   10 │       <el-menu
   11 │         :default-active="activeMenu"
   12 │         mode="vertical"

   16 │         active-text-color="#409eff"
   17 │         :collapse="isCollapse"

   19 │         <template v-for="menu in menuList" :key="menu.path">
   20 │           <el-sub-menu :index="menu.path">
   21 │             <template #title>
   22 │               <el-icon><component :is="menu.icon" /></el-icon>
   23 │               <span>{{ menu.name }}</span>
   24 │             </template>
   25 │             <el-menu-item
   26 │               v-for="sub in menu.children"
   27 │               :key="sub.path"

   29 │               @click="handleMenuClick(sub.path)"

   34 │         </template>
   35 │       </el-menu>

   38 │       </div>
   39 │     </aside>
   40 │     <main class="main-content">

   70 │ import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'

  156 │ 
  157 │ const activeMenu = computed(() => {

   56 │   { id: 'S001', name: '节日庆典模式', description: '全亮度照明，营造节日氛围', brightness: 100, duration: null, enabled: true },
   57 │   { id: 'S002', name: '节能模式', description: '降低亮度至50%，节省电能', brightness: 50, duration: null, enabled: true },
   58 │   { id: 'S003', name: '深夜模式', description: '凌晨2点后降低亮度', brightness: 30, duration: '02:00-05:00', enabled: true },
   59 │   { id: 'S004', name: '应急模式', description: '突发情况全亮照明', brightness: 100, duration: null, enabled: false },
   60 │   { id: 'S005', name: '雾霾模式', description: '提高亮度应对低能见度', brightness: 90, duration: null, enabled: true }
   61 │ ]
   62 │

   65 │   { id: 'SCH002', name: '周末全亮模式', templateId: 'S001', scheduleType: 'weekend', time: '18:00', enabled: true },

📄 router/index.js


    1 │ import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'
    2 │ 
    3 │ const routes = [
    4 │   {
    5 │     path: '/',
    6 │     redirect: '/tunnel/home'
    7 │   },
    8 │   {
    9 │     path: '/tunnel',
   10 │     name: 'tunnel',
   11 │     redirect: '/tunnel/home',
   12 │     children: [
   13 │       {
   14 │         path: 'home',
   15 │         name: 'tunnel-home',
   16 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/TunnelHome.vue')
   17 │       },
   18 │       {
   19 │         path: 'list',
   20 │         name: 'tunnel-list',
   21 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/TunnelList.vue')
   22 │       },
   23 │       {
   24 │         path: 'detail/:id',
   25 │         name: 'tunnel-detail',
   26 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/TunnelDetail.vue')
   27 │       },
   28 │       {
   29 │         path: 'section',
   30 │         name: 'tunnel-section',
   31 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/TunnelSection.vue')
   32 │       },
   33 │       {
   34 │         path: 'environment',
   35 │         name: 'tunnel-environment',
   36 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/EnvironmentMonitor.vue')
   37 │       },
   38 │       {
   39 │         path: 'lighting',
   40 │         name: 'tunnel-lighting',
   41 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/LightingControl.vue')
   42 │       },
   43 │       {
   44 │         path: 'section-manage',
   45 │         name: 'tunnel-section-manage',
   46 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/SectionManage.vue')
   47 │       },
   48 │       {
   49 │         path: 'time-schedule',
   50 │         name: 'tunnel-time-schedule',
   51 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/TimeSchedule.vue')
   52 │       },
   53 │       {
   54 │         path: 'circuit-group',
   55 │         name: 'tunnel-circuit-group',
   56 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/CircuitGroup.vue')
   57 │       },
   58 │       {
   59 │         path: 'lamp-manage',
   60 │         name: 'tunnel-lamp-manage',
   61 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/LampManage.vue')
   62 │       },
   63 │       {
   64 │         path: 'fitting-manage',
   65 │         name: 'tunnel-fitting-manage',
   66 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/FittingManage.vue')
   67 │       },
   68 │       {
   69 │         path: 'ventilation',
   70 │         name: 'tunnel-ventilation',
   71 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/VentilationControl.vue')
   72 │       },
   73 │       {
   74 │         path: 'fire',
   75 │         name: 'tunnel-fire',
   76 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/FireControl.vue')
   77 │       },
   78 │       {
   79 │         path: 'energy',
   80 │         name: 'tunnel-energy',
   81 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/EnergyStatistics.vue')
   82 │       },
   83 │       {
   84 │         path: 'alarm',
   85 │         name: 'tunnel-alarm',
   86 │         component: () => import('@/views/tunnel/AlarmManage.vue')
   87 │       }
   88 │     ]
   89 │   },
   90 │   {
   91 │     path: '/power',
   92 │     name: 'power',
   93 │     redirect: '/power/distribution',
   94 │     children: [
   95 │       {
   96 │         path: 'distribution',
   97 │         name: 'power-distribution',
   98 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/DistributionBox.vue')
   99 │       },
  100 │       {
  101 │         path: 'line',
  102 │         name: 'power-line',
  103 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/LineInfo.vue')
  104 │       },
  105 │       {
  106 │         path: 'central',
  107 │         name: 'power-central',
  108 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/CentralControl.vue')
  109 │       },
  110 │       {
  111 │         path: 'circuit',
  112 │         name: 'power-circuit',
  113 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/CircuitControl.vue')
  114 │       },
  115 │       {
  116 │         path: 'load',
  117 │         name: 'power-load',
  118 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue')
  119 │       },
  120 │       {
  121 │         path: 'module',
  122 │         name: 'power-module',
  123 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue')
  124 │       },
  125 │       {
  126 │         path: 'strong-electric',
  127 │         name: 'power-strong-electric',
  128 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue')
  129 │       },
  130 │       {
  131 │         path: 'history-scene',
  132 │         name: 'power-history-scene',
  133 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/HistoryScene.vue')
  134 │       },
  135 │       {
  136 │         path: 'circuit-group',
  137 │         name: 'power-circuit-group',
  138 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue')
  139 │       },
  140 │       {
  141 │         path: 'lamp-control-bind',
  142 │         name: 'power-lamp-control-bind',
  143 │         component: () => import('@/views/power/LampControlBind.vue')
  144 │       }
  145 │     ]
  146 │   },
  147 │   {
  148 │     path: '/scene',
  149 │     name: 'scene',
  150 │     redirect: '/scene/quick-operation',
  151 │     children: [
  152 │       {
  153 │         path: 'quick-operation',
  154 │         name: 'scene-quick-operation',
  155 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue')
  156 │       },
  157 │       {
  158 │         path: 'manage',
  159 │         name: 'scene-manage',
  160 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/SceneManage.vue')
  161 │       },
  162 │       {
  163 │         path: 'linkage',
  164 │         name: 'scene-linkage',
  165 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue')
  166 │       },
  167 │       {
  168 │         path: 'linkage-manage',
  169 │         name: 'scene-linkage-manage',
  170 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue')
  171 │       },
  172 │       {
  173 │         path: 'template',
  174 │         name: 'scene-template',
  175 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue')
  176 │       },
  177 │       {
  178 │         path: 'trigger',
  179 │         name: 'scene-trigger',
  180 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue')
  181 │       },
  182 │       {
  183 │         path: 'schedule',
  184 │         name: 'scene-schedule',
  185 │         component: () => import('@/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue')
  186 │       }
  187 │     ]
  188 │   }
  189 │ ]
  190 │ 
  191 │ const router = createRouter({
  192 │   history: createWebHistory(),
  193 │   routes
  194 │ })
  195 │ 
  196 │ export default router
  197 │

📄 views/lighting/GisMap.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">GIS地图</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-input
    7 │           v-model="searchText"
    8 │           placeholder="按IMEI号或名称搜索"
    9 │           style="width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;"
   10 │           clearable
   11 │         >
   12 │           <template #prefix>
   13 │             <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   14 │           </template>
   15 │         </el-input>
   16 │         <el-button @click="refreshMap">
   17 │           <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   18 │           刷新
   19 │         </el-button>
   20 │       </div>
   21 │     </div>
   22 │ 
   23 │     <div class="map-container">
   24 │       <div class="map-toolbar">
   25 │         <div class="toolbar-left">
   26 │           <el-radio-group v-model="statusFilter" size="default">
   27 │             <el-radio-button label="all">全部</el-radio-button>
   28 │             <el-radio-button label="on">开灯</el-radio-button>
   29 │             <el-radio-button label="off">关灯</el-radio-button>
   30 │             <el-radio-button label="alert">告警</el-radio-button>
   31 │             <el-radio-button label="offline">离线</el-radio-button>
   32 │           </el-radio-group>
   33 │         </div>
   34 │         <div class="toolbar-right">
   35 │           <el-radio-group v-model="mapMode" size="small">
   36 │             <el-radio-button label="satellite">卫星</el-radio-button>
   37 │             <el-radio-button label="2d">2D</el-radio-button>
   38 │             <el-radio-button label="3d">3D</el-radio-button>
   39 │           </el-radio-group>
   40 │         </div>
   41 │       </div>
   42 │ 
   43 │       <div class="map-content">
   44 │         <div class="map-area">
   45 │           <div class="map-placeholder">
   46 │             <div class="map-grid">
   47 │               <div
   48 │                 v-for="(light, index) in filteredLights"
   49 │                 :key="light.id"
   50 │                 class="map-light"
   51 │                 :class="getLightClass(light.status)"
   52 │                 :style="getLightPosition(index)"
   53 │                 @click="showLightDetail(light)"
   54 │               >
   55 │                 <div class="light-icon">
   56 │                   <el-icon><Sunrise /></el-icon>
   57 │                 </div>
   58 │                 <div class="light-info">
   59 │                   <span class="light-name">{{ light.name }}</span>
   60 │                   <span class="light-status">{{ getStatusText(light.status) }}</span>
   61 │                 </div>
   62 │               </div>
   63 │             </div>
   64 │             <div class="map-legend">
   65 │               <div class="legend-title">图例</div>
   66 │               <div class="legend-items">
   67 │                 <div class="legend-item">
   68 │                   <span class="legend-dot online"></span>
   69 │                   <span>在线开灯</span>
   70 │                 </div>
   71 │                 <div class="legend-item">
   72 │                   <span class="legend-dot offline-off"></span>
   73 │                   <span>在线关灯</span>
   74 │                 </div>
   75 │                 <div class="legend-item">
   76 │                   <span class="legend-dot alert"></span>
   77 │                   <span>告警</span>
   78 │                 </div>
   79 │                 <div class="legend-item">
   80 │                   <span class="legend-dot offline"></span>
   81 │                   <span>离线</span>
   82 │                 </div>
   83 │               </div>
   84 │             </div>
   85 │           </div>
   86 │         </div>
   87 │ 
   88 │         <div class="map-sidebar">
   89 │           <div class="sidebar-section">
   90 │             <div class="section-title">设备统计</div>
   91 │             <div class="stat-list">
   92 │               <div class="stat-item">
   93 │                 <span class="stat-dot online"></span>
   94 │                 <span class="stat-label">在线</span>
   95 │                 <span class="stat-value">{{ stats.online }}</span>
   96 │               </div>
   97 │               <div class="stat-item">
   98 │                 <span class="stat-dot offline"></span>
   99 │                 <span class="stat-label">离线</span>
  100 │                 <span class="stat-value">{{ stats.offline }}</span>
  101 │               </div>
  102 │               <div class="stat-item">
  103 │                 <span class="stat-dot alert"></span>
  104 │                 <span class="stat-label">告警</span>
  105 │                 <span class="stat-value">{{ stats.alert }}</span>
  106 │               </div>
  107 │             </div>
  108 │           </div>
  109 │ 
  110 │           <div class="sidebar-section">
  111 │             <div class="section-title">快捷操作</div>
  112 │             <div class="quick-actions">
  113 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="batchControl('on')">
  114 │                 <el-icon><Sunrise /></el-icon>
  115 │                 批量开灯
  116 │               </el-button>
  117 │               <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="batchControl('off')">
  118 │                 <el-icon><Moon /></el-icon>
  119 │                 批量关灯
  120 │               </el-button>
  121 │               <el-button size="small" @click="showTimedControl = true">
  122 │                 <el-icon><Timer /></el-icon>
  123 │                 定时控制
  124 │               </el-button>
  125 │             </div>
  126 │           </div>
  127 │ 
  128 │           <div class="sidebar-section">
  129 │             <div class="section-title">选中设备信息</div>
  130 │             <div v-if="selectedLight" class="device-info">
  131 │               <div class="info-item">
  132 │                 <span class="info-label">设备名称</span>
  133 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.name }}</span>
  134 │               </div>
  135 │               <div class="info-item">
  136 │                 <span class="info-label">IMEI号</span>
  137 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.imei }}</span>
  138 │               </div>
  139 │               <div class="info-item">
  140 │                 <span class="info-label">状态</span>
  141 │                 <span class="info-value" :class="'status-' + selectedLight.status">
  142 │                   {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }}
  143 │                 </span>
  144 │               </div>
  145 │               <div class="info-item">
  146 │                 <span class="info-label">亮度</span>
  147 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.brightness }}%</span>
  148 │               </div>
  149 │               <div class="info-item">
  150 │                 <span class="info-label">电压</span>
  151 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.voltage }}V</span>
  152 │               </div>
  153 │               <div class="info-item">
  154 │                 <span class="info-label">电流</span>
  155 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.current }}A</span>
  156 │               </div>
  157 │               <div class="info-item">
  158 │                 <span class="info-label">功率</span>
  159 │                 <span class="info-value">{{ selectedLight.power }}W</span>
  160 │               </div>
  161 │               <div class="action-buttons">
  162 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="controlLight(selectedLight, 'on')">
  163 │                   开灯
  164 │                 </el-button>
  165 │                 <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="controlLight(selectedLight, 'off')">
  166 │                   关灯
  167 │                 </el-button>
  168 │                 <el-button size="small" @click="showBrightnessDialog(selectedLight)">
  169 │                   调光
  170 │                 </el-button>
  171 │               </div>
  172 │             </div>
  173 │             <div v-else class="no-selection">
  174 │               <span>点击地图上的路灯查看详情</span>
  175 │             </div>
  176 │           </div>
  177 │         </div>
  178 │       </div>
  179 │     </div>
  180 │ 
  181 │     <el-dialog v-model="showTimedControl" title="定时控制" width="500px">
  182 │       <el-form :model="timedForm" label-width="100px">
  183 │         <el-form-item label="控制类型">
  184 │           <el-radio-group v-model="timedForm.type">
  185 │             <el-radio label="on">开灯</el-radio>
  186 │             <el-radio label="off">关灯</el-radio>
  187 │             <el-radio label="dim">调光</el-radio>
  188 │           </el-radio-group>
  189 │         </el-form-item>
  190 │         <el-form-item label="执行时间">
  191 │           <el-time-picker v-model="timedForm.time" format="HH:mm" placeholder="选择时间" style="width: 100%;" />
  192 │         </el-form-item>
  193 │         <el-form-item v-if="timedForm.type === 'dim'" label="亮度值">
  194 │           <el-slider v-model="timedForm.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  195 │         </el-form-item>
  196 │         <el-form-item label="重复">
  197 │           <el-checkbox-group v-model="timedForm.days">
  198 │             <el-checkbox label="1">周一</el-checkbox>
  199 │             <el-checkbox label="2">周二</el-checkbox>
  200 │             <el-checkbox label="3">周三</el-checkbox>
  201 │             <el-checkbox label="4">周四</el-checkbox>
  202 │             <el-checkbox label="5">周五</el-checkbox>
  203 │             <el-checkbox label="6">周六</el-checkbox>
  204 │             <el-checkbox label="0">周日</el-checkbox>
  205 │           </el-checkbox-group>
  206 │         </el-form-item>
  207 │       </el-form>
  208 │       <template #footer>
  209 │         <el-button @click="showTimedControl = false">取消</el-button>
  210 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitTimedControl">确定</el-button>
  211 │       </template>
  212 │     </el-dialog>
  213 │ 
  214 │     <el-dialog v-model="showBrightness" title="亮度调节" width="400px">
  215 │       <div class="brightness-control">
  216 │         <el-slider v-model="brightnessValue" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  217 │       </div>
  218 │       <template #footer>
  219 │         <el-button @click="showBrightness = false">取消</el-button>
  220 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitBrightness">确定</el-button>
  221 │       </template>
  222 │     </el-dialog>
  223 │   </div>
  224 │ </template>
  225 │ 
  226 │ <script setup>
  227 │ import { ref, computed, reactive } from 'vue'
  228 │ import { Search, Refresh, Sunrise, Moon, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  229 │ 
  230 │ const searchText = ref('')
  231 │ const statusFilter = ref('all')
  232 │ const mapMode = ref('2d')
  233 │ const selectedLight = ref(null)
  234 │ const showTimedControl = ref(false)
  235 │ const showBrightness = ref(false)
  236 │ const brightnessValue = ref(80)
  237 │ 
  238 │ const timedForm = reactive({
  239 │   type: 'on',
  240 │   time: '',
  241 │   brightness: 80,
  242 │   days: []
  243 │ })
  244 │ 
  245 │ const lights = ref([
  246 │   { id: 1, name: '中山路01号灯', imei: '861234567890001', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 10, y: 15 },
  247 │   { id: 2, name: '中山路02号灯', imei: '861234567890002', status: 'online-on', brightness: 80, voltage: 218, current: 2.0, power: 440, x: 25, y: 15 },
  248 │   { id: 3, name: '人民路01号灯', imei: '861234567890003', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 40, y: 30 },
  249 │   { id: 4, name: '人民路02号灯', imei: '861234567890004', status: 'alert', brightness: 60, voltage: 180, current: 1.5, power: 330, x: 55, y: 30 },
  250 │   { id: 5, name: '解放路01号灯', imei: '861234567890005', status: 'offline', brightness: 0, voltage: 0, current: 0, power: 0, x: 70, y: 45 },
  251 │   { id: 6, name: '解放路02号灯', imei: '861234567890006', status: 'online-on', brightness: 90, voltage: 219, current: 2.2, power: 484, x: 85, y: 45 },
  252 │   { id: 7, name: '公园路01号灯', imei: '861234567890007', status: 'online-on', brightness: 70, voltage: 221, current: 1.8, power: 396, x: 15, y: 60 },
  253 │   { id: 8, name: '公园路02号灯', imei: '861234567890008', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 30, y: 60 },
  254 │   { id: 9, name: '文化路01号灯', imei: '861234567890009', status: 'alert', brightness: 50, voltage: 160, current: 1.2, power: 264, x: 45, y: 75 },
  255 │   { id: 10, name: '文化路02号灯', imei: '861234567890010', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 60, y: 75 }
  256 │ ])
  257 │ 
  258 │ const stats = computed(() => {
  259 │   const result = { online: 0, offline: 0, alert: 0 }
  260 │   lights.value.forEach(light => {
  261 │     if (light.status === 'offline') result.offline++
  262 │     else if (light.status === 'alert') result.alert++
  263 │     else result.online++
  264 │   })
  265 │   return result
  266 │ })
  267 │ 
  268 │ const filteredLights = computed(() => {
  269 │   if (!searchText.value) {
  270 │     if (statusFilter.value === 'all') return lights.value
  271 │     return lights.value.filter(l => l.status.startsWith(statusFilter.value))
  272 │   }
  273 │   return lights.value.filter(l => 
  274 │     l.name.includes(searchText.value) || l.imei.includes(searchText.value)
  275 │   )
  276 │ })
  277 │ 
  278 │ const getLightClass = (status) => {
  279 │   const classMap = {
  280 │     'online-on': 'light-on',
  281 │     'online-off': 'light-off',
  282 │     'alert': 'light-alert',
  283 │     'offline': 'light-offline'
  284 │   }
  285 │   return classMap[status] || ''
  286 │ }
  287 │ 
  288 │ const getLightPosition = (index) => {
  289 │   const light = filteredLights.value[index]
  290 │   if (light) {
  291 │     return { left: light.x + '%', top: light.y + '%' }
  292 │   }
  293 │   return {}
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ const getStatusText = (status) => {
  297 │   const textMap = {
  298 │     'online-on': '在线-开灯',
  299 │     'online-off': '在线-关灯',
  300 │     'alert': '告警',
  301 │     'offline': '离线'
  302 │   }
  303 │   return textMap[status] || status
  304 │ }
  305 │ 
  306 │ const showLightDetail = (light) => {
  307 │   selectedLight.value = light
  308 │ }
  309 │ 
  310 │ const controlLight = (light, action) => {
  311 │   if (action === 'on') {
  312 │     light.status = 'online-on'
  313 │   } else {
  314 │     light.status = 'online-off'
  315 │   }
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ const showBrightnessDialog = (light) => {
  319 │   brightnessValue.value = light.brightness
  320 │   showBrightness.value = true
  321 │ }
  322 │ 
  323 │ const submitBrightness = () => {
  324 │   if (selectedLight.value) {
  325 │     selectedLight.value.brightness = brightnessValue.value
  326 │     if (brightnessValue.value > 0) {
  327 │       selectedLight.value.status = 'online-on'
  328 │     } else {
  329 │       selectedLight.value.status = 'online-off'
  330 │     }
  331 │   }
  332 │   showBrightness.value = false
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ const batchControl = (action) => {
  336 │   lights.value.forEach(light => {
  337 │     if (light.status !== 'offline') {
  338 │       if (action === 'on') {
  339 │         light.status = 'online-on'
  340 │       } else {
  341 │         light.status = 'online-off'
  342 │       }
  343 │     }
  344 │   })
  345 │ }
  346 │ 
  347 │ const submitTimedControl = () => {
  348 │   console.log('定时控制配置:', timedForm)
  349 │   showTimedControl.value = false
  350 │   ElMessage.success('定时控制已设置')
  351 │ }
  352 │ 
  353 │ const refreshMap = () => {
  354 │   console.log('刷新地图')
  355 │ }
  356 │ 
  357 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  358 │ </script>
  359 │ 
  360 │ <style scoped>
  361 │ .map-container {
  362 │   background: #fff;
  363 │   border-radius: 4px;
  364 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  365 │ }
  366 │ 
  367 │ .map-toolbar {
  368 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  369 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  370 │   display: flex;
  371 │   justify-content: space-between;
  372 │   align-items: center;
  373 │ }
  374 │ 
  375 │ .map-content {
  376 │   display: flex;
  377 │   height: calc(100vh - 300px);
  378 │ }
  379 │ 
  380 │ .map-area {
  381 │   flex: 1;
  382 │   position: relative;
  383 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #e4e8eb 100%);
  384 │ }
  385 │ 
  386 │ .map-placeholder {
  387 │   width: 100%;
  388 │   height: 100%;
  389 │   position: relative;
  390 │ }
  391 │ 
  392 │ .map-grid {
  393 │   width: 100%;
  394 │   height: 100%;
  395 │   position: relative;
  396 │ }
  397 │ 
  398 │ .map-light {
  399 │   position: absolute;
  400 │   transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  401 │   cursor: pointer;
  402 │   transition: transform 0.2s;
  403 │ }
  404 │ 
  405 │ .map-light:hover {
  406 │   transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1);
  407 │ }
  408 │ 
  409 │ .light-icon {
  410 │   width: 40px;
  411 │   height: 40px;
  412 │   border-radius: 50%;
  413 │   display: flex;
  414 │   align-items: center;
  415 │   justify-content: center;
  416 │   font-size: 20px;
  417 │   margin-bottom: 5px;
  418 │ }
  419 │ 
  420 │ .light-on .light-icon {
  421 │   background: #52c41a;
  422 │   color: #fff;
  423 │   box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(82, 196, 26, 0.5);
  424 │ }
  425 │ 
  426 │ .light-off .light-icon {
  427 │   background: #d9d9d9;
  428 │   color: #666;
  429 │ }
  430 │ 
  431 │ .light-alert .light-icon {
  432 │   background: #f5222d;
  433 │   color: #fff;
  434 │   animation: blink 1s infinite;
  435 │ }
  436 │ 
  437 │ .light-offline .light-icon {
  438 │   background: #8c8c8c;
  439 │   color: #fff;
  440 │ }
  441 │ 
  442 │ @keyframes blink {
  443 │   0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  444 │   50% { opacity: 0.5; }
  445 │ }
  446 │ 
  447 │ .light-info {
  448 │   text-align: center;
  449 │   font-size: 12px;
  450 │ }
  451 │ 
  452 │ .light-name {
  453 │   display: block;
  454 │   color: #333;
  455 │   font-weight: 500;
  456 │ }
  457 │ 
  458 │ .light-status {
  459 │   color: #666;
  460 │ }
  461 │ 
  462 │ .map-legend {
  463 │   position: absolute;
  464 │   bottom: 20px;
  465 │   left: 20px;
  466 │   background: #fff;
  467 │   padding: 15px;
  468 │   border-radius: 4px;
  469 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  470 │ }
  471 │ 
  472 │ .legend-title {
  473 │   font-weight: 600;
  474 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  475 │   color: #333;
  476 │ }
  477 │ 
  478 │ .legend-items {
  479 │   display: flex;
  480 │   flex-direction: column;
  481 │   gap: 8px;
  482 │ }
  483 │ 
  484 │ .legend-item {

  489 │ }

  512 │ 
  513 │ .map-sidebar {

  516 │   border-left: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  517 │   padding: 15px;
  518 │   overflow-y: auto;
  519 │ }
  520 │ 
  521 │ .sidebar-section {

  523 │ }

  525 │ .section-title {
  526 │   font-weight: 600;

  529 │   margin-bottom: 15px;

  532 │ }
  533 │ 
  534 │ .stat-list {

  540 │ .stat-item {
  541 │   display: flex;

  546 │   border-radius: 4px;
  547 │ }

  577 │ .quick-actions {
