📄 views/lighting/GroupManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="left-sidebar">
    5 │         <div class="sidebar-header">
    6 │           <el-input
    7 │             v-model="searchTreeText"
    8 │             placeholder="请输入层级名称"
    9 │             class="sidebar-search"
   10 │           >
   11 │             <template #prefix>
   12 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   13 │             </template>
   14 │           </el-input>
   15 │         </div>
   16 │         <el-tree
   17 │           :data="treeData"
   18 │           :props="defaultProps"
   19 │           show-checkbox
   20 │           node-key="id"
   21 │           :expand-on-click-node="false"
   22 │           @check-change="handleCheckChange"
   23 │         />
   24 │       </div>
   25 │ 
   26 │       <div class="right-content">
   27 │         <div class="page-header">
   28 │           <div class="title">分组管理</div>
   29 │           <div class="header-actions">
   30 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="showAddDialog = true">
   31 │               <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
   32 │               新增
   33 │             </el-button>
   34 │             <el-button @click="refreshData">
   35 │               <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   36 │               刷新
   37 │             </el-button>
   38 │             <el-button type="success" @click="handleExport">
   39 │               <el-icon><Download /></el-icon>
   40 │               导出
   41 │             </el-button>
   42 │             <el-button type="danger" @click="batchDelete" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">
   43 │               <el-icon><Delete /></el-icon>
   44 │               删除
   45 │             </el-button>
   46 │           </div>
   47 │         </div>
   48 │ 
   49 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   50 │           <el-input
   51 │             v-model="filters.search"
   52 │             placeholder="请输入分组名称"
   53 │             class="filter-input"
   54 │           >
   55 │             <template #prefix>
   56 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   57 │             </template>
   58 │           </el-input>
   59 │           <el-select v-model="filters.type" placeholder="请选择分组类型" class="filter-select">
   60 │             <el-option label="全部类型" value="" />
   61 │             <el-option label="路段分组" value="road" />
   62 │             <el-option label="功能分组" value="function" />
   63 │             <el-option label="自定义分组" value="custom" />
   64 │           </el-select>
   65 │           <el-select v-model="filters.hierarchy" placeholder="请选择所属区域" class="filter-select">
   66 │             <el-option label="全部区域" value="" />
   67 │             <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道" value="xiandao" />
   68 │             <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道1栋" value="liwei" />
   69 │           </el-select>
   70 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="searchGroups">查询</el-button>
   71 │           <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   72 │         </div>
   73 │ 
   74 │         <el-table
   75 │           :data="filteredGroups"
   76 │           border
   77 │           @selection-change="handleSelectionChange"
   78 │         >
   79 │           <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   80 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="60" align="center" />
   81 │           <el-table-column prop="name" label="分组名称" min-width="180" />
   82 │           <el-table-column prop="type" label="分组类型" width="120" align="center">
   83 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   84 │               <el-tag :type="getTypeTagType(row.type)" size="small">{{ getTypeText(row.type) }}</el-tag>
   85 │             </template>
   86 │           </el-table-column>
   87 │           <el-table-column prop="hierarchy" label="所属区域" min-width="180">
   88 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   89 │               {{ getHierarchyText(row.hierarchy) }}
   90 │             </template>
   91 │           </el-table-column>
   92 │           <el-table-column prop="lampCount" label="关联灯具数" width="110" align="center">
   93 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   94 │               <span class="lamp-count" @click="showLampDialog(row)">
   95 │                 {{ row.lampCount }}
   96 │                 <el-icon><View /></el-icon>
   97 │               </span>
   98 │             </template>
   99 │           </el-table-column>
  100 │           <el-table-column prop="createTime" label="创建时间" width="160" />
  101 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="300" fixed="right" align="center">
  102 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  103 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="viewLamps(row)">查看关联</el-button>
  104 │               <el-button type="success" size="small" @click="editGroup(row)">编辑</el-button>
  105 │               <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="batchControl(row)">批量控制</el-button>
  106 │               <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="deleteGroup(row)">删除</el-button>
  107 │             </template>
  108 │           </el-table-column>
  109 │         </el-table>
  110 │ 
  111 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
  112 │           <el-pagination
  113 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  114 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  115 │             :total="total"
  116 │             :page-sizes="[10, 20, 30, 50]"
  117 │             layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  118 │           />
  119 │         </div>
  120 │       </div>
  121 │     </div>
  122 │ 
  123 │     <el-dialog v-model="showAddDialog" :title="isEdit ? '编辑分组' : '新增分组'" width="900px" @close="resetForm">
  124 │       <el-form ref="formRef" :model="form" :rules="rules" label-width="110px">
  125 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  126 │           <el-col :span="12">
  127 │             <el-form-item label="分组名称" prop="name">
  128 │               <el-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="请输入分组名称" />
  129 │             </el-form-item>
  130 │           </el-col>
  131 │           <el-col :span="12">
  132 │             <el-form-item label="分组类型" prop="type">
  133 │               <el-select v-model="form.type" placeholder="请选择分组类型" style="width: 100%">
  134 │                 <el-option label="路段分组" value="road" />
  135 │                 <el-option label="功能分组" value="function" />
  136 │                 <el-option label="自定义分组" value="custom" />
  137 │               </el-select>
  138 │             </el-form-item>
  139 │           </el-col>
  140 │         </el-row>
  141 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  142 │           <el-col :span="12">
  143 │             <el-form-item label="所属区域" prop="hierarchy">
  144 │               <el-select v-model="form.hierarchy" placeholder="请选择所属区域" style="width: 100%">
  145 │                 <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道" value="xiandao" />
  146 │                 <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道1栋" value="liwei" />
  147 │               </el-select>
  148 │             </el-form-item>
  149 │           </el-col>
  150 │           <el-col :span="12">
  151 │             <el-form-item label="备注信息">
  152 │               <el-input v-model="form.remark" placeholder="请输入备注信息" />
  153 │             </el-form-item>
  154 │           </el-col>
  155 │         </el-row>
  156 │         
  157 │         <el-form-item label="选择灯具">
  158 │           <div class="lamp-selector">
  159 │             <div class="selector-left">
  160 │               <div class="selector-header">
  161 │                 <el-input
  162 │                   v-model="leftSearch"
  163 │                   placeholder="请输入灯具名称或编号"
  164 │                   class="search-input"
  165 │                 />
  166 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="searchLeftLamps">查询</el-button>
  167 │                 <el-button size="small" @click="resetLeftSearch">重置</el-button>
  168 │               </div>
  169 │               <el-table
  170 │                 :data="availableLamps"
  171 │                 border
  172 │                 size="small"
  173 │                 height="280"
  174 │                 @selection-change="handleLeftSelection"
  175 │               >
  176 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="40" />
  177 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="50" align="center" />
  178 │                 <el-table-column prop="code" label="灯具编号" min-width="100" />
  179 │                 <el-table-column prop="name" label="灯具名称" min-width="100" />
  180 │                 <el-table-column prop="poleName" label="所属灯杆" min-width="100" />
  181 │               </el-table>
  182 │             </div>
  183 │             
  184 │             <div class="selector-buttons">
  185 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="addSelectedLamps">
  186 │                 <el-icon><ArrowRight /></el-icon>
  187 │               </el-button>
  188 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="removeSelectedLamps">
  189 │                 <el-icon><ArrowLeft /></el-icon>
  190 │               </el-button>
  191 │             </div>
  192 │             
  193 │             <div class="selector-right">
  194 │               <div class="selector-header">
  195 │                 <el-input
  196 │                   v-model="rightSearch"
  197 │                   placeholder="请输入灯具名称或编号"
  198 │                   class="search-input"
  199 │                 />
  200 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="searchRightLamps">查询</el-button>
  201 │                 <el-button size="small" @click="resetRightSearch">重置</el-button>
  202 │               </div>
  203 │               <div class="selected-count">已选灯具：{{ selectedLampIds.length }}</div>
  204 │               <el-table
  205 │                 :data="selectedLamps"
  206 │                 border
  207 │                 size="small"
  208 │                 height="240"
  209 │                 @selection-change="handleRightSelection"
  210 │               >
  211 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="40" />
  212 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="50" align="center" />
  213 │                 <el-table-column prop="code" label="灯具编号" min-width="100" />
  214 │                 <el-table-column prop="name" label="灯具名称" min-width="100" />
  215 │                 <el-table-column prop="poleName" label="所属灯杆" min-width="100" />
  216 │               </el-table>
  217 │             </div>
  218 │           </div>
  219 │         </el-form-item>
  220 │       </el-form>
  221 │       <template #footer>
  222 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  223 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确定</el-button>
  224 │       </template>
  225 │     </el-dialog>
  226 │ 
  227 │     <el-dialog v-model="showLampListDialog" title="关联灯具列表" width="800px">
  228 │       <el-table :data="currentGroupLamps" border>
  229 │         <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="60" align="center" />
  230 │         <el-table-column prop="code" label="灯具编号" min-width="120" />
  231 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="灯具名称" min-width="120" />
  232 │         <el-table-column prop="poleName" label="所属灯杆" min-width="120" />
  233 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="灯具状态" width="90" align="center">
  234 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  235 │             <el-tag :type="row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">
  236 │               {{ row.status === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}
  237 │             </el-tag>
  238 │           </template>
  239 │         </el-table-column>
  240 │         <el-table-column prop="networkStatus" label="网络状态" width="90" align="center">
  241 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  242 │             <el-tag :type="row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  243 │               {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
  244 │             </el-tag>
  245 │           </template>
  246 │         </el-table-column>
  247 │       </el-table>
  248 │       <template #footer>
  249 │         <el-button @click="showLampListDialog = false">关闭</el-button>
  250 │       </template>
  251 │     </el-dialog>
  252 │ 
  253 │     <el-dialog v-model="showControlDialog" title="分组批量控制" width="500px">
  254 │       <div class="control-content">
  255 │         <div class="control-item">
  256 │           <span class="control-label">操作类型：</span>
  257 │           <el-radio-group v-model="controlType">
  258 │             <el-radio label="on">开灯</el-radio>
  259 │             <el-radio label="off">关灯</el-radio>
  260 │             <el-radio label="dim">调光</el-radio>
  261 │           </el-radio-group>
  262 │         </div>
  263 │         <div class="control-item" v-if="controlType === 'dim'">
  264 │           <span class="control-label">亮度值：</span>
  265 │           <el-slider v-model="brightnessValue" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  266 │         </div>
  267 │       </div>
  268 │       <template #footer>
  269 │         <el-button @click="showControlDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  270 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitControl">确定</el-button>
  271 │       </template>
  272 │     </el-dialog>
  273 │   </div>
  274 │ </template>
  275 │ 
  276 │ <script setup>
  277 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  278 │ import { Plus, Refresh, Download, Delete, Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, View } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  279 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  280 │ 
  281 │ const searchTreeText = ref('')
  282 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  283 │ const pageSize = ref(20)
  284 │ const total = ref(5)
  285 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false)
  286 │ const showLampListDialog = ref(false)
  287 │ const showControlDialog = ref(false)
  288 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  289 │ const formRef = ref(null)
  290 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  291 │ const leftSearch = ref('')
  292 │ const rightSearch = ref('')
  293 │ const controlType = ref('on')
  294 │ const brightnessValue = ref(80)
  295 │ 
  296 │ const defaultProps = {
  297 │   children: 'children',
  298 │   label: 'label'
  299 │ }
  300 │ 
  301 │ const treeData = ref([
  302 │   {
  303 │     id: 1,
  304 │     label: '长沙',
  305 │     children: [
  306 │       { 
  307 │         id: 11, 
  308 │         label: '岳麓区',
  309 │         children: [
  310 │           { id: 111, label: '梅溪湖隧道' },
  311 │           { id: 112, label: '梅溪湖隧道1栋' }
  312 │         ]
  313 │       }
  314 │     ]
  315 │   }
  316 │ ])
  317 │ 
  318 │ const filters = reactive({
  319 │   search: '',
  320 │   type: '',
  321 │   hierarchy: ''
  322 │ })
  323 │ 
  324 │ const form = reactive({
  325 │   name: '',
  326 │   type: 'road',
  327 │   hierarchy: '',
  328 │   remark: ''
  329 │ })
  330 │ 
  331 │ const rules = {
  332 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  333 │   type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择分组类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  334 │   hierarchy: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属区域', trigger: 'change' }]
  335 │ }
  336 │ 
  337 │ const allLamps = ref([
  338 │   { id: 1, no: 1, code: '862715067560391', name: '光亚展灯具', poleName: '光亚展灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' },
  339 │   { id: 2, no: 2, code: '863123069184162', name: '1号楼-极简07', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' },
  340 │   { id: 3, no: 3, code: '863123069133946', name: '宿舍楼02', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  341 │   { id: 4, no: 4, code: '863123069031165', name: '3号楼-极简13', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  342 │   { id: 5, no: 5, code: '863123069267413', name: '食堂-极简18辅路', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  343 │   { id: 6, no: 6, code: '863123069265714', name: '食堂-极简18', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  344 │   { id: 7, no: 7, code: '863123069201446', name: '食堂-极简17', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  345 │   { id: 8, no: 8, code: '864900066365673', name: '0104Z11', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' },
  346 │   { id: 9, no: 9, code: '862715067560392', name: '梅溪湖隧道路灯1', poleName: '梅溪湖隧道1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' },
  347 │   { id: 10, no: 10, code: '862715067560393', name: '梅溪湖隧道路灯2', poleName: '梅溪湖隧道2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' },
  348 │   { id: 11, no: 11, code: '862715067560394', name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋路灯1', poleName: '梅溪湖隧道1栋1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' },
  349 │   { id: 12, no: 12, code: '862715067560395', name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋路灯2', poleName: '梅溪湖隧道1栋2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }
  350 │ ])
  351 │ 
  352 │ const groups = ref([
  353 │   { id: 1, no: 1, name: '梅溪湖隧道主干道路灯分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 5, createTime: '2024-01-15 10:30:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 9, 10] },
  354 │   { id: 2, no: 2, name: '梅溪湖隧道景观灯分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-01-20 14:20:00', remark: '', lampIds: [2, 3, 4] },
  355 │   { id: 3, no: 3, name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋照明分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 4, createTime: '2024-02-01 09:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [11, 12, 5, 6] },
  356 │   { id: 4, no: 4, name: '园区节假日专用', type: 'custom', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 2, createTime: '2024-02-10 16:45:00', remark: '', lampIds: [7, 8] },
  357 │   { id: 5, no: 5, name: '展厅演示分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-03-01 11:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 2, 3] }
  358 │ ])
  359 │ 
  360 │ const selectedLampIds = ref([])
  361 │ const tempLeftSelection = ref([])
  362 │ const tempRightSelection = ref([])
  363 │ const currentGroupLamps = ref([])
  364 │ 
  365 │ const availableLamps = computed(() => {
  366 │   let result = allLamps.value.filter(l => !selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id))
  367 │   if (leftSearch.value) {
  368 │     result = result.filter(l => l.name.includes(leftSearch.value) || l.code.includes(leftSearch.value))
  369 │   }
  370 │   return result
  371 │ })
  372 │ 
  373 │ const selectedLamps = computed(() => {
  374 │   let result = allLamps.value.filter(l => selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id))
  375 │   if (rightSearch.value) {
  376 │     result = result.filter(l => l.name.includes(rightSearch.value) || l.code.includes(rightSearch.value))
  377 │   }
  378 │   return result
  379 │ })
  380 │ 
  381 │ const filteredGroups = computed(() => {
  382 │   let result = groups.value
  383 │   if (filters.search) {
  384 │     result = result.filter(g => g.name.includes(filters.search))
  385 │   }
  386 │   if (filters.type) {
  387 │     result = result.filter(g => g.type === filters.type)
  388 │   }
  389 │   if (filters.hierarchy) {
  390 │     result = result.filter(g => g.hierarchy === filters.hierarchy)
  391 │   }
  392 │   return result
  393 │ })
  394 │ 
  395 │ const getTypeText = (type) => {
  396 │   const map = { road: '路段分组', function: '功能分组', custom: '自定义分组' }
  397 │   return map[type] || type
  398 │ }
  399 │ 
  400 │ const getTypeTagType = (type) => {
  401 │   const map = { road: 'primary', function: 'success', custom: 'warning' }
  402 │   return map[type] || ''
  403 │ }
  404 │ 
  405 │ const getHierarchyText = (hierarchy) => {
  406 │   const map = { xiandao: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道', liwei: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道1栋' }
  407 │   return map[hierarchy] || hierarchy
  408 │ }
  409 │ 
  410 │ const handleCheckChange = () => {}
  411 │ 
  412 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  413 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  414 │ }
  415 │ 
  416 │ const searchGroups = () => {
  417 │   currentPage.value = 1
  418 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  419 │ }
  420 │ 
  421 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  422 │   Object.assign(filters, { search: '', type: '', hierarchy: '' })
  423 │   currentPage.value = 1
  424 │ }
  425 │ 
  426 │ const refreshData = () => {
  427 │   ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
  428 │ }
  429 │ 
  430 │ const handleExport = () => {
  431 │   ElMessage.success('导出成功')
  432 │ }
  433 │ 
  434 │ const batchDelete = () => {
  435 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个分组吗？`, '提示', {
  436 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  437 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  438 │     type: 'warning'
  439 │   }).then(() => {
  440 │     const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(g => g.id)
  441 │     groups.value = groups.value.filter(g => !selectedIds.includes(g.id))
  442 │     total.value = groups.value.length
  443 │     selectedRows.value = []
  444 │     ElMessage.success('批量删除成功')
  445 │   }).catch(() => {})
  446 │ }
  447 │ 
  448 │ const handleLeftSelection = (selection) => {
  449 │   tempLeftSelection.value = selection
  450 │ }
  451 │ 
  452 │ const handleRightSelection = (selection) => {
  453 │   tempRightSelection.value = selection
  454 │ }
  455 │ 
  456 │ const addSelectedLamps = () => {
  457 │   tempLeftSelection.value.forEach(item => {
  458 │     if (!selectedLampIds.value.includes(item.id)) {
  459 │       selectedLampIds.value.push(item.id)
  460 │     }
  461 │   })
  462 │   tempLeftSelection.value = []
  463 │ }
  464 │ 
  465 │ const removeSelectedLamps = () => {
  466 │   tempRightSelection.value.forEach(item => {
  467 │     const index = selectedLampIds.value.indexOf(item.id)
  468 │     if (index > -1) {
  469 │       selectedLampIds.value.splice(index, 1)
  470 │     }
  471 │   })
  472 │   tempRightSelection.value = []
  473 │ }
  474 │ 
  475 │ const searchLeftLamps = () => {}
  476 │ const resetLeftSearch = () => { leftSearch.value = '' }
  477 │ const searchRightLamps = () => {}
  478 │ const resetRightSearch = () => { rightSearch.value = '' }
  479 │ 
  480 │ const resetForm = () => {
  481 │   Object.assign(form, { name: '', type: 'road', hierarchy: '', remark: '' })
  482 │   selectedLampIds.value = []
  483 │   tempLeftSelection.value = []
  484 │   tempRightSelection.value = []
  485 │ }
  486 │ 
  487 │ const editGroup = (row) => {
  488 │   isEdit.value = true
  489 │   Object.assign(form, { name: row.name, type: row.type, hierarchy: row.hierarchy, remark: row.remark })
  490 │   selectedLampIds.value = [...(row.lampIds || [])]
  491 │   showAddDialog.value = true
  492 │ }
  493 │ 
  494 │ const deleteGroup = (row) => {
  495 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除分组"${row.name}"吗？`, '提示', {
  496 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  497 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  498 │     type: 'warning'
  499 │   }).then(() => {
  500 │     const index = groups.value.findIndex(g => g.id === row.id)
  501 │     if (index > -1) {
  502 │       groups.value.splice(index, 1)
  503 │       total.value--
  504 │       ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  505 │     }
  506 │   }).catch(() => {})
  507 │ }
  508 │ 
  509 │ const submitForm = () => {
  510 │   formRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  511 │     if (valid) {
  512 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  513 │         const index = groups.value.findIndex(g => g.id === form.id)
  514 │         if (index > -1) {
  515 │           groups.value[index] = {
  516 │             ...groups.value[index],
  517 │             ...form,
  518 │             lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length,
  519 │             lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value]
  520 │           }
  521 │         }
  522 │         ElMessage.success('分组修改成功')
  523 │       } else {
  524 │         const newId = Math.max(...groups.value.map(g => g.id)) + 1
  525 │         groups.value.push({
  526 │           id: newId,
  527 │           no: groups.value.length + 1,
  528 │           ...form,
  529 │           lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length,
  530 │           lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value],
  531 │           createTime: new Date().toLocaleString()
  532 │         })
  533 │         total.value++
  534 │         ElMessage.success('分组添加成功')
  535 │       }
  536 │       showAddDialog.value = false
  537 │       isEdit.value = false
  538 │       resetForm()
  539 │     }
  540 │   })
  541 │ }
  542 │ 
  543 │ const viewLamps = (row) => {
  544 │   currentGroupLamps.value = allLamps.value.filter(l => row.lampIds?.includes(l.id))
  545 │   showLampListDialog.value = true
  546 │ }
  547 │ 
  548 │ const showLampDialog = (row) => {
  549 │   viewLamps(row)
  550 │ }
  551 │ 
  552 │ const batchControl = (row) => {
  553 │   showControlDialog.value = true
  554 │ }
  555 │ 
  556 │ const submitControl = () => {
  557 │   const action = controlType.value === 'on' ? '开灯' : controlType.value === 'off' ? '关灯' : `调光至${brightnessValue.value}%`
  558 │   ElMessage.success(`批量${action}成功`)
  559 │   showControlDialog.value = false
  560 │ }
  561 │ </script>
  562 │ 
  563 │ <style scoped>
  564 │ .page-container {
  565 │   padding: 20px;
  566 │   background: #fff;
  567 │   border-radius: 4px;
  568 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  569 │ }
  570 │ 
  571 │ .main-content {
  572 │   display: flex;
  573 │   gap: 20px;
  574 │ }
  575 │ 
  576 │ .left-sidebar {
  577 │   width: 200px;
  578 │   background: #fff;
  579 │   border-radius: 4px;
  580 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  581 │   padding: 15px;
  582 │   flex-shrink: 0;
  583 │ }
  584 │ 
  585 │ .sidebar-header {
  586 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  587 │ }
  588 │ 
  589 │ .right-content {
  590 │   flex: 1;
  591 │   min-width: 0;
  592 │ }
  593 │ 
  594 │ .page-header {
  595 │   display: flex;
  596 │   justify-content: space-between;
  597 │   align-items: center;
  598 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  599 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  600 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  601 │ }
  602 │ 
  603 │ .page-header .title {
  604 │   font-size: 18px;
  605 │   font-weight: 600;
  606 │   color: #1f1f1f;
  607 │ }
  608 │ 
  609 │ .header-actions {
  610 │   display: flex;
  611 │   gap: 10px;
  612 │   align-items: center;
  613 │ }
  614 │ 
  615 │ .filter-bar {
  616 │   display: flex;
  617 │   align-items: center;
  618 │   gap: 15px;
  619 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  620 │   padding: 15px;
  621 │   background: #fafafa;
  622 │   border-radius: 4px;
  623 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  624 │ }
  625 │ 
  626 │ .filter-select {
  627 │   width: 160px;
  628 │ }
  629 │ 
  630 │ .filter-input {
  631 │   width: 200px;
  632 │ }
  633 │ 
  634 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  635 │   margin-top: 20px;
  636 │   display: flex;
  637 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  638 │ }
  639 │ 
  640 │ .lamp-count {
  641 │   color: #409eff;
  642 │   cursor: pointer;
  643 │   display: flex;
  644 │   align-items: center;
  645 │   gap: 4px;
  646 │ }
  647 │ 
  648 │ .lamp-count:hover {
  649 │   text-decoration: underline;
  650 │ }
  651 │ 
  652 │ .lamp-selector {
  653 │   display: flex;
  654 │   gap: 15px;
  655 │   height: 350px;
  656 │ }
  657 │ 
  658 │ .selector-left, .selector-right {
  659 │   flex: 1;
  660 │   display: flex;
  661 │   flex-direction: column;
  662 │ }
  663 │ 
  664 │ .selector-header {
  665 │   display: flex;
  666 │   gap: 10px;
  667 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  668 │ }
  669 │ 
  670 │ .search-input {
  671 │   flex: 1;
  672 │ }
  673 │ 
  674 │ .selected-count {
  675 │   color: #409eff;
  676 │   font-size: 13px;
  677 │   margin-bottom: 5px;
  678 │ }
  679 │ 
  680 │ .selector-buttons {
  681 │   display: flex;
  682 │   flex-direction: column;
  683 │   justify-content: center;
  684 │   gap: 10px;
  685 │ }
  686 │ 
  687 │ .control-content {
  688 │   padding: 20px;
  689 │ }
  690 │ 
  691 │ .control-item {
  692 │   display: flex;
  693 │   align-items: center;
  694 │   gap: 15px;
  695 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  696 │ }
  697 │ 
  698 │ .control-label {
  699 │   width: 80px;
  700 │   font-weight: 500;
  701 │ }
  702 │ </style>
  703 │

📄 views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">历史下发策略</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="success" @click="handleExport" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">
    7 │           <el-icon><Download /></el-icon>
    8 │           导出记录
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │         <el-button @click="refreshData">
   11 │           <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   12 │           刷新
   13 │         </el-button>
   14 │       </div>
   15 │     </div>
   16 │ 
   17 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   18 │       <el-input
   19 │         v-model="filters.name"
   20 │         placeholder="请输入策略名称"
   21 │         class="filter-input"
   22 │         clearable
   23 │       >
   24 │         <template #prefix>
   25 │           <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   26 │         </template>
   27 │       </el-input>
   28 │       <el-select v-model="filters.status" placeholder="请选择执行状态" class="filter-select" clearable>
   29 │         <el-option label="成功" value="success" />
   30 │         <el-option label="部分成功" value="partial" />
   31 │         <el-option label="失败" value="fail" />
   32 │       </el-select>
   33 │       <el-date-picker
   34 │         v-model="filters.dateRange"
   35 │         type="daterange"
   36 │         range-separator="至"
   37 │         start-placeholder="开始时间"
   38 │         end-placeholder="结束时间"
   39 │         class="filter-date"
   40 │         value-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
   41 │       />
   42 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="searchRecords">查询</el-button>
   43 │       <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   44 │     </div>
   45 │ 
   46 │     <el-table :data="filteredRecords" border class="record-table" style="width: 100%;" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   47 │       <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" />
   48 │       <el-table-column prop="id" label="序号" width="80" align="center" />
   49 │       <el-table-column prop="strategyName" label="策略名称" min-width="200">
   50 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   51 │           <el-link type="primary" @click="viewDetail(row)">{{ row.strategyName }}</el-link>
   52 │         </template>
   53 │       </el-table-column>
   54 │       <el-table-column prop="sendTime" label="下发时间" width="180" />
   55 │       <el-table-column prop="operator" label="下发人员" width="120" />
   56 │       <el-table-column prop="deviceCount" label="关联设备数" width="120" align="center" />
   57 │       <el-table-column prop="successCount" label="成功数" width="100" align="center">
   58 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   59 │           <span style="color: #52c41a; font-weight: 500;">{{ row.successCount }}</span>
   60 │         </template>
   61 │       </el-table-column>
   62 │       <el-table-column prop="failCount" label="失败数" width="100" align="center">
   63 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   64 │           <span style="color: #f5222d; font-weight: 500;">{{ row.failCount }}</span>
   65 │         </template>
   66 │       </el-table-column>
   67 │       <el-table-column prop="status" label="执行结果" width="120" align="center">
   68 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   69 │           <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(row.status)" size="small">
   70 │             {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
   71 │           </el-tag>
   72 │         </template>
   73 │       </el-table-column>
   74 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="260" fixed="right" align="center">
   75 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   76 │           <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleCopy(row)">复制</el-button>
   77 │           <el-button type="info" size="small" @click="handleExportSingle(row)">导出</el-button>
   78 │           <el-button type="default" size="small" @click="viewDetail(row)">查看详情</el-button>
   79 │         </template>
   80 │       </el-table-column>
   81 │     </el-table>
   82 │ 
   83 │     <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   84 │       <el-pagination
   85 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   86 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   87 │         :total="total"
   88 │         :page-sizes="[10, 20, 50, 100]"
   89 │         layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
   90 │         @size-change="handleSizeChange"
   91 │         @current-change="handleCurrentChange"
   92 │       />
   93 │     </div>
   94 │ 
   95 │     <el-dialog v-model="detailVisible" title="策略执行详情" width="900px">
   96 │       <div v-if="currentRecord" class="detail-content">
   97 │         <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
   98 │           <el-descriptions-item label="策略名称">{{ currentRecord.strategyName }}</el-descriptions-item>
   99 │           <el-descriptions-item label="下发时间">{{ currentRecord.sendTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
  100 │           <el-descriptions-item label="下发人员">{{ currentRecord.operator }}</el-descriptions-item>
  101 │           <el-descriptions-item label="执行结果">
  102 │             <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(currentRecord.status)" size="small">
  103 │               {{ getStatusText(currentRecord.status) }}
  104 │             </el-tag>
  105 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  106 │           <el-descriptions-item label="关联设备数" :span="2">{{ currentRecord.deviceCount }}</el-descriptions-item>
  107 │         </el-descriptions>
  108 │ 
  109 │         <el-tabs v-model="activeTab" class="detail-tabs">
  110 │           <el-tab-pane label="策略配置" name="config">
  111 │             <div class="config-content">
  112 │               <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
  113 │                 <el-descriptions-item label="策略类型">{{ getTypeText(currentRecord.strategyType) }}</el-descriptions-item>
  114 │                 <el-descriptions-item label="执行动作">{{ getActionText(currentRecord.action) }}</el-descriptions-item>
  115 │                 <el-descriptions-item label="执行时间" :span="2">{{ currentRecord.executeTime || '-' }}</el-descriptions-item>
  116 │                 <el-descriptions-item label="策略描述" :span="2">{{ currentRecord.description || '-' }}</el-descriptions-item>
  117 │               </el-descriptions>
  118 │             </div>
  119 │           </el-tab-pane>
  120 │           <el-tab-pane label="关联设备" name="devices">
  121 │             <div class="device-list">
  122 │               <el-table :data="currentRecord.devices" size="small" border>
  123 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="80" align="center" />
  124 │                 <el-table-column prop="name" label="设备名称" />
  125 │                 <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" width="150" />
  126 │                 <el-table-column prop="result" label="执行结果" width="100" align="center">
  127 │                   <template #default="{ row }">
  128 │                     <el-tag :type="row.result === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  129 │                       {{ row.result === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
  130 │                     </el-tag>
  131 │                   </template>
  132 │                 </el-table-column>
  133 │                 <el-table-column prop="message" label="消息" />
  134 │               </el-table>
  135 │             </div>
  136 │           </el-tab-pane>
  137 │           <el-tab-pane label="执行日志" name="logs">
  138 │             <div class="log-list">
  139 │               <el-table :data="currentRecord.logs" size="small" border>
  140 │                 <el-table-column prop="time" label="时间" width="180" />
  141 │                 <el-table-column prop="type" label="类型" width="100" align="center">
  142 │                   <template #default="{ row }">
  143 │                     <el-tag :type="row.type === 'info' ? '' : (row.type === 'warning' ? 'warning' : 'danger')" size="small">
  144 │                       {{ row.type === 'info' ? '信息' : (row.type === 'warning' ? '警告' : '错误') }}
  145 │                     </el-tag>
  146 │                   </template>
  147 │                 </el-table-column>
  148 │                 <el-table-column prop="content" label="内容" />
  149 │               </el-table>
  150 │             </div>
  151 │           </el-tab-pane>
  152 │         </el-tabs>
  153 │       </div>
  154 │       <template #footer>
  155 │         <el-button @click="handleCopy(currentRecord)">复制策略</el-button>
  156 │         <el-button @click="detailVisible = false">关闭</el-button>
  157 │       </template>
  158 │     </el-dialog>
  159 │ 
  160 │     <el-dialog v-model="copyVisible" title="复制策略" width="600px">
  161 │       <el-form ref="copyFormRef" :model="copyForm" :rules="copyRules" label-width="100px">
  162 │         <el-form-item label="原策略名称">
  163 │           <span>{{ copyForm.originalName }}</span>
  164 │         </el-form-item>
  165 │         <el-form-item label="新策略名称" prop="name">
  166 │           <el-input v-model="copyForm.name" placeholder="请输入新策略名称" />
  167 │         </el-form-item>
  168 │         <el-form-item label="策略类型" prop="type">
  169 │           <el-select v-model="copyForm.type" placeholder="请选择策略类型" style="width: 100%;">
  170 │             <el-option label="定时策略" value="time" />
  171 │             <el-option label="光感策略" value="light" />
  172 │             <el-option label="手动策略" value="manual" />
  173 │           </el-select>
  174 │         </el-form-item>
  175 │         <el-form-item label="执行时间" prop="executeTime">
  176 │           <el-input v-model="copyForm.executeTime" placeholder="请输入执行时间" />
  177 │         </el-form-item>
  178 │       </el-form>
  179 │       <template #footer>
  180 │         <el-button @click="copyVisible = false">取消</el-button>
  181 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitCopy">确定</el-button>
  182 │       </template>
  183 │     </el-dialog>
  184 │   </div>
  185 │ </template>
  186 │ 
  187 │ <script setup>
  188 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  189 │ import { Refresh, Search, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  190 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  191 │ import router from '@/router'
  192 │ 
  193 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  194 │ const pageSize = ref(10)
  195 │ const total = ref(0)
  196 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  197 │ const detailVisible = ref(false)
  198 │ const copyVisible = ref(false)
  199 │ const currentRecord = ref(null)
  200 │ const copyFormRef = ref(null)
  201 │ const activeTab = ref('config')
  202 │ 
  203 │ const filters = reactive({
  204 │   name: '',
  205 │   status: '',
  206 │   dateRange: []
  207 │ })
  208 │ 
  209 │ const copyForm = reactive({
  210 │   originalName: '',
  211 │   name: '',
  212 │   type: '',
  213 │   executeTime: ''
  214 │ })
  215 │ 
  216 │ const copyRules = {
  217 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入新策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  218 │   type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  219 │   executeTime: [{ required: true, message: '请输入执行时间', trigger: 'blur' }]
  220 │ }
  221 │ 
  222 │ const records = ref([
  223 │   {
  224 │     id: 1,
  225 │     strategyName: '城市主干道夜间照明',
  226 │     strategyType: 'time',
  227 │     action: 'dim',
  228 │     executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00',
  229 │     description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%',
  230 │     sendTime: '2024-04-28 17:30:00',
  231 │     operator: 'admin',
  232 │     deviceCount: 50,
  233 │     successCount: 48,
  234 │     failCount: 2,
  235 │     status: 'partial',
  236 │     devices: [
  237 │       { no: 1, name: '梅溪湖隧道01号灯', imei: '862715067560391', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
  238 │       { no: 2, name: '梅溪湖隧道02号灯', imei: '863123069184162', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
  239 │       { no: 3, name: '梅溪湖隧道03号灯', imei: '863123069133946', result: 'fail', message: '设备离线' },
  240 │       { no: 4, name: '梅溪湖隧道04号灯', imei: '863123069031165', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
  241 │       { no: 5, name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋大堂灯', imei: '863123069267413', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }
  242 │     ],
  243 │     logs: [
  244 │       { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' },
  245 │       { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:01', type: 'info', content: '连接50个设备' },
  246 │       { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:05', type: 'warning', content: '梅溪湖隧道03号灯连接超时' },
  247 │       { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:10', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' }
  248 │     ]
  249 │   },
  250 │   {
  251 │     id: 2,
  252 │     strategyName: '园区展厅照明',
  253 │     strategyType: 'time',
  254 │     action: 'on',
  255 │     executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00',
  256 │     description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮',
  257 │     sendTime: '2024-04-28 07:55:00',
  258 │     operator: 'admin',
  259 │     deviceCount: 20,
  260 │     successCount: 20,
  261 │     failCount: 0,
  262 │     status: 'success',
  263 │     devices: [
  264 │       { no: 1, name: '展厅主灯', imei: '863123069265714', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' },
  265 │       { no: 2, name: '展厅侧灯', imei: '863123069201446', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }
  266 │     ],
  267 │     logs: [
  268 │       { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' },
  269 │       { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:02', type: 'info', content: '连接20个设备' },
  270 │       { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:08', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' }
  271 │     ]
  272 │   },
  273 │   {
  274 │     id: 3,
  275 │     strategyName: '园区照明光感控制',
  276 │     strategyType: 'light',
  277 │     action: 'dim',
  278 │     executeTime: '根据光线自动调节',
  279 │     description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度',
  280 │     sendTime: '2024-04-27 18:00:00',
  281 │     operator: 'operator',
  282 │     deviceCount: 35,
  283 │     successCount: 35,
  284 │     failCount: 0,
  285 │     status: 'success',
  286 │     devices: [],
  287 │     logs: []
  288 │   },
  289 │   {
  290 │     id: 4,
  291 │     strategyName: '特殊活动照明',
  292 │     strategyType: 'manual',
  293 │     action: 'on',
  294 │     executeTime: '手动控制',
  295 │     description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略',
  296 │     sendTime: '2024-04-26 20:00:00',
  297 │     operator: 'operator',
  298 │     deviceCount: 10,
  299 │     successCount: 0,
  300 │     failCount: 10,
  301 │     status: 'fail',
  302 │     devices: [],
  303 │     logs: []
  304 │   }
  305 │ ])
  306 │ 
  307 │ total.value = records.value.length
  308 │ 
  309 │ const filteredRecords = computed(() => {
  310 │   let result = records.value
  311 │   if (filters.name) {
  312 │     result = result.filter(r => r.strategyName.includes(filters.name))
  313 │   }
  314 │   if (filters.status) {
  315 │     result = result.filter(r => r.status === filters.status)
  316 │   }
  317 │   return result
  318 │ })
  319 │ 
  320 │ const getTypeText = (type) => {
  321 │   const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' }
  322 │   return map[type] || type
  323 │ }
  324 │ 
  325 │ const getActionText = (action) => {
  326 │   const map = { on: '开灯', off: '关灯', dim: '调光' }
  327 │   return map[action] || action
  328 │ }
  329 │ 
  330 │ const getStatusText = (status) => {
  331 │   const map = { success: '成功', partial: '部分成功', fail: '失败' }
  332 │   return map[status] || status
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ const getStatusTagType = (status) => {
  336 │   const map = { success: 'success', partial: 'warning', fail: 'danger' }
  337 │   return map[status] || ''
  338 │ }
  339 │ 
  340 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  341 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  342 │ }
  343 │ 
  344 │ const searchRecords = () => {
  345 │   currentPage.value = 1
  346 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  347 │ }
  348 │ 
  349 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  350 │   Object.assign(filters, {
  351 │     name: '',
  352 │     status: '',
  353 │     dateRange: []
  354 │   })
  355 │   currentPage.value = 1
  356 │ }
  357 │ 
  358 │ const refreshData = () => {
  359 │   ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
  360 │ }
  361 │ 
  362 │ const viewDetail = (row) => {
  363 │   currentRecord.value = row
  364 │   detailVisible.value = true
  365 │   activeTab.value = 'config'
  366 │ }
  367 │ 
  368 │ const handleCopy = (row) => {
  369 │   currentRecord.value = row
  370 │   Object.assign(copyForm, {
  371 │     originalName: row.strategyName,
  372 │     name: row.strategyName + ' (副本)',
  373 │     type: row.strategyType,
  374 │     executeTime: row.executeTime
  375 │   })
  376 │   copyVisible.value = true
  377 │ }
  378 │ 
  379 │ const submitCopy = async () => {
  380 │   if (!copyFormRef.value) return
  381 │   await copyFormRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  382 │     if (valid) {
  383 │       ElMessage.success(`策略「${copyForm.name}」复制成功`)
  384 │       copyVisible.value = false
  385 │       router.push('/lighting/strategy')
  386 │     }
  387 │   })
  388 │ }
  389 │ 
  390 │ const handleExportSingle = (row) => {
  391 │   ElMessage.success(`正在导出「${row.strategyName}」的执行记录...`)
  392 │   setTimeout(() => {
  393 │     ElMessage.success('导出成功，文件已开始下载')
  394 │   }, 500)
  395 │ }
  396 │ 
  397 │ const handleExport = () => {
  398 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要导出选中的${selectedRows.value.length}条记录吗？`, '提示', {
  399 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  400 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  401 │     type: 'info'
  402 │   }).then(() => {
  403 │     ElMessage.success('正在导出...')
  404 │     setTimeout(() => {
  405 │       ElMessage.success('导出成功，Excel文件已开始下载')
  406 │     }, 500)
  407 │   }).catch(() => {})
  408 │ }
  409 │ 
  410 │ const handleSizeChange = (val) => {
  411 │   pageSize.value = val
  412 │ }
  413 │ 
  414 │ const handleCurrentChange = (val) => {
  415 │   currentPage.value = val
  416 │ }
  417 │ </script>
  418 │ 
  419 │ <style scoped>
  420 │ .page-container {
  421 │   padding: 20px;
  422 │   background: #fff;
  423 │   border-radius: 4px;
  424 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  425 │ }
  426 │ 
  427 │ .page-header {
  428 │   display: flex;
  429 │   justify-content: space-between;
  430 │   align-items: center;
  431 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  432 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  433 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  434 │ }
  435 │ 
  436 │ .page-header .title {
  437 │   font-size: 18px;
  438 │   font-weight: 600;
  439 │   color: #1f1f1f;
  440 │ }
  441 │ 
  442 │ .header-actions {
  443 │   display: flex;
  444 │   gap: 10px;
  445 │   align-items: center;
  446 │ }
  447 │ 
  448 │ .filter-bar {
  449 │   display: flex;
  450 │   align-items: center;
  451 │   gap: 15px;
  452 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  453 │   padding: 15px;
  454 │   background: #fafafa;
  455 │   border-radius: 4px;
  456 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  457 │ }
  458 │ 
  459 │ .filter-input {
  460 │   width: 200px;
  461 │ }
  462 │ 
  463 │ .filter-select {
  464 │   width: 150px;
  465 │ }
  466 │ 
  467 │ .filter-date {
  468 │   width: 300px;
  469 │ }
  470 │ 
  471 │ .record-table {
  472 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  473 │ }
  474 │ 
  475 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  476 │   display: flex;
  477 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  478 │ }
  479 │ 
  480 │ .detail-content {
  481 │   padding: 10px 0;
  482 │ }
  483 │ 
  484 │ .detail-tabs {
  485 │   margin-top: 20px;
  486 │ }
  487 │ 
  488 │ .config-content,
  489 │ .device-list,
  490 │ .log-list {
  491 │   margin-top: 15px;
  492 │ }
  493 │ </style>
  494 │

📄 views/lighting/LampManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="left-sidebar">
    5 │         <div class="sidebar-header">
    6 │           <el-input
    7 │             v-model="treeSearch"
    8 │             placeholder="请输入层级名称"
    9 │             class="sidebar-search"
   10 │           >
   11 │             <template #prefix>
   12 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   13 │             </template>
   14 │           </el-input>
   15 │         </div>
   16 │         <el-tree
   17 │           :data="treeData"
   18 │           :props="defaultProps"
   19 │           show-checkbox
   20 │           node-key="id"
   21 │           :default-expand-all="true"
   22 │           :expand-on-click-node="false"
   23 │         />
   24 │       </div>
   25 │ 
   26 │       <div class="right-content">
   27 │         <div class="page-header">
   28 │           <div class="header-actions">
   29 │             <el-button class="control-btn" @click="handleTurnOn">开灯</el-button>
   30 │             <el-button class="control-btn" @click="handleTurnOff">关灯</el-button>
   31 │             <el-button class="control-btn" @click="showDimmingDialog = true">调光</el-button>
   32 │             <el-dropdown>
   33 │               <el-button class="default-btn">更多操作</el-button>
   34 │               <template #dropdown>
   35 │                 <el-dropdown-menu>
   36 │                   <el-dropdown-item>自检</el-dropdown-item>
   37 │                   <el-dropdown-item>状态设置</el-dropdown-item>
   38 │                   <el-dropdown-item>批量导出</el-dropdown-item>
   39 │                 </el-dropdown-menu>
   40 │               </template>
   41 │             </el-dropdown>
   42 │           </div>
   43 │         </div>
   44 │ 
   45 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   46 │           <el-select v-model="filterProduct" placeholder="请选择所属产品" class="filter-select">
   47 │             <el-option label="全部" value=""></el-option>
   48 │             <el-option label="电信CAT1" value="电信CAT1"></el-option>
   49 │             <el-option label="EXC-CAT1" value="EXC-CAT1"></el-option>
   50 │           </el-select>
   51 │           <el-select v-model="filterLampStatus" placeholder="请选择灯具状态" class="filter-select">
   52 │             <el-option label="全部" value=""></el-option>
   53 │             <el-option label="开" value="on"></el-option>
   54 │             <el-option label="关" value="off"></el-option>
   55 │           </el-select>
   56 │           <el-select v-model="filterNetworkStatus" placeholder="请选择网络状态" class="filter-select">
   57 │             <el-option label="全部" value=""></el-option>
   58 │             <el-option label="在线" value="online"></el-option>
   59 │             <el-option label="离线" value="offline"></el-option>
   60 │           </el-select>
   61 │           <el-select v-model="filterEnabled" placeholder="请选择可用状态" class="filter-select">
   62 │             <el-option label="全部" value=""></el-option>
   63 │             <el-option label="启用" value="enabled"></el-option>
   64 │             <el-option label="不启用" value="disabled"></el-option>
   65 │           </el-select>
   66 │           <el-input v-model="searchKeyword" placeholder="请输入IMEI号或名称" class="filter-input"></el-input>
   67 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   68 │           <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   69 │         </div>
   70 │ 
   71 │         <div class="table-wrapper">
   72 │           <el-table :data="filteredData" border class="data-table" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   73 │             <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   74 │             <el-table-column prop="product" label="所属产品" min-width="90"></el-table-column>
   75 │             <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" min-width="140" sortable></el-table-column>
   76 │             <el-table-column prop="name" label="灯具名称" min-width="110" sortable></el-table-column>
   77 │             <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(W)" width="75" align="center"></el-table-column>
   78 │             <el-table-column prop="voltage" label="电压(V)" width="75" align="center"></el-table-column>
   79 │             <el-table-column prop="current" label="电流(mA)" width="80" align="center"></el-table-column>
   80 │             <el-table-column prop="lampStatus" label="灯具状态" width="75" align="center">
   81 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   82 │                 <el-tag :type="row.lampStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">
   83 │                   {{ row.lampStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }}
   84 │                 </el-tag>
   85 │               </template>
   86 │             </el-table-column>
   87 │             <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="85" align="center">
   88 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   89 │                 <span :class="row.brightness === '-' ? 'text-muted' : ''">{{ row.brightness }}</span>
   90 │               </template>
   91 │             </el-table-column>
   92 │             <el-table-column prop="networkStatus" label="网络状态" width="85" align="center">
   93 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   94 │                 <el-tag :type="row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   95 │                   {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
   96 │                 </el-tag>
   97 │               </template>
   98 │             </el-table-column>
   99 │             <el-table-column prop="lastOnline" label="最后在线时间" min-width="150" sortable></el-table-column>
  100 │             <el-table-column prop="currentStrategy" label="当前策略" min-width="110"></el-table-column>
  101 │             <el-table-column prop="switchRecord" label="开关灯记录" width="70" align="center">
  102 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  103 │                 <el-button type="text" @click="handleViewSwitchRecord(row)">查看</el-button>
  104 │               </template>
  105 │             </el-table-column>
  106 │             <el-table-column prop="enabled" label="可用状态" width="80" align="center">
  107 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  108 │                 <el-tag :type="row.enabled ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  109 │                   {{ row.enabled ? '启用' : '不启用' }}
  110 │                 </el-tag>
  111 │               </template>
  112 │             </el-table-column>
  113 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="115" align="center">
  114 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  115 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
  116 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleMore(row)">更多</el-button>
  117 │               </template>
  118 │             </el-table-column>
  119 │           </el-table>
  120 │         </div>
  121 │ 
  122 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
  123 │           <el-pagination
  124 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  125 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  126 │             :total="total"
  127 │             :page-sizes="[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]"
  128 │             layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
  129 │           ></el-pagination>
  130 │         </div>
  131 │       </div>
  132 │     </div>
  133 │ 
  134 │     <!-- 调光对话框 -->
  135 │     <el-dialog title="调光控制" v-model="showDimmingDialog" width="400px">
  136 │       <div class="dimming-content">
  137 │         <div class="dimming-label">亮度值：{{ brightnessValue }}%</div>
  138 │         <el-slider v-model="brightnessValue" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  139 │         <div class="quick-actions">
  140 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="brightnessValue = 100">全亮</el-button>
  141 │           <el-button @click="brightnessValue = 75">75%</el-button>
  142 │           <el-button @click="brightnessValue = 50">50%</el-button>
  143 │           <el-button @click="brightnessValue = 25">25%</el-button>
  144 │         </div>
  145 │       </div>
  146 │       <template #footer>
  147 │         <el-button @click="showDimmingDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  148 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleDimming">确定</el-button>
  149 │       </template>
  150 │     </el-dialog>
  151 │ 
  152 │     <!-- 详情对话框 -->
  153 │     <el-dialog title="灯具详情" v-model="showDetailDialog" width="800px">
  154 │       <div v-if="selectedItem" class="detail-content">
  155 │         <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
  156 │           <el-descriptions-item label="所属产品">{{ selectedItem.product }}</el-descriptions-item>
  157 │           <el-descriptions-item label="IMEI号">{{ selectedItem.imei }}</el-descriptions-item>
  158 │           <el-descriptions-item label="灯具名称">{{ selectedItem.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
  159 │           <el-descriptions-item label="功率(W)">{{ selectedItem.power }}</el-descriptions-item>
  160 │           <el-descriptions-item label="电压(V)">{{ selectedItem.voltage }}</el-descriptions-item>
  161 │           <el-descriptions-item label="电流(mA)">{{ selectedItem.current }}</el-descriptions-item>
  162 │           <el-descriptions-item label="灯具状态">
  163 │             <el-tag :type="selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">
  164 │               {{ selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }}
  165 │             </el-tag>
  166 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  167 │           <el-descriptions-item label="亮度(%)">{{ selectedItem.brightness }}</el-descriptions-item>
  168 │           <el-descriptions-item label="网络状态">
  169 │             <el-tag :type="selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  170 │               {{ selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
  171 │             </el-tag>
  172 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  173 │           <el-descriptions-item label="最后在线">{{ selectedItem.lastOnline }}</el-descriptions-item>
  174 │           <el-descriptions-item label="当前策略">{{ selectedItem.currentStrategy }}</el-descriptions-item>
  175 │           <el-descriptions-item label="可用状态">
  176 │             <el-tag :type="selectedItem.enabled ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  177 │               {{ selectedItem.enabled ? '启用' : '不启用' }}
  178 │             </el-tag>
  179 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  180 │         </el-descriptions>
  181 │       </div>
  182 │     </el-dialog>
  183 │   </div>
  184 │ </template>
  185 │ 
  186 │ <script setup>
  187 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  188 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  189 │ import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  190 │ 
  191 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  192 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  193 │ const total = ref(68)
  194 │ const searchKeyword = ref('')
  195 │ const filterProduct = ref('')
  196 │ const filterLampStatus = ref('')
  197 │ const filterNetworkStatus = ref('')
  198 │ const filterEnabled = ref('')
  199 │ const showDimmingDialog = ref(false)
  200 │ const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
  201 │ const brightnessValue = ref(80)
  202 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  203 │ const selectedItem = ref(null)
  204 │ const treeSearch = ref('')
  205 │ 
  206 │ const defaultProps = {
  207 │   label: 'label',
  208 │   children: 'children'
  209 │ }
  210 │ 
  211 │ const treeData = ref([
  212 │   {
  213 │     id: 1,
  214 │     label: '长沙',
  215 │     children: [
  216 │       {
  217 │         id: 2,
  218 │         label: '岳麓区',
  219 │         children: [
  220 │           { id: 3, label: '梅溪湖隧道' },
  221 │           { id: 4, label: '梅溪湖隧道1栋' }
  222 │         ]
  223 │       }
  224 │     ]
  225 │   }
  226 │ ])
  227 │ 
  228 │ const lampData = ref([
  229 │   { id: 1, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '862715067560391', name: '光亚展灯具', power: 0, voltage: 231.3, current: 0, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:47:19', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  230 │   { id: 2, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069184162', name: '1号楼-极简07', power: 0, voltage: 231.3, current: 0, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:44:54', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  231 │   { id: 3, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069133946', name: '宿舍楼02', power: 48, voltage: 0, current: 222, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:53:41', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  232 │   { id: 4, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069031165', name: '3号楼-极简13', power: 24, voltage: 233.1, current: 127, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:52:52', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  233 │   { id: 5, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069267413', name: '食堂-极简18辅路', power: 22, voltage: 233.5, current: 110, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:52:09', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false },
  234 │   { id: 6, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069265714', name: '食堂-极简18', power: 25, voltage: 233.8, current: 125, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:51:17', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false },
  235 │   { id: 7, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069277032', name: '3号楼-极简14', power: 24, voltage: 234.9, current: 122, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:46:48', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  236 │   { id: 8, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069201446', name: '食堂-极简17', power: 26, voltage: 234.3, current: 130, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:46:48', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  237 │   { id: 9, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069081624', name: '宿舍楼01', power: 48, voltage: 0, current: 218, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:53:13', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  238 │   { id: 10, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069146013', name: '宿舍楼03', power: 47, voltage: 233.2, current: 214, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:52:12', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  239 │   { id: 11, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069236392', name: '食堂-极简16', power: 26, voltage: 234.4, current: 130, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:40:04', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  240 │   { id: 12, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066365673', name: '0104Z11', power: 103, voltage: 233.3, current: 445, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-24 18:20:10', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false },
  241 │   { id: 13, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069231120', name: '1号楼-极简05', power: 44, voltage: 234.3, current: 202, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-23 17:45:55', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true },
  242 │   { id: 14, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066361359', name: '展示0204Z05', power: 232, voltage: 237.9, current: 999, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-09 21:19:55', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }
  243 │ ])
  244 │ 
  245 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  246 │   let result = lampData.value
  247 │   if (filterProduct.value) {
  248 │     result = result.filter(item => item.product === filterProduct.value)
  249 │   }
  250 │   if (filterLampStatus.value) {
  251 │     result = result.filter(item => item.lampStatus === filterLampStatus.value)
  252 │   }
  253 │   if (filterNetworkStatus.value) {
  254 │     result = result.filter(item => item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value)
  255 │   }
  256 │   if (filterEnabled.value) {
  257 │     result = result.filter(item => filterEnabled.value === 'enabled' ? item.enabled : !item.enabled)
  258 │   }
  259 │   if (searchKeyword.value) {
  260 │     result = result.filter(item => 
  261 │       item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || 
  262 │       item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value)
  263 │     )
  264 │   }
  265 │   return result
  266 │ })
  267 │ 
  268 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  269 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  270 │ }
  271 │ 
  272 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  273 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  274 │ }
  275 │ 
  276 │ const handleReset = () => {
  277 │   searchKeyword.value = ''
  278 │   filterProduct.value = ''
  279 │   filterLampStatus.value = ''
  280 │   filterNetworkStatus.value = ''
  281 │   filterEnabled.value = ''
  282 │ }
  283 │ 
  284 │ const handleTurnOn = () => {
  285 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  286 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具')
  287 │     return
  288 │   }
  289 │   ElMessage.success(`已开启 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`)
  290 │ }
  291 │ 
  292 │ const handleTurnOff = () => {
  293 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  294 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具')
  295 │     return
  296 │   }
  297 │   ElMessage.success(`已关闭 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`)
  298 │ }
  299 │ 
  300 │ const handleDimming = () => {
  301 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  302 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要调光的灯具')
  303 │     return
  304 │   }
  305 │   ElMessage.success(`已将 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具亮度设置为 ${brightnessValue.value}%`)
  306 │   showDimmingDialog.value = false
  307 │ }
  308 │ 
  309 │ const handleDetail = (row) => {
  310 │   selectedItem.value = row
  311 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  312 │ }
  313 │ 
  314 │ const handleMore = (row) => {
  315 │   ElMessage.info(`更多操作: ${row.name}`)
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ const handleViewSwitchRecord = (row) => {
  319 │   ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.name} 的开关灯记录`)
  320 │ }
  321 │ </script>
  322 │

  335 │   height: 100%;
  336 │ }

  347 │ }

  351 │ }

  354 │   background: #fff;
  355 │ }

  360 │ }

  366 │   min-width: 0;
  367 │ }

  369 │ .page-header {
  370 │   display: flex;
  371 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  372 │   align-items: center;
  373 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  374 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  375 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  376 │   overflow: visible;
  377 │ }
  378 │ 
  379 │ .header-actions {
  380 │   display: flex;
  381 │   gap: 10px;
  382 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  383 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  384 │ }
  385 │ 
  386 │ .control-btn {
  387 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1890ff 0%, #096dd9 100%);
  388 │   border: none;
  389 │   color: #fff;
  390 │   white-space: nowrap;
  391 │ }
  392 │ 
  393 │ .control-btn:hover {
  394 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #40a9ff 0%, #1890ff 100%);
  395 │ }
  396 │ 
  397 │ .default-btn {
  398 │   background: #fff;
  399 │   border: 1px solid #d9d9d9;
  400 │   color: #666;
  401 │   white-space: nowrap;
  402 │ }
  403 │ 
  404 │ .default-btn:hover {
  405 │   color: #1890ff;
  406 │   border-color: #1890ff;
  407 │ }
  408 │ 
  409 │ .filter-bar {
  410 │   display: flex;
  411 │   align-items: center;
  412 │   gap: 10px;
  413 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  414 │   padding: 12px 15px;
  415 │   background: #fafafa;
  416 │   border-radius: 8px;
  417 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  418 │ }
  419 │ 
  420 │ .filter-select {
  421 │   width: 140px;
  422 │ }
  423 │ 
  424 │ .filter-input {
  425 │   width: 200px;
  426 │ }
  427 │ 
  428 │ .table-wrapper {
  429 │   flex: 1;
  430 │   overflow-x: auto;
  431 │   overflow-y: auto;
  432 │   min-height: 0;
  433 │ }
  434 │ 
  435 │ .data-table {
  436 │   width: 100%;
  437 │   min-width: 1400px;
  438 │ }
  439 │ 
  440 │ .data-table :deep(.text-muted) {
  441 │   color: #999;
  442 │ }
  443 │ 
  444 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  445 │   margin-top: 15px;
  446 │   display: flex;
  447 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  448 │ }
  449 │

  452 │ }

  456 │ }

  463 │ }
