  472 │

📄 views/lighting/LightControl.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">远程控制</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="batchControl">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Batch" />
    8 │           批量控制
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <div class="control-section">
   13 │       <div class="section-title">区域选择</div>
   14 │       <div class="area-selector">
   15 │         <div 
   16 │           v-for="area in areas" 
   17 │           :key="area.id"
   18 │           :class="['area-card', { active: selectedArea === area.id }]"
   19 │           @click="selectArea(area.id)"
   20 │         >
   21 │           <component :is="area.icon" class="area-icon" />
   22 │           <span class="area-name">{{ area.name }}</span>
   23 │           <span class="area-count">{{ getAreaCount(area.id) }}盏</span>
   24 │         </div>
   25 │       </div>
   26 │     </div>
   27 │     <div class="control-section">
   28 │       <div class="section-title">控制操作</div>
   29 │       <div class="control-panel">
   30 │         <div class="control-row">
   31 │           <div class="control-btn-group">
   32 │             <el-button type="primary" size="large" @click="controlAll('on')">
   33 │               <component :is="icons.Power" />
   34 │               全部开启
   35 │             </el-button>
   36 │             <el-button size="large" @click="controlAll('off')">
   37 │               <component :is="icons.PowerOff" />
   38 │               全部关闭
   39 │             </el-button>
   40 │           </div>
   41 │         </div>
   42 │         <div class="control-row">
   43 │           <div class="brightness-control">
   44 │             <span class="control-label">亮度调节</span>
   45 │             <div class="brightness-slider">
   46 │               <el-slider 
   47 │                 v-model="brightnessValue" 
   48 │                 :min="0" 
   49 │                 :max="100" 
   50 │                 :step="5"
   51 │                 @change="onBrightnessChange"
   52 │               />
   53 │               <span class="brightness-value">{{ brightnessValue }}%</span>
   54 │             </div>
   55 │             <div class="quick-buttons">
   56 │               <el-button v-for="level in brightnessLevels" :key="level" @click="setBrightness(level)">
   57 │                 {{ level }}%
   58 │               </el-button>
   59 │             </div>
   60 │           </div>
   61 │         </div>
   62 │       </div>
   63 │     </div>
   64 │     <div class="control-section">
   65 │       <div class="section-title">路灯列表</div>
   66 │       <el-table :data="filteredLights" border class="data-table">
   67 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" />
   68 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="设备编号" width="100" />
   69 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="路灯名称" />
   70 │         <el-table-column prop="location" label="安装位置" />
   71 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
   72 │           <template #default="scope">
   73 │             <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)">
   74 │               {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }}
   75 │             </el-tag>
   76 │           </template>
   77 │         </el-table-column>
   78 │         <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="100" />
   79 │         <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(W)" width="100" />
   80 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="180">
   81 │           <template #default="scope">
   82 │             <el-button 
   83 │               size="small" 
   84 │               :type="scope.row.status === 'on' ? 'default' : 'primary'"
   85 │               @click="toggleLight(scope.row)"
   86 │             >
   87 │               {{ scope.row.status === 'on' ? '关闭' : '开启' }}
   88 │             </el-button>
   89 │             <el-button size="small" @click="adjustBrightness(scope.row)">调亮度</el-button>
   90 │           </template>
   91 │         </el-table-column>
   92 │       </el-table>
   93 │     </div>
   94 │     <el-dialog title="亮度调节" :visible.sync="brightnessDialogVisible" width="400px">
   95 │       <div v-if="currentLight" class="brightness-dialog">
   96 │         <div class="light-info">{{ currentLight.name }}</div>
   97 │         <el-slider 
   98 │           v-model="currentBrightness" 
   99 │           :min="0" 
  100 │           :max="100" 
  101 │           :step="1"
  102 │           show-input
  103 │         />
  104 │       </div>
  105 │       <template #footer>
  106 │         <el-button @click="brightnessDialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
  107 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="confirmBrightness">确认</el-button>
  108 │       </template>
  109 │     </el-dialog>
  110 │   </div>
  111 │ </template>
  112 │ 
  113 │ <script setup>
  114 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  115 │ import { VideoPlay, VideoPause, Grid, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  116 │ import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData'
  117 │ 
  118 │ const icons = { Power: VideoPlay, PowerOff: VideoPause, Batch: Grid, MapPin: MapLocation }
  119 │ const selectedArea = ref('all')
  120 │ const brightnessValue = ref(80)
  121 │ const brightnessDialogVisible = ref(false)
  122 │ const currentLight = ref(null)
  123 │ const currentBrightness = ref(80)
  124 │ const selectedLights = ref([])
  125 │ 
  126 │ const areas = [
  127 │   { id: 'all', name: '全部区域', icon: MapLocation },
  128 │   { id: 'zhongshan', name: '中山路', icon: MapLocation },
  129 │   { id: 'renmin', name: '人民路', icon: MapLocation },
  130 │   { id: 'jiefang', name: '解放路', icon: MapLocation },
  131 │   { id: 'gongyuan', name: '公园路', icon: MapLocation },
  132 │   { id: 'wenhua', name: '文化路', icon: MapLocation }
  133 │ ]
  134 │ 
  135 │ const brightnessLevels = [30, 50, 70, 85, 100]
  136 │ 
  137 │ const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData])
  138 │ 
  139 │ const filteredLights = computed(() => {
  140 │   if (selectedArea.value === 'all') return tableData.value
  141 │   const areaMap = {
  142 │     zhongshan: '中山路',
  143 │     renmin: '人民路',
  144 │     jiefang: '解放路',
  145 │     gongyuan: '公园路',
  146 │     wenhua: '文化路'
  147 │   }
  148 │   return tableData.value.filter(item => item.location.includes(areaMap[selectedArea.value]))
  149 │ })
  150 │ 
  151 │ const getAreaCount = (areaId) => {
  152 │   if (areaId === 'all') return tableData.value.length
  153 │   const areaMap = {
  154 │     zhongshan: '中山路',
  155 │     renmin: '人民路',
  156 │     jiefang: '解放路',
  157 │     gongyuan: '公园路',
  158 │     wenhua: '文化路'
  159 │   }
  160 │   return tableData.value.filter(item => item.location.includes(areaMap[areaId])).length
  161 │ }
  162 │ 
  163 │ const getStatusTagType = (status) => {
  164 │   switch (status) {
  165 │     case 'on': return 'success'
  166 │     case 'off': return 'info'
  167 │     case 'fault': return 'danger'
  168 │     default: return 'info'
  169 │   }
  170 │ }
  171 │ 
  172 │ const getStatusText = (status) => {
  173 │   switch (status) {
  174 │     case 'on': return '开启'
  175 │     case 'off': return '关闭'
  176 │     case 'fault': return '故障'
  177 │     default: return status
  178 │   }
  179 │ }
  180 │ 
  181 │ const selectArea = (areaId) => {
  182 │   selectedArea.value = areaId
  183 │ }
  184 │ 
  185 │ const controlAll = (action) => {
  186 │   filteredLights.value.forEach(light => {
  187 │     if (light.status !== 'fault') {
  188 │       light.status = action
  189 │       light.brightness = action === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0
  190 │     }
  191 │   })
  192 │ }
  193 │ 
  194 │ const toggleLight = (row) => {
  195 │   if (row.status === 'fault') return
  196 │   row.status = row.status === 'on' ? 'off' : 'on'
  197 │   row.brightness = row.status === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0
  198 │ }
  199 │ 
  200 │ const onBrightnessChange = (val) => {
  201 │   filteredLights.value.forEach(light => {
  202 │     if (light.status === 'on') {
  203 │       light.brightness = val
  204 │     }
  205 │   })
  206 │ }
  207 │ 
  208 │ const setBrightness = (level) => {
  209 │   brightnessValue.value = level
  210 │   onBrightnessChange(level)
  211 │ }
  212 │ 
  213 │ const adjustBrightness = (row) => {
  214 │   if (row.status === 'fault') return
  215 │   currentLight.value = row
  216 │   currentBrightness.value = row.brightness
  217 │   brightnessDialogVisible.value = true
  218 │ }
  219 │ 
  220 │ const confirmBrightness = () => {
  221 │   if (currentLight.value && currentLight.value.status !== 'fault') {
  222 │     currentLight.value.brightness = currentBrightness.value
  223 │     if (currentLight.value.status === 'off') {
  224 │       currentLight.value.status = 'on'
  225 │     }
  226 │   }
  227 │   brightnessDialogVisible.value = false
  228 │ }
  229 │ 
  230 │ const batchControl = () => {
  231 │   selectedLights.value.forEach(id => {
  232 │     const light = tableData.value.find(l => l.id === id)
  233 │     if (light && light.status !== 'fault') {
  234 │       light.status = 'on'
  235 │       light.brightness = brightnessValue.value
  236 │     }
  237 │   })
  238 │ }
  239 │ </script>
  240 │ 
  241 │ <style scoped>
  242 │ .control-section {
  243 │   margin-bottom: 25px;
  244 │ }
  245 │ 
  246 │ .section-title {
  247 │   font-size: 16px;
  248 │   font-weight: 600;
  249 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  250 │   color: #333;
  251 │ }
  252 │ 
  253 │ .area-selector {
  254 │   display: flex;
  255 │   gap: 15px;
  256 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  257 │ }
  258 │ 
  259 │ .area-card {
  260 │   flex: 0 0 calc(16.666% - 12px);
  261 │   min-width: 120px;
  262 │   padding: 20px;
  263 │   border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  264 │   border-radius: 8px;
  265 │   cursor: pointer;
  266 │   transition: all 0.3s;
  267 │   text-align: center;
  268 │   
  269 │   &:hover {
  270 │     border-color: #1890ff;
  271 │     background: #f0f7ff;
  272 │   }
  273 │   
  274 │   &.active {
  275 │     border-color: #1890ff;
  276 │     background: #e6f7ff;
  277 │   }
  278 │ }
  279 │ 
  280 │ .area-icon {
  281 │   font-size: 24px;
  282 │   color: #1890ff;
  283 │   margin-bottom: 8px;
  284 │ }
  285 │ 
  286 │ .area-name {
  287 │   display: block;
  288 │   font-size: 14px;
  289 │   color: #333;
  290 │ }
  291 │ 
  292 │ .area-count {
  293 │   display: block;
  294 │   font-size: 12px;
  295 │   color: #999;
  296 │   margin-top: 4px;
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ .control-panel {
  300 │   background: #fafafa;
  301 │   padding: 20px;
  302 │   border-radius: 8px;
  303 │ }
  304 │ 
  305 │ .control-row {
  306 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  307 │   
  308 │   &:last-child {
  309 │     margin-bottom: 0;
  310 │   }
  311 │ }
  312 │ 
  313 │ .control-btn-group {
  314 │   display: flex;
  315 │   gap: 15px;
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ .brightness-control {
  319 │   display: flex;
  320 │   flex-direction: column;
  321 │   gap: 15px;
  322 │ }
  323 │ 
  324 │ .control-label {
  325 │   font-weight: 500;
  326 │   color: #666;
  327 │ }
  328 │ 
  329 │ .brightness-slider {
  330 │   display: flex;
  331 │   align-items: center;
  332 │   gap: 15px;
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ .brightness-value {
  336 │   font-weight: 600;
  337 │   color: #1890ff;
  338 │   min-width: 60px;
  339 │ }
  340 │ 
  341 │ .quick-buttons {
  342 │   display: flex;
  343 │   gap: 10px;
  344 │ }
  345 │ 
  346 │ .data-table {
  347 │   width: 100%;
  348 │ }
  349 │ 
  350 │ .brightness-dialog {
  351 │   padding: 20px 0;
  352 │ }
  353 │ 
  354 │ .light-info {
  355 │   font-weight: 600;
  356 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  357 │   color: #333;
  358 │ }
  359 │ </style>
  360 │

📄 views/lighting/LightStatus.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">路灯实时状态</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="refreshData">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Refresh" />
    8 │           刷新数据
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <div class="stats-card">
   13 │       <div class="stat-item">
   14 │         <span class="stat-value online">{{ onlineCount }}</span>
   15 │         <span class="stat-label">在线</span>
   16 │       </div>
   17 │       <div class="stat-item">
   18 │         <span class="stat-value offline">{{ offlineCount }}</span>
   19 │         <span class="stat-label">离线</span>
   20 │       </div>
   21 │       <div class="stat-item">
   22 │         <span class="stat-value fault">{{ faultCount }}</span>
   23 │         <span class="stat-label">故障</span>
   24 │       </div>
   25 │       <div class="stat-item">
   26 │         <span class="stat-value total">{{ totalCount }}</span>
   27 │         <span class="stat-label">总数</span>
   28 │       </div>
   29 │     </div>
   30 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   31 │       <el-select v-model="statusFilter" placeholder="状态筛选" class="filter-select">
   32 │         <el-option label="全部" value="" />
   33 │         <el-option label="开启" value="on" />
   34 │         <el-option label="关闭" value="off" />
   35 │         <el-option label="故障" value="fault" />
   36 │       </el-select>
   37 │       <el-input v-model="searchKeyword" placeholder="搜索路灯名称或位置" class="filter-input" />
   38 │     </div>
   39 │     <el-table :data="filteredData" border class="data-table">
   40 │       <el-table-column prop="id" label="设备编号" width="100" />
   41 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="路灯名称" />
   42 │       <el-table-column prop="location" label="安装位置" />
   43 │       <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
   44 │         <template #default="scope">
   45 │           <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)">
   46 │             {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }}
   47 │           </el-tag>
   48 │         </template>
   49 │       </el-table-column>
   50 │       <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="100">
   51 │         <template #default="scope">
   52 │           <el-progress :percentage="scope.row.brightness" :show-text="false" width="80" />
   53 │           <span class="progress-text">{{ scope.row.brightness }}%</span>
   54 │         </template>
   55 │       </el-table-column>
   56 │       <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(W)" width="100" />
   57 │       <el-table-column prop="lastUpdate" label="更新时间" width="180" />
   58 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="120">
   59 │         <template #default="scope">
   60 │           <el-button size="small" @click="viewDetail(scope.row)">详情</el-button>
   61 │         </template>
   62 │       </el-table-column>
   63 │     </el-table>
   64 │     <el-dialog title="路灯详情" :visible.sync="detailDialogVisible" width="500px">
   65 │       <div v-if="selectedLight" class="detail-content">
   66 │         <el-form label-width="100px">
   67 │           <el-form-item label="设备编号">{{ selectedLight.id }}</el-form-item>
   68 │           <el-form-item label="路灯名称">{{ selectedLight.name }}</el-form-item>
   69 │           <el-form-item label="安装位置">{{ selectedLight.location }}</el-form-item>
   70 │           <el-form-item label="当前状态">
   71 │             <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(selectedLight.status)">
   72 │               {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }}
   73 │             </el-tag>
   74 │           </el-form-item>
   75 │           <el-form-item label="亮度">
   76 │             <el-progress :percentage="selectedLight.brightness" :show-text="true" />
   77 │           </el-form-item>
   78 │           <el-form-item label="功率">{{ selectedLight.power }}W</el-form-item>
   79 │           <el-form-item label="最后更新">{{ selectedLight.lastUpdate }}</el-form-item>
   80 │         </el-form>
   81 │       </div>
   82 │     </el-dialog>
   83 │   </div>
   84 │ </template>
   85 │ 
   86 │ <script setup>
   87 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   88 │ import { Refresh } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   89 │ import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData'
   90 │ 
   91 │ const icons = { Refresh }
   92 │ const statusFilter = ref('')
   93 │ const searchKeyword = ref('')
   94 │ const detailDialogVisible = ref(false)
   95 │ const selectedLight = ref(null)
   96 │ 
   97 │ const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData])
   98 │ 
   99 │ const totalCount = computed(() => tableData.value.length)
  100 │ const onlineCount = computed(() => tableData.value.filter(item => item.status === 'on').length)
  101 │ const offlineCount = computed(() => tableData.value.filter(item => item.status === 'off').length)
  102 │ const faultCount = computed(() => tableData.value.filter(item => item.status === 'fault').length)
  103 │ 
  104 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  105 │   return tableData.value.filter(item => {
  106 │     const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value
  107 │     const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || 
  108 │       item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) ||
  109 │       item.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase())
  110 │     return statusMatch && keywordMatch
  111 │   })
  112 │ })
  113 │ 
  114 │ const getStatusTagType = (status) => {
  115 │   switch (status) {
  116 │     case 'on': return 'success'
  117 │     case 'off': return 'info'
  118 │     case 'fault': return 'danger'
  119 │     default: return 'info'
  120 │   }
  121 │ }
  122 │ 
  123 │ const getStatusText = (status) => {
  124 │   switch (status) {
  125 │     case 'on': return '开启'
  126 │     case 'off': return '关闭'
  127 │     case 'fault': return '故障'
  128 │     default: return status
  129 │   }
  130 │ }
  131 │ 
  132 │ const refreshData = () => {
  133 │   tableData.value = [...lightStatusData]
  134 │ }
  135 │ 
  136 │ const viewDetail = (row) => {
  137 │   selectedLight.value = row
  138 │   detailDialogVisible.value = true
  139 │ }
  140 │ </script>
  141 │ 
  142 │ <style scoped>
  143 │ .stats-card {
  144 │   display: flex;
  145 │   gap: 20px;
  146 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  147 │ }
  148 │ 
  149 │ .stat-item {
  150 │   flex: 1;
  151 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  152 │   padding: 20px;
  153 │   border-radius: 8px;
  154 │   text-align: center;
  155 │   color: #fff;
  156 │ }
  157 │ 
  158 │ .stat-value {
  159 │   display: block;
  160 │   font-size: 32px;
  161 │   font-weight: 600;
  162 │   margin-bottom: 5px;
  163 │ }
  164 │ 
  165 │ .stat-label {
  166 │   font-size: 14px;
  167 │   opacity: 0.9;
  168 │ }
  169 │ 
  170 │ .filter-bar {
  171 │   display: flex;
  172 │   gap: 15px;
  173 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  174 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  175 │ }
  176 │ 
  177 │ .filter-select {
  178 │   width: 150px;
  179 │ }
  180 │ 
  181 │ .filter-input {
  182 │   width: 250px;
  183 │ }
  184 │ 
  185 │ .data-table {
  186 │   width: 100%;
  187 │ }
  188 │ 
  189 │ .progress-text {
  190 │   margin-left: 10px;
  191 │   font-size: 12px;
  192 │   color: #666;
  193 │ }
  194 │ 
  195 │ .detail-content {
  196 │   padding: 10px 0;
  197 │ }
  198 │ </style>
  199 │

📄 views/lighting/LightingHome.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">快捷首页</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-date-picker
    7 │           v-model="dateRange"
    8 │           type="daterange"
    9 │           range-separator="至"
   10 │           start-placeholder="开始日期"
   11 │           end-placeholder="结束日期"
   12 │           style="margin-right: 10px;"
   13 │         />
   14 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="refreshData">
   15 │           <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   16 │           刷新数据
   17 │         </el-button>
   18 │       </div>
   19 │     </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │     <el-row :gutter="20" class="statistics-row">
   22 │       <el-col :span="6">
   23 │         <div class="stat-card">
   24 │           <div class="stat-icon blue">
   25 │             <el-icon><Postcard /></el-icon>
   26 │           </div>
   27 │           <div class="stat-info">
   28 │             <div class="stat-value">{{ statistics.poleCount }}</div>
   29 │             <div class="stat-label">灯杆总数</div>
   30 │           </div>
   31 │         </div>
   32 │       </el-col>
   33 │       <el-col :span="6">
   34 │         <div class="stat-card">
   35 │           <div class="stat-icon green">
   36 │             <el-icon><Cpu /></el-icon>
   37 │           </div>
   38 │           <div class="stat-info">
   39 │             <div class="stat-value">{{ statistics.controllerCount }}</div>
   40 │             <div class="stat-label">控制器数量</div>
   41 │           </div>
   42 │         </div>
   43 │       </el-col>
   44 │       <el-col :span="6">
   45 │         <div class="stat-card">
   46 │           <div class="stat-icon orange">
   47 │             <el-icon><Sunrise /></el-icon>
   48 │           </div>
   49 │           <div class="stat-info">
   50 │             <div class="stat-value">{{ statistics.lampCount }}</div>
   51 │             <div class="stat-label">灯具总数</div>
   52 │           </div>
   53 │         </div>
   54 │       </el-col>
   55 │       <el-col :span="6">
   56 │         <div class="stat-card">
   57 │           <div class="stat-icon purple">
   58 │             <el-icon><Timer /></el-icon>
   59 │           </div>
   60 │           <div class="stat-info">
   61 │             <div class="stat-value">{{ statistics.onlineRate }}%</div>
   62 │             <div class="stat-label">在线率</div>
   63 │           </div>
   64 │         </div>
   65 │       </el-col>
   66 │     </el-row>
   67 │ 
   68 │     <el-row :gutter="20" class="statistics-row">
   69 │       <el-col :span="12">
   70 │         <div class="chart-card">
   71 │           <div class="chart-title">能耗统计</div>
   72 │           <div class="energy-grid">
   73 │             <div class="energy-item">
   74 │               <span class="energy-label">昨日能耗</span>
   75 │               <span class="energy-value">{{ energy.yesterday }} kWh</span>
   76 │             </div>
   77 │             <div class="energy-item">
   78 │               <span class="energy-label">本周能耗</span>
   79 │               <span class="energy-value">{{ energy.thisWeek }} kWh</span>
   80 │             </div>
   81 │             <div class="energy-item">
   82 │               <span class="energy-label">本月能耗</span>
   83 │               <span class="energy-value">{{ energy.thisMonth }} kWh</span>
   84 │             </div>
   85 │             <div class="energy-item">
   86 │               <span class="energy-label">年度能耗</span>
   87 │               <span class="energy-value">{{ energy.thisYear }} kWh</span>
   88 │             </div>
   89 │           </div>
   90 │         </div>
   91 │       </el-col>
   92 │       <el-col :span="6">
   93 │         <div class="chart-card">
   94 │           <div class="chart-title">开关灯时间</div>
   95 │           <div class="time-info">
   96 │             <div class="time-item">
   97 │               <span class="time-label">开灯时间</span>
   98 │               <span class="time-value">{{ switchTime.on }} </span>
   99 │             </div>
  100 │             <div class="time-item">
  101 │               <span class="time-label">关灯时间</span>
  102 │               <span class="time-value">{{ switchTime.off }} </span>
  103 │             </div>
  104 │           </div>
  105 │         </div>
  106 │       </el-col>
  107 │       <el-col :span="6">
  108 │         <div class="chart-card">
  109 │           <div class="chart-title">亮灯率</div>
  110 │           <div class="rate-display">
  111 │             <el-progress
  112 │               type="dashboard"
  113 │               :percentage="lightingRate"
  114 │               :width="120"
  115 │               :stroke-width="10"
  116 │               color="#52c41a"
  117 │             >
  118 │               <template #default>
  119 │                 <span class="rate-value">{{ lightingRate }}%</span>
  120 │               </template>
  121 │             </el-progress>
  122 │           </div>
  123 │         </div>
  124 │       </el-col>
  125 │     </el-row>
  126 │ 
  127 │     <el-row :gutter="20" class="statistics-row">

  132 │             <el-col :span="8">
  133 │               <div class="alert-stat">
  134 │                 <div class="alert-value today">{{ alerts.today }}</div>
  135 │                 <div class="alert-label">今日告警</div>
  136 │               </div>
  137 │             </el-col>
  138 │             <el-col :span="8">
  139 │               <div class="alert-stat">
  140 │                 <div class="alert-value recovered">{{ alerts.recovered }}</div>
  141 │                 <div class="alert-label">已恢复</div>
  142 │               </div>
  143 │             </el-col>
  144 │             <el-col :span="8">
  145 │               <div class="alert-stat">
  146 │                 <div class="alert-value continuing">{{ alerts.continuing }}</div>
  147 │                 <div class="alert-label">持续中</div>
  148 │               </div>
  149 │             </el-col>
  150 │           </el-row>
  151 │         </div>
  152 │       </el-col>
  153 │       <el-col :span="12">
  154 │         <div class="chart-card">
  155 │           <div class="chart-title">故障分析</div>
  156 │           <div class="fault-chart">
  157 │             <div class="fault-bar">
  158 │               <span class="fault-label">通讯故障</span>
  159 │               <div class="bar-container">
  160 │                 <div class="bar-fill comm" :style="{ width: faultAnalysis.comm + '%' }"></div>
  161 │               </div>
  162 │               <span class="fault-value">{{ faultAnalysis.comm }}%</span>
  163 │             </div>
  164 │             <div class="fault-bar">
  165 │               <span class="fault-label">灯具故障</span>
  166 │               <div class="bar-container">
  167 │                 <div class="bar-fill lamp" :style="{ width: faultAnalysis.lamp + '%' }"></div>
  168 │               </div>
  169 │               <span class="fault-value">{{ faultAnalysis.lamp }}%</span>
  170 │             </div>
  171 │             <div class="fault-bar">
  172 │               <span class="fault-label">电源故障</span>
  173 │               <div class="bar-container">
  174 │                 <div class="bar-fill power" :style="{ width: faultAnalysis.power + '%' }"></div>
  175 │               </div>
  176 │               <span class="fault-value">{{ faultAnalysis.power }}%</span>
  177 │             </div>
  178 │             <div class="fault-bar">
  179 │               <span class="fault-label">其他故障</span>
  180 │               <div class="bar-container">
  181 │                 <div class="bar-fill other" :style="{ width: faultAnalysis.other + '%' }"></div>
  182 │               </div>
  183 │               <span class="fault-value">{{ faultAnalysis.other }}%</span>
  184 │             </div>
  185 │           </div>
  186 │         </div>
  187 │       </el-col>
  188 │     </el-row>

📄 views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">照明策略</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBatchIssue" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">
    7 │           <el-icon><Promotion /></el-icon>
    8 │           批量下发
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │         <el-button type="warning" @click="handleBatchPause" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">
   11 │           <el-icon><VideoPause /></el-icon>
   12 │           批量暂停
   13 │         </el-button>
   14 │         <el-button @click="refreshData">
   15 │           <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   16 │           刷新
   17 │         </el-button>
   18 │       </div>
   19 │     </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │     <div class="main-content">
   22 │       <div class="left-sidebar">
   23 │         <div class="sidebar-header">
   24 │           <el-input
   25 │             v-model="searchTreeText"
   26 │             placeholder="请输入层级名称"
   27 │             class="sidebar-search"
   28 │           >
   29 │             <template #prefix>
   30 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   31 │             </template>
   32 │           </el-input>
   33 │         </div>
   34 │         <el-tree
   35 │           :data="treeData"
   36 │           :props="defaultProps"
   37 │           show-checkbox
   38 │           node-key="id"
   39 │           :expand-on-click-node="false"
   40 │           @check-change="handleCheckChange"
   41 │         />
   42 │       </div>
   43 │ 
   44 │       <div class="right-content">
   45 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   46 │           <el-input
   47 │             v-model="filters.name"
   48 │             placeholder="请输入策略名称"
   49 │             class="filter-input"
   50 │             clearable
   51 │           >
   52 │             <template #prefix>
   53 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   54 │             </template>
   55 │           </el-input>
   56 │           <el-select v-model="filters.type" placeholder="请选择策略类型" class="filter-select" clearable>
   57 │             <el-option label="定时策略" value="time" />
   58 │             <el-option label="光感策略" value="light" />
   59 │             <el-option label="手动策略" value="manual" />
   60 │           </el-select>
   61 │           <el-select v-model="filters.status" placeholder="请选择执行状态" class="filter-select" clearable>
   62 │             <el-option label="未下发" value="not_issued" />
   63 │             <el-option label="已下发" value="issued" />
   64 │             <el-option label="暂停" value="paused" />
   65 │             <el-option label="过期" value="expired" />
   66 │           </el-select>
   67 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="searchStrategies">查询</el-button>
   68 │           <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   69 │         </div>
   70 │ 
   71 │         <el-table :data="filteredStrategies" border class="strategy-table" style="width: 100%;" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   72 │           <el-table-column type="selection" width="55" />
   73 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="80" align="center" />
   74 │           <el-table-column prop="name" label="策略名称" min-width="180" />
   75 │           <el-table-column prop="type" label="策略类型" width="120" align="center">
   76 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   77 │               <el-tag :type="getTypeTagType(row.type)" size="small">
   78 │                 {{ getTypeText(row.type) }}
   79 │               </el-tag>
   80 │             </template>
   81 │           </el-table-column>
   82 │           <el-table-column prop="executeTime" label="执行时间" min-width="180" />
   83 │           <el-table-column prop="status" label="执行状态" width="100" align="center">
   84 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   85 │               <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(row.status)" size="small">
   86 │                 {{ getStatusText(row.status) }}
   87 │               </el-tag>
   88 │             </template>
   89 │           </el-table-column>
   90 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="220" fixed="right" align="center">
   91 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   92 │               <el-button type="success" size="small" @click="handleIssue(row)" v-if="row.status === 'not_issued'">下发</el-button>
   93 │               <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="handlePause(row)" v-if="row.status === 'issued'">暂停</el-button>
   94 │               <el-button type="info" size="small" @click="viewDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
   95 │             </template>
   96 │           </el-table-column>
   97 │         </el-table>
   98 │ 
   99 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
  100 │           <el-pagination
  101 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  102 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  103 │             :total="total"
  104 │             :page-sizes="[10, 20, 50, 100]"
  105 │             layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  106 │             @size-change="handleSizeChange"
  107 │             @current-change="handleCurrentChange"
  108 │           />
  109 │         </div>
  110 │       </div>
  111 │     </div>
  112 │ 
  113 │     <el-dialog v-model="detailVisible" title="策略详情" width="600px">
  114 │       <el-descriptions v-if="currentStrategy" :column="2" border>
  115 │         <el-descriptions-item label="策略名称">{{ currentStrategy.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
  116 │         <el-descriptions-item label="策略类型">
  117 │           <el-tag :type="getTypeTagType(currentStrategy.type)" size="small">
  118 │             {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }}
  119 │           </el-tag>
  120 │         </el-descriptions-item>
  121 │         <el-descriptions-item label="执行时间" :span="2">{{ currentStrategy.executeTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
  122 │         <el-descriptions-item label="执行状态">
  123 │           <el-tag :type="getStatusTagType(currentStrategy.status)" size="small">
  124 │             {{ getStatusText(currentStrategy.status) }}
  125 │           </el-tag>
  126 │         </el-descriptions-item>
  127 │         <el-descriptions-item label="描述" :span="2">{{ currentStrategy.description }}</el-descriptions-item>
  128 │       </el-descriptions>
  129 │       <template #footer>
  130 │         <el-button @click="detailVisible = false">关闭</el-button>
  131 │       </template>
  132 │     </el-dialog>
  133 │   </div>
  134 │ </template>
  135 │ 
  136 │ <script setup>
  137 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  138 │ import { Refresh, Search, Promotion, VideoPause } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  139 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  140 │ 
  141 │ const searchTreeText = ref('')
  142 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  143 │ const pageSize = ref(10)
  144 │ const total = ref(0)
  145 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  146 │ const detailVisible = ref(false)
  147 │ const currentStrategy = ref(null)
  148 │ 
  149 │ const filters = reactive({
  150 │   name: '',
  151 │   type: '',
  152 │   status: ''
  153 │ })
  154 │ 
  155 │ const defaultProps = {
  156 │   children: 'children',
  157 │   label: 'label'
  158 │ }
  159 │ 
  160 │ const treeData = ref([
  161 │   {
  162 │     id: 1,
  163 │     label: '长沙',
  164 │     children: [
  165 │       { 
  166 │         id: 11, 
  167 │         label: '岳麓区',
  168 │         children: [
  169 │           { id: 111, label: '梅溪湖隧道' },
  170 │           { id: 112, label: '梅溪湖隧道1栋' }
  171 │         ]
  172 │       }
  173 │     ]
  174 │   }
  175 │ ])
  176 │ 
  177 │ const strategies = ref([
  178 │   { id: 1, no: 1, name: '城市主干道夜间照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00', status: 'issued', description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%' },
  179 │   { id: 2, no: 2, name: '园区展厅照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00', status: 'issued', description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮' },
  180 │   { id: 3, no: 3, name: '园区照明光感控制', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'paused', description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度' },
  181 │   { id: 4, no: 4, name: '特殊活动照明', type: 'manual', executeTime: '手动控制', status: 'not_issued', description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略' },
  182 │   { id: 5, no: 5, name: '节假日照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '节假日全天', status: 'expired', description: '节假日照明策略' },
  183 │   { id: 6, no: 6, name: '景观灯照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每晚19:00-23:00', status: 'issued', description: '景观灯照明策略' },
  184 │   { id: 7, no: 7, name: '地下车库照明', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'issued', description: '地下车库照明策略' }
  185 │ ])
  186 │ 
  187 │ total.value = strategies.value.length
  188 │ 
  189 │ const filteredStrategies = computed(() => {
  190 │   let result = strategies.value
  191 │   if (filters.name) {
  192 │     result = result.filter(s => s.name.includes(filters.name))
  193 │   }
  194 │   if (filters.type) {
  195 │     result = result.filter(s => s.type === filters.type)
  196 │   }
  197 │   if (filters.status) {
  198 │     result = result.filter(s => s.status === filters.status)
  199 │   }
  200 │   return result
  201 │ })
  202 │ 
  203 │ const getTypeText = (type) => {
  204 │   const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' }
  205 │   return map[type] || type
  206 │ }
  207 │ 
  208 │ const getTypeTagType = (type) => {
  209 │   const map = { time: 'primary', light: 'success', manual: 'warning' }
  210 │   return map[type] || ''
  211 │ }
  212 │ 
  213 │ const getStatusText = (status) => {
  214 │   const map = { not_issued: '未下发', issued: '已下发', paused: '暂停', expired: '过期' }
  215 │   return map[status] || status
  216 │ }
  217 │ 
  218 │ const getStatusTagType = (status) => {
  219 │   const map = { not_issued: 'info', issued: 'success', paused: 'warning', expired: 'danger' }
  220 │   return map[status] || ''
  221 │ }
  222 │ 
  223 │ const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) => {
  224 │   console.log('selected hierarchy:', data, checked)
  225 │ }
  226 │ 
  227 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  228 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  229 │ }
  230 │ 
  231 │ const searchStrategies = () => {
  232 │   currentPage.value = 1
  233 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  234 │ }
  235 │ 
  236 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  237 │   Object.assign(filters, {
  238 │     name: '',
  239 │     type: '',
  240 │     status: ''
  241 │   })
  242 │   currentPage.value = 1
  243 │ }
  244 │ 
  245 │ const refreshData = () => {
  246 │   ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
  247 │ }
  248 │ 
  249 │ const viewDetail = (row) => {
  250 │   currentStrategy.value = row
  251 │   detailVisible.value = true
  252 │ }
  253 │ 
  254 │ const handleIssue = (row) => {
  255 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要下发策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', {
  256 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  257 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  258 │     type: 'primary'
  259 │   }).then(() => {
  260 │     row.status = 'issued'
  261 │     ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」下发成功`)
  262 │   }).catch(() => {})
  263 │ }
  264 │ 
  265 │ const handlePause = (row) => {
  266 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要暂停策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', {
  267 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  268 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  269 │     type: 'warning'
  270 │   }).then(() => {
  271 │     row.status = 'paused'
  272 │     ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」已暂停`)
  273 │   }).catch(() => {})
  274 │ }
  275 │ 
  276 │ const handleBatchIssue = () => {
  277 │   const notIssuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r => r.status === 'not_issued').length
  278 │   if (notIssuedCount === 0) {
  279 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择未下发的策略')
  280 │     return
  281 │   }
  282 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量下发选中的 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', {
  283 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  284 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  285 │     type: 'primary'
  286 │   }).then(() => {
  287 │     selectedRows.value.forEach(row => {
  288 │       if (row.status === 'not_issued') {
  289 │         row.status = 'issued'
  290 │       }
  291 │     })
  292 │     ElMessage.success(`已成功下发 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略`)
  293 │   }).catch(() => {})
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ const handleBatchPause = () => {
  297 │   const issuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r => r.status === 'issued').length
  298 │   if (issuedCount === 0) {
  299 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择已下发的策略')
  300 │     return
  301 │   }
  302 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量暂停选中的 ${issuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', {
  303 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  304 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  305 │     type: 'warning'
  306 │   }).then(() => {
  307 │     selectedRows.value.forEach(row => {
  308 │       if (row.status === 'issued') {
  309 │         row.status = 'paused'
  310 │       }
  311 │     })
  312 │     ElMessage.success(`已成功暂停 ${issuedCount} 个策略`)
  313 │   }).catch(() => {})
  314 │ }
  315 │ 
  316 │ const handleSizeChange = (val) => {
  317 │   pageSize.value = val
  318 │ }
  319 │ 
  320 │ const handleCurrentChange = (val) => {
  321 │   currentPage.value = val
  322 │ }
  323 │ </script>
  324 │ 
  325 │ <style scoped>
  326 │ .page-container {
  327 │   padding: 20px;
  328 │   background: #fff;
  329 │   border-radius: 4px;
  330 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  331 │ }
  332 │ 
  333 │ .page-header {
  334 │   display: flex;
  335 │   justify-content: space-between;
  336 │   align-items: center;
  337 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  338 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  339 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  340 │ }
  341 │ 
  342 │ .page-header .title {
  343 │   font-size: 18px;
  344 │   font-weight: 600;
  345 │   color: #1f1f1f;
  346 │ }
  347 │ 
  348 │ .header-actions {
  349 │   display: flex;
  350 │   gap: 10px;
  351 │   align-items: center;
  352 │ }
  353 │ 
  354 │ .main-content {
  355 │   display: flex;
  356 │   gap: 20px;
  357 │ }
  358 │ 
  359 │ .left-sidebar {
  360 │   width: 200px;
  361 │   background: #fff;
  362 │   border-radius: 4px;
  363 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  364 │   padding: 15px;
  365 │   flex-shrink: 0;
  366 │ }
  367 │ 
  368 │ .sidebar-header {
  369 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  370 │ }
  371 │ 
  372 │ .right-content {
  373 │   flex: 1;
  374 │ }
  375 │ 
  376 │ .filter-bar {
  377 │   display: flex;
  378 │   align-items: center;
  379 │   gap: 15px;
  380 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  381 │   padding: 15px;
  382 │   background: #fafafa;
  383 │   border-radius: 4px;
  384 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  385 │ }
  386 │ 
  387 │ .filter-input {
  388 │   width: 200px;
  389 │ }
  390 │ 
  391 │ .filter-select {
  392 │   width: 150px;
  393 │ }
  394 │ 
  395 │ .strategy-table {
  396 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  397 │ }
  398 │ 
  399 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  400 │   display: flex;
  401 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  402 │ }
  403 │ </style>

📄 views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">策略管理</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="showAddDialog">
    7 │           <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
    8 │           新增策略
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │ 
   13 │     <el-table :data="strategies" border style="width: 100%; margin-top: 20px;">
   14 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="策略名称" width="180" />
   15 │       <el-table-column prop="type" label="策略类型" width="120">
   16 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   17 │           <el-tag :type="getTypeTag(row.type)" size="small">
   18 │             {{ getTypeText(row.type) }}
   19 │           </el-tag>
   20 │         </template>
   21 │       </el-table-column>
   22 │       <el-table-column prop="action" label="执行动作" width="100">
   23 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   24 │           <el-tag :type="getActionTag(row.action)" size="small">
   25 │             {{ getActionText(row.action) }}
   26 │           </el-tag>
   27 │         </template>
   28 │       </el-table-column>
   29 │       <el-table-column prop="startDate" label="开始日期" width="120" />
   30 │       <el-table-column prop="endDate" label="结束日期" width="120" />
   31 │       <el-table-column prop="deviceCount" label="关联设备数" width="100" align="center" />
   32 │       <el-table-column prop="enabled" label="状态" width="80" align="center">
   33 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   34 │           <el-switch v-model="row.enabled" @change="toggleStrategy(row)" />
   35 │         </template>
   36 │       </el-table-column>
   37 │       <el-table-column prop="description" label="描述" min-width="200" />
   38 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="200" fixed="right">
   39 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   40 │           <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="editStrategy(row)">
   41 │             修改
   42 │           </el-button>
   43 │           <el-button type="info" size="small" @click="viewDetail(row)">
   44 │             详情
   45 │           </el-button>
   46 │           <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="deleteStrategy(row)">
   47 │             删除
   48 │           </el-button>
   49 │         </template>
   50 │       </el-table-column>
   51 │     </el-table>
   52 │ 
   53 │     <el-dialog v-model="dialogVisible" :title="isEdit ? '修改策略' : '新增策略'" width="700px">
   54 │       <el-form :model="form" :rules="rules" ref="formRef" label-width="100px">
   55 │         <el-form-item label="策略名称" prop="name">
   56 │           <el-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="请输入策略名称" />
   57 │         </el-form-item>
   58 │         <el-form-item label="策略类型" prop="type">
   59 │           <el-select v-model="form.type" placeholder="请选择策略类型" style="width: 100%;" @change="onTypeChange">
   60 │             <el-option label="时间执行" value="time" />
   61 │             <el-option label="经纬度执行" value="coordinate" />
   62 │             <el-option label="计时执行" value="timer" />
   63 │           </el-select>
   64 │         </el-form-item>
   65 │         
   66 │         <div v-if="form.type === 'time'" class="type-form">
   67 │           <el-form-item label="执行动作" prop="action">
   68 │             <el-radio-group v-model="form.action">
   69 │               <el-radio label="on">开灯</el-radio>
   70 │               <el-radio label="off">关灯</el-radio>
   71 │               <el-radio label="dim">调光</el-radio>
   72 │             </el-radio-group>
   73 │           </el-form-item>
   74 │           <el-form-item v-if="form.action === 'dim'" label="亮度值" prop="brightness">
   75 │             <el-slider v-model="form.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
   76 │           </el-form-item>
   77 │           <el-form-item label="执行时间" prop="executeTime">
   78 │             <el-time-picker
   79 │               v-model="form.executeTime"
   80 │               format="HH:mm"
   81 │               placeholder="选择时间"
   82 │               style="width: 100%;"
   83 │             />
   84 │           </el-form-item>
   85 │           <el-form-item label="重复日期" prop="repeatDays">
   86 │             <el-checkbox-group v-model="form.repeatDays">
   87 │               <el-checkbox label="1">周一</el-checkbox>
   88 │               <el-checkbox label="2">周二</el-checkbox>
   89 │               <el-checkbox label="3">周三</el-checkbox>
   90 │               <el-checkbox label="4">周四</el-checkbox>
   91 │               <el-checkbox label="5">周五</el-checkbox>
   92 │               <el-checkbox label="6">周六</el-checkbox>
   93 │               <el-checkbox label="0">周日</el-checkbox>
   94 │             </el-checkbox-group>
   95 │           </el-form-item>
   96 │         </div>
   97 │ 
   98 │         <div v-if="form.type === 'coordinate'" class="type-form">
   99 │           <el-form-item label="执行动作" prop="action">
  100 │             <el-radio-group v-model="form.action">
  101 │               <el-radio label="on">开灯</el-radio>
  102 │               <el-radio label="off">关灯</el-radio>
  103 │               <el-radio label="dim">调光</el-radio>
  104 │             </el-radio-group>
  105 │           </el-form-item>
  106 │           <el-form-item v-if="form.action === 'dim'" label="亮度值" prop="brightness">
  107 │             <el-slider v-model="form.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  108 │           </el-form-item>
  109 │           <el-form-item label="纬度" prop="latitude">
  110 │             <el-input-number v-model="form.latitude" :precision="6" :step="0.000001" style="width: 100%;" />
  111 │           </el-form-item>
  112 │           <el-form-item label="经度" prop="longitude">
  113 │             <el-input-number v-model="form.longitude" :precision="6" :step="0.000001" style="width: 100%;" />
  114 │           </el-form-item>
  115 │           <el-form-item label="日出/日落">
  116 │             <el-radio-group v-model="form.sunEvent">
  117 │               <el-radio label="sunrise">日出执行</el-radio>
  118 │               <el-radio label="sunset">日落执行</el-radio>
  119 │             </el-radio-group>
  120 │           </el-form-item>
  121 │           <el-form-item label="偏移时间" prop="offset">
  122 │             <el-input-number v-model="form.offset" :step="10" style="width: 200px;">
  123 │               <template #append>分钟</template>
  124 │             </el-input-number>
  125 │           </el-form-item>
  126 │         </div>
  127 │ 
  128 │         <div v-if="form.type === 'timer'" class="type-form">
  129 │           <el-form-item label="执行动作" prop="action">
  130 │             <el-radio-group v-model="form.action">
  131 │               <el-radio label="on">开灯</el-radio>
  132 │               <el-radio label="off">关灯</el-radio>
  133 │               <el-radio label="dim">调光</el-radio>
  134 │             </el-radio-group>
  135 │           </el-form-item>
  136 │           <el-form-item v-if="form.action === 'dim'" label="亮度值" prop="brightness">
  137 │             <el-slider v-model="form.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  138 │           </el-form-item>
  139 │           <el-form-item label="间隔时长" prop="interval">
  140 │             <el-input-number v-model="form.interval" :min="1" style="width: 200px;">
  141 │               <template #append>分钟</template>
  142 │             </el-input-number>
  143 │           </el-form-item>
  144 │           <el-form-item label="开始时间" prop="startTime">
  145 │             <el-time-picker
  146 │               v-model="form.startTime"
  147 │               format="HH:mm"
  148 │               placeholder="选择开始时间"
  149 │               style="width: 100%;"
  150 │             />
  151 │           </el-form-item>

  153 │             <el-time-picker
  154 │               v-model="form.endTime"
  155 │               format="HH:mm"
  156 │               placeholder="选择结束时间"
  157 │               style="width: 100%;"
  158 │             />
  159 │           </el-form-item>
  160 │         </div>
  161 │ 
  162 │         <el-form-item label="开始日期" prop="startDate">
  163 │           <el-date-picker
  164 │             v-model="form.startDate"
  165 │             type="date"
  166 │             placeholder="选择开始日期"
  167 │             style="width: 100%;"
  168 │           />
  169 │         </el-form-item>

  171 │           <el-date-picker
  172 │             v-model="form.endDate"
  173 │             type="date"
  174 │             placeholder="选择结束日期"
  175 │             style="width: 100%;"
  176 │           />
  177 │         </el-form-item>

  179 │           <el-select v-model="form.devices" multiple placeholder="请选择关联设备" style="width: 100%;">
  180 │             <el-option label="中山路01号灯" value="1" />
  181 │             <el-option label="中山路02号灯" value="2" />
  182 │             <el-option label="人民路01号灯" value="3" />
  183 │             <el-option label="人民路02号灯" value="4" />
  184 │             <el-option label="解放路01号灯" value="5" />
  185 │             <el-option label="解放路02号灯" value="6" />
  186 │           </el-select>
  187 │         </el-form-item>
  188 │         <el-form-item label="描述">
  189 │           <el-input v-model="form.description" type="textarea" :rows="3" placeholder="请输入策略描述" />
  190 │         </el-form-item>
  191 │       </el-form>
  192 │       <template #footer>
  193 │         <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
  194 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确定</el-button>
  195 │       </template>
  196 │     </el-dialog>
  197 │ 
  198 │     <el-dialog v-model="detailVisible" title="策略详情" width="600px">
  199 │       <el-descriptions v-if="currentStrategy" :column="2" border>
  200 │         <el-descriptions-item label="策略名称">{{ currentStrategy.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
  201 │         <el-descriptions-item label="策略类型">
  202 │           <el-tag :type="getTypeTag(currentStrategy.type)" size="small">
  203 │             {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }}
  204 │           </el-tag>
  205 │         </el-descriptions-item>
  206 │         <el-descriptions-item label="执行动作">
  207 │           <el-tag :type="getActionTag(currentStrategy.action)" size="small">
  208 │             {{ getActionText(currentStrategy.action) }}
  209 │           </el-tag>
  210 │         </el-descriptions-item>
  211 │         <el-descriptions-item label="关联设备数">{{ currentStrategy.deviceCount }}</el-descriptions-item>
  212 │         <el-descriptions-item label="开始日期">{{ currentStrategy.startDate }}</el-descriptions-item>
  213 │         <el-descriptions-item label="结束日期">{{ currentStrategy.endDate }}</el-descriptions-item>
  214 │         <el-descriptions-item label="状态">
  215 │           <el-tag :type="currentStrategy.enabled ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">
  216 │             {{ currentStrategy.enabled ? '已启用' : '已禁用' }}
  217 │           </el-tag>
  218 │         </el-descriptions-item>
  219 │         <el-descriptions-item label="描述" :span="2">{{ currentStrategy.description }}</el-descriptions-item>
  220 │       </el-descriptions>
  221 │       <template #footer>
  222 │         <el-button @click="detailVisible = false">关闭</el-button>
  223 │       </template>
  224 │     </el-dialog>
  225 │   </div>
  226 │ </template>
  227 │ 
  228 │ <script setup>
  229 │ import { ref, reactive } from 'vue'
  230 │ import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  231 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  232 │ 
  233 │ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
  234 │ const detailVisible = ref(false)
  235 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  236 │ const formRef = ref(null)
  237 │ const currentStrategy = ref(null)
  238 │ 
  239 │ const strategies = ref([
  240 │   { id: 1, name: '夜间节能模式', type: 'time', action: 'dim', brightness: 60, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['1','2','3','4','5'], deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '工作日夜间降低亮度至60%' },
  241 │   { id: 2, name: '全夜亮灯模式', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 30, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '周末全天保持全亮' },
  242 │   { id: 3, name: '日出日落策略', type: 'coordinate', action: 'dim', brightness: 80, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, deviceCount: 100, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '根据经纬度自动开关灯' },
  243 │   { id: 4, name: '深夜间隔调光', type: 'timer', action: 'dim', brightness: 40, interval: 30, startTime: '23:00', endTime: '05:00', deviceCount: 20, enabled: false, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '深夜每30分钟调光一次' },
  244 │   { id: 5, name: '节假日庆典', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 80, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-02-01', endDate: '2024-02-29', description: '节假日期间全亮模式' },
  245 │   { id: 6, name: '故障后恢复', type: 'coordinate', action: 'on', brightness: 100, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunrise', offset: 0, deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '日出时自动恢复所有灯具' }
  246 │ ])
  247 │ 
  248 │ const form = reactive({
  249 │   name: '',
  250 │   type: 'time',
  251 │   action: 'on',
  252 │   brightness: 100,
  253 │   executeTime: '',
  254 │   repeatDays: [],
  255 │   latitude: 31.230416,
  256 │   longitude: 121.473701,
  257 │   sunEvent: 'sunset',
  258 │   offset: 0,
  259 │   interval: 30,
  260 │   startTime: '',
  261 │   endTime: '',
  262 │   startDate: '',
  263 │   endDate: '',
  264 │   devices: [],
  265 │   description: ''
  266 │ })
  267 │ 
  268 │ const rules = {
  269 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  270 │   type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  271 │   action: [{ required: true, message: '请选择执行动作', trigger: 'change' }]
  272 │ }
  273 │ 
  274 │ const getTypeText = (type) => {
  275 │   const map = { 'time': '时间执行', 'coordinate': '经纬度执行', 'timer': '计时执行' }
  276 │   return map[type] || type
  277 │ }
  278 │ 
  279 │ const getTypeTag = (type) => {
  280 │   const map = { 'time': '', 'coordinate': 'success', 'timer': 'warning' }
  281 │   return map[type] || ''
  282 │ }
  283 │ 
  284 │ const getActionText = (action) => {
  285 │   const map = { 'on': '开灯', 'off': '关灯', 'dim': '调光' }
  286 │   return map[action] || action
  287 │ }
  288 │ 
  289 │ const getActionTag = (action) => {
  290 │   const map = { 'on': 'success', 'off': 'warning', 'dim': '' }
  291 │   return map[action] || ''
  292 │ }
  293 │ 
  294 │ const onTypeChange = () => {
  295 │   form.action = 'on'
  296 │   form.brightness = 100
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ const showAddDialog = () => {
  300 │   isEdit.value = false
  301 │   resetForm()
  302 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  303 │ }
  304 │ 
  305 │ const editStrategy = (row) => {
  306 │   isEdit.value = true
  307 │   Object.assign(form, row)
  308 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  309 │ }
  310 │ 
  311 │ const viewDetail = (row) => {
  312 │   currentStrategy.value = row
  313 │   detailVisible.value = true
  314 │ }
  315 │ 
  316 │ const deleteStrategy = (row) => {
  317 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除策略"${row.name}"吗？`, '提示', {
  318 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  319 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  320 │     type: 'warning'
  321 │   }).then(() => {
  322 │     const index = strategies.value.findIndex(s => s.id === row.id)
  323 │     if (index > -1) {
  324 │       strategies.value.splice(index, 1)
  325 │       ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  326 │     }
  327 │   }).catch(() => {})
  328 │ }
  329 │ 
  330 │ const toggleStrategy = (row) => {
  331 │   ElMessage.success(`策略"${row.name}"已${row.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`)
  332 │ }
  333 │ 
  334 │ const submitForm = () => {
  335 │   formRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  336 │     if (valid) {
  337 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  338 │         ElMessage.success('策略修改成功')
  339 │       } else {
  340 │         const newId = Math.max(...strategies.value.map(s => s.id)) + 1
  341 │         strategies.value.push({
  342 │           id: newId,
  343 │           ...form,
  344 │           deviceCount: form.devices.length,
  345 │           enabled: true
  346 │         })
  347 │         ElMessage.success('策略创建成功')
  348 │       }
  349 │       dialogVisible.value = false
  350 │     }
  351 │   })
  352 │ }
  353 │ 
  354 │ const resetForm = () => {
  355 │   Object.assign(form, {
  356 │     name: '',
  357 │     type: 'time',
  358 │     action: 'on',
  359 │     brightness: 100,
  360 │     executeTime: '',
  361 │     repeatDays: [],
  362 │     latitude: 31.230416,
  363 │     longitude: 121.473701,
  364 │     sunEvent: 'sunset',
  365 │     offset: 0,
  366 │     interval: 30,
  367 │     startTime: '',
  368 │     endTime: '',
  369 │     startDate: '',
  370 │     endDate: '',
  371 │     devices: [],
  372 │     description: ''
  373 │   })
  374 │ }
  375 │ </script>
  376 │ 
  377 │ <style scoped>
  378 │ .action-toolbar {
  379 │   display: flex;
  380 │   justify-content: space-between;
  381 │   align-items: center;
  382 │ }
  383 │ 
  384 │ .type-form {
  385 │   padding: 15px;
  386 │   background: #fafafa;
  387 │   border-radius: 4px;
  388 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  389 │ }
  390 │ </style>
  391 │

📄 views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">时序策略</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="addStrategy">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Plus" />
    8 │           新增策略
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <el-table :data="strategyList" border class="data-table">
   13 │       <el-table-column prop="id" label="策略编号" width="100" />
   14 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="策略名称" />
   15 │       <el-table-column prop="startTime" label="开始时间" width="100" />
   16 │       <el-table-column prop="endTime" label="结束时间" width="100" />
   17 │       <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="100">
   18 │         <template #default="scope">
   19 │           <el-progress :percentage="scope.row.brightness" :show-text="true" width="80" />
   20 │         </template>
   21 │       </el-table-column>
   22 │       <el-table-column prop="enabled" label="状态" width="100">
   23 │         <template #default="scope">
   24 │           <el-switch 
   25 │             :value="scope.row.enabled" 
   26 │             @change="toggleEnable(scope.row)"
   27 │             active-color="#13ce66"
   28 │             inactive-color="#ff4949"
   29 │           />
   30 │         </template>
   31 │       </el-table-column>
   32 │       <el-table-column prop="createTime" label="创建时间" width="120" />
   33 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="180">
   34 │         <template #default="scope">
   35 │           <el-button size="small" @click="editStrategy(scope.row)">编辑</el-button>
   36 │           <el-button size="small" type="danger" @click="deleteStrategy(scope.row)">删除</el-button>
   37 │         </template>
   38 │       </el-table-column>
   39 │     </el-table>
   40 │     <el-dialog :title="editDialogTitle" :visible.sync="dialogVisible" width="500px">
   41 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   42 │         <el-form-item label="策略名称" prop="name">
   43 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入策略名称" />
   44 │         </el-form-item>
   45 │         <el-form-item label="开始时间" prop="startTime">
   46 │           <el-time-picker 
   47 │             v-model="formData.startTime" 
   48 │             format="HH:mm" 
   49 │             placeholder="选择开始时间"
   50 │           />
   51 │         </el-form-item>
   52 │         <el-form-item label="结束时间" prop="endTime">
   53 │           <el-time-picker 
   54 │             v-model="formData.endTime" 
   55 │             format="HH:mm" 
   56 │             placeholder="选择结束时间"
   57 │           />
   58 │         </el-form-item>
   59 │         <el-form-item label="亮度" prop="brightness">
   60 │           <el-slider 
   61 │             v-model="formData.brightness" 
   62 │             :min="0" 
   63 │             :max="100" 
   64 │             :step="1"
   65 │             show-input
   66 │           />
   67 │         </el-form-item>
   68 │       </el-form>
   69 │       <template #footer>
   70 │         <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
   71 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="saveStrategy">保存</el-button>
   72 │       </template>
   73 │     </el-dialog>
   74 │   </div>
   75 │ </template>
   76 │ 
   77 │ <script setup>
   78 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   79 │ import { Plus, Edit, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   80 │ import { timingStrategies } from '@/data/mockData'
   81 │ 
   82 │ const icons = { Plus, Edit, Delete }
   83 │ const strategyList = ref([...timingStrategies])
   84 │ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
   85 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
   86 │ const formData = ref({
   87 │   id: '',
   88 │   name: '',
   89 │   startTime: '',
   90 │   endTime: '',
   91 │   brightness: 80,
   92 │   enabled: true,
   93 │   createTime: ''
   94 │ })
   95 │ 
   96 │ const editDialogTitle = computed(() => isEdit.value ? '编辑策略' : '新增策略')
   97 │ 
   98 │ const addStrategy = () => {
   99 │   isEdit.value = false
  100 │   formData.value = {
  101 │     id: '',
  102 │     name: '',
  103 │     startTime: '',
  104 │     endTime: '',
  105 │     brightness: 80,
  106 │     enabled: true,
  107 │     createTime: ''
  108 │   }
  109 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  110 │ }
  111 │ 
  112 │ const editStrategy = (row) => {
  113 │   isEdit.value = true
  114 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  115 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  116 │ }
  117 │ 
  118 │ const deleteStrategy = (row) => {
  119 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  120 │     '确定要删除该策略吗？',
  121 │     '提示',
  122 │     {
  123 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  124 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  125 │       type: 'warning'
  126 │     }
  127 │   ).then(() => {
  128 │     const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s => s.id === row.id)
  129 │     if (index > -1) {
  130 │       strategyList.value.splice(index, 1)
  131 │     }
  132 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  133 │   }).catch(() => {
  134 │     ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  135 │   })
  136 │ }
  137 │ 
  138 │ const toggleEnable = (row) => {
  139 │   row.enabled = !row.enabled
  140 │ }
  141 │ 
  142 │ const saveStrategy = () => {
  143 │   if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.startTime || !formData.value.endTime) {
  144 │     ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息')
  145 │     return
  146 │   }
  147 │   
  148 │   if (isEdit.value) {
  149 │     const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s => s.id === formData.value.id)
  150 │     if (index > -1) {
  151 │       strategyList.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
  152 │     }
  153 │     ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  154 │   } else {
  155 │     const newId = 'T' + String(strategyList.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
  156 │     strategyList.value.push({
  157 │       ...formData.value,
  158 │       id: newId,
  159 │       createTime: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  160 │     })
  161 │     ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  162 │   }
  163 │   dialogVisible.value = false
  164 │ }
  165 │ </script>
  166 │ 
  167 │ <style scoped>
  168 │ .data-table {
  169 │   width: 100%;
  170 │ }
  171 │ </style>
  172 │

📄 views/power/CentralControl.vue

   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="main-content">

   40 │               <template #default="{ row }">

   48 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="200" fixed="right" align="center">

  174 │               <el-table :data="moduleList" border size="small">

  192 │                   type="daterange"
  193 │                   range-separator="至"
  194 │                   start-placeholder="开始日期"
  195 │                   end-placeholder="结束日期"
  196 │                   style="width: 300px; margin-right: 10px;"
  197 │                 />
  198 │                 <el-button type="primary">查询</el-button>

  203 │                 </div>

  209 │                   <span class="chart-tab">年</span>
  210 │                 </div>

  215 │                     <span>0.6</span>
  216 │                     <span>0.4</span>
  217 │                     <span>0.2</span>

  219 │                   </div>

  221 │                     <div class="chart-x-axis">
  222 │                       <span>04-21</span>
  223 │                       <span>04-22</span>
  224 │                       <span>04-23</span>
  225 │                       <span>04-24</span>
  226 │                       <span>04-25</span>
  227 │                       <span>04-26</span>
  228 │                       <span>04-27</span>
  229 │                       <span>日楼</span>
  230 │                     </div>
  231 │                   </div>
  232 │                 </div>
  233 │               </div>
  234 │             </div>
  235 │           </el-tab-pane>
  236 │ 
  237 │           <el-tab-pane label="告警信息" name="alarm">
  238 │             <div class="alarm-info-panel">
  239 │               <el-table :data="alarmList" border size="small">
  240 │                 <el-table-column prop="level" label="告警级别" width="100">
  241 │                   <template #default="{ row }">
  242 │                     <div class="alarm-level-dot" :class="row.levelClass"></div>
  243 │                     <span>{{ row.level }}</span>
  244 │                   </template>
  245 │                 </el-table-column>
  246 │                 <el-table-column prop="type" label="告警类型" width="120" />
  247 │                 <el-table-column prop="occurTime" label="告警发生时间" width="180" />
  248 │                 <el-table-column prop="duration" label="持续时间" width="150" />
  249 │                 <el-table-column prop="recoverTime" label="告警恢复时间" width="180" />
  250 │                 <el-table-column prop="description" label="告警描述" min-width="250" />
  251 │                 <el-table-column prop="status" label="告警状态" width="100">
  252 │                   <template #default="{ row }">
  253 │                     <el-tag type="danger" size="small">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
  254 │                   </template>
  255 │                 </el-table-column>
  256 │               </el-table>
  257 │             </div>
  258 │           </el-tab-pane>
  259 │         </el-tabs>
  260 │       </div>
  261 │     </el-dialog>
  262 │ 
  263 │     <el-dialog v-model="showAddDialog" title="新增集控设备" width="550px">
  264 │       <el-form :model="form" :rules="rules" ref="formRef" label-width="120px">
  265 │         <el-form-item label="设备名称" prop="name">
  266 │           <el-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="请输入设备名称" />
  267 │         </el-form-item>
  268 │         <el-form-item label="设备编号" prop="code">
  269 │           <el-input v-model="form.code" placeholder="请输入设备编号" />
  270 │         </el-form-item>
  271 │         <el-form-item label="MAC地址" prop="mac">
  272 │           <el-input v-model="form.mac" placeholder="请输入MAC地址，如：00-14-97-38-DD-D2" />
  273 │         </el-form-item>
  274 │         <el-form-item label="IP地址" prop="ip">
  275 │           <el-input v-model="form.ip" placeholder="请输入IP地址，如：10.80.91.139" />
  276 │         </el-form-item>
  277 │         <el-form-item label="所属配电柜" prop="cabinetId">
  278 │           <el-select v-model="form.cabinetId" placeholder="请选择所属配电柜" style="width: 100%;">
  279 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道1号配电柜" value="1" />
  280 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道2号配电柜" value="2" />
  281 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道1栋1号配电柜" value="3" />
  282 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道1栋2号配电柜" value="4" />
  283 │           </el-select>
  284 │         </el-form-item>
  285 │         <el-form-item label="设备型号" prop="model">
  286 │           <el-select v-model="form.model" placeholder="请选择设备型号" style="width: 100%;">
  287 │             <el-option label="EXC-GLA0605E-P20" value="EXC-GLA0605E-P20" />
  288 │             <el-option label="G420A路灯网关-Pro" value="G420A" />
  289 │           </el-select>
  290 │         </el-form-item>
  291 │         <el-form-item label="备注">
  292 │           <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" :rows="2" placeholder="请输入备注" />
  293 │         </el-form-item>
  294 │       </el-form>
  295 │       <template #footer>
  296 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  297 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确定</el-button>
  298 │       </template>
  299 │     </el-dialog>
  300 │   </div>
  301 │ </template>
  302 │ 
  303 │ <script setup>

  312 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  313 │ const total = ref(3)
  314 │ const searchKeyword = ref('')
  315 │ const treeSearch = ref('')
  316 │ const activeTab = ref('basic')
  317 │ const moduleSearch = ref('')
  318 │ const energyTimeRange = ref('7')
  319 │ const energyDateRange = ref([])

  322 │   children: 'children',
  323 │   label: 'label'

  326 │ const treeData = ref([
  327 │   {
  328 │     id: 1,
  329 │     label: '长沙',
  330 │     children: [
  331 │       {
  332 │         id: 11,
  333 │         label: '岳麓区',
  334 │         children: [
  335 │           { id: 111, label: '梅溪湖隧道', children: [] },
  336 │           { id: 112, label: '梅溪湖隧道1栋', children: [] }
  337 │         ]
  338 │       }
  339 │     ]
  340 │   }
  341 │ ])

  343 │ const form = reactive({
  344 │   name: '',
  345 │   code: '',
  346 │   cabinetId: '',
  347 │   model: '',

  354 │   cabinetId: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属配电柜', trigger: 'change' }]
  355 │ }
  356 │ 
  357 │ const deviceList = ref([

  359 │   { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', mac: '00-14-97-38-DD-D3', ip: '10.80.91.140', networkStatus: 'online', scene: '梅溪湖隧道节能模式', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:28:00' },
  360 │   { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', mac: '00-14-97-38-DD-D4', ip: '10.80.91.141', networkStatus: 'offline', scene: '梅溪湖隧道1栋照明', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 08:15:00' },
  361 │   { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', mac: '00-14-97-38-DD-D5', ip: '10.80.91.142', networkStatus: 'online', scene: '梅溪湖隧道1栋节能', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:32:00' }
  362 │ ])
  363 │

  366 │   { no: 2, circuitNo: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: '关', currentA: '-', currentB: '-', currentC: '-', reportTime: '2025-06-18 18:18:14' },
  367 │   { no: 3, circuitNo: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: '关', currentA: '-', currentB: '-', currentC: '-', reportTime: '2025-06-18 18:18:14' },

  370 │   { no: 6, circuitNo: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: '关', currentA: '-', currentB: '-', currentC: '-', reportTime: '2025-06-18 18:18:14' },
  371 │   { no: 7, circuitNo: 1, circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: '关', currentA: '-', currentB: '-', currentC: '-', reportTime: '2025-06-18 18:18:14' },
  372 │   { no: 8, circuitNo: 2, circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: '关', currentA: '-', currentB: '-', currentC: '-', reportTime: '2025-06-18 18:18:14' }
  373 │ ])
  374 │ 
  375 │ const moduleList = ref([

  377 │   { no: 2, moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', moduleType: 'EXC-G290C-B2' },
  378 │   { no: 3, moduleName: 'EXC_12_4', moduleType: 'EXC-G290C-C3' },
  379 │   { no: 4, moduleName: 'EXC_11_5', moduleType: 'EXC-G290C-D5' },
  380 │   { no: 5, moduleName: 'EXC_14_6', moduleType: 'EXC-G290C-P7' },
  381 │   { no: 6, moduleName: 'EXC_13_7', moduleType: 'EXC-G290C-L4' },

  383 │ ])
  384 │ 
  385 │ const alarmList = ref([
  386 │   { level: '提示告警', levelClass: 'info', type: '网络状态', occurTime: '2025-05-06 16:09:17', duration: '357天1时45分', recoverTime: '-', description: '4g网络状态异常,请及时处理', status: '持续中' },
  387 │   { level: '提示告警', levelClass: 'info', type: '离线告警', occurTime: '2025-06-18 19:12:00', duration: '313天22时43分', recoverTime: '-', description: '当前集控产生离线告警，请及时处理！', status: '持续中' }
  388 │ ])
  389 │ 
  390 │ const handleCheckChange = () => {}
  391 │ const viewDeviceDetail = () => {
  392 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  393 │ }
  394 │ const submitForm = () => {

  397 │ }
  398 │ </script>
