📄 views/power/CircuitControl.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="left-panel">
    5 │         <div class="panel-header">
    6 │           <div class="panel-tabs">
    7 │             <span class="tab active">设备</span>
    8 │             <span class="tab">分组</span>
    9 │           </div>
   10 │         </div>
   11 │         <div class="search-box">
   12 │           <el-input
   13 │             v-model="deviceSearch"
   14 │             placeholder="请输入设备名称查询"
   15 │             class="search-input"
   16 │           >
   17 │             <template #prefix>
   18 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   19 │             </template>
   20 │           </el-input>
   21 │         </div>
   22 │         <div class="device-tree">
   23 │           <el-tree
   24 │             :data="deviceTreeData"
   25 │             :props="defaultProps"
   26 │             show-checkbox
   27 │             node-key="id"
   28 │             :expand-on-click-node="false"
   29 │             @check-change="handleDeviceCheck"
   30 │           />
   31 │         </div>
   32 │       </div>
   33 │ 
   34 │       <div class="right-panel">
   35 │         <div class="panel-header">
   36 │           <div class="header-left">
   37 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="batchControl('on')">全开</el-button>
   38 │             <el-button type="danger" @click="batchControl('off')">全关</el-button>
   39 │           </div>
   40 │         </div>
   41 │ 
   42 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   43 │           <el-select v-model="filters.product" placeholder="请选择所属产品" class="filter-select">
   44 │             <el-option label="全部产品" value="" />
   45 │             <el-option label="电信CAT1" value="cat1" />
   46 │             <el-option label="EXC-CAT1" value="exc" />
   47 │           </el-select>
   48 │           <el-select v-model="filters.networkStatus" placeholder="请选择网络状态" class="filter-select">
   49 │             <el-option label="全部状态" value="" />
   50 │             <el-option label="在线" value="online" />
   51 │             <el-option label="离线" value="offline" />
   52 │           </el-select>
   53 │           <el-select v-model="filters.switchStatus" placeholder="请选择开关状态" class="filter-select">
   54 │             <el-option label="全部状态" value="" />
   55 │             <el-option label="开" value="on" />
   56 │             <el-option label="关" value="off" />
   57 │           </el-select>
   58 │           <el-input
   59 │             v-model="filters.search"
   60 │             placeholder="请输入回路/模块名称"
   61 │             class="filter-input"
   62 │           >
   63 │             <template #prefix>
   64 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   65 │             </template>
   66 │           </el-input>
   67 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="searchCircuits">搜索</el-button>
   68 │           <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   69 │         </div>
   70 │ 
   71 │         <el-table :data="filteredCircuits" border class="circuit-table" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   72 │           <el-table-column type="selection" width="45" />
   73 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center" />
   74 │           <el-table-column prop="deviceName" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
   75 │           <el-table-column prop="circuitName" label="回路名称" min-width="150" />
   76 │           <el-table-column prop="moduleName" label="模块名称" min-width="150" />
   77 │           <el-table-column prop="switchStatus" label="开关状态" width="100" align="center">
   78 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   79 │               <el-tag :type="row.switchStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   80 │                 {{ row.switchStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }}
   81 │               </el-tag>
   82 │             </template>
   83 │           </el-table-column>
   84 │           <el-table-column prop="reportTime" label="上报时间" width="180" />
   85 │           <el-table-column prop="networkStatus" label="网络状态" width="100" align="center">
   86 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   87 │               <el-tag :type="row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   88 │                 {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
   89 │               </el-tag>
   90 │             </template>
   91 │           </el-table-column>
   92 │           <el-table-column prop="lastOnline" label="最后在线时间" width="180" />
   93 │           <el-table-column label="开关记录" width="100" align="center">
   94 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   95 │               <el-button type="text" @click="viewSwitchLog(row)">查看</el-button>
   96 │             </template>
   97 │           </el-table-column>
   98 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="120" align="center">
   99 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  100 │               <el-button type="success" size="small" @click="controlCircuit(row, 'on')">开</el-button>
  101 │               <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="controlCircuit(row, 'off')">关</el-button>
  102 │             </template>
  103 │           </el-table-column>
  104 │         </el-table>
  105 │ 
  106 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
  107 │           <el-pagination
  108 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  109 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  110 │             :total="total"
  111 │             :page-sizes="[15, 30, 50, 100]"
  112 │             layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
  113 │           />
  114 │         </div>
  115 │       </div>
  116 │     </div>
  117 │ 
  118 │     <el-dialog v-model="showLogDialog" title="开关记录" width="800px">
  119 │       <div class="log-content">
  120 │         <div class="log-header">
  121 │           <span class="log-title">{{ currentCircuit?.deviceName }} - {{ currentCircuit?.circuitName }}</span>
  122 │         </div>
  123 │         <el-table :data="switchLogs" border size="small">
  124 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="60" align="center" />
  125 │           <el-table-column prop="operator" label="操作人" width="120" />
  126 │           <el-table-column prop="action" label="操作类型" width="100" align="center">
  127 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  128 │               <el-tag :type="row.action === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  129 │                 {{ row.action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭' }}
  130 │               </el-tag>
  131 │             </template>
  132 │           </el-table-column>
  133 │           <el-table-column prop="operateTime" label="操作时间" width="180" />
  134 │           <el-table-column prop="result" label="执行结果" width="100" align="center">
  135 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  136 │               <el-tag :type="row.result === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  137 │                 {{ row.result === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
  138 │               </el-tag>
  139 │             </template>
  140 │           </el-table-column>
  141 │           <el-table-column prop="remark" label="备注" />
  142 │         </el-table>
  143 │         <div class="log-pagination">
  144 │           <el-pagination
  145 │             v-model:current-page="logPage"
  146 │             v-model:page-size="logPageSize"
  147 │             :total="logTotal"
  148 │             layout="prev, pager, next, total"
  149 │           />
  150 │         </div>
  151 │       </div>
  152 │     </el-dialog>
  153 │   </div>
  154 │ </template>
  155 │ 
  156 │ <script setup>
  157 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  158 │ import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  159 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  160 │ 
  161 │ const deviceSearch = ref('')
  162 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  163 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  164 │ const total = ref(0)
  165 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  166 │ const showLogDialog = ref(false)
  167 │ const currentCircuit = ref(null)
  168 │ const logPage = ref(1)
  169 │ const logPageSize = ref(10)
  170 │ const logTotal = ref(0)
  171 │ 
  172 │ const defaultProps = {
  173 │   children: 'children',
  174 │   label: 'label'
  175 │ }
  176 │ 
  177 │ const filters = reactive({
  178 │   product: '',
  179 │   networkStatus: '',
  180 │   switchStatus: '',
  181 │   search: ''
  182 │ })
  183 │ 
  184 │ const deviceTreeData = ref([
  185 │   {
  186 │     id: 'root',
  187 │     label: '长沙',
  188 │     children: [
  189 │       {
  190 │         id: 'district',
  191 │         label: '岳麓区',
  192 │         children: [
  193 │           {
  194 │             id: 'xiandao',
  195 │             label: '梅溪湖隧道',
  196 │             children: [
  197 │               { id: 'device-1', label: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', deviceId: 1 },
  198 │               { id: 'device-2', label: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', deviceId: 2 }
  199 │             ]
  200 │           },
  201 │           {
  202 │             id: 'liwei',
  203 │             label: '梅溪湖隧道1栋',
  204 │             children: [
  205 │               { id: 'device-3', label: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', deviceId: 3 },
  206 │               { id: 'device-4', label: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', deviceId: 4 }
  207 │             ]
  208 │           }
  209 │         ]
  210 │       }
  211 │     ]
  212 │   }
  213 │ ])
  214 │ 
  215 │ const circuits = ref([
  216 │   { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路1', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  217 │   { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路2', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  218 │   { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路3', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  219 │   { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路4', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  220 │   { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路5', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  221 │   { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '内置回路6', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' },
  222 │   { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' },
  223 │   { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' },
  224 │   { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' },
  225 │   { id: 10, no: 10, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器01', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' },
  226 │   { id: 11, no: 11, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器02', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' },
  227 │   { id: 12, no: 12, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  228 │   { id: 13, no: 13, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  229 │   { id: 14, no: 14, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' },
  230 │   { id: 15, no: 15, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', circuitName: '回路4', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }
  231 │ ])
  232 │ 
  233 │ total.value = circuits.value.length
  234 │ 
  235 │ const switchLogs = ref([
  236 │   { no: 1, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  237 │   { no: 2, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-14 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  238 │   { no: 3, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-13 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  239 │   { no: 4, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-13 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' },
  240 │   { no: 5, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-12 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '手动操作' }
  241 │ ])
  242 │ 
  243 │ logTotal.value = switchLogs.value.length
  244 │ 
  245 │ const filteredCircuits = computed(() => {
  246 │   let result = circuits.value
  247 │   if (filters.product) result = result.filter(c => c.deviceName.includes(filters.product))
  248 │   if (filters.networkStatus) result = result.filter(c => c.networkStatus === filters.networkStatus)
  249 │   if (filters.switchStatus) result = result.filter(c => c.switchStatus === filters.switchStatus)
  250 │   if (filters.search) result = result.filter(c => c.circuitName.includes(filters.search) || c.moduleName.includes(filters.search))
  251 │   return result
  252 │ })
  253 │ 
  254 │ const handleDeviceCheck = (data, checked) => {
  255 │   console.log('Device checked:', data, checked)
  256 │ }
  257 │ 
  258 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  259 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  260 │ }
  261 │ 
  262 │ const searchCircuits = () => {
  263 │   currentPage.value = 1
  264 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  265 │ }
  266 │ 
  267 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  268 │   Object.assign(filters, { product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' })
  269 │   currentPage.value = 1
  270 │ }
  271 │ 
  272 │ const controlCircuit = (row, action) => {
  273 │   if (row.networkStatus === 'offline') {
  274 │     ElMessage.warning('设备离线，无法操作')
  275 │     return
  276 │   }
  277 │   row.switchStatus = action
  278 │   const actionText = action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭'
  279 │   ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName}已${actionText}`)
  280 │ }
  281 │ 
  282 │ const batchControl = (action) => {
  283 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  284 │     ElMessage.warning('请先选择要操作的回路')
  285 │     return
  286 │   }
  287 │   selectedRows.value.forEach(row => {
  288 │     if (row.networkStatus === 'online') {
  289 │       row.switchStatus = action
  290 │     }
  291 │   })
  292 │   const actionText = action === 'on' ? '全开' : '全关'
  293 │   ElMessage.success(`已执行${actionText}`)
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ const viewSwitchLog = (row) => {
  297 │   currentCircuit.value = row
  298 │   showLogDialog.value = true
  299 │ }
  300 │ </script>
  301 │ 
  302 │ <style scoped>
  303 │ .page-container {
  304 │   height: 100%;
  305 │   display: flex;
  306 │   flex-direction: column;
  307 │ }
  308 │ 
  309 │ .main-content {
  310 │   flex: 1;
  311 │   display: flex;
  312 │   gap: 15px;
  313 │   overflow: hidden;
  314 │ }
  315 │ 
  316 │ .left-panel {
  317 │   width: 200px;
  318 │   background: #fff;
  319 │   border-radius: 4px;
  320 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  321 │   display: flex;
  322 │   flex-direction: column;
  323 │   overflow: hidden;
  324 │   flex-shrink: 0;
  325 │ }
  326 │ 
  327 │ .panel-header {
  328 │   padding: 12px;
  329 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  330 │   background: #fafafa;
  331 │ }
  332 │ 
  333 │ .panel-tabs {
  334 │   display: flex;
  335 │   gap: 15px;
  336 │ }
  337 │ 
  338 │ .tab {
  339 │   cursor: pointer;
  340 │   font-size: 14px;
  341 │   color: #666;
  342 │   padding-bottom: 8px;
  343 │   border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  344 │ }
  345 │ 
  346 │ .tab.active {
  347 │   color: #1890ff;
  348 │   border-bottom-color: #1890ff;
  349 │ }
  350 │ 
  351 │ .search-box {
  352 │   padding: 10px;
  353 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  354 │ }
  355 │ 
  356 │ .search-input {
  357 │   width: 100%;
  358 │ }
  359 │ 
  360 │ .device-tree {
  361 │   flex: 1;
  362 │   overflow-y: auto;
  363 │   padding: 10px;
  364 │ }
  365 │ 
  366 │ .right-panel {
  367 │   flex: 1;
  368 │   display: flex;
  369 │   flex-direction: column;
  370 │   overflow: hidden;
  371 │   min-width: 0;
  372 │ }
  373 │ 
  374 │ .header-left {
  375 │   display: flex;
  376 │   gap: 10px;
  377 │ }
  378 │ 
  379 │ .filter-bar {
  380 │   display: flex;
  381 │   align-items: center;
  382 │   gap: 15px;
  383 │   padding: 15px;
  384 │   background: #fff;
  385 │   border-radius: 4px;
  386 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  387 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  388 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  389 │ }
  390 │ 
  391 │ .filter-select {
  392 │   width: 150px;
  393 │ }
  394 │ 
  395 │ .filter-input {
  396 │   width: 200px;
  397 │ }
  398 │ 
  399 │ .circuit-table {
  400 │   flex: 1;
  401 │   background: #fff;
  402 │   border-radius: 4px;
  403 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  404 │   overflow: auto;
  405 │   min-width: 0;
  406 │ }
  407 │ 
  408 │ :deep(.circuit-table .el-table) {
  409 │   min-width: 100%;
  410 │ }
  411 │ 
  412 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  413 │   margin-top: 15px;
  414 │   display: flex;
  415 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  416 │ }
  417 │ 
  418 │ .log-content {
  419 │   padding: 10px 0;
  420 │ }
  421 │ 
  422 │ .log-header {
  423 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  424 │ }
  425 │ 
  426 │ .log-title {
  427 │   font-weight: 600;
  428 │   color: #333;
  429 │ }
  430 │ 
  431 │ .log-pagination {
  432 │   margin-top: 15px;
  433 │   display: flex;
  434 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  435 │ }
  436 │ </style>

📄 views/power/CircuitData.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">回路用电数据</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-select v-model="selectedBox" placeholder="选择配电箱" class="box-select">
    7 │           <el-option label="全部" value="" />
    8 │           <el-option v-for="box in boxes" :key="box.id" :label="box.name" :value="box.id" />
    9 │         </el-select>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <div class="circuit-stats">
   13 │       <div class="stat-card">
   14 │         <div class="stat-icon">
   15 │           <component :is="icons.Electricity" />
   16 │         </div>
   17 │         <div class="stat-info">
   18 │           <span class="stat-value">{{ totalPower.toFixed(1) }} kW</span>
   19 │           <span class="stat-label">总功率</span>
   20 │         </div>
   21 │       </div>
   22 │       <div class="stat-card">
   23 │         <div class="stat-icon">
   24 │           <component :is="icons.Battery" />
   25 │         </div>
   26 │         <div class="stat-info">
   27 │           <span class="stat-value">{{ totalEnergy }} kWh</span>
   28 │           <span class="stat-label">总用电量</span>
   29 │         </div>
   30 │       </div>
   31 │       <div class="stat-card">
   32 │         <div class="stat-icon">
   33 │           <component :is="icons.Gauge" />
   34 │         </div>
   35 │         <div class="stat-info">
   36 │           <span class="stat-value">{{ avgPowerFactor.toFixed(2) }}</span>
   37 │           <span class="stat-label">平均功率因数</span>
   38 │         </div>
   39 │       </div>
   40 │     </div>
   41 │     <el-table :data="filteredCircuits" border class="data-table">
   42 │       <el-table-column prop="id" label="回路编号" width="100" />
   43 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="回路名称" />
   44 │       <el-table-column prop="boxId" label="所属配电箱" width="120">
   45 │         <template #default="scope">
   46 │           {{ getBoxName(scope.row.boxId) }}
   47 │         </template>
   48 │       </el-table-column>
   49 │       <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(W)" width="100" />
   50 │       <el-table-column prop="energy" label="用电量(kWh)" width="120" />
   51 │       <el-table-column prop="voltage" label="电压(V)" width="100" />
   52 │       <el-table-column prop="current" label="电流(A)" width="100" />
   53 │       <el-table-column prop="powerFactor" label="功率因数" width="100" />
   54 │       <el-table-column label="功率因数状态" width="120">
   55 │         <template #default="scope">
   56 │           <el-tag :type="getPowerFactorTag(scope.row.powerFactor)">
   57 │             {{ getPowerFactorText(scope.row.powerFactor) }}
   58 │           </el-tag>
   59 │         </template>
   60 │       </el-table-column>
   61 │     </el-table>
   62 │   </div>
   63 │ </template>
   64 │ 
   65 │ <script setup>
   66 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   67 │ import { Lightning, Tools, Cpu } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   68 │ import { circuitData, distributionBoxes } from '@/data/mockData'
   69 │ 
   70 │ const icons = { Electricity: Lightning, Battery: Tools, Gauge: Cpu }
   71 │ const selectedBox = ref('')
   72 │ const circuits = ref([...circuitData])
   73 │ const boxes = ref([...distributionBoxes])
   74 │ 
   75 │ const filteredCircuits = computed(() => {
   76 │   if (!selectedBox.value) return circuits.value
   77 │   return circuits.value.filter(c => c.boxId === selectedBox.value)
   78 │ })
   79 │ 
   80 │ const totalPower = computed(() => {
   81 │   return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.power, 0) / 1000
   82 │ })
   83 │ 
   84 │ const totalEnergy = computed(() => {
   85 │   return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.energy, 0)
   86 │ })
   87 │ 
   88 │ const avgPowerFactor = computed(() => {
   89 │   const count = filteredCircuits.value.length
   90 │   if (count === 0) return 0
   91 │   return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.powerFactor, 0) / count
   92 │ })
   93 │ 
   94 │ const getBoxName = (boxId) => {
   95 │   const box = boxes.value.find(b => b.id === boxId)
   96 │   return box ? box.name : boxId
   97 │ }
   98 │ 
   99 │ const getPowerFactorTag = (pf) => {
  100 │   if (pf >= 0.95) return 'success'
  101 │   if (pf >= 0.9) return 'warning'
  102 │   return 'danger'
  103 │ }
  104 │ 
  105 │ const getPowerFactorText = (pf) => {
  106 │   if (pf >= 0.95) return '优秀'
  107 │   if (pf >= 0.9) return '良好'
  108 │   return '需优化'
  109 │ }
  110 │ </script>
  111 │ 
  112 │ <style scoped>
  113 │ .circuit-stats {
  114 │   display: flex;
  115 │   gap: 20px;
  116 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  117 │ }
  118 │ 
  119 │ .stat-card {
  120 │   flex: 1;
  121 │   background: #fff;
  122 │   padding: 20px;
  123 │   border-radius: 8px;
  124 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  125 │   display: flex;
  126 │   align-items: center;
  127 │   gap: 15px;
  128 │ }
  129 │ 
  130 │ .stat-icon {
  131 │   width: 48px;
  132 │   height: 48px;
  133 │   border-radius: 12px;
  134 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  135 │   display: flex;
  136 │   align-items: center;
  137 │   justify-content: center;
  138 │   color: #fff;
  139 │   font-size: 24px;
  140 │ }
  141 │ 
  142 │ .stat-info {
  143 │   display: flex;
  144 │   flex-direction: column;
  145 │ }
  146 │ 
  147 │ .stat-value {
  148 │   font-size: 24px;
  149 │   font-weight: 600;
  150 │   color: #333;
  151 │ }
  152 │ 
  153 │ .stat-label {
  154 │   font-size: 14px;
  155 │   color: #666;
  156 │ }
  157 │ 
  158 │ .box-select {
  159 │   width: 200px;
  160 │ }
  161 │ 
  162 │ .data-table {
  163 │   width: 100%;
  164 │ }
  165 │ </style>
  166 │

📄 views/power/CircuitGroup.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="header-right">
    5 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    6 │         <el-button type="danger" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0" @click="handleBatchDelete">删除</el-button>
    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="content-area">
   11 │       <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │         <el-input v-model="searchKeyword" placeholder="请输入分组名称查询" class="filter-input">
   13 │           <template #prefix>
   14 │             <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   15 │           </template>
   16 │         </el-input>
   17 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   18 │         <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   19 │       </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │       <el-table :data="filteredGroups" border class="group-table" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   22 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   23 │         <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center"></el-table-column>
   24 │         <el-table-column prop="groupName" label="分组名称" min-width="200"></el-table-column>
   25 │         <el-table-column prop="deviceCount" label="关联设备数" width="150" align="center"></el-table-column>
   26 │         <el-table-column prop="creator" label="创建人" width="150"></el-table-column>
   27 │         <el-table-column prop="remark" label="备注" min-width="150"></el-table-column>
   28 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="300" align="center" fixed="right">
   29 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   30 │             <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleBatchOn(row)">全开</el-button>
   31 │             <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleBatchOff(row)">全关</el-button>
   32 │             <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   33 │             <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   34 │           </template>
   35 │         </el-table-column>
   36 │       </el-table>
   37 │ 
   38 │       <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   39 │         <el-pagination
   40 │           v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   41 │           v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   42 │           :total="total"
   43 │           :page-sizes="[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]"
   44 │           layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
   45 │         ></el-pagination>
   46 │       </div>
   47 │     </div>
   48 │ 
   49 │     <!-- 新增/编辑分组对话框 -->
   50 │     <el-dialog :title="dialogTitle" v-model="showDialog" width="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false">
   51 │       <el-form :model="groupForm" :rules="groupRules" ref="groupFormRef" label-width="100px">
   52 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   53 │           <el-col :span="8">
   54 │             <el-form-item label="分组名称" prop="groupName">
   55 │               <el-input v-model="groupForm.groupName" placeholder="请输入分组名称"></el-input>
   56 │             </el-form-item>
   57 │           </el-col>
   58 │           <el-col :span="8">
   59 │             <el-form-item label="所属层级" prop="level">
   60 │               <el-select v-model="groupForm.level" placeholder="请选择所属层级" style="width: 100%">
   61 │                 <el-option label="长沙" value="1"></el-option>
   62 │                 <el-option label="岳麓区" value="2"></el-option>
   63 │                 <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="3"></el-option>
   64 │                 <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道1栋" value="4"></el-option>
   65 │                 <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道2栋" value="5"></el-option>
   66 │               </el-select>
   67 │             </el-form-item>
   68 │           </el-col>
   69 │           <el-col :span="8">
   70 │             <el-form-item label="分组备注" prop="remark">
   71 │               <el-input v-model="groupForm.remark" placeholder="请输入分组备注"></el-input>
   72 │             </el-form-item>
   73 │           </el-col>
   74 │         </el-row>
   75 │         
   76 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   77 │           <el-col :span="12">
   78 │             <div class="circuit-select">
   79 │               <div class="select-header">
   80 │                 <span class="select-title">可选回路</span>
   81 │                 <el-input v-model="leftSearch" placeholder="请输入回路名称" style="width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;"></el-input>
   82 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleLeftSearch">查询</el-button>
   83 │                 <el-button size="small" @click="handleLeftReset">重置</el-button>
   84 │               </div>
   85 │               <el-table :data="leftCircuits" border style="margin-top: 10px;" @selection-change="handleLeftSelection" size="small">
   86 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   87 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
   88 │                 <el-table-column prop="circuitName" label="回路名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   89 │                 <el-table-column prop="centralControl" label="所属集控" min-width="100"></el-table-column>
   90 │               </el-table>
   91 │               <div class="pagination-small">
   92 │                 <el-pagination
   93 │                   :current-page="leftPage"
   94 │                   :page-size="10"
   95 │                   :total="leftTotal"
   96 │                   layout="prev, pager, next"
   97 │                   @current-change="handleLeftPageChange"
   98 │                 ></el-pagination>
   99 │               </div>
  100 │             </div>
  101 │           </el-col>
  102 │           <el-col :span="2" class="transfer-buttons">
  103 │             <el-button type="primary" icon="ArrowRight" circle @click="handleMoveRight" :disabled="leftSelected.length === 0"></el-button>
  104 │             <el-button type="primary" icon="ArrowLeft" circle @click="handleMoveLeft" :disabled="rightSelected.length === 0" style="margin-top: 10px;"></el-button>
  105 │           </el-col>
  106 │           <el-col :span="10">
  107 │             <div class="circuit-select">
  108 │               <div class="select-header">
  109 │                 <span class="select-title">已选回路</span>
  110 │                 <el-input v-model="rightSearch" placeholder="请输入回路名称" style="width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;" disabled></el-input>
  111 │               </div>
  112 │               <el-table :data="selectedCircuits" border style="margin-top: 10px;" @selection-change="handleRightSelection" size="small">
  113 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
  114 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
  115 │                 <el-table-column prop="circuitName" label="回路名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
  116 │                 <el-table-column prop="centralControl" label="所属集控" min-width="100"></el-table-column>
  117 │               </el-table>
  118 │               <div class="empty-tip" v-if="selectedCircuits.length === 0">
  119 │                 暂无数据
  120 │               </div>
  121 │             </div>
  122 │           </el-col>
  123 │         </el-row>
  124 │       </el-form>
  125 │       
  126 │       <template #footer>
  127 │         <el-button @click="handleDialogClose">取消</el-button>
  128 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSubmit">确定</el-button>
  129 │       </template>
  130 │     </el-dialog>
  131 │   </div>
  132 │ </template>
  133 │ 
  134 │ <script setup>
  135 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  136 │ import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  137 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  138 │ 
  139 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  140 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  141 │ const total = ref(2)
  142 │ const searchKeyword = ref('')
  143 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
  144 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  145 │ const leftPage = ref(1)
  146 │ const leftTotal = ref(40)
  147 │ const leftSearch = ref('')
  148 │ const rightSearch = ref('')
  149 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  150 │ const leftSelected = ref([])
  151 │ const rightSelected = ref([])
  152 │ const groupFormRef = ref(null)
  153 │ 
  154 │ const groupForm = ref({
  155 │   groupName: '',
  156 │   level: '',
  157 │   remark: ''
  158 │ })
  159 │ 
  160 │ const groupRules = {
  161 │   groupName: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  162 │   level: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属层级', trigger: 'change' }]
  163 │ }
  164 │ 
  165 │ const dialogTitle = computed(() => isEdit.value ? '编辑' : '新增')
  166 │ 
  167 │ const circuitGroups = ref([
  168 │   {
  169 │     no: 1,
  170 │     groupName: '隔一亮一组',
  171 │     deviceCount: 8,
  172 │     creator: 'test08',
  173 │     remark: '',
  174 │     circuits: [
  175 │       { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  176 │       { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  177 │       { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  178 │       { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  179 │       { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  180 │       { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  181 │       { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  182 │       { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }
  183 │     ]
  184 │   },
  185 │   {
  186 │     no: 2,
  187 │     groupName: '隔一亮一B组',
  188 │     deviceCount: 0,
  189 │     creator: 'admin',
  190 │     remark: '不可更改',
  191 │     circuits: []
  192 │   }
  193 │ ])
  194 │ 
  195 │ const selectedCircuits = ref([])
  196 │ 
  197 │ const allCircuits = ref([
  198 │   { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  199 │   { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  200 │   { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  201 │   { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  202 │   { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  203 │   { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  204 │   { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  205 │   { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' },
  206 │   { no: 9, circuitName: '回路3', centralControl: '梅溪湖隧道集控1' },
  207 │   { no: 10, circuitName: '回路4', centralControl: '梅溪湖隧道集控1' },
  208 │   { no: 11, circuitName: '回路5', centralControl: '梅溪湖隧道集控2' },
  209 │   { no: 12, circuitName: '回路6', centralControl: '梅溪湖隧道集控2' }
  210 │ ])
  211 │ 
  212 │ const leftCircuits = computed(() => {
  213 │   const start = (leftPage.value - 1) * 10
  214 │   const end = start + 10
  215 │   let result = allCircuits.value.filter(c => 
  216 │     !selectedCircuits.value.some(sc => sc.no === c.no)
  217 │   )
  218 │   if (leftSearch.value) {
  219 │     result = result.filter(c => 
  220 │       c.circuitName.includes(leftSearch.value) || 
  221 │       c.centralControl.includes(leftSearch.value)
  222 │     )
  223 │   }
  224 │   return result.slice(start, end)
  225 │ })
  226 │ 
  227 │ const filteredGroups = computed(() => {
  228 │   if (!searchKeyword.value) return circuitGroups.value
  229 │   return circuitGroups.value.filter(g => g.groupName.includes(searchKeyword.value))
  230 │ })
  231 │ 
  232 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  233 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  234 │ }
  235 │ 
  236 │ const handleLeftSelection = (selection) => {
  237 │   leftSelected.value = selection
  238 │ }
  239 │ 
  240 │ const handleRightSelection = (selection) => {
  241 │   rightSelected.value = selection
  242 │ }
  243 │ 
  244 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  245 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  246 │ }
  247 │ 
  248 │ const handleReset = () => {
  249 │   searchKeyword.value = ''
  250 │   ElMessage.info('已重置')
  251 │ }
  252 │ 
  253 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  254 │   isEdit.value = false
  255 │   selectedCircuits.value = []
  256 │   groupForm.value = {
  257 │     groupName: '',
  258 │     level: '',
  259 │     remark: ''
  260 │   }
  261 │   showDialog.value = true
  262 │ }
  263 │ 
  264 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  265 │   isEdit.value = true
  266 │   groupForm.value = {
  267 │     groupName: row.groupName,
  268 │     level: '1',
  269 │     remark: row.remark
  270 │   }
  271 │   selectedCircuits.value = [...row.circuits]
  272 │   showDialog.value = true
  273 │ }
  274 │ 
  275 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {
  276 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  277 │     `确定要删除分组【${row.groupName}】吗？`,
  278 │     '删除确认',
  279 │     {
  280 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  281 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  282 │       type: 'warning'
  283 │     }
  284 │   ).then(() => {
  285 │     circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g => g.no !== row.no)
  286 │     total.value--
  287 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  288 │   }).catch(() => {})
  289 │ }
  290 │ 
  291 │ const handleBatchDelete = () => {
  292 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  293 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的分组')
  294 │     return
  295 │   }
  296 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  297 │     `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个分组吗？`,
  298 │     '批量删除确认',
  299 │     {
  300 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  301 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  302 │       type: 'warning'
  303 │     }
  304 │   ).then(() => {
  305 │     const ids = selectedRows.value.map(r => r.no)
  306 │     circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g => !ids.includes(g.no))
  307 │     total.value -= selectedRows.value.length
  308 │     selectedRows.value = []
  309 │     ElMessage.success('批量删除成功')
  310 │   }).catch(() => {})
  311 │ }
  312 │ 
  313 │ const handleBatchOn = (row) => {
  314 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  315 │     `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行"全开"操作吗？`,
  316 │     '批量控制',
  317 │     {
  318 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  319 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  320 │       type: 'warning'
  321 │     }
  322 │   ).then(() => {
  323 │     ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部开启`)
  324 │   }).catch(() => {})
  325 │ }
  326 │ 
  327 │ const handleBatchOff = (row) => {
  328 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  329 │     `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行"全关"操作吗？`,
  330 │     '批量控制',
  331 │     {
  332 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  333 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  334 │       type: 'warning'
  335 │     }
  336 │   ).then(() => {
  337 │     ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部关闭`)
  338 │   }).catch(() => {})
  339 │ }
  340 │ 
  341 │ const handleMoveRight = () => {
  342 │   if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) {
  343 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的回路')
  344 │     return
  345 │   }
  346 │   leftSelected.value.forEach(circuit => {
  347 │     if (!selectedCircuits.value.some(c => c.no === circuit.no)) {
  348 │       selectedCircuits.value.push(circuit)
  349 │     }
  350 │   })
  351 │   leftSelected.value = []
  352 │   ElMessage.success('已添加选中的回路')
  353 │ }
  354 │ 
  355 │ const handleMoveLeft = () => {
  356 │   if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) {
  357 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的回路')
  358 │     return
  359 │   }
  360 │   const ids = rightSelected.value.map(c => c.no)
  361 │   selectedCircuits.value = selectedCircuits.value.filter(c => !ids.includes(c.no))
  362 │   rightSelected.value = []
  363 │   ElMessage.success('已移除选中的回路')
  364 │ }
  365 │ 
  366 │ const handleLeftSearch = () => {
  367 │   leftPage.value = 1
  368 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  369 │ }
  370 │ 
  371 │ const handleLeftReset = () => {
  372 │   leftSearch.value = ''
  373 │   leftPage.value = 1
  374 │   ElMessage.info('已重置')
  375 │ }
  376 │ 
  377 │ const handleLeftPageChange = (page) => {
  378 │   leftPage.value = page
  379 │ }
  380 │ 
  381 │ const handleDialogClose = () => {
  382 │   showDialog.value = false
  383 │   groupFormRef.value?.resetFields()
  384 │ }
  385 │ 
  386 │ const handleSubmit = () => {
  387 │   groupFormRef.value?.validate((valid) => {
  388 │     if (valid) {
  389 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  390 │         const index = circuitGroups.value.findIndex(g => g.no === groupForm.value.no)
  391 │         if (index !== -1) {
  392 │           circuitGroups.value[index].groupName = groupForm.value.groupName
  393 │           circuitGroups.value[index].remark = groupForm.value.remark
  394 │           circuitGroups.value[index].deviceCount = selectedCircuits.value.length
  395 │           circuitGroups.value[index].circuits = [...selectedCircuits.value]
  396 │         }
  397 │         ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  398 │       } else {
  399 │         const newNo = circuitGroups.value.length > 0 ? Math.max(...circuitGroups.value.map(g => g.no)) + 1 : 1
  400 │         circuitGroups.value.push({
  401 │           no: newNo,
  402 │           groupName: groupForm.value.groupName,
  403 │           deviceCount: selectedCircuits.value.length,
  404 │           creator: '管理员',
  405 │           remark: groupForm.value.remark,
  406 │           circuits: [...selectedCircuits.value]
  407 │         })
  408 │         total.value++
  409 │         ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  410 │       }
  411 │       showDialog.value = false
  412 │       groupFormRef.value?.resetFields()
  413 │     }
  414 │   })
  415 │ }
  416 │ </script>
  417 │ 
  418 │ <style scoped>
  419 │ .page-container {
  420 │   height: 100%;
  421 │   display: flex;
  422 │   flex-direction: column;
  423 │ }
  424 │ 
  425 │ .page-header {
  426 │   display: flex;
  427 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  428 │   align-items: center;
  429 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  430 │ }
  431 │ 
  432 │ .header-right {
  433 │   display: flex;
  434 │   gap: 10px;
  435 │ }
  436 │ 
  437 │ .content-area {
  438 │   flex: 1;
  439 │   background: #fff;
  440 │   border-radius: 4px;
  441 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  442 │   padding: 15px;
  443 │   display: flex;
  444 │   flex-direction: column;
  445 │   overflow: hidden;
  446 │ }
  447 │ 
  448 │ .filter-bar {
  449 │   display: flex;
  450 │   align-items: center;
  451 │   gap: 10px;
  452 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  453 │ }
  454 │ 
  455 │ .filter-input {
  456 │   width: 200px;
  457 │ }
  458 │ 
  459 │ .group-table {
  460 │   flex: 1;
  461 │   overflow: hidden;
  462 │ }
  463 │ 
  464 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  465 │   margin-top: 15px;
  466 │   display: flex;
  467 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  468 │ }
  469 │ 
  470 │ .circuit-select {
  471 │   display: flex;
  472 │   flex-direction: column;
  473 │ }
  474 │ 
  475 │ .select-header {
  476 │   display: flex;
  477 │   align-items: center;
  478 │   gap: 10px;
  479 │ }
  480 │ 
  481 │ .select-title {
  482 │   font-weight: 500;
  483 │   color: #303133;
  484 │   min-width: 60px;
  485 │ }
  486 │ 
  487 │ .transfer-buttons {
  488 │   display: flex;
  489 │   flex-direction: column;
  490 │   justify-content: center;
  491 │   align-items: center;
  492 │ }
  493 │ 
  494 │ .pagination-small {
  495 │   margin-top: 10px;
  496 │   display: flex;
  497 │   justify-content: center;
  498 │ }
  499 │ 
  500 │ .empty-tip {
  501 │   text-align: center;
  502 │   padding: 40px;
  503 │   color: #909399;
  504 │ }
  505 │ </style>
  506 │

📄 views/power/DistributionBox.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="left-sidebar">
    5 │         <div class="sidebar-header">
    6 │           <el-input
    7 │             v-model="searchText"
    8 │             placeholder="请输入层级名称"
    9 │             class="sidebar-search"
   10 │           >
   11 │             <template #prefix>
   12 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   13 │             </template>
   14 │           </el-input>
   15 │         </div>
   16 │         <el-tree
   17 │           :data="treeData"
   18 │           :props="defaultProps"
   19 │           show-checkbox
   20 │           node-key="id"
   21 │           :expand-on-click-node="false"
   22 │           @check-change="handleCheckChange"
   23 │         />
   24 │       </div>
   25 │ 
   26 │       <div class="right-content">
   27 │         <div class="page-header">
   28 │           <div class="title">配电柜</div>
   29 │           <div class="header-actions">
   30 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="showAddDialog = true">
   31 │               <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
   32 │               新增
   33 │             </el-button>
   34 │             <el-button @click="refreshData">
   35 │               <el-icon><Refresh /></el-icon>
   36 │               刷新
   37 │             </el-button>
   38 │             <el-button type="danger" @click="batchDelete" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">
   39 │               <el-icon><Delete /></el-icon>
   40 │               删除
   41 │             </el-button>
   42 │           </div>
   43 │         </div>
   44 │ 
   45 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   46 │           <el-input
   47 │             v-model="filters.search"
   48 │             placeholder="请输入配电柜名称或编号"
   49 │             class="filter-input"
   50 │             clearable
   51 │           >
   52 │             <template #prefix>
   53 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   54 │             </template>
   55 │           </el-input>
   56 │           <el-select v-model="filters.status" placeholder="请选择状态" class="filter-select" clearable>
   57 │             <el-option label="在线" value="online" />
   58 │             <el-option label="离线" value="offline" />
   59 │           </el-select>
   60 │           <el-select v-model="filters.health" placeholder="请选择健康状态" class="filter-select" clearable>
   61 │             <el-option label="正常" value="normal" />
   62 │             <el-option label="故障" value="fault" />
   63 │           </el-select>
   64 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="searchBoxes">查询</el-button>
   65 │           <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   66 │         </div>
   67 │ 
   68 │         <el-table :data="filteredBoxes" border style="width: 100%;" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   69 │           <el-table-column type="selection" width="45" />
   70 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="60" align="center" />
   71 │           <el-table-column prop="code" label="设备编号" width="120" />
   72 │           <el-table-column prop="name" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
   73 │           <el-table-column prop="location" label="位置" min-width="150" />
   74 │           <el-table-column prop="status" label="在线状态" width="100" align="center">
   75 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   76 │               <el-tag :type="row.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   77 │                 {{ row.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
   78 │               </el-tag>
   79 │             </template>
   80 │           </el-table-column>
   81 │           <el-table-column prop="health" label="健康状态" width="100" align="center">
   82 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   83 │               <el-tag :type="row.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   84 │                 {{ row.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }}
   85 │               </el-tag>
   86 │             </template>
   87 │           </el-table-column>
   88 │           <el-table-column prop="temperature" label="温度(℃)" width="90" align="center" />
   89 │           <el-table-column prop="humidity" label="湿度(%)" width="90" align="center" />
   90 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="280" fixed="right" align="center">
   91 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   92 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="viewDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
   93 │               <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="editBox(row)">编辑</el-button>
   94 │               <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="deleteBox(row)">删除</el-button>
   95 │             </template>
   96 │           </el-table-column>
   97 │         </el-table>
   98 │ 
   99 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
  100 │           <el-pagination
  101 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  102 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  103 │             :total="total"
  104 │             :page-sizes="[10, 15, 20, 30]"
  105 │             layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  106 │           />
  107 │         </div>
  108 │       </div>
  109 │     </div>
  110 │ 
  111 │     <el-dialog v-model="showAddDialog" :title="isEdit ? '编辑配电柜' : '新增配电柜'" width="700px">
  112 │       <el-form :model="form" :rules="rules" ref="formRef" label-width="120px">
  113 │         <el-form-item label="配电柜编号" prop="code">
  114 │           <el-input v-model="form.code" placeholder="请输入配电柜编号" />
  115 │         </el-form-item>
  116 │         <el-form-item label="配电柜名称" prop="name">
  117 │           <el-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="请输入配电柜名称" />
  118 │         </el-form-item>
  119 │         <el-form-item label="配电柜位置" prop="location">
  120 │           <el-input v-model="form.location" placeholder="请输入配电柜位置" />
  121 │         </el-form-item>
  122 │         <el-form-item label="配电柜经度" prop="longitude">
  123 │           <el-input v-model="form.longitude" placeholder="请输入配电柜经度" />
  124 │         </el-form-item>
  125 │         <el-form-item label="配电柜纬度" prop="latitude">
  126 │           <el-input v-model="form.latitude" placeholder="请输入配电柜纬度" />
  127 │         </el-form-item>
  128 │         <el-form-item label="所属层级" prop="hierarchy">
  129 │           <el-select v-model="form.hierarchy" placeholder="请选择所属层级" style="width: 100%;">
  130 │             <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道" value="meixi" />
  131 │           </el-select>
  132 │         </el-form-item>
  133 │         <el-form-item label="容量(kVA)" prop="capacity">
  134 │           <el-input v-model="form.capacity" placeholder="请输入配电柜容量" />
  135 │         </el-form-item>
  136 │         <el-form-item label="描述">
  137 │           <el-input v-model="form.description" type="textarea" :rows="3" placeholder="请输入描述" />
  138 │         </el-form-item>
  139 │       </el-form>
  140 │       <template #footer>
  141 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  142 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确定</el-button>
  143 │       </template>
  144 │     </el-dialog>
  145 │ 
  146 │     <el-dialog v-model="showDetailDialog" title="配电柜详情" width="900px">
  147 │       <div v-if="currentBox" class="detail-content">
  148 │         <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
  149 │           <el-descriptions-item label="设备编号">{{ currentBox.code }}</el-descriptions-item>
  150 │           <el-descriptions-item label="设备名称">{{ currentBox.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
  151 │           <el-descriptions-item label="位置">{{ currentBox.location }}</el-descriptions-item>
  152 │           <el-descriptions-item label="在线状态">
  153 │             <el-tag :type="currentBox.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  154 │               {{ currentBox.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
  155 │             </el-tag>
  156 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  157 │           <el-descriptions-item label="健康状态">
  158 │             <el-tag :type="currentBox.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  159 │               {{ currentBox.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }}
  160 │             </el-tag>
  161 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  162 │           <el-descriptions-item label="温度">{{ currentBox.temperature }}℃</el-descriptions-item>
  163 │           <el-descriptions-item label="湿度">{{ currentBox.humidity }}%</el-descriptions-item>
  164 │         </el-descriptions>
  165 │ 
  166 │         <el-tabs v-model="detailTab" class="detail-tabs">
  167 │           <el-tab-pane label="供电参数" name="power">
  168 │             <el-descriptions :column="3" border>
  169 │               <el-descriptions-item label="A相电压">220V</el-descriptions-item>
  170 │               <el-descriptions-item label="B相电压">221V</el-descriptions-item>
  171 │               <el-descriptions-item label="C相电压">219V</el-descriptions-item>
  172 │               <el-descriptions-item label="A相电流">15.2A</el-descriptions-item>
  173 │               <el-descriptions-item label="B相电流">14.8A</el-descriptions-item>
  174 │               <el-descriptions-item label="C相电流">15.5A</el-descriptions-item>
  175 │               <el-descriptions-item label="有功功率">10.2kW</el-descriptions-item>
  176 │               <el-descriptions-item label="无功功率">2.1kVar</el-descriptions-item>
  177 │               <el-descriptions-item label="功率因数">0.95</el-descriptions-item>
  178 │             </el-descriptions>
  179 │           </el-tab-pane>
  180 │           <el-tab-pane label="关联线路" name="circuits">
  181 │             <el-table :data="relatedCircuits" size="small" border>
  182 │               <el-table-column prop="no" label="序号" width="60" align="center" />
  183 │               <el-table-column prop="name" label="线路名称" />
  184 │               <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80" align="center">
  185 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  186 │                   <el-tag :type="row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">
  187 │                     {{ row.status === 'on' ? '合闸' : '分闸' }}
  188 │                   </el-tag>
  189 │                 </template>
  190 │               </el-table-column>
  191 │               <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(kW)" width="100" align="center" />
  192 │             </el-table>
  193 │           </el-tab-pane>
  194 │           <el-tab-pane label="环境监测" name="environment">
  195 │             <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
  196 │               <el-descriptions-item label="门锁状态">
  197 │                 <el-tag :type="currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">
  198 │                   {{ currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? '锁定' : '解锁' }}
  199 │                 </el-tag>
  200 │               </el-descriptions-item>
  201 │               <el-descriptions-item label="门磁状态">
  202 │                 <el-tag :type="currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">
  203 │                   {{ currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? '关闭' : '打开' }}
  204 │                 </el-tag>
  205 │               </el-descriptions-item>
  206 │               <el-descriptions-item label="烟感状态">
  207 │                 <el-tag :type="currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  208 │                   {{ currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? '正常' : '报警' }}
  209 │                 </el-tag>
  210 │               </el-descriptions-item>
  211 │               <el-descriptions-item label="水浸状态">
  212 │                 <el-tag :type="currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  213 │                   {{ currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? '干燥' : '水浸' }}
  214 │                 </el-tag>
  215 │               </el-descriptions-item>
  216 │             </el-descriptions>
  217 │           </el-tab-pane>
  218 │         </el-tabs>
  219 │       </div>
  220 │       <template #footer>
  221 │         <el-button @click="showDetailDialog = false">关闭</el-button>
  222 │       </template>
  223 │     </el-dialog>
  224 │   </div>
  225 │ </template>
  226 │ 
  227 │ <script setup>
  228 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  229 │ import { Search, Plus, Refresh, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  230 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  231 │ 
  232 │ const searchText = ref('')
  233 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false)
  234 │ const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
  235 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  236 │ const formRef = ref(null)
  237 │ const detailTab = ref('power')
  238 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  239 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  240 │ const total = ref(9)
  241 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  242 │ const currentBox = ref(null)
  243 │ 
  244 │ const filters = reactive({
  245 │   search: '',
  246 │   status: '',
  247 │   health: ''
  248 │ })
  249 │ 
  250 │ const form = reactive({
  251 │   code: '',
  252 │   name: '',
  253 │   location: '',
  254 │   longitude: '',
  255 │   latitude: '',
  256 │   hierarchy: '',
  257 │   capacity: '',
  258 │   description: ''
  259 │ })
  260 │ 
  261 │ const rules = {
  262 │   code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜编号', trigger: 'blur' }],
  263 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  264 │   location: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜位置', trigger: 'blur' }]
  265 │ }
  266 │ 
  267 │ const defaultProps = {
  268 │   children: 'children',
  269 │   label: 'label'
  270 │ }
  271 │ 
  272 │ const treeData = ref([
  273 │   {
  274 │     id: 1,
  275 │     label: '长沙',
  276 │     children: [
  277 │       { 
  278 │         id: 11, 
  279 │         label: '岳麓区',
  280 │         children: [
  281 │           { id: 111, label: '梅溪湖隧道' }
  282 │         ]
  283 │       }
  284 │     ]
  285 │   }
  286 │ ])
  287 │ 
  288 │ const boxes = ref([
  289 │   { id: 1, no: 1, code: 'PDG-MXH-001', name: '梅溪湖隧道入口段1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道入口段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 28, humidity: 65, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  290 │   { id: 2, no: 2, code: 'PDG-MXH-002', name: '梅溪湖隧道基本段1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道基本段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 30, humidity: 60, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  291 │   { id: 3, no: 3, code: 'PDG-MXH-003', name: '梅溪湖隧道出口段1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道出口段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 25, humidity: 70, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' },
  292 │   { id: 4, no: 4, code: 'PDG-MXH-004', name: '梅溪湖隧道应急配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道中央', status: 'offline', health: 'fault', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }
  293 │ ])
  294 │ 
  295 │ const relatedCircuits = ref([
  296 │   { no: 1, name: '主照明回路1', status: 'on', power: 3.5 },
  297 │   { no: 2, name: '主照明回路2', status: 'on', power: 2.8 },
  298 │   { no: 3, name: '景观照明回路', status: 'off', power: 0 },
  299 │   { no: 4, name: '应急照明回路', status: 'on', power: 1.2 }
  300 │ ])
  301 │ 
  302 │ const filteredBoxes = computed(() => {
  303 │   let result = boxes.value
  304 │   if (filters.search) {
  305 │     result = result.filter(b => b.code.includes(filters.search) || b.name.includes(filters.search))
  306 │   }
  307 │   if (filters.status) {
  308 │     result = result.filter(b => b.status === filters.status)
  309 │   }
  310 │   if (filters.health) {
  311 │     result = result.filter(b => b.health === filters.health)
  312 │   }
  313 │   return result
  314 │ })
  315 │ 
  316 │ const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) => {
  317 │   console.log('checked:', data, checked)
  318 │ }
  319 │ 
  320 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  321 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  322 │ }
  323 │ 
  324 │ const searchBoxes = () => {
  325 │   currentPage.value = 1
  326 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  327 │ }
  328 │ 
  329 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  330 │   Object.assign(filters, { search: '', status: '', health: '' })
  331 │   currentPage.value = 1
  332 │ }
  333 │ 
  334 │ const refreshData = () => {
  335 │   ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
  336 │ }
  337 │ 
  338 │ const viewDetail = (row) => {
  339 │   currentBox.value = row
  340 │   detailTab.value = 'power'
  341 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  342 │ }
  343 │ 
  344 │ const editBox = (row) => {
  345 │   isEdit.value = true
  346 │   Object.assign(form, row)
  347 │   showAddDialog.value = true
  348 │ }
  349 │ 
  350 │ const deleteBox = (row) => {
  351 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除配电柜"${row.name}"吗？`, '提示', {
  352 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  353 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  354 │     type: 'warning'
  355 │   }).then(() => {
  356 │     const index = boxes.value.findIndex(b => b.id === row.id)
  357 │     if (index > -1) {
  358 │       boxes.value.splice(index, 1)
  359 │       total.value--
  360 │       ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  361 │     }
  362 │   }).catch(() => {})
  363 │ }
  364 │ 
  365 │ const batchDelete = () => {
  366 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个配电柜吗？`, '提示', {
  367 │     confirmButtonText: '确定',
  368 │     cancelButtonText: '取消',
  369 │     type: 'warning'
  370 │   }).then(() => {
  371 │     const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(b => b.id)
  372 │     boxes.value = boxes.value.filter(b => !selectedIds.includes(b.id))
  373 │     total.value = boxes.value.length
  374 │     selectedRows.value = []
  375 │     ElMessage.success('批量删除成功')
  376 │   }).catch(() => {})
  377 │ }
  378 │ 
  379 │ const submitForm = () => {
  380 │   formRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  381 │     if (valid) {
  382 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  383 │         ElMessage.success('配电柜修改成功')
  384 │       } else {
  385 │         const newId = Math.max(...boxes.value.map(b => b.id)) + 1
  386 │         boxes.value.push({
  387 │           id: newId,
  388 │           no: boxes.value.length + 1,
  389 │           ...form,
  390 │           status: 'online',
  391 │           health: 'normal',
  392 │           temperature: '-',
  393 │           humidity: '-',
  394 │           lockStatus: 'locked',
  395 │           magneticStatus: 'closed',
  396 │           smokeStatus: 'normal',
  397 │           waterStatus: 'dry'
  398 │         })
  399 │         total.value++
  400 │         ElMessage.success('配电柜添加成功')
  401 │       }
  402 │       showAddDialog.value = false
  403 │     }
  404 │   })
  405 │ }
  406 │ </script>
  407 │ 
  408 │ <style scoped>
  409 │ .page-container {
  410 │   padding: 20px;
  411 │   background: #fff;
  412 │   border-radius: 4px;
  413 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  414 │ }

  417 │   display: flex;
  418 │   gap: 20px;
  419 │ }

  421 │ .left-sidebar {
  422 │   width: 200px;

  424 │   border-radius: 4px;
  425 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  426 │   padding: 15px;
  427 │   flex-shrink: 0;
  428 │ }
  429 │

  434 │ .right-content {
  435 │   flex: 1;
  436 │ }
  437 │ 
  438 │ .page-header {
  439 │   display: flex;
  440 │   justify-content: space-between;
  441 │   align-items: center;
  442 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  443 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  444 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  445 │ }

  447 │ .page-header .title {
  448 │   font-size: 18px;
  449 │   font-weight: 600;
  450 │   color: #1f1f1f;
  451 │ }
  452 │ 
  453 │ .header-actions {
  454 │   display: flex;
  455 │   gap: 10px;
  456 │ }
  457 │ 
  458 │ .filter-bar {
  459 │   display: flex;
  460 │   align-items: center;
  461 │   gap: 15px;
  462 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  463 │   padding: 15px;
  464 │   background: #fafafa;
  465 │   border-radius: 4px;
  466 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  467 │ }
  468 │ 
  469 │ .filter-input {
  470 │   width: 220px;
  471 │ }
  472 │ 
  473 │ .filter-select {
  474 │   width: 150px;
  475 │ }
  476 │ 
  477 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  478 │   margin-top: 20px;
  479 │   display: flex;
  480 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  481 │ }
  482 │ 
  483 │ .detail-content {
  484 │   padding: 10px 0;
  485 │ }
  486 │ 
  487 │ .detail-tabs {
  488 │   margin-top: 20px;
  489 │ }
  490 │ </style>
