📄 views/power/HistoryScene.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">历史下发场景</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-right">
    6 │         <el-button @click="refreshData">刷新</el-button>
    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="content-area">
   11 │       <el-table :data="historyScenes" border class="scene-table">
   12 │         <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center" />
   13 │         <el-table-column prop="sceneName" label="场景名称" min-width="200" />
   14 │         <el-table-column prop="operator" label="下发人员" width="150" />
   15 │         <el-table-column prop="deployTime" label="下发时间" width="200" />
   16 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="120" align="center">
   17 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   18 │             <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="viewDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
   19 │           </template>
   20 │         </el-table-column>
   21 │       </el-table>
   22 │ 
   23 │       <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   24 │         <el-pagination
   25 │           v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   26 │           v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   27 │           :total="total"
   28 │           :page-sizes="[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]"
   29 │           layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
   30 │         />
   31 │       </div>
   32 │ 
   33 │       <div class="bottom-buttons">
   34 │         <el-button size="small">隐藏</el-button>
   35 │         <el-button size="small">显示</el-button>
   36 │       </div>
   37 │     </div>
   38 │   </div>
   39 │ </template>
   40 │ 
   41 │ <script setup>
   42 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
   43 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
   44 │ 
   45 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
   46 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
   47 │ const total = ref(42)
   48 │ 
   49 │ const historyScenes = ref([
   50 │   { no: 1, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'tanrongfu', deployTime: '2026-01-09 13:59:26' },
   51 │   { no: 2, sceneName: '定时', operator: 'admin', deployTime: '2026-01-05 11:33:52' },
   52 │   { no: 3, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 11:17:53' },
   53 │   { no: 4, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 10:26:38' },
   54 │   { no: 5, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 09:57:31' },
   55 │   { no: 6, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 18:28:36' },
   56 │   { no: 7, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 17:41:50' },
   57 │   { no: 8, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:09:09' },
   58 │   { no: 9, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:08:53' },
   59 │   { no: 10, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 10:43:24' },
   60 │   { no: 11, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 18:19:53' },
   61 │   { no: 12, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:09:25' },
   62 │   { no: 13, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:33' },
   63 │   { no: 14, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:18' },
   64 │   { no: 15, sceneName: '测试', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2024-11-19 15:02:00' }
   65 │ ])
   66 │ 
   67 │ const refreshData = () => { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') }
   68 │ const viewDetail = (row) => { ElMessage.info('查看场景详情: ' + row.sceneName) }
   69 │ </script>
   70 │ 
   71 │ <style scoped>
   72 │ .page-container {
   73 │   height: 100%;
   74 │   display: flex;
   75 │   flex-direction: column;
   76 │ }
   77 │ 
   78 │ .page-header {
   79 │   display: flex;
   80 │   justify-content: space-between;
   81 │   align-items: center;
   82 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
   83 │ }
   84 │ 
   85 │ .page-header .title {
   86 │   font-size: 18px;
   87 │   font-weight: 600;
   88 │   color: #1f1f1f;
   89 │ }
   90 │ 
   91 │ .header-right {
   92 │   display: flex;
   93 │   gap: 10px;
   94 │ }
   95 │ 
   96 │ .content-area {
   97 │   flex: 1;
   98 │   background: #fff;
   99 │   border-radius: 4px;
  100 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  101 │   padding: 15px;
  102 │   display: flex;
  103 │   flex-direction: column;
  104 │   overflow: hidden;
  105 │ }
  106 │ 
  107 │ .scene-table {
  108 │   flex: 1;
  109 │   overflow: hidden;
  110 │ }
  111 │ 
  112 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  113 │   margin-top: 15px;
  114 │   display: flex;
  115 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  116 │ }
  117 │ 
  118 │ .bottom-buttons {
  119 │   margin-top: 15px;
  120 │   display: flex;
  121 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  122 │   gap: 8px;
  123 │ }
  124 │ </style>
  125 │

📄 views/power/LampControlBind.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="header-right">
    5 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    6 │         <el-button type="danger" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0" @click="handleBatchUnbind">解绑</el-button>
    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="content-area">
   11 │       <el-tabs v-model="activeTab" class="main-tabs">
   12 │         <el-tab-pane label="灯控绑定" name="lamp">
   13 │           <div class="filter-bar">
   14 │             <el-input v-model="searchKeyword" placeholder="请输入名称或编号查询" class="filter-input">
   15 │               <template #prefix>
   16 │                 <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   17 │               </template>
   18 │             </el-input>
   19 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   20 │             <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   21 │           </div>
   22 │ 
   23 │           <el-table :data="filteredData" border class="data-table" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   24 │             <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   25 │             <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center"></el-table-column>
   26 │             <el-table-column prop="centralControlName" label="集控名称" min-width="200"></el-table-column>
   27 │             <el-table-column prop="centralControlNo" label="集控编号" width="200"></el-table-column>
   28 │             <el-table-column prop="bindCount" label="关联灯控数" width="150" align="center"></el-table-column>
   29 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="200" align="center" fixed="right">
   30 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   31 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   32 │                 <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="handleUnbind(row)">解绑</el-button>
   33 │               </template>
   34 │             </el-table-column>
   35 │           </el-table>
   36 │ 
   37 │           <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   38 │             <el-pagination
   39 │               v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   40 │               v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   41 │               :total="total"
   42 │               :page-sizes="[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]"
   43 │               layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
   44 │             ></el-pagination>
   45 │           </div>
   46 │         </el-tab-pane>
   47 │         <el-tab-pane label="组播分组" name="multicast">
   48 │           <div class="empty-tip">功能开发中...</div>
   49 │         </el-tab-pane>
   50 │       </el-tabs>
   51 │     </div>
   52 │ 
   53 │     <!-- 新增/编辑灯控绑定对话框 -->
   54 │     <el-dialog :title="dialogTitle" v-model="showDialog" width="900px" :close-on-click-modal="false">
   55 │       <el-form :model="formData" :rules="formRules" ref="formRef" label-width="100px">
   56 │         <el-form-item label="所属集控" prop="centralControl">
   57 │           <el-select v-model="formData.centralControl" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 100%">
   58 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道集控" value="ZTJK"></el-option>
   59 │             <el-option label="测试128M" value="CS128M"></el-option>
   60 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道集控1" value="XDLJK1"></el-option>
   61 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道集控2" value="XDLJK2"></el-option>
   62 │           </el-select>
   63 │         </el-form-item>
   64 │         
   65 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   66 │           <el-col :span="11">
   67 │             <div class="table-select">
   68 │               <div class="select-header">
   69 │                 <el-input v-model="leftSearch" placeholder="请输入IMEI号或名称" style="width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;"></el-input>
   70 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleLeftSearch">查询</el-button>
   71 │                 <el-button size="small" @click="handleLeftReset">重置</el-button>
   72 │               </div>
   73 │               <el-table :data="leftTableData" border style="margin-top: 10px;" @selection-change="handleLeftSelection" size="small">
   74 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   75 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
   76 │                 <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   77 │                 <el-table-column prop="lampControlName" label="灯控名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   78 │                 <el-table-column prop="lampPoleName" label="灯杆名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   79 │               </el-table>
   80 │               <div class="empty-tip" v-if="leftTableData.length === 0">暂无数据</div>
   81 │             </div>
   82 │           </el-col>
   83 │           <el-col :span="2" class="transfer-buttons">
   84 │             <el-button type="primary" icon="ArrowRight" circle @click="handleMoveRight" :disabled="leftSelected.length === 0"></el-button>
   85 │             <el-button type="primary" icon="ArrowLeft" circle @click="handleMoveLeft" :disabled="rightSelected.length === 0" style="margin-top: 10px;"></el-button>
   86 │           </el-col>
   87 │           <el-col :span="11">
   88 │             <div class="table-select">
   89 │               <div class="select-header">
   90 │                 <el-input v-model="rightSearch" placeholder="请输入IMEI号或名称" style="width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;" disabled></el-input>
   91 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" disabled>查询</el-button>
   92 │                 <el-button size="small" disabled>重置</el-button>
   93 │               </div>
   94 │               <el-table :data="selectedLampControls" border style="margin-top: 10px;" @selection-change="handleRightSelection" size="small">
   95 │                 <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   96 │                 <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
   97 │                 <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   98 │                 <el-table-column prop="lampControlName" label="灯控名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
   99 │                 <el-table-column prop="lampPoleName" label="灯杆名称" min-width="120"></el-table-column>
  100 │               </el-table>
  101 │               <div class="empty-tip" v-if="selectedLampControls.length === 0">暂无数据</div>
  102 │             </div>
  103 │           </el-col>
  104 │         </el-row>
  105 │       </el-form>
  106 │       
  107 │       <template #footer>
  108 │         <el-button @click="handleDialogClose">取消</el-button>
  109 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSubmit">确定</el-button>
  110 │       </template>
  111 │     </el-dialog>
  112 │   </div>
  113 │ </template>
  114 │ 
  115 │ <script setup>
  116 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  117 │ import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  118 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  119 │ 
  120 │ const activeTab = ref('lamp')
  121 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  122 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  123 │ const total = ref(1)
  124 │ const searchKeyword = ref('')
  125 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
  126 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  127 │ const leftSearch = ref('')
  128 │ const rightSearch = ref('')
  129 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  130 │ const leftSelected = ref([])
  131 │ const rightSelected = ref([])
  132 │ const formRef = ref(null)
  133 │ 
  134 │ const formData = ref({
  135 │   centralControl: ''
  136 │ })
  137 │ 
  138 │ const formRules = {
  139 │   centralControl: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属集控', trigger: 'change' }]
  140 │ }
  141 │ 
  142 │ const dialogTitle = computed(() => isEdit.value ? '编辑灯控绑定' : '新增灯控绑定')
  143 │ 
  144 │ const bindData = ref([
  145 │   {
  146 │     no: 1,
  147 │     centralControlName: '梅溪湖隧道集控',
  148 │     centralControlNo: 'ZTJK',
  149 │     bindCount: 2,
  150 │     lampControls: [
  151 │       { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' },
  152 │       { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' }
  153 │     ]
  154 │   }
  155 │ ])
  156 │ 
  157 │ const selectedLampControls = ref([])
  158 │ 
  159 │ const allLampControls = ref([
  160 │   { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' },
  161 │   { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' },
  162 │   { no: 3, imei: '867892010000003', lampControlName: '灯控3', lampPoleName: '灯杆003' },
  163 │   { no: 4, imei: '867892010000004', lampControlName: '灯控4', lampPoleName: '灯杆004' },
  164 │   { no: 5, imei: '867892010000005', lampControlName: '灯控5', lampPoleName: '灯杆005' },
  165 │   { no: 6, imei: '867892010000006', lampControlName: '灯控6', lampPoleName: '灯杆006' }
  166 │ ])
  167 │ 
  168 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  169 │   if (!searchKeyword.value) return bindData.value
  170 │   return bindData.value.filter(item => 
  171 │     item.centralControlName.includes(searchKeyword.value) || 
  172 │     item.centralControlNo.includes(searchKeyword.value)
  173 │   )
  174 │ })
  175 │ 
  176 │ const leftTableData = computed(() => {
  177 │   let result = allLampControls.value.filter(lc => 
  178 │     !selectedLampControls.value.some(slc => slc.imei === lc.imei)
  179 │   )
  180 │   if (leftSearch.value) {
  181 │     result = result.filter(lc => 
  182 │       lc.imei.includes(leftSearch.value) || 
  183 │       lc.lampControlName.includes(leftSearch.value) ||
  184 │       lc.lampPoleName.includes(leftSearch.value)
  185 │     )
  186 │   }
  187 │   return result
  188 │ })
  189 │ 
  190 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  191 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  192 │ }
  193 │ 
  194 │ const handleLeftSelection = (selection) => {
  195 │   leftSelected.value = selection
  196 │ }
  197 │ 
  198 │ const handleRightSelection = (selection) => {
  199 │   rightSelected.value = selection
  200 │ }
  201 │ 
  202 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  203 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  204 │ }
  205 │ 
  206 │ const handleReset = () => {
  207 │   searchKeyword.value = ''
  208 │   ElMessage.info('已重置')
  209 │ }
  210 │ 
  211 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  212 │   isEdit.value = false
  213 │   selectedLampControls.value = []
  214 │   formData.value = {
  215 │     centralControl: ''
  216 │   }
  217 │   showDialog.value = true
  218 │ }
  219 │ 
  220 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  221 │   isEdit.value = true
  222 │   formData.value = {
  223 │     centralControl: row.centralControlNo
  224 │   }
  225 │   selectedLampControls.value = [...row.lampControls]
  226 │   showDialog.value = true
  227 │ }
  228 │ 
  229 │ const handleUnbind = (row) => {
  230 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  231 │     `确定要对集控【${row.centralControlName}】执行"解绑"操作吗？`,
  232 │     '解绑确认',
  233 │     {
  234 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  235 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  236 │       type: 'warning'
  237 │     }
  238 │   ).then(() => {
  239 │     const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item => item.no === row.no)
  240 │     if (index !== -1) {
  241 │       bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0
  242 │       bindData.value[index].lampControls = []
  243 │     }
  244 │     ElMessage.success('解绑成功')
  245 │   }).catch(() => {})
  246 │ }
  247 │ 
  248 │ const handleBatchUnbind = () => {
  249 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  250 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要解绑的集控')
  251 │     return
  252 │   }
  253 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  254 │     `确定要对选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个集控执行"解绑"操作吗？`,
  255 │     '批量解绑确认',
  256 │     {
  257 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  258 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  259 │       type: 'warning'
  260 │     }
  261 │   ).then(() => {
  262 │     selectedRows.value.forEach(row => {
  263 │       const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item => item.no === row.no)
  264 │       if (index !== -1) {
  265 │         bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0
  266 │         bindData.value[index].lampControls = []
  267 │       }
  268 │     })
  269 │     selectedRows.value = []
  270 │     ElMessage.success('批量解绑成功')
  271 │   }).catch(() => {})
  272 │ }
  273 │ 
  274 │ const handleMoveRight = () => {
  275 │   if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) {
  276 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的灯控')
  277 │     return
  278 │   }
  279 │   leftSelected.value.forEach(lc => {
  280 │     if (!selectedLampControls.value.some(slc => slc.imei === lc.imei)) {
  281 │       selectedLampControls.value.push(lc)
  282 │     }
  283 │   })
  284 │   leftSelected.value = []
  285 │   ElMessage.success('已添加选中的灯控')
  286 │ }
  287 │ 
  288 │ const handleMoveLeft = () => {
  289 │   if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) {
  290 │     ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的灯控')
  291 │     return
  292 │   }
  293 │   const imeis = rightSelected.value.map(lc => lc.imei)
  294 │   selectedLampControls.value = selectedLampControls.value.filter(lc => !imeis.includes(lc.imei))
  295 │   rightSelected.value = []
  296 │   ElMessage.success('已移除选中的灯控')
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ const handleLeftSearch = () => {
  300 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  301 │ }
  302 │ 
  303 │ const handleLeftReset = () => {
  304 │   leftSearch.value = ''
  305 │   ElMessage.info('已重置')
  306 │ }
  307 │ 
  308 │ const handleDialogClose = () => {
  309 │   showDialog.value = false
  310 │   formRef.value?.resetFields()
  311 │ }
  312 │ 
  313 │ const handleSubmit = () => {
  314 │   formRef.value?.validate((valid) => {
  315 │     if (valid) {
  316 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  317 │         const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item => item.centralControlNo === formData.value.centralControl)
  318 │         if (index !== -1) {
  319 │           bindData.value[index].bindCount = selectedLampControls.value.length
  320 │           bindData.value[index].lampControls = [...selectedLampControls.value]
  321 │         }
  322 │         ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  323 │       } else {
  324 │         const centralControlMap = {
  325 │           'ZTJK': '梅溪湖隧道集控',
  326 │           'CS128M': '测试128M',
  327 │           'XDLJK1': '梅溪湖隧道集控1',
  328 │           'XDLJK2': '梅溪湖隧道集控2'
  329 │         }
  330 │         const newNo = bindData.value.length > 0 ? Math.max(...bindData.value.map(item => item.no)) + 1 : 1
  331 │         bindData.value.push({
  332 │           no: newNo,
  333 │           centralControlName: centralControlMap[formData.value.centralControl] || formData.value.centralControl,
  334 │           centralControlNo: formData.value.centralControl,
  335 │           bindCount: selectedLampControls.value.length,
  336 │           lampControls: [...selectedLampControls.value]
  337 │         })
  338 │         total.value++
  339 │         ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  340 │       }
  341 │       showDialog.value = false
  342 │       formRef.value?.resetFields()
  343 │     }
  344 │   })
  345 │ }
  346 │ </script>
  347 │ 
  348 │ <style scoped>
  349 │ .page-container {
  350 │   height: 100%;
  351 │   display: flex;
  352 │   flex-direction: column;
  353 │ }
  354 │ 
  355 │ .page-header {
  356 │   display: flex;
  357 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  358 │   align-items: center;
  359 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  360 │ }
  361 │ 
  362 │ .header-right {
  363 │   display: flex;
  364 │   gap: 10px;
  365 │ }
  366 │ 
  367 │ .content-area {
  368 │   flex: 1;
  369 │   background: #fff;
  370 │   border-radius: 4px;
  371 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  372 │   padding: 15px;
  373 │   display: flex;
  374 │   flex-direction: column;
  375 │   overflow: hidden;
  376 │ }
  377 │ 
  378 │ .main-tabs {
  379 │   flex: 1;
  380 │   display: flex;
  381 │   flex-direction: column;
  382 │ }
  383 │ 
  384 │ .main-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) {
  385 │   flex: 1;
  386 │   overflow: hidden;
  387 │   display: flex;
  388 │   flex-direction: column;
  389 │ }
  390 │ 
  391 │ .main-tabs :deep(.el-tab-pane) {
  392 │   flex: 1;
  393 │   display: flex;
  394 │   flex-direction: column;
  395 │ }
  396 │ 
  397 │ .filter-bar {
  398 │   display: flex;
  399 │   align-items: center;
  400 │   gap: 10px;
  401 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  402 │ }
  403 │ 
  404 │ .filter-input {
  405 │   width: 200px;
  406 │ }
  407 │ 
  408 │ .data-table {
  409 │   flex: 1;
  410 │   overflow: hidden;
  411 │ }
  412 │ 
  413 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  414 │   margin-top: 15px;
  415 │   display: flex;
  416 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  417 │ }
  418 │ 
  419 │ .table-select {
  420 │   display: flex;
  421 │   flex-direction: column;
  422 │ }
  423 │ 
  424 │ .select-header {
  425 │   display: flex;
  426 │   align-items: center;
  427 │ }
  428 │ 
  429 │ .transfer-buttons {
  430 │   display: flex;
  431 │   flex-direction: column;
  432 │   justify-content: center;
  433 │   align-items: center;
  434 │ }
  435 │ 
  436 │ .empty-tip {
  437 │   text-align: center;
  438 │   padding: 40px;
  439 │   color: #909399;
  440 │ }
  441 │ </style>
  442 │

📄 views/power/LineInfo.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">线路信息</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="showAddDialog = true">新增</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button>批量导入</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="main-content">
   12 │       <div class="left-panel">
   13 │         <div class="panel-header">
   14 │           <span class="panel-title">配电柜列表</span>
   15 │         </div>
   16 │         <div class="search-box">
   17 │           <el-input
   18 │             v-model="cabinetSearch"
   19 │             placeholder="请输入"
   20 │             class="search-input"
   21 │           >
   22 │             <template #prefix>
   23 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   24 │             </template>
   25 │           </el-input>
   26 │         </div>
   27 │         <div class="cabinet-list">
   28 │           <div
   29 │             v-for="cabinet in filteredCabinets"
   30 │             :key="cabinet.id"
   31 │             class="cabinet-item"
   32 │             :class="{ active: selectedCabinet?.id === cabinet.id }"
   33 │             @click="selectCabinet(cabinet)"
   34 │           >
   35 │             <div class="cabinet-name">{{ cabinet.name }}</div>
   36 │             <div class="cabinet-code">编号: {{ cabinet.code }}</div>
   37 │           </div>
   38 │         </div>
   39 │       </div>
   40 │ 
   41 │       <div class="right-panel">
   42 │         <div class="panel-header">
   43 │           <span class="panel-title">线路信息</span>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │         <el-table :data="filteredLines" border class="line-table">
   46 │           <el-table-column prop="name" label="线路名称" min-width="150" />
   47 │           <el-table-column prop="code" label="线路编号" min-width="120" />
   48 │           <el-table-column prop="lampCount" label="关联灯控数" width="100" align="center" />
   49 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="80" align="center">
   50 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   51 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="editLine(row)">修改</el-button>
   52 │             </template>
   53 │           </el-table-column>
   54 │         </el-table>
   55 │       </div>
   56 │     </div>
   57 │ 
   58 │     <el-dialog v-model="showAddDialog" :title="isEdit ? '修改' : '新增'" width="650px">
   59 │       <el-form :model="form" :rules="rules" ref="formRef" label-width="120px">
   60 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   61 │           <el-col :span="12">
   62 │             <el-form-item label="*配电柜名称" prop="cabinetId">
   63 │               <el-select v-model="form.cabinetId" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 100%;">
   64 │                 <el-option
   65 │                   v-for="cabinet in cabinets"
   66 │                   :key="cabinet.id"
   67 │                   :label="cabinet.name"
   68 │                   :value="cabinet.id"
   69 │                 />
   70 │               </el-select>
   71 │             </el-form-item>
   72 │           </el-col>
   73 │           <el-col :span="12">
   74 │             <el-form-item label="*上级线路" prop="parentLine">
   75 │               <el-select v-model="form.parentLine" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 100%;">
   76 │                 <el-option label="无" value="" />
   77 │                 <el-option label="主线1" value="main1" />
   78 │                 <el-option label="主线2" value="main2" />
   79 │               </el-select>
   80 │             </el-form-item>
   81 │           </el-col>
   82 │         </el-row>
   83 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   84 │           <el-col :span="12">
   85 │             <el-form-item label="*控制类型" prop="controlType">
   86 │               <el-select v-model="form.controlType" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 100%;">
   87 │                 <el-option label="断路器" value="breaker" />
   88 │                 <el-option label="接触器" value="contactor" />
   89 │                 <el-option label="继电器" value="relay" />
   90 │               </el-select>
   91 │             </el-form-item>
   92 │           </el-col>
   93 │           <el-col :span="12">
   94 │             <el-form-item label="*线路编号" prop="code">
   95 │               <el-input v-model="form.code" placeholder="请输入" />
   96 │             </el-form-item>
   97 │           </el-col>
   98 │         </el-row>
   99 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  100 │           <el-col :span="12">
  101 │             <el-form-item label="*线路名称" prop="name">
  102 │               <el-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="请输入" />
  103 │             </el-form-item>
  104 │           </el-col>
  105 │           <el-col :span="12">
  106 │             <el-form-item label="*单三相" prop="phaseType">
  107 │               <el-select v-model="form.phaseType" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 100%;">
  108 │                 <el-option label="单相" value="single" />
  109 │                 <el-option label="三相" value="three" />
  110 │               </el-select>
  111 │             </el-form-item>
  112 │           </el-col>
  113 │         </el-row>
  114 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  115 │           <el-col :span="12">
  116 │             <el-form-item label="参考电流(A)" prop="refCurrent">
  117 │               <el-input v-model="form.refCurrent" placeholder="请输入参考电流" />
  118 │             </el-form-item>
  119 │           </el-col>
  120 │           <el-col :span="12">
  121 │             <el-form-item label="额定功率" prop="ratedPower">
  122 │               <el-input v-model="form.ratedPower" placeholder="请输入额定功率" />
  123 │             </el-form-item>
  124 │           </el-col>
  125 │         </el-row>
  126 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  127 │           <el-col :span="12">
  128 │             <el-form-item label="电流上限值(A)" prop="currentMax">
  129 │               <el-input v-model="form.currentMax" placeholder="请输入电流上限值" />
  130 │             </el-form-item>
  131 │           </el-col>
  132 │           <el-col :span="12">
  133 │             <el-form-item label="电流下限值(A)" prop="currentMin">
  134 │               <el-input v-model="form.currentMin" placeholder="请输入电流下限值" />
  135 │             </el-form-item>
  136 │           </el-col>
  137 │         </el-row>
  138 │         <el-form-item label="备注">
  139 │           <el-input v-model="form.remark" type="textarea" :rows="2" placeholder="请输入备注" maxlength="20" />
  140 │         </el-form-item>
  141 │       </el-form>
  142 │       <template #footer>
  143 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  144 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitForm">确定</el-button>
  145 │       </template>
  146 │     </el-dialog>
  147 │   </div>
  148 │ </template>
  149 │ 
  150 │ <script setup>
  151 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  152 │ import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  153 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  154 │ 
  155 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false)
  156 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  157 │ const formRef = ref(null)
  158 │ const cabinetSearch = ref('')
  159 │ const selectedCabinet = ref(null)
  160 │ 
  161 │ const cabinets = ref([
  162 │   { id: 1, name: '梅溪湖隧道1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-001' },
  163 │   { id: 2, name: '梅溪湖隧道2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-002' },
  164 │   { id: 3, name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-001' },
  165 │   { id: 4, name: '梅溪湖隧道1栋2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-002' }
  166 │ ])
  167 │ 
  168 │ const lines = ref([
  169 │   { id: 1, cabinetId: 1, name: '断路器', code: 'AL10', lampCount: 0, parentLine: '', controlType: 'breaker', phaseType: 'single', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }
  170 │ ])
  171 │ 
  172 │ const form = reactive({
  173 │   cabinetId: '',
  174 │   parentLine: '',
  175 │   controlType: '',
  176 │   code: '',
  177 │   name: '',
  178 │   phaseType: '',
  179 │   refCurrent: '',
  180 │   ratedPower: '',
  181 │   currentMax: '',
  182 │   currentMin: '',
  183 │   remark: ''
  184 │ })
  185 │ 
  186 │ const rules = {
  187 │   cabinetId: [{ required: true, message: '请选择配电柜名称', trigger: 'change' }],
  188 │   parentLine: [{ required: true, message: '请选择上级线路', trigger: 'change' }],
  189 │   controlType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择控制类型', trigger: 'change' }],
  190 │   code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路编号', trigger: 'blur' }],
  191 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  192 │   phaseType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择单三相', trigger: 'change' }]
  193 │ }
  194 │ 
  195 │ const filteredCabinets = computed(() => {
  196 │   if (!cabinetSearch.value) return cabinets.value
  197 │   return cabinets.value.filter(c => c.name.includes(cabinetSearch.value) || c.code.includes(cabinetSearch.value))
  198 │ })
  199 │ 
  200 │ const filteredLines = computed(() => {
  201 │   if (!selectedCabinet.value) return lines.value
  202 │   return lines.value.filter(l => l.cabinetId === selectedCabinet.value.id)
  203 │ })
  204 │ 
  205 │ const selectCabinet = (cabinet) => {
  206 │   selectedCabinet.value = cabinet
  207 │ }
  208 │ 
  209 │ const resetForm = () => {
  210 │   Object.assign(form, {
  211 │     cabinetId: '',
  212 │     parentLine: '',
  213 │     controlType: '',
  214 │     code: '',
  215 │     name: '',
  216 │     phaseType: '',
  217 │     refCurrent: '',
  218 │     ratedPower: '',
  219 │     currentMax: '',
  220 │     currentMin: '',
  221 │     remark: ''
  222 │   })
  223 │ }
  224 │ 
  225 │ const editLine = (row) => {
  226 │   isEdit.value = true
  227 │   Object.assign(form, row)
  228 │   showAddDialog.value = true
  229 │ }
  230 │ 
  231 │ const submitForm = () => {
  232 │   formRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  233 │     if (valid) {
  234 │       if (isEdit.value) {
  235 │         const index = lines.value.findIndex(l => l.id === form.id)
  236 │         if (index > -1) {
  237 │           lines.value[index] = { ...lines.value[index], ...form }
  238 │         }
  239 │         ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  240 │       } else {
  241 │         const newId = Math.max(...lines.value.map(l => l.id), 0) + 1
  242 │         lines.value.push({
  243 │           id: newId,
  244 │           ...form,
  245 │           lampCount: 0
  246 │         })
  247 │         ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  248 │       }
  249 │       showAddDialog.value = false
  250 │       isEdit.value = false
  251 │       resetForm()
  252 │     }
  253 │   })
  254 │ }
  255 │ </script>
  256 │ 
  257 │ <style scoped>
  258 │ .page-container {
  259 │   padding: 20px;
  260 │   background: #fff;
  261 │   border-radius: 4px;
  262 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  263 │ }
  264 │ 
  265 │ .page-header {
  266 │   display: flex;
  267 │   justify-content: space-between;
  268 │   align-items: center;
  269 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  270 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  271 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  272 │ }
  273 │ 
  274 │ .page-header .title {
  275 │   font-size: 18px;
  276 │   font-weight: 600;
  277 │   color: #1f1f1f;
  278 │ }
  279 │ 
  280 │ .header-actions {
  281 │   display: flex;
  282 │   gap: 10px;
  283 │ }
  284 │ 
  285 │ .main-content {
  286 │   display: flex;
  287 │   gap: 20px;
  288 │   overflow: hidden;
  289 │ }
  290 │ 
  291 │ .left-panel {
  292 │   width: 200px;
  293 │   background: #fff;
  294 │   border-radius: 4px;
  295 │   display: flex;
  296 │   flex-direction: column;
  297 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  298 │   flex-shrink: 0;
  299 │   overflow: hidden;
  300 │ }
  301 │ 
  302 │ .panel-header {
  303 │   padding: 12px 15px;
  304 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  305 │   background: #fafafa;
  306 │ }
  307 │ 
  308 │ .panel-title {
  309 │   font-size: 14px;
  310 │   font-weight: 500;
  311 │   color: #333;
  312 │ }
  313 │ 
  314 │ .search-box {
  315 │   padding: 10px;
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ .search-input {
  319 │   width: 100%;
  320 │ }
  321 │ 
  322 │ .cabinet-list {
  323 │   flex: 1;
  324 │   overflow-y: auto;
  325 │   padding: 5px;
  326 │ }
  327 │ 
  328 │ .cabinet-item {
  329 │   padding: 10px;
  330 │   margin-bottom: 5px;
  331 │   background: #fafafa;
  332 │   border-radius: 4px;
  333 │   cursor: pointer;
  334 │   transition: all 0.3s;
  335 │   border: 1px solid transparent;
  336 │ }
  337 │ 
  338 │ .cabinet-item:hover {
  339 │   background: #f0f0f0;
  340 │ }
  341 │ 
  342 │ .cabinet-item.active {
  343 │   background: #e6f7ff;
  344 │   border-color: #91d5ff;
  345 │ }
  346 │ 
  347 │ .cabinet-name {
  348 │   font-size: 13px;
  349 │   color: #333;
  350 │   margin-bottom: 4px;
  351 │ }
  352 │ 
  353 │ .cabinet-code {
  354 │   font-size: 11px;
  355 │   color: #999;
  356 │ }
  357 │ 
  358 │ .right-panel {
  359 │   flex: 1;
  360 │   background: #fff;
  361 │   border-radius: 4px;
  362 │   display: flex;
  363 │   flex-direction: column;
  364 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  365 │   min-width: 0;
  366 │ }
  367 │ 
  368 │ .line-table {
  369 │   flex: 1;
  370 │ }
  371 │ </style>
  372 │

📄 views/power/LoadMonitor.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">电压电流负荷展示</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-select v-model="timeRange" placeholder="时间范围" class="range-select">
    7 │           <el-option label="今日" value="today" />
    8 │           <el-option label="本周" value="week" />
    9 │           <el-option label="本月" value="month" />
   10 │         </el-select>
   11 │       </div>
   12 │     </div>
   13 │     <div class="summary-cards">
   14 │       <div class="summary-card">
   15 │         <div class="card-title">总功率</div>
   16 │         <div class="card-value">{{ statistics.power.toLocaleString() }} W</div>
   17 │         <div class="card-trend positive">
   18 │           <component :is="icons.TrendingUp" />
   19 │           <span>+12.5%</span>
   20 │         </div>
   21 │       </div>
   22 │       <div class="summary-card">
   23 │         <div class="card-title">用电量</div>
   24 │         <div class="card-value">{{ statistics.energy }} kWh</div>
   25 │         <div class="card-trend positive">
   26 │           <component :is="icons.TrendingUp" />
   27 │           <span>+8.3%</span>
   28 │         </div>
   29 │       </div>
   30 │       <div class="summary-card">
   31 │         <div class="card-title">峰值负荷</div>
   32 │         <div class="card-value">{{ statistics.peakLoad.toFixed(1) }} A</div>
   33 │         <div class="card-trend negative">
   34 │           <component :is="icons.TrendingDown" />
   35 │           <span>-5.2%</span>
   36 │         </div>
   37 │       </div>
   38 │     </div>
   39 │     <div class="chart-section">
   40 │       <div class="chart-card">
   41 │         <div class="chart-header">
   42 │           <span class="chart-title">电压趋势</span>
   43 │           <el-tag type="info">220V ± 5%</el-tag>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │         <div class="chart-container">
   46 │           <canvas ref="voltageChart"></canvas>
   47 │         </div>
   48 │       </div>
   49 │       <div class="chart-card">
   50 │         <div class="chart-header">
   51 │           <span class="chart-title">电流趋势</span>
   52 │           <el-tag type="warning">峰值: {{ maxCurrent.toFixed(1) }}A</el-tag>
   53 │         </div>
   54 │         <div class="chart-container">
   55 │           <canvas ref="currentChart"></canvas>
   56 │         </div>
   57 │       </div>
   58 │     </div>
   59 │     <div class="chart-section">
   60 │       <div class="chart-card full-width">
   61 │         <div class="chart-header">
   62 │           <span class="chart-title">功率与负载率</span>
   63 │           <div class="legend">
   64 │             <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot power"></span> 功率(kW)</span>
   65 │             <span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-dot load"></span> 负载率(%)</span>
   66 │           </div>
   67 │         </div>
   68 │         <div class="chart-container">
   69 │           <canvas ref="powerChart"></canvas>
   70 │         </div>
   71 │       </div>
   72 │     </div>
   73 │   </div>
   74 │ </template>
   75 │ 
   76 │ <script setup>import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue';
   77 │ import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';
   78 │ import { loadHistoryData, energyStatistics } from '@/data/mockData';
   79 │ const icons = { TrendingUp: ArrowUp, TrendingDown: ArrowDown };
   80 │ const timeRange = ref('today');
   81 │ const voltageChart = ref(null);
   82 │ const currentChart = ref(null);
   83 │ const powerChart = ref(null);
   84 │ const statistics = computed(() => {
   85 │  return energyStatistics[timeRange.value];
   86 │ });
   87 │ const maxCurrent = computed(() => {
   88 │  return Math.max(...loadHistoryData.current);
   89 │ });
   90 │ const drawChart = (canvas, data, color, label, unit) => {
   91 │  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
   92 │  const width = canvas.width;
   93 │  const height = canvas.height;
   94 │  const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 45 };
   95 │  const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
   96 │  const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;
   97 │  const maxValue = Math.max(...data) * 1.1;
   98 │  const minValue = Math.min(...data) * 0.9;
   99 │  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
  100 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
  101 │  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  102 │  for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
  103 │  const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i;
  104 │  ctx.beginPath();
  105 │  ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y);
  106 │  ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y);
  107 │  ctx.stroke();
  108 │  const value = maxValue - ((maxValue - minValue) / 5) * i;
  109 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
  110 │  ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
  111 │  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  112 │  ctx.fillText(value.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4);
  113 │  }
  114 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
  115 │  for (let i = 0; i < loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) {
  116 │  const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i;
  117 │  ctx.beginPath();
  118 │  ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top);
  119 │  ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom);
  120 │  ctx.stroke();
  121 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
  122 │  ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
  123 │  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  124 │  ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8);
  125 │  }
  126 │  ctx.beginPath();
  127 │  ctx.strokeStyle = color;
  128 │  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  129 │  ctx.shadowColor = color;
  130 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 5;
  131 │  data.forEach((value, index) => {
  132 │  const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (data.length - 1)) * index;
  133 │  const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((value - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight;
  134 │  if (index === 0) {
  135 │  ctx.moveTo(x, y);
  136 │  }
  137 │  else {
  138 │  ctx.lineTo(x, y);
  139 │  }
  140 │  });
  141 │  ctx.stroke();
  142 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  143 │  const lastX = padding.left + chartWidth;
  144 │  const lastY = padding.top + chartHeight - ((data[data.length - 1] - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight;
  145 │  ctx.fillStyle = color;
  146 │  ctx.beginPath();
  147 │  ctx.arc(lastX, lastY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  148 │  ctx.fill();
  149 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#333';
  150 │  ctx.font = '12px sans-serif';
  151 │  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  152 │  ctx.fillText(`${data[data.length - 1].toFixed(1)}${unit}`, lastX + 8, lastY + 4);
  153 │ };
  154 │ const drawPowerChart = (canvas) => {
  155 │  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  156 │  const width = canvas.width;
  157 │  const height = canvas.height;
  158 │  const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 55 };
  159 │  const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right;
  160 │  const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;
  161 │  const powerData = loadHistoryData.power.map(p => p / 1000);
  162 │  const loadData = loadHistoryData.loadPercent;
  163 │  const maxPower = Math.max(...powerData) * 1.1;
  164 │  const maxLoad = 100;
  165 │  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
  166 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
  167 │  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  168 │  for (let i = 0; i <= 5; i++) {
  169 │  const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i;
  170 │  ctx.beginPath();
  171 │  ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y);
  172 │  ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y);
  173 │  ctx.stroke();
  174 │  const powerValue = maxPower - (maxPower / 5) * i;
  175 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
  176 │  ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
  177 │  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  178 │  ctx.fillText(powerValue.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4);
  179 │  }
  180 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
  181 │  ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
  182 │  ctx.save();
  183 │  ctx.translate(20, height / 2);
  184 │  ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
  185 │  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  186 │  ctx.fillText('功率(kW)', 0, 0);
  187 │  ctx.restore();
  188 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8';
  189 │  for (let i = 0; i < loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) {
  190 │  const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i;
  191 │  ctx.beginPath();
  192 │  ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top);
  193 │  ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom);
  194 │  ctx.stroke();
  195 │  ctx.fillStyle = '#999';
  196 │  ctx.font = '11px sans-serif';
  197 │  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  198 │  ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8);
  199 │  }
  200 │  ctx.beginPath();
  201 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#1890ff';
  202 │  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  203 │  ctx.shadowColor = '#1890ff';
  204 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 5;
  205 │  powerData.forEach((value, index) => {
  206 │  const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (powerData.length - 1)) * index;
  207 │  const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxPower) * chartHeight;
  208 │  if (index === 0) {
  209 │  ctx.moveTo(x, y);
  210 │  }
  211 │  else {
  212 │  ctx.lineTo(x, y);
  213 │  }
  214 │  });
  215 │  ctx.stroke();
  216 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  217 │  ctx.beginPath();
  218 │  ctx.strokeStyle = '#52c41a';
  219 │  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  220 │  ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
  221 │  ctx.shadowColor = '#52c41a';
  222 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 3;
  223 │  loadData.forEach((value, index) => {
  224 │  const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadData.length - 1)) * index;
  225 │  const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxLoad) * chartHeight;
  226 │  if (index === 0) {
  227 │  ctx.moveTo(x, y);
  228 │  }
  229 │  else {
  230 │  ctx.lineTo(x, y);
  231 │  }
  232 │  });
  233 │  ctx.stroke();
  234 │  ctx.setLineDash([]);
  235 │  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  236 │ };
  237 │ const resizeCanvas = (canvas, width, height) => {
  238 │  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  239 │  canvas.width = width * dpr;
  240 │  canvas.height = height * dpr;
  241 │  canvas.style.width = width + 'px';
  242 │  canvas.style.height = height + 'px';
  243 │  canvas.getContext('2d').scale(dpr, dpr);
  244 │ };
  245 │ onMounted(() => {
  246 │  setTimeout(() => {
  247 │  if (voltageChart.value) {
  248 │  resizeCanvas(voltageChart.value, 450, 200);
  249 │  drawChart(voltageChart.value, loadHistoryData.voltage, '#1890ff', '电压', 'V');
  250 │  }
  251 │  if (currentChart.value) {
  252 │  resizeCanvas(currentChart.value, 450, 200);
  253 │  drawChart(currentChart.value, loadHistoryData.current, '#faad14', '电流', 'A');
  254 │  }
  255 │  if (powerChart.value) {
  256 │  resizeCanvas(powerChart.value, 920, 250);
  257 │  drawPowerChart(powerChart.value);
  258 │  }
  259 │  }, 100);
  260 │ });
  261 │ </script>
  262 │ 
  263 │ <style scoped>
  264 │ .summary-cards {
  265 │   display: flex;
  266 │   gap: 20px;
  267 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  268 │ }
  269 │ 
  270 │ .summary-card {
  271 │   flex: 1;
  272 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  273 │   padding: 25px;
  274 │   border-radius: 8px;
  275 │   color: #fff;
  276 │ }
  277 │ 
  278 │ .card-title {
  279 │   font-size: 14px;
  280 │   opacity: 0.9;
  281 │   margin-bottom: 8px;
  282 │ }
  283 │ 
  284 │ .card-value {
  285 │   font-size: 28px;
  286 │   font-weight: 600;
  287 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  288 │ }
  289 │ 
  290 │ .card-trend {
  291 │   display: flex;
  292 │   align-items: center;
  293 │   gap: 4px;
  294 │   font-size: 12px;
  295 │   
  296 │   &.positive {
  297 │     color: #95de64;
  298 │   }
  299 │   
  300 │   &.negative {
  301 │     color: #ff7875;
  302 │   }
  303 │ }
  304 │ 
  305 │ .chart-section {
  306 │   display: flex;
  307 │   gap: 20px;
  308 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  309 │   
  310 │   &:last-child {
  311 │     margin-bottom: 0;
  312 │   }
  313 │ }
  314 │ 
  315 │ .chart-card {
  316 │   flex: 1;
  317 │   background: #fff;
  318 │   padding: 20px;
  319 │   border-radius: 8px;
  320 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  321 │   
  322 │   &.full-width {
  323 │     flex: 1 1 100%;
  324 │   }
  325 │ }
  326 │ 
  327 │ .chart-header {
  328 │   display: flex;
  329 │   justify-content: space-between;
  330 │   align-items: center;
  331 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  332 │ }
  333 │ 
  334 │ .chart-title {
  335 │   font-size: 16px;
  336 │   font-weight: 600;
  337 │   color: #333;
  338 │ }
  339 │ 
  340 │ .legend {
  341 │   display: flex;
  342 │   gap: 20px;
  343 │ }
  344 │ 
  345 │ .legend-item {
  346 │   display: flex;
  347 │   align-items: center;
  348 │   gap: 6px;
  349 │   font-size: 12px;
  350 │   color: #666;
  351 │ }
  352 │ 
  353 │ .legend-dot {
  354 │   width: 10px;
  355 │   height: 10px;
  356 │   border-radius: 50%;
  357 │   
  358 │   &.power {
  359 │     background: #1890ff;
  360 │   }
  361 │   
  362 │   &.load {
  363 │     background: #52c41a;
  364 │   }
  365 │ }
  366 │ 
  367 │ .chart-container {
  368 │   height: 200px;
  369 │   
  370 │   .full-width & {
  371 │     height: 250px;
  372 │   }
  373 │ }
  374 │ 
  375 │ .range-select {
  376 │   width: 120px;
  377 │ }
  378 │ </style>

📄 views/power/ModuleInfo.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="content-panel">
    5 │         <div class="panel-header">
    6 │           <div class="header-left">
    7 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="refreshData">刷新</el-button>
    8 │           </div>
    9 │         </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │           <el-input
   13 │             v-model="filters.deviceName"
   14 │             placeholder="请输入集控名称"
   15 │             class="filter-input"
   16 │           >
   17 │             <template #prefix>
   18 │               <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   19 │             </template>
   20 │           </el-input>
   21 │           <el-select v-model="filters.status" placeholder="请选择模块状态" class="filter-select">
   22 │             <el-option label="全部状态" value="" />
   23 │             <el-option label="在线" value="online" />
   24 │             <el-option label="离线" value="offline" />
   25 │           </el-select>
   26 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="searchModules">查询</el-button>
   27 │           <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   28 │         </div>
   29 │ 
   30 │         <el-table :data="filteredModules" border class="module-table">
   31 │           <el-table-column type="selection" width="45" />
   32 │           <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center" />
   33 │           <el-table-column prop="deviceName" label="设备名称" min-width="150" sortable />
   34 │           <el-table-column prop="moduleType" label="模块类型" min-width="150" />
   35 │           <el-table-column prop="moduleName" label="模块名称" min-width="150" />
   36 │           <el-table-column prop="moduleAddress" label="模块地址" width="100" />
   37 │           <el-table-column prop="model" label="模块型号" min-width="140" />
   38 │           <el-table-column prop="moduleTag" label="模块信息标签" width="150" align="center">
   39 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   40 │               <el-tag :type="getTagType(row.moduleTag)" size="small">{{ row.moduleTag }}</el-tag>
   41 │             </template>
   42 │           </el-table-column>
   43 │           <el-table-column prop="serialNumber" label="序列号" min-width="150" />
   44 │           <el-table-column prop="networkStatus" label="网络状态" width="100" align="center">
   45 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   46 │               <el-tag :type="row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   47 │                 {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }}
   48 │               </el-tag>
   49 │             </template>
   50 │           </el-table-column>
   51 │           <el-table-column prop="updateTime" label="数据更新时间" width="180" />
   52 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="150" align="center" fixed="right">
   53 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   54 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="viewCircuitData(row)">回路数据</el-button>
   55 │             </template>
   56 │           </el-table-column>
   57 │         </el-table>
   58 │ 
   59 │         <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   60 │           <el-pagination
   61 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   62 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   63 │             :total="total"
   64 │             :page-sizes="[10, 20, 50, 100]"
   65 │             layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, sizes, total"
   66 │           />
   67 │         </div>
   68 │ 
   69 │         <!-- 回路数据弹窗 -->
   70 │         <el-dialog v-model="showCircuitDialog" :title="`${currentModule?.moduleName} - 回路数据`" width="90%">
   71 │           <div class="circuit-data-content">
   72 │             <div class="circuit-header">
   73 │               <div class="circuit-info">
   74 │                 <span class="info-item"><strong>所属设备：</strong>{{ currentModule?.deviceName }}</span>
   75 │                 <span class="info-item"><strong>模块类型：</strong>{{ currentModule?.moduleType }}</span>
   76 │                 <span class="info-item"><strong>模块型号：</strong>{{ currentModule?.model }}</span>
   77 │               </div>
   78 │               <div class="circuit-actions">
   79 │                 <el-button type="primary" @click="refreshCircuitData">刷新数据</el-button>
   80 │               </div>
   81 │             </div>
   82 │ 
   83 │             <el-table :data="circuitData" border class="circuit-data-table">
   84 │               <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="60" align="center" />
   85 │               <el-table-column prop="circuitName" label="回路名称" min-width="150" />
   86 │               <el-table-column prop="circuitNo" label="回路编号" width="100" />
   87 │               <el-table-column prop="currentA" label="A相电流(A)" width="120" align="right">
   88 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
   89 │                   <span :style="{ color: row.currentA > 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }">{{ row.currentA }}</span>
   90 │                 </template>
   91 │               </el-table-column>
   92 │               <el-table-column prop="currentB" label="B相电流(A)" width="120" align="right">
   93 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
   94 │                   <span :style="{ color: row.currentB > 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }">{{ row.currentB }}</span>
   95 │                 </template>
   96 │               </el-table-column>
   97 │               <el-table-column prop="currentC" label="C相电流(A)" width="120" align="right">
   98 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
   99 │                   <span :style="{ color: row.currentC > 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }">{{ row.currentC }}</span>
  100 │                 </template>
  101 │               </el-table-column>
  102 │               <el-table-column prop="circuitStatus" label="回路状态" width="100" align="center">
  103 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  104 │                   <el-tag :type="row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
  105 │                     {{ row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? '通电' : '断电' }}
  106 │                   </el-tag>
  107 │                 </template>
  108 │               </el-table-column>
  109 │               <el-table-column prop="switchRecord" label="开关记录" width="180" />
  110 │               <el-table-column prop="display" label="是否显示" width="100" align="center">
  111 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  112 │                   <el-switch v-model="row.display" size="small" @change="toggleDisplay(row)" />
  113 │                 </template>
  114 │               </el-table-column>
  115 │               <el-table-column label="操作" width="120" align="center">
  116 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  117 │                   <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="viewCircuitDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
  118 │                 </template>
  119 │               </el-table-column>
  120 │             </el-table>
  121 │ 
  122 │             <div class="circuit-pagination">
  123 │               <el-pagination
  124 │                 v-model:current-page="circuitPage"
  125 │                 v-model:page-size="circuitPageSize"
  126 │                 :total="circuitTotal"
  127 │                 layout="prev, pager, next, total"
  128 │               />
  129 │             </div>
  130 │           </div>
  131 │         </el-dialog>
  132 │       </div>
  133 │     </div>
  134 │   </div>
  135 │ </template>
  136 │ 
  137 │ <script setup>
  138 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  139 │ import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  140 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  141 │ 
  142 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  143 │ const pageSize = ref(10)
  144 │ const total = ref(0)
  145 │ const showCircuitDialog = ref(false)
  146 │ const currentModule = ref(null)
  147 │ const circuitPage = ref(1)
  148 │ const circuitPageSize = ref(10)
  149 │ const circuitTotal = ref(0)
  150 │ 
  151 │ const filters = reactive({
  152 │   deviceName: '',
  153 │   status: ''
  154 │ })
  155 │ 
  156 │ const modules = ref([
  157 │   { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', moduleAddress: 66, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', moduleTag: '控制模块', serialNumber: '152403120001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  158 │   { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_4', moduleAddress: 4, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', moduleTag: '检测模块', serialNumber: '112230620003', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  159 │   { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', moduleTag: '检测模块', serialNumber: '113230820001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' },
  160 │   { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', moduleAddress: 3, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', moduleTag: '控制模块', serialNumber: '110231123001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:15' },
  161 │   { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', moduleType: '4回路供电控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_14_6', moduleAddress: 6, model: 'EXC-G290C-P7', moduleTag: '供电模块', serialNumber: '114230210001', networkStatus: 'offline', updateTime: '2026-05-14 08:15:15' },
  162 │   { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', moduleType: '12回路输入状态检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_11_5', moduleAddress: 5, model: 'EXC-G290C-D5', moduleTag: '检测模块', serialNumber: '111230620000', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  163 │   { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_7', moduleAddress: 7, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', moduleTag: '检测模块', serialNumber: '113230620006', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  164 │   { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', moduleAddress: 1, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', moduleTag: '控制模块', serialNumber: '110231215560', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' },
  165 │   { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '梅溪湖隧道集控2', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', moduleTag: '检测模块', serialNumber: '112231215574', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }
  166 │ ])
  167 │ 
  168 │ total.value = modules.value.length
  169 │ 
  170 │ const circuitData = ref([
  171 │   { id: 1, no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', circuitNo: 1, currentA: 3.2, currentB: 3.0, currentC: 3.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  172 │   { id: 2, no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', circuitNo: 2, currentA: 2.8, currentB: 2.9, currentC: 2.7, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  173 │   { id: 3, no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', circuitNo: 3, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true },
  174 │   { id: 4, no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', circuitNo: 4, currentA: 4.5, currentB: 4.6, currentC: 4.4, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true },
  175 │   { id: 5, no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', circuitNo: 5, currentA: 1.2, currentB: 1.3, currentC: 1.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: false },
  176 │   { id: 6, no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', circuitNo: 6, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true }
  177 │ ])
  178 │ 
  179 │ circuitTotal.value = circuitData.value.length
  180 │ 
  181 │ const filteredModules = computed(() => {
  182 │   let result = modules.value
  183 │   if (filters.deviceName) result = result.filter(m => m.deviceName.includes(filters.deviceName))
  184 │   if (filters.status) result = result.filter(m => m.networkStatus === filters.status)
  185 │   return result
  186 │ })
  187 │ 
  188 │ const searchModules = () => {
  189 │   currentPage.value = 1
  190 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  191 │ }
  192 │ 
  193 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  194 │   Object.assign(filters, { deviceName: '', status: '' })
  195 │   currentPage.value = 1
  196 │ }
  197 │ 
  198 │ const refreshData = () => {
  199 │   ElMessage.success('数据已刷新')
  200 │ }
  201 │ 
  202 │ const viewCircuitData = (row) => {
  203 │   currentModule.value = row
  204 │   showCircuitDialog.value = true
  205 │ }
  206 │ 
  207 │ const refreshCircuitData = () => {
  208 │   ElMessage.success('回路数据已刷新')
  209 │ }
  210 │ 
  211 │ const toggleDisplay = (row) => {
  212 │   ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName} 显示状态已${row.display ? '开启' : '关闭'}`)
  213 │ }
  214 │ 
  215 │ const viewCircuitDetail = (row) => {
  216 │   ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.circuitName} 的详细数据`)
  217 │ }
  218 │ 
  219 │ const getTagType = (tag) => {
  220 │   switch (tag) {
  221 │     case '控制模块': return 'primary'
  222 │     case '检测模块': return 'success'
  223 │     case '供电模块': return 'warning'
  224 │     default: return 'info'
  225 │   }
  226 │ }
  227 │ </script>
  228 │ 
  229 │ <style scoped>
  230 │ .page-container {
  231 │   height: 100%;
  232 │   display: flex;
  233 │   flex-direction: column;
  234 │ }
  235 │ 
  236 │ .main-content {
  237 │   flex: 1;
  238 │   display: flex;
  239 │   overflow: hidden;
  240 │ }
  241 │ 
  242 │ .content-panel {
  243 │   flex: 1;
  244 │   display: flex;
  245 │   flex-direction: column;
  246 │   overflow: hidden;
  247 │   min-width: 0;
  248 │ }
  249 │ 
  250 │ .panel-header {
  251 │   padding: 15px;
  252 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  253 │   background: #fff;
  254 │   border-radius: 4px;
  255 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  256 │ }
  257 │ 
  258 │ .header-left {
  259 │   display: flex;
  260 │   gap: 10px;
  261 │ }
  262 │ 
  263 │ .filter-bar {
  264 │   display: flex;
  265 │   align-items: center;
  266 │   gap: 15px;
  267 │   padding: 15px;
  268 │   background: #fff;
  269 │   border-radius: 4px;
  270 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  271 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  272 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  273 │ }
  274 │ 
  275 │ .filter-select {
  276 │   width: 150px;
  277 │ }
  278 │ 
  279 │ .filter-input {
  280 │   width: 200px;
  281 │ }
  282 │ 
  283 │ .module-table {
  284 │   flex: 1;
  285 │   background: #fff;
  286 │   border-radius: 4px;
  287 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  288 │   overflow: auto;
  289 │   min-width: 0;
  290 │ }
  291 │ 
  292 │ :deep(.module-table .el-table) {
  293 │   min-width: 100%;
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  297 │   margin-top: 15px;
  298 │   display: flex;
  299 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  300 │ }
  301 │ 
  302 │ .circuit-data-content {
  303 │   padding: 10px 0;
  304 │ }
  305 │ 
  306 │ .circuit-header {
  307 │   display: flex;
  308 │   justify-content: space-between;
  309 │   align-items: center;
  310 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  311 │   padding: 15px;
  312 │   background: #fafafa;
  313 │   border-radius: 4px;
  314 │ }
  315 │ 
  316 │ .circuit-info {
  317 │   display: flex;
  318 │   gap: 30px;
  319 │ }
