📄 views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="toolbar">
    4 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    5 │       <el-button @click="handleLightSensor">光感策略</el-button>
    6 │       <el-button type="success" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0" @click="handleDeploy">下发</el-button>
    7 │       <el-button type="danger" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0" @click="handleDelete">删除</el-button>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │     
   10 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   11 │       <el-input v-model="filters.name" placeholder="请输入场景名称" class="filter-input" clearable>
   12 │         <template #prefix>
   13 │           <el-icon><Search /></el-icon>
   14 │         </template>
   15 │       </el-input>
   16 │       <el-select v-model="filters.type" placeholder="请选择场景类型" class="filter-select" clearable>
   17 │         <el-option label="定时场景" value="timer" />
   18 │         <el-option label="光感场景" value="light" />
   19 │       </el-select>
   20 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="searchScenes">查询</el-button>
   21 │       <el-button @click="resetFilters">重置</el-button>
   22 │     </div>
   23 │ 
   24 │     <el-table 
   25 │       :data="filteredScenes" 
   26 │       border 
   27 │       class="scene-table"
   28 │       @selection-change="handleSelectionChange"
   29 │     >
   30 │       <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   31 │       <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="70" align="center" />
   32 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="场景名称" min-width="180" />
   33 │       <el-table-column prop="type" label="场景类型" width="120" align="center">
   34 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   35 │           <el-tag :type="row.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'" size="small">
   36 │             {{ row.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }}
   37 │           </el-tag>
   38 │         </template>
   39 │       </el-table-column>
   40 │       <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100" align="center">
   41 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   42 │           <el-tag :type="row.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">
   43 │             {{ row.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }}
   44 │           </el-tag>
   45 │         </template>
   46 │       </el-table-column>
   47 │       <el-table-column prop="deployCount" label="下发次数" width="100" align="center" />
   48 │       <el-table-column prop="creator" label="创建人" width="120" />
   49 │       <el-table-column prop="createTime" label="创建时间" width="180" />
   50 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="220" align="center" fixed="right">
   51 │         <template #default="{ row }">
   52 │           <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">编辑</el-button>
   53 │           <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="handleView(row)">详情</el-button>
   54 │           <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="handleDeleteOne(row)">删除</el-button>
   55 │         </template>
   56 │       </el-table-column>
   57 │     </el-table>
   58 │ 
   59 │     <div class="pagination-wrapper">
   60 │       <el-pagination
   61 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   62 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   63 │         :total="total"
   64 │         :page-sizes="[10, 20, 50, 100]"
   65 │         layout="total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper"
   66 │       />
   67 │     </div>
   68 │ 
   69 │     <!-- 新增/编辑场景弹窗 -->
   70 │     <el-dialog 
   71 │       :title="isEdit ? '编辑场景' : '新增场景'" 
   72 │       v-model="showSceneDialog" 
   73 │       width="700px"
   74 │       :close-on-click-modal="false"
   75 │     >
   76 │       <el-form :model="sceneForm" :rules="sceneRules" ref="sceneFormRef" label-width="100px">
   77 │         <el-form-item label="场景名称" prop="name">
   78 │           <el-input v-model="sceneForm.name" placeholder="请输入场景名称" />
   79 │         </el-form-item>
   80 │         <el-form-item label="场景类型" prop="type">
   81 │           <el-radio-group v-model="sceneForm.type" @change="handleTypeChange">
   82 │             <el-radio value="timer">定时场景</el-radio>
   83 │             <el-radio value="light">光感场景</el-radio>
   84 │           </el-radio-group>
   85 │         </el-form-item>
   86 │         
   87 │         <!-- 定时场景配置 -->
   88 │         <template v-if="sceneForm.type === 'timer'">
   89 │           <el-divider content-position="left">定时动作配置</el-divider>
   90 │           <div class="timer-actions">
   91 │             <div v-for="(action, index) in sceneForm.actions" :key="index" class="action-item">
   92 │               <el-row :gutter="10">
   93 │                 <el-col :span="5">
   94 │                   <el-select v-model="action.type" placeholder="动作类型" style="width: 100%">
   95 │                     <el-option label="开灯" value="on" />
   96 │                     <el-option label="关灯" value="off" />
   97 │                   </el-select>
   98 │                 </el-col>
   99 │                 <el-col :span="6">
  100 │                   <el-time-picker
  101 │                     v-model="action.time"
  102 │                     placeholder="执行时间"
  103 │                     format="HH:mm"
  104 │                     value-format="HH:mm"
  105 │                     style="width: 100%"
  106 │                   />
  107 │                 </el-col>
  108 │                 <el-col :span="11">
  109 │                   <el-checkbox-group v-model="action.weekDays" size="small">
  110 │                     <el-checkbox label="1">周一</el-checkbox>
  111 │                     <el-checkbox label="2">周二</el-checkbox>
  112 │                     <el-checkbox label="3">周三</el-checkbox>
  113 │                     <el-checkbox label="4">周四</el-checkbox>
  114 │                     <el-checkbox label="5">周五</el-checkbox>
  115 │                     <el-checkbox label="6">周六</el-checkbox>
  116 │                     <el-checkbox label="0">周日</el-checkbox>
  117 │                   </el-checkbox-group>
  118 │                 </el-col>
  119 │                 <el-col :span="2">
  120 │                   <el-button type="danger" icon="Delete" @click="removeAction(index)" circle size="small" />
  121 │                 </el-col>
  122 │               </el-row>
  123 │             </div>
  124 │             <el-button type="primary" plain @click="addAction" style="width: 100%">+ 添加动作</el-button>
  125 │           </div>
  126 │         </template>
  127 │         
  128 │         <!-- 光感场景配置 -->
  129 │         <template v-if="sceneForm.type === 'light'">
  130 │           <el-divider content-position="left">光感策略配置</el-divider>
  131 │           <el-form-item label="光感阈值">
  132 │             <el-input-number v-model="sceneForm.lightThreshold" :min="0" :max="1000" placeholder="光照阈值 (lux)" />
  133 │             <span class="unit">lux</span>
  134 │           </el-form-item>
  135 │           <el-form-item label="触发动作">
  136 │             <el-select v-model="sceneForm.lightAction" placeholder="选择触发动作">
  137 │               <el-option label="开灯" value="on" />
  138 │               <el-option label="关灯" value="off" />
  139 │             </el-select>
  140 │           </el-form-item>
  141 │           <el-form-item label="生效时段">
  142 │             <el-time-picker
  143 │               v-model="sceneForm.lightTimeRange"
  144 │               is-range
  145 │               placeholder="开始时间 - 结束时间"
  146 │               format="HH:mm"
  147 │               value-format="HH:mm"
  148 │               range-separator="至"
  149 │               start-placeholder="开始时间"
  150 │               end-placeholder="结束时间"
  151 │               style="width: 100%"
  152 │             />
  153 │           </el-form-item>
  154 │         </template>
  155 │ 
  156 │         <el-divider content-position="left">关联设备</el-divider>
  157 │         <el-form-item label="选择设备">
  158 │           <el-transfer
  159 │             v-model="sceneForm.devices"
  160 │             :data="deviceOptions"
  161 │             :titles="['可选设备', '已选设备']"
  162 │             filterable
  163 │             filter-placeholder="搜索设备"
  164 │           />
  165 │         </el-form-item>
  166 │       </el-form>
  167 │       <template #footer>
  168 │         <el-button @click="showSceneDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  169 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="submitScene">确定</el-button>
  170 │       </template>
  171 │     </el-dialog>
  172 │ 
  173 │     <!-- 详情弹窗 -->
  174 │     <el-dialog title="场景详情" v-model="showDetailDialog" width="600px">
  175 │       <div class="detail-content" v-if="currentScene">
  176 │         <el-descriptions :column="1" border>
  177 │           <el-descriptions-item label="场景名称">{{ currentScene.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
  178 │           <el-descriptions-item label="场景类型">
  179 │             <el-tag :type="currentScene.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'" size="small">
  180 │               {{ currentScene.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }}
  181 │             </el-tag>
  182 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  183 │           <el-descriptions-item label="状态">
  184 │             <el-tag :type="currentScene.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">
  185 │               {{ currentScene.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }}
  186 │             </el-tag>
  187 │           </el-descriptions-item>
  188 │           <el-descriptions-item label="创建人">{{ currentScene.creator }}</el-descriptions-item>
  189 │           <el-descriptions-item label="创建时间">{{ currentScene.createTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
  190 │         </el-descriptions>
  191 │         
  192 │         <el-divider content-position="left" style="margin-top: 20px">策略配置</el-divider>
  193 │         <div v-if="currentScene.type === 'timer'" class="timer-detail">
  194 │           <div v-for="(action, index) in currentScene.actions" :key="index" class="action-detail">
  195 │             <span class="action-no">动作 {{ index + 1 }}：</span>
  196 │             <el-tag size="small">{{ action.type === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}</el-tag>
  197 │             <span>，执行时间：{{ action.time }}</span>
  198 │             <span>，执行星期：{{ action.weekDaysText }}</span>
  199 │           </div>
  200 │         </div>
  201 │         <div v-else class="light-detail">
  202 │           <div>光感阈值：{{ currentScene.lightThreshold }} lux</div>
  203 │           <div>触发动作：{{ currentScene.lightAction === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}</div>
  204 │           <div>生效时段：{{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[0] }} 至 {{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[1] }}</div>
  205 │         </div>
  206 │       </div>
  207 │     </el-dialog>
  208 │   </div>
  209 │ </template>
  210 │ 
  211 │ <script setup>
  212 │ import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue'
  213 │ import { Search, Plus, Delete, Clock, Sunrise, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  214 │ import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus'
  215 │ 
  216 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  217 │ const pageSize = ref(10)
  218 │ const total = ref(0)
  219 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  220 │ const showSceneDialog = ref(false)
  221 │ const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
  222 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  223 │ const currentScene = ref(null)
  224 │ const sceneFormRef = ref(null)
  225 │ 
  226 │ const filters = reactive({
  227 │   name: '',
  228 │   type: ''
  229 │ })
  230 │ 
  231 │ const weekDayMap = {
  232 │   '0': '周日',
  233 │   '1': '周一',
  234 │   '2': '周二',
  235 │   '3': '周三',
  236 │   '4': '周四',
  237 │   '5': '周五',
  238 │   '6': '周六'
  239 │ }
  240 │ 
  241 │ const scenes = ref([
  242 │   {
  243 │     id: 1,
  244 │     no: 1,
  245 │     name: '夜间照明场景',
  246 │     type: 'timer',
  247 │     status: 'active',
  248 │     deployCount: 15,
  249 │     creator: '管理员',
  250 │     createTime: '2026-05-10 10:00:00',
  251 │     actions: [
  252 │       { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] },
  253 │       { type: 'off', time: '06:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] }
  254 │     ]
  255 │   },
  256 │   {
  257 │     id: 2,
  258 │     no: 2,
  259 │     name: '周末照明场景',
  260 │     type: 'timer',
  261 │     status: 'active',
  262 │     deployCount: 8,
  263 │     creator: '管理员',
  264 │     createTime: '2026-05-12 14:30:00',
  265 │     actions: [
  266 │       { type: 'on', time: '19:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] },
  267 │       { type: 'off', time: '07:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] }
  268 │     ]
  269 │   },
  270 │   {
  271 │     id: 3,
  272 │     no: 3,
  273 │     name: '阴天自动照明',
  274 │     type: 'light',
  275 │     status: 'inactive',
  276 │     deployCount: 5,
  277 │     creator: '管理员',
  278 │     createTime: '2026-05-13 09:00:00',
  279 │     lightThreshold: 200,
  280 │     lightAction: 'on',
  281 │     lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '20:00']
  282 │   },
  283 │   {
  284 │     id: 4,
  285 │     no: 4,
  286 │     name: '强光自动关闭',
  287 │     type: 'light',
  288 │     status: 'active',
  289 │     deployCount: 3,
  290 │     creator: '管理员',
  291 │     createTime: '2026-05-14 16:00:00',
  292 │     lightThreshold: 800,
  293 │     lightAction: 'off',
  294 │     lightTimeRange: ['08:00', '18:00']
  295 │   }
  296 │ ])
  297 │ 
  298 │ total.value = scenes.value.length
  299 │ 
  300 │ const deviceOptions = ref([
  301 │   { key: 1, label: '梅溪湖隧道集控1' },
  302 │   { key: 2, label: '梅溪湖隧道集控2' },
  303 │   { key: 3, label: '梅溪湖隧道集控1' },
  304 │   { key: 4, label: '梅溪湖隧道集控2' }
  305 │ ])
  306 │ 
  307 │ const sceneForm = reactive({
  308 │   name: '',
  309 │   type: 'timer',
  310 │   actions: [
  311 │     { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
  312 │   ],
  313 │   lightThreshold: 200,
  314 │   lightAction: 'on',
  315 │   lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
  316 │   devices: []
  317 │ })
  318 │ 
  319 │ const sceneRules = {
  320 │   name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入场景名称', trigger: 'blur' }],
  321 │   type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择场景类型', trigger: 'change' }]
  322 │ }
  323 │ 
  324 │ const filteredScenes = computed(() => {
  325 │   let result = scenes.value
  326 │   if (filters.name) {
  327 │     result = result.filter(s => s.name.includes(filters.name))
  328 │   }
  329 │   if (filters.type) {
  330 │     result = result.filter(s => s.type === filters.type)
  331 │   }
  332 │   return result
  333 │ })
  334 │ 
  335 │ const handleSelectionChange = (selection) => {
  336 │   selectedRows.value = selection
  337 │ }
  338 │ 
  339 │ const searchScenes = () => {
  340 │   currentPage.value = 1
  341 │   ElMessage.success('查询成功')
  342 │ }
  343 │ 
  344 │ const resetFilters = () => {
  345 │   Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '' })
  346 │   currentPage.value = 1
  347 │ }
  348 │ 
  349 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  350 │   isEdit.value = false
  351 │   resetSceneForm()
  352 │   showSceneDialog.value = true
  353 │ }
  354 │ 
  355 │ const handleLightSensor = () => {
  356 │   isEdit.value = false
  357 │   resetSceneForm()
  358 │   sceneForm.type = 'light'
  359 │   showSceneDialog.value = true
  360 │ }
  361 │ 
  362 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  363 │   isEdit.value = true
  364 │   Object.assign(sceneForm, {
  365 │     name: row.name,
  366 │     type: row.type,
  367 │     actions: row.type === 'timer' ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(row.actions)) : [],
  368 │     lightThreshold: row.lightThreshold || 200,
  369 │     lightAction: row.lightAction || 'on',
  370 │     lightTimeRange: row.lightTimeRange || ['06:00', '22:00'],
  371 │     devices: []
  372 │   })
  373 │   showSceneDialog.value = true
  374 │ }
  375 │ 
  376 │ const handleView = (row) => {
  377 │   currentScene.value = {
  378 │     ...row,
  379 │     actions: row.actions ? row.actions.map(a => ({
  380 │       ...a,
  381 │       weekDaysText: a.weekDays.map(d => weekDayMap[d]).join('、')
  382 │     })) : []
  383 │   }
  384 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  385 │ }
  386 │ 
  387 │ const handleDeploy = () => {
  388 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  389 │     `确定要下发选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
  390 │     '场景下发',
  391 │     {
  392 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  393 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  394 │       type: 'warning'
  395 │     }
  396 │   ).then(() => {
  397 │     ElMessage.success('场景下发成功')
  398 │   })
  399 │ }
  400 │ 
  401 │ const handleDelete = () => {
  402 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  403 │     `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`,
  404 │     '删除确认',
  405 │     {
  406 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  407 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  408 │       type: 'warning'
  409 │     }
  410 │   ).then(() => {
  411 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  412 │   })
  413 │ }
  414 │ 
  415 │ const handleDeleteOne = (row) => {
  416 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  417 │     `确定要删除场景【${row.name}】吗？`,
  418 │     '删除确认',
  419 │     {
  420 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  421 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  422 │       type: 'warning'
  423 │     }
  424 │   ).then(() => {
  425 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  426 │   })
  427 │ }
  428 │ 
  429 │ const submitScene = () => {
  430 │   sceneFormRef.value.validate((valid) => {
  431 │     if (valid) {
  432 │       if (sceneForm.type === 'timer' && sceneForm.actions.length === 0) {
  433 │         ElMessage.warning('请至少添加一个定时动作')
  434 │         return
  435 │       }
  436 │       ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '编辑成功' : '创建成功')
  437 │       showSceneDialog.value = false
  438 │     }
  439 │   })
  440 │ }
  441 │ 
  442 │ const addAction = () => {
  443 │   sceneForm.actions.push({
  444 │     type: 'on',
  445 │     time: '18:00',
  446 │     weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0']
  447 │   })
  448 │ }
  449 │ 
  450 │ const removeAction = (index) => {
  451 │   if (sceneForm.actions.length > 1) {
  452 │     sceneForm.actions.splice(index, 1)
  453 │   } else {
  454 │     ElMessage.warning('至少保留一个动作')
  455 │   }
  456 │ }
  457 │ 
  458 │ const handleTypeChange = () => {
  459 │   if (sceneForm.type === 'timer') {
  460 │     sceneForm.actions = [{ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }]
  461 │   }
  462 │ }
  463 │ 
  464 │ const resetSceneForm = () => {
  465 │   Object.assign(sceneForm, {
  466 │     name: '',
  467 │     type: 'timer',
  468 │     actions: [
  469 │       { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }
  470 │     ],
  471 │     lightThreshold: 200,
  472 │     lightAction: 'on',
  473 │     lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'],
  474 │     devices: []
  475 │   })
  476 │ }
  477 │ </script>
  478 │ 
  479 │ <style scoped>
  480 │ .page-container {
  481 │   padding: 20px;
  482 │   background: #f0f2f5;
  483 │   min-height: 100%;
  484 │ }
  485 │ 
  486 │ .toolbar {
  487 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  488 │ }
  489 │ 
  490 │ .filter-bar {
  491 │   display: flex;
  492 │   align-items: center;
  493 │   gap: 15px;
  494 │   padding: 15px;
  495 │   background: #fff;
  496 │   border-radius: 4px;
  497 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  498 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  499 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  500 │ }
  501 │ 
  502 │ .filter-select {
  503 │   width: 150px;
  504 │ }
  505 │ 
  506 │ .filter-input {
  507 │   width: 200px;
  508 │ }
  509 │ 
  510 │ .scene-table {
  511 │   background: #fff;
  512 │   border-radius: 4px;
  513 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  514 │ }
  515 │ 
  516 │ .pagination-wrapper {
  517 │   margin-top: 20px;
  518 │   display: flex;
  519 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  520 │ }
  521 │ 
  522 │ .timer-actions {
  523 │   width: 100%;
  524 │ }
  525 │ 
  526 │ .action-item {
  527 │   padding: 15px;
  528 │   background: #f5f7fa;
  529 │   border-radius: 4px;
  530 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  531 │ }
  532 │ 
  533 │ .unit {
  534 │   margin-left: 10px;
  535 │   color: #606266;
  536 │ }
  537 │ 
  538 │ .detail-content {
  539 │   padding: 10px 0;
  540 │ }
  541 │ 
  542 │ .timer-detail,
  543 │ .light-detail {
  544 │   padding: 15px;
  545 │   background: #f5f7fa;
  546 │   border-radius: 4px;
  547 │ }
  548 │ 
  549 │ .action-detail {
  550 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  551 │ }
  552 │ 
  553 │ .action-no {
  554 │   font-weight: 600;
  555 │   color: #303133;
  556 │ }
  557 │ 
  558 │ .action-detail span {
  559 │   margin-right: 10px;
  560 │ }
  561 │ </style>

📄 views/scene/LinkageManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="right-content">
    5 │         <div class="page-header">
    6 │           <div class="header-right">
    7 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">保存</el-button>
    8 │             <el-button @click="handleCancel">取消</el-button>
    9 │             <el-button type="text" @click="handleTimeRange">触发时间段</el-button>
   10 │           </div>
   11 │         </div>
   12 │ 
   13 │         <div class="form-section">
   14 │           <div class="form-row">
   15 │             <div class="form-item">
   16 │               <label class="required">规则名称</label>
   17 │               <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入规则名称" class="form-input" />
   18 │             </div>
   19 │             <div class="form-item">
   20 │               <label class="required">优先级</label>
   21 │               <el-select v-model="formData.priority" class="form-select">
   22 │                 <el-option label="高" value="high" />
   23 │                 <el-option label="低" value="low" />
   24 │               </el-select>
   25 │             </div>
   26 │             <div class="form-item">
   27 │               <label class="required">执行日期</label>
   28 │               <div class="radio-group">
   29 │                 <el-radio v-model="formData.executeType" label="always">一直执行</el-radio>
   30 │                 <el-radio v-model="formData.executeType" label="scheduled">定时执行</el-radio>
   31 │               </div>
   32 │             </div>
   33 │           </div>
   34 │         </div>
   35 │ 
   36 │         <div class="tabs-section">
   37 │           <el-tabs v-model="activeTab" class="section-tabs">
   38 │             <el-tab-pane label="触发条件" name="condition">
   39 │               <div class="condition-list">
   40 │                 <div v-for="(condition, index) in formData.conditions" :key="index" class="condition-item">
   41 │                   <div class="condition-index">{{ index + 1 }}</div>
   42 │                   <div class="condition-fields">
   43 │                     <el-select v-model="condition.productType" placeholder="请选择产品类型" class="condition-select">
   44 │                       <el-option label="灯控制器" value="灯控制器" />
   45 │                       <el-option label="传感器" value="传感器" />
   46 │                       <el-option label="摄像头" value="摄像头" />
   47 │                     </el-select>
   48 │                     <el-select v-model="condition.device" placeholder="请选择设备" class="condition-select">
   49 │                       <el-option label="展厅隧道灯" value="展厅隧道灯" />
   50 │                       <el-option label="光亚展灯杆" value="光亚展灯杆" />
   51 │                     </el-select>
   52 │                     <el-select v-model="condition.triggerType" placeholder="请选择触发类型" class="condition-select">
   53 │                       <el-option label="事件触发" value="event" />
   54 │                       <el-option label="属性触发" value="property" />
   55 │                     </el-select>
   56 │                     <el-select v-model="condition.triggerCondition" placeholder="请选择触发条件" class="condition-select">
   57 │                       <el-option label="检测有人" value="有人" />
   58 │                       <el-option label="检测无人" value="无人" />
   59 │                       <el-option label="光照度低于阈值" value="光照度低" />
   60 │                       <el-option label="漏电" value="漏电" />
   61 │                     </el-select>
   62 │                   </div>
   63 │                   <div class="condition-controls">
   64 │                     <el-button type="text" @click="removeCondition(index)">×</el-button>
   65 │                   </div>
   66 │                 </div>
   67 │               </div>
   68 │               <div class="add-condition">
   69 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="addCondition">
   70 │                   <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
   71 │                   添加触发条件
   72 │                 </el-button>
   73 │               </div>
   74 │             </el-tab-pane>
   75 │             <el-tab-pane label="执行动作" name="action">
   76 │               <div class="action-list">
   77 │                 <div v-for="(action, index) in formData.actions" :key="index" class="action-item">
   78 │                   <div class="action-index">{{ index + 1 }}</div>
   79 │                   <div class="action-fields">
   80 │                     <el-select v-model="action.productType" placeholder="请选择产品类型" class="action-select">
   81 │                       <el-option label="灯控制器" value="灯控制器" />
   82 │                       <el-option label="集控" value="集控" />
   83 │                       <el-option label="传感器" value="传感器" />
   84 │                     </el-select>
   85 │                     <el-select v-model="action.device" placeholder="请选择设备" class="action-select">
   86 │                       <el-option label="展厅隧道灯" value="展厅隧道灯" />
   87 │                       <el-option label="光亚展灯杆" value="光亚展灯杆" />
   88 │                     </el-select>
   89 │                     <el-select v-model="action.action" placeholder="请选择动作内容" class="action-select">
   90 │                       <el-option label="开灯" value="开灯" />
   91 │                       <el-option label="关灯" value="关灯" />
   92 │                       <el-option label="调光50%" value="调光50%" />
   93 │                       <el-option label="断电" value="断电" />
   94 │                     </el-select>
   95 │                   </div>
   96 │                   <div class="action-controls">
   97 │                     <el-button type="text" @click="removeAction(index)">×</el-button>
   98 │                   </div>
   99 │                 </div>
  100 │               </div>
  101 │               <div class="add-action">
  102 │                 <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="addAction">
  103 │                   <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
  104 │                   添加执行动作
  105 │                 </el-button>
  106 │               </div>
  107 │             </el-tab-pane>
  108 │           </el-tabs>
  109 │         </div>
  110 │       </div>
  111 │     </div>
  112 │ 
  113 │     <el-dialog title="触发时间段" v-model="showTimeRangeDialog" width="400px">
  114 │       <el-form :model="timeRangeData" label-width="80px">
  115 │         <el-form-item label="开始时间">
  116 │           <el-time-picker v-model="timeRangeData.startTime" placeholder="选择开始时间" />
  117 │         </el-form-item>
  118 │         <el-form-item label="结束时间">
  119 │           <el-time-picker v-model="timeRangeData.endTime" placeholder="选择结束时间" />
  120 │         </el-form-item>
  121 │       </el-form>
  122 │       <template #footer>
  123 │         <el-button @click="showTimeRangeDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  124 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="confirmTimeRange">确定</el-button>
  125 │       </template>
  126 │     </el-dialog>
  127 │   </div>
  128 │ </template>
  129 │ 
  130 │ <script setup>
  131 │ import { ref } from 'vue';
  132 │ import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';
  133 │ 
  134 │ const activeTab = ref('condition');
  135 │ const showTimeRangeDialog = ref(false);
  136 │ 
  137 │ const formData = ref({
  138 │   name: '',
  139 │   priority: 'high',
  140 │   executeType: 'always',
  141 │   conditions: [
  142 │     {
  143 │       productType: '',
  144 │       device: '',
  145 │       triggerType: '',
  146 │       triggerCondition: ''
  147 │     }
  148 │   ],
  149 │   actions: [
  150 │     {
  151 │       productType: '',
  152 │       device: '',
  153 │       action: ''
  154 │     }
  155 │   ]
  156 │ });
  157 │ 
  158 │ const timeRangeData = ref({
  159 │   startTime: '',
  160 │   endTime: ''
  161 │ });
  162 │ 
  163 │ const addCondition = () => {
  164 │   formData.value.conditions.push({
  165 │     productType: '',
  166 │     device: '',
  167 │     triggerType: '',
  168 │     triggerCondition: ''
  169 │   });
  170 │ };
  171 │ 
  172 │ const removeCondition = (index) => {
  173 │   if (formData.value.conditions.length > 1) {
  174 │     formData.value.conditions.splice(index, 1);
  175 │   }
  176 │ };
  177 │ 
  178 │ const addAction = () => {
  179 │   formData.value.actions.push({
  180 │     productType: '',
  181 │     device: '',
  182 │     action: ''
  183 │   });
  184 │ };
  185 │ 
  186 │ const removeAction = (index) => {
  187 │   if (formData.value.actions.length > 1) {
  188 │     formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  189 │   }
  190 │ };
  191 │ 
  192 │ const handleSave = () => {
  193 │   if (!formData.value.name) {
  194 │     alert('请输入规则名称');
  195 │     return;
  196 │   }
  197 │   alert('规则保存成功');
  198 │ };
  199 │ 
  200 │ const handleCancel = () => {
  201 │   formData.value = {
  202 │     name: '',
  203 │     priority: 'high',
  204 │     executeType: 'always',
  205 │     conditions: [
  206 │       {
  207 │         productType: '',
  208 │         device: '',
  209 │         triggerType: '',
  210 │         triggerCondition: ''
  211 │       }
  212 │     ],
  213 │     actions: [
  214 │       {
  215 │         productType: '',
  216 │         device: '',
  217 │         action: ''
  218 │       }
  219 │     ]
  220 │   };
  221 │ };
  222 │ 
  223 │ const handleTimeRange = () => {
  224 │   showTimeRangeDialog.value = true;
  225 │ };
  226 │ 
  227 │ const confirmTimeRange = () => {
  228 │   showTimeRangeDialog.value = false;
  229 │   alert('触发时间段设置成功');
  230 │ };
  231 │ </script>
  232 │ 
  233 │ <style scoped>
  234 │ .page-container {
  235 │   display: flex;
  236 │   height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  237 │ }
  238 │ 
  239 │ .main-content {
  240 │   flex: 1;
  241 │   display: flex;
  242 │   overflow: hidden;
  243 │ }
  244 │ 
  245 │ .right-content {
  246 │   flex: 1;
  247 │   display: flex;
  248 │   flex-direction: column;
  249 │   min-width: 0;
  250 │   padding: 15px;
  251 │   overflow: hidden;
  252 │ }
  253 │ 
  254 │ .page-header {
  255 │   display: flex;
  256 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  257 │   align-items: center;
  258 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  259 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  260 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  261 │ }
  262 │ 
  263 │ .form-section {
  264 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  265 │ }
  266 │ 
  267 │ .form-row {
  268 │   display: flex;
  269 │   gap: 30px;
  270 │ }
  271 │ 
  272 │ .form-item {
  273 │   display: flex;
  274 │   flex-direction: column;
  275 │   gap: 8px;
  276 │   width: 280px;
  277 │ }
  278 │ 
  279 │ .form-item label {
  280 │   color: #303133;
  281 │   font-size: 14px;
  282 │ }
  283 │ 
  284 │ .required::after {
  285 │   content: '*';
  286 │   color: #f56c6c;
  287 │   margin-left: 4px;
  288 │ }
  289 │ 
  290 │ .form-input {
  291 │   width: 100%;
  292 │   background: #fff;
  293 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ .form-select {
  297 │   width: 100%;
  298 │   background: #fff;
  299 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  300 │ }
  301 │ 
  302 │ .radio-group {
  303 │   display: flex;
  304 │   gap: 20px;
  305 │ }
  306 │ 
  307 │ .radio-group :deep(.el-radio) {
  308 │   color: #303133;
  309 │ }
  310 │ 
  311 │ .tabs-section {
  312 │   flex: 1;
  313 │   overflow-y: auto;
  314 │ }
  315 │ 
  316 │ .section-tabs {
  317 │   --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266;
  318 │   --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff;
  319 │   --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8;
  320 │   --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff;
  321 │ }
  322 │ 
  323 │ .section-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) {
  324 │   padding: 15px 0;
  325 │ }
  326 │ 
  327 │ .condition-list,
  328 │ .action-list {
  329 │   display: flex;
  330 │   flex-direction: column;
  331 │   gap: 10px;
  332 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ .condition-item,
  336 │ .action-item {
  337 │   display: flex;
  338 │   align-items: center;
  339 │   gap: 10px;
  340 │   background: #fff;
  341 │   border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  342 │   border-radius: 8px;
  343 │   padding: 12px;
  344 │ }
  345 │ 
  346 │ .condition-index,
  347 │ .action-index {
  348 │   width: 30px;
  349 │   height: 30px;
  350 │   display: flex;
  351 │   align-items: center;
  352 │   justify-content: center;
  353 │   background: #f0f2f5;
  354 │   border-radius: 4px;
  355 │   color: #409eff;
  356 │   font-weight: 600;
  357 │ }
  358 │ 
  359 │ .condition-fields,
  360 │ .action-fields {
  361 │   flex: 1;
  362 │   display: flex;
  363 │   gap: 15px;
  364 │   align-items: center;
  365 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  366 │ }
  367 │ 
  368 │ .condition-select,
  369 │ .action-select {
  370 │   width: 180px;
  371 │   background: #fff;
  372 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  373 │ }
  374 │ 
  375 │ .condition-controls,
  376 │ .action-controls {
  377 │   display: flex;
  378 │ }
  379 │ 
  380 │ .condition-controls .el-button,
  381 │ .action-controls .el-button {
  382 │   padding: 4px 12px;
  383 │   font-size: 18px;
  384 │   color: #909399;
  385 │ }
  386 │ 
  387 │ .add-condition,
  388 │ .add-action {
  389 │   padding: 10px;
  390 │   border: 1px dashed #dcdfe6;
  391 │   border-radius: 8px;
  392 │   text-align: center;
  393 │ }
  394 │ </style>

📄 views/scene/QuickOperation.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="right-content">
    5 │         <div class="page-header">
    6 │           <div class="header-left">
    7 │             <el-tabs v-model="activeTab" class="header-tabs">
    8 │               <el-tab-pane label="场景控制" name="control">场景控制</el-tab-pane>
    9 │               <el-tab-pane label="场景下发记录" name="records">场景下发记录</el-tab-pane>
   10 │             </el-tabs>
   11 │           </div>
   12 │           <div class="header-right">
   13 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
   14 │           </div>
   15 │         </div>
   16 │ 
   17 │         <div v-if="activeTab === 'control'" class="control-panel">
   18 │           <div class="filter-bar">
   19 │             <el-input v-model="filterKeyword" placeholder="请输入场景名称查询" class="filter-input" />
   20 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   21 │             <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   22 │           </div>
   23 │ 
   24 │           <div class="scene-cards">
   25 │             <el-card
   26 │               v-for="scene in filteredScenes"
   27 │               :key="scene.id"
   28 │               class="scene-card"
   29 │             >
   30 │               <div class="card-header">
   31 │                 <label class="checkbox-label">
   32 │                   <el-checkbox v-model="scene.selected" />
   33 │                   <span>{{ scene.name }}</span>
   34 │                 </label>
   35 │                 <div class="card-controls">
   36 │                   <el-switch v-model="scene.visible" active-text="显示" inactive-text="隐藏" />
   37 │                 </div>
   38 │               </div>
   39 │               <div class="card-body">
   40 │                 <el-button type="primary" @click="handleExecute(scene)">执行</el-button>
   41 │                 <el-button type="info" @click="handleResult(scene)">执行结果</el-button>
   42 │                 <el-button type="text" @click="handleMore(scene)">...</el-button>
   43 │               </div>
   44 │             </el-card>
   45 │           </div>
   46 │         </div>
   47 │ 
   48 │         <div v-else class="records-panel">
   49 │           <el-table :data="recordsData" border class="data-table">
   50 │             <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
   51 │             <el-table-column prop="sceneName" label="场景名称" min-width="150"></el-table-column>
   52 │             <el-table-column prop="executeTime" label="下发时间" min-width="160"></el-table-column>
   53 │             <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="90" align="center">
   54 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   55 │                 <el-tag :type="row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   56 │                   {{ row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
   57 │                 </el-tag>
   58 │               </template>
   59 │             </el-table-column>
   60 │             <el-table-column prop="detail" label="详情" min-width="200"></el-table-column>
   61 │           </el-table>
   62 │         </div>
   63 │       </div>
   64 │     </div>
   65 │ 
   66 │     <el-dialog title="新增场景" v-model="showAddDialog" width="500px">
   67 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   68 │         <el-form-item label="场景名称">
   69 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入场景名称" />
   70 │         </el-form-item>
   71 │         <el-form-item label="显示状态">
   72 │           <el-select v-model="formData.visible" class="form-select">
   73 │             <el-option label="显示" :value="true" />
   74 │             <el-option label="隐藏" :value="false" />
   75 │           </el-select>
   76 │         </el-form-item>
   77 │         <el-form-item label="排序序号">
   78 │           <el-input type="number" v-model="formData.sortOrder" placeholder="请输入排序序号" />
   79 │         </el-form-item>
   80 │       </el-form>
   81 │       <template #footer>
   82 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
   83 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleConfirmAdd">确定</el-button>
   84 │       </template>
   85 │     </el-dialog>
   86 │ 
   87 │     <el-dialog title="执行结果" v-model="showResultDialog" width="500px">
   88 │       <el-descriptions :column="2" :data="resultData" border>
   89 │         <el-descriptions-item label="场景名称">{{ resultData.name }}</el-descriptions-item>
   90 │         <el-descriptions-item label="执行时间">{{ resultData.executeTime }}</el-descriptions-item>
   91 │         <el-descriptions-item label="状态">
   92 │           <el-tag :type="resultData.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   93 │             {{ resultData.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
   94 │           </el-tag>
   95 │         </el-descriptions-item>
   96 │         <el-descriptions-item label="详情">{{ resultData.detail }}</el-descriptions-item>
   97 │       </el-descriptions>
   98 │     </el-dialog>
   99 │   </div>
  100 │ </template>
  101 │ 
  102 │ <script setup>
  103 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
  104 │ 
  105 │ const activeTab = ref('control');
  106 │ const filterKeyword = ref('');
  107 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false);
  108 │ const showResultDialog = ref(false);
  109 │ 
  110 │ const formData = ref({
  111 │   name: '',
  112 │   visible: true,
  113 │   sortOrder: 1
  114 │ });
  115 │ 
  116 │ const resultData = ref({});
  117 │ 
  118 │ const scenesData = ref([
  119 │   { id: 1, name: '(0)应急开灯', visible: true, selected: false },
  120 │   { id: 2, name: '(0)某路段人工复查', visible: true, selected: false },
  121 │   { id: 3, name: '(1)线性灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  122 │   { id: 4, name: '(1)线性灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  123 │   { id: 5, name: '(1)线性灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  124 │   { id: 6, name: '(1)线性灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  125 │   { id: 7, name: '(1)隧道灯具全关', visible: true, selected: false },
  126 │   { id: 8, name: '(2)高速灯-100', visible: true, selected: false },
  127 │   { id: 9, name: '(2)高速灯-50', visible: true, selected: false },
  128 │   { id: 10, name: '(2)高速灯-10', visible: true, selected: false },
  129 │   { id: 11, name: '(2)高速灯关', visible: true, selected: false },
  130 │   { id: 12, name: '(3)低位红光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  131 │   { id: 13, name: '(3)低位雾光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  132 │   { id: 14, name: '(3)低位雾光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  133 │   { id: 15, name: '(3)低位白光关闭', visible: true, selected: false },
  134 │   { id: 16, name: '(3)低位白光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  135 │   { id: 17, name: '(3)低位红光开', visible: true, selected: false },
  136 │   { id: 18, name: '(5)灯具展示100...', visible: true, selected: false },
  137 │   { id: 19, name: '(99)展厅一键全开', visible: true, selected: false },
  138 │   { id: 20, name: '(99)展厅全关', visible: true, selected: false }
  139 │ ]);
  140 │ 
  141 │ const recordsData = ref([
  142 │   { no: 1, sceneName: '应急开灯', executeTime: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' },
  143 │   { no: 2, sceneName: '隧道灯具全关', executeTime: '2024-04-22 09:15:30', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制89盏灯具' },
  144 │   { no: 3, sceneName: '线性灯-50', executeTime: '2024-04-22 08:00:00', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制234盏灯具' },
  145 │   { no: 4, sceneName: '高速灯-100', executeTime: '2024-04-21 22:30:00', status: 'danger', detail: '执行失败，部分设备离线' }
  146 │ ]);
  147 │ 
  148 │ const filteredScenes = computed(() => {
  149 │   if (!filterKeyword.value) return scenesData.value;
  150 │   const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
  151 │   return scenesData.value.filter(item => item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
  152 │ });
  153 │ 
  154 │ const handleSearch = () => {};
  155 │ 
  156 │ const handleReset = () => {
  157 │   filterKeyword.value = '';
  158 │ };
  159 │ 
  160 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  161 │   showAddDialog.value = true;
  162 │   formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: scenesData.value.length + 1 };
  163 │ };
  164 │ 
  165 │ const handleConfirmAdd = () => {
  166 │   if (!formData.value.name) {
  167 │     alert('请输入场景名称');
  168 │     return;
  169 │   }
  170 │   scenesData.value.push({
  171 │     id: scenesData.value.length + 1,
  172 │     name: formData.value.name,
  173 │     visible: formData.value.visible,
  174 │     selected: false
  175 │   });
  176 │   showAddDialog.value = false;
  177 │ };
  178 │ 
  179 │ const handleExecute = (scene) => {
  180 │   alert(`正在执行场景：${scene.name}`);
  181 │ };
  182 │ 
  183 │ const handleResult = (scene) => {
  184 │   showResultDialog.value = true;
  185 │   resultData.value = {
  186 │     name: scene.name,
  187 │     executeTime: new Date().toLocaleString(),
  188 │     status: 'success',
  189 │     detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具'
  190 │   };
  191 │ };
  192 │ 
  193 │ const handleMore = (scene) => {
  194 │   alert(`更多操作：${scene.name}`);
  195 │ };
  196 │ </script>
  197 │ 
  198 │ <style scoped>
  199 │ .page-container {
  200 │   display: flex;
  201 │   height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  202 │ }
  203 │ 
  204 │ .main-content {
  205 │   flex: 1;
  206 │   display: flex;
  207 │   overflow: hidden;
  208 │ }
  209 │ 
  210 │ .right-content {
  211 │   flex: 1;
  212 │   display: flex;
  213 │   flex-direction: column;
  214 │   min-width: 0;
  215 │   padding: 15px;
  216 │   overflow: hidden;
  217 │ }
  218 │ 
  219 │ .page-header {
  220 │   display: flex;
  221 │   justify-content: space-between;
  222 │   align-items: center;
  223 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  224 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  225 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  226 │ }
  227 │ 
  228 │ .header-tabs {
  229 │   --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266;
  230 │   --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff;
  231 │   --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8;
  232 │   --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff;
  233 │ }
  234 │ 
  235 │ .filter-bar {
  236 │   display: flex;
  237 │   gap: 15px;
  238 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  239 │   align-items: center;
  240 │ }
  241 │ 
  242 │ .filter-input {
  243 │   width: 250px;
  244 │ }
  245 │ 
  246 │ .scene-cards {
  247 │   display: grid;
  248 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
  249 │   gap: 15px;
  250 │   overflow-y: auto;
  251 │   flex: 1;

  255 │ .scene-card {
  256 │   background: #fff;

  264 │   align-items: center;
  265 │   padding-bottom: 10px;
  266 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  267 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  268 │ }
  269 │ 
  270 │ .checkbox-label {
  271 │   display: flex;
  272 │   align-items: center;
  273 │   gap: 8px;
  274 │   color: #303133;
  275 │   font-size: 14px;
  276 │ }

  278 │ .card-body {
  279 │   display: flex;
  280 │   gap: 8px;
  281 │ }
  282 │

  287 │ }
