📄 views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="right-content">
    5 │         <div class="page-header">
    6 │           <div class="header-left">
    7 │             <el-tabs v-model="viewMode" class="header-tabs">
    8 │               <el-tab-pane label="卡片模式" name="card">卡片模式</el-tab-pane>
    9 │               <el-tab-pane label="列表模式" name="list">列表模式</el-tab-pane>
   10 │             </el-tabs>
   11 │           </div>
   12 │           <div class="header-right">
   13 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
   14 │             <el-button type="danger" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0" @click="handleBatchDelete">批量删除</el-button>
   15 │           </div>
   16 │         </div>
   17 │ 
   18 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   19 │           <el-input v-model="filterKeyword" placeholder="请输入规则名称查询" class="filter-input" />
   20 │           <el-select v-model="filterStatus" placeholder="请选择启用状态" class="filter-select">
   21 │             <el-option label="全部" value="" />
   22 │             <el-option label="启用" value="true" />
   23 │             <el-option label="禁用" value="false" />
   24 │           </el-select>
   25 │           <el-select v-model="filterPriority" placeholder="请选择优先级" class="filter-select">
   26 │             <el-option label="全部" value="" />
   27 │             <el-option label="高" value="high" />
   28 │             <el-option label="低" value="low" />
   29 │           </el-select>
   30 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">搜索</el-button>
   31 │           <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   32 │         </div>
   33 │ 
   34 │         <div v-if="viewMode === 'card'" class="rule-cards">
   35 │           <el-card
   36 │             v-for="rule in filteredRules"
   37 │             :key="rule.id"
   38 │             class="rule-card"
   39 │           >
   40 │             <div class="card-header">
   41 │               <div class="priority-tag" :class="rule.priority">
   42 │                 {{ rule.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }}
   43 │               </div>
   44 │               <label class="checkbox-label">
   45 │                 <el-checkbox v-model="rule.selected" />
   46 │                 <span>{{ rule.name }}</span>
   47 │               </label>
   48 │               <div class="card-controls">
   49 │                 <el-switch v-model="rule.enabled" active-text="启用" inactive-text="禁用" @change="handleToggle(rule)" />
   50 │               </div>
   51 │             </div>
   52 │             <div class="card-body">
   53 │               <div class="execute-info">
   54 │                 <span>执行日期:</span>
   55 │                 <span>{{ rule.executeDate }}</span>
   56 │               </div>
   57 │               <el-button type="text" @click="handleMore(rule)">...</el-button>
   58 │             </div>
   59 │           </el-card>
   60 │         </div>
   61 │ 
   62 │         <div v-else class="list-panel">
   63 │           <el-table :data="filteredRules" border class="data-table" @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   64 │             <el-table-column type="selection" width="50"></el-table-column>
   65 │             <el-table-column prop="no" label="No" width="50" align="center"></el-table-column>
   66 │             <el-table-column prop="name" label="规则名称" min-width="150"></el-table-column>
   67 │             <el-table-column prop="priority" label="优先级" width="80" align="center">
   68 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   69 │                 <el-tag :type="row.priority === 'high' ? 'danger' : 'info'" size="small">
   70 │                   {{ row.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }}
   71 │                 </el-tag>
   72 │               </template>
   73 │             </el-table-column>
   74 │             <el-table-column prop="enabled" label="状态" width="90" align="center">
   75 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   76 │                 <el-switch v-model="row.enabled" active-text="启用" inactive-text="禁用" />
   77 │               </template>
   78 │             </el-table-column>
   79 │             <el-table-column prop="executeDate" label="执行日期" min-width="180"></el-table-column>
   80 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="100" align="center">
   81 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   82 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">编辑</el-button>
   83 │                 <el-button type="danger" size="small" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   84 │               </template>
   85 │             </el-table-column>
   86 │           </el-table>
   87 │         </div>
   88 │ 
   89 │         <div class="pagination-bar">
   90 │           <el-pagination
   91 │             v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   92 │             v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   93 │             :total="total"
   94 │             layout="prev, pager, next, jumper, ->, total"
   95 │           />
   96 │         </div>
   97 │       </div>
   98 │     </div>
   99 │ 
  100 │     <el-dialog title="新增规则" v-model="showAddDialog" width="500px">
  101 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
  102 │         <el-form-item label="规则名称">
  103 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入规则名称" />
  104 │         </el-form-item>
  105 │         <el-form-item label="优先级">
  106 │           <el-select v-model="formData.priority" class="form-select">
  107 │             <el-option label="高" value="high" />
  108 │             <el-option label="低" value="low" />
  109 │           </el-select>
  110 │         </el-form-item>
  111 │         <el-form-item label="执行日期">
  112 │           <el-select v-model="formData.executeType" class="form-select">
  113 │             <el-option label="一直执行" value="always" />
  114 │             <el-option label="定时执行" value="scheduled" />
  115 │           </el-select>
  116 │         </el-form-item>
  117 │         <el-form-item v-if="formData.executeType === 'scheduled'" label="执行时间">
  118 │           <el-date-picker v-model="formData.executeTime" type="datetime" placeholder="选择执行时间" />
  119 │         </el-form-item>
  120 │       </el-form>
  121 │       <template #footer>
  122 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  123 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleConfirmAdd">确定</el-button>
  124 │       </template>
  125 │     </el-dialog>
  126 │   </div>
  127 │ </template>
  128 │ 
  129 │ <script setup>
  130 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue';
  131 │ 
  132 │ const viewMode = ref('card');
  133 │ const filterKeyword = ref('');
  134 │ const filterStatus = ref('');
  135 │ const filterPriority = ref('');
  136 │ const currentPage = ref(1);
  137 │ const pageSize = ref(10);
  138 │ const selectedRows = ref([]);
  139 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false);
  140 │ 
  141 │ const formData = ref({
  142 │   name: '',
  143 │   priority: 'high',
  144 │   executeType: 'always',
  145 │   executeTime: ''
  146 │ });
  147 │ 
  148 │ const rulesData = ref([
  149 │   { id: 1, no: 1, name: '检测有人开', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '2025.09.01-2028.10.31', selected: false },
  150 │   { id: 2, no: 2, name: '漏电自动断电', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  151 │   { id: 3, no: 3, name: '光照度亮灯', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  152 │   { id: 4, no: 4, name: '关回路', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false },
  153 │   { id: 5, no: 5, name: '检测无人关', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }
  154 │ ]);
  155 │ 
  156 │ const total = computed(() => rulesData.value.length);
  157 │ 
  158 │ const filteredRules = computed(() => {
  159 │   let data = [...rulesData.value];
  160 │   if (filterKeyword.value) {
  161 │     const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase();
  162 │     data = data.filter(item => item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword));
  163 │   }
  164 │   if (filterStatus.value !== '') {
  165 │     const status = filterStatus.value === 'true';
  166 │     data = data.filter(item => item.enabled === status);
  167 │   }
  168 │   if (filterPriority.value) {
  169 │     data = data.filter(item => item.priority === filterPriority.value);
  170 │   }
  171 │   return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value);
  172 │ });
  173 │ 
  174 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  175 │   currentPage.value = 1;
  176 │ };
  177 │ 
  178 │ const handleReset = () => {
  179 │   filterKeyword.value = '';
  180 │   filterStatus.value = '';
  181 │   filterPriority.value = '';
  182 │   currentPage.value = 1;
  183 │ };
  184 │ 
  185 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  186 │   selectedRows.value = val;
  187 │ };
  188 │ 
  189 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  190 │   showAddDialog.value = true;
  191 │   formData.value = {
  192 │     name: '',
  193 │     priority: 'high',
  194 │     executeType: 'always',
  195 │     executeTime: ''
  196 │   };
  197 │ };
  198 │ 
  199 │ const handleConfirmAdd = () => {
  200 │   if (!formData.value.name) {
  201 │     alert('请输入规则名称');
  202 │     return;
  203 │   }
  204 │   rulesData.value.push({
  205 │     id: rulesData.value.length + 1,
  206 │     no: rulesData.value.length + 1,
  207 │     name: formData.value.name,
  208 │     priority: formData.value.priority,
  209 │     enabled: true,
  210 │     executeDate: formData.value.executeType === 'always' ? '一直执行' : formData.value.executeTime,
  211 │     selected: false
  212 │   });
  213 │   showAddDialog.value = false;
  214 │ };
  215 │ 
  216 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  217 │   alert(`编辑规则：${row.name}`);
  218 │ };
  219 │ 
  220 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {
  221 │   const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item => item.id === row.id);
  222 │   if (index !== -1) {
  223 │     rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
  224 │   }
  225 │ };
  226 │ 
  227 │ const handleBatchDelete = () => {
  228 │   selectedRows.value.forEach(row => {
  229 │     const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item => item.id === row.id);
  230 │     if (index !== -1) {
  231 │       rulesData.value.splice(index, 1);
  232 │     }
  233 │   });
  234 │   selectedRows.value = [];
  235 │ };
  236 │ 
  237 │ const handleToggle = (rule) => {
  238 │   alert(`${rule.name}已${rule.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`);
  239 │ };
  240 │ 
  241 │ const handleMore = (rule) => {
  242 │   alert(`更多操作：${rule.name}`);
  243 │ };
  244 │ </script>
  245 │ 
  246 │ <style scoped>
  247 │ .page-container {
  248 │   display: flex;
  249 │   height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  250 │ }
  251 │ 
  252 │ .main-content {
  253 │   flex: 1;
  254 │   display: flex;
  255 │   overflow: hidden;
  256 │ }
  257 │ 
  258 │ .right-content {
  259 │   flex: 1;
  260 │   display: flex;
  261 │   flex-direction: column;
  262 │   min-width: 0;
  263 │   padding: 15px;
  264 │   overflow: hidden;
  265 │ }
  266 │ 
  267 │ .page-header {
  268 │   display: flex;
  269 │   justify-content: space-between;
  270 │   align-items: center;
  271 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  272 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  273 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  274 │ }
  275 │ 
  276 │ .header-tabs {
  277 │   --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266;
  278 │   --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff;
  279 │   --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8;
  280 │   --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff;
  281 │ }
  282 │ 
  283 │ .filter-bar {
  284 │   display: flex;
  285 │   gap: 15px;
  286 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  287 │   align-items: center;
  288 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  289 │ }
  290 │ 
  291 │ .filter-input {
  292 │   width: 200px;
  293 │ }
  294 │ 
  295 │ .filter-select {
  296 │   width: 160px;
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ .rule-cards {
  300 │   display: grid;
  301 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
  302 │   gap: 15px;
  303 │   overflow-y: auto;
  304 │   flex: 1;
  305 │   padding-right: 10px;
  306 │ }
  307 │ 
  308 │ .rule-card {
  309 │   background: #fff;
  310 │   border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  311 │   border-radius: 8px;
  312 │ }
  313 │ 
  314 │ .card-header {
  315 │   display: flex;
  316 │   align-items: center;
  317 │   gap: 10px;
  318 │   padding-bottom: 10px;
  319 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  320 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  321 │ }
  322 │ 
  323 │ .priority-tag {
  324 │   width: 30px;
  325 │   height: 20px;
  326 │   display: flex;
  327 │   align-items: center;
  328 │   justify-content: center;
  329 │   border-radius: 4px;
  330 │   font-size: 12px;
  331 │   font-weight: 600;
  332 │   color: #fff;
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ .priority-tag.high {
  336 │   background: #f56c6c;
  337 │ }
  338 │ 
  339 │ .priority-tag.low {
  340 │   background: #67c23a;
  341 │ }
  342 │ 
  343 │ .checkbox-label {
  344 │   flex: 1;
  345 │   display: flex;
  346 │   align-items: center;
  347 │   gap: 8px;
  348 │   color: #303133;
  349 │   font-size: 14px;
  350 │ }
  351 │ 
  352 │ .card-body {
  353 │   display: flex;
  354 │   justify-content: space-between;
  355 │   align-items: center;
  356 │ }
  357 │ 
  358 │ .execute-info {
  359 │   display: flex;
  360 │   gap: 8px;
  361 │   color: #606266;
  362 │   font-size: 12px;
  363 │ }
  364 │ 
  365 │ .list-panel {
  366 │   flex: 1;
  367 │   overflow: auto;
  368 │ }
  369 │ 
  370 │ .data-table {
  371 │   width: 100%;
  372 │ }
  373 │ 
  374 │ .pagination-bar {
  375 │   display: flex;
  376 │   justify-content: center;
  377 │   padding: 15px 0;
  378 │ }
  379 │ 
  380 │ .form-select {
  381 │   width: 100%;
  382 │ }
  383 │ </style>

📄 views/scene/SceneManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="main-content">
    4 │       <div class="right-content">
    5 │         <div class="page-header">
    6 │           <div class="header-right">
    7 │             <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">保存</el-button>
    8 │             <el-button @click="handleCancel">取消</el-button>
    9 │           </div>
   10 │         </div>
   11 │ 
   12 │         <div class="form-section">
   13 │           <div class="form-row">
   14 │             <div class="form-item">
   15 │               <label class="required">场景名称</label>
   16 │               <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入场景名称" class="form-input" />
   17 │             </div>
   18 │             <div class="form-item">
   19 │               <label class="required">显示状态</label>
   20 │               <el-select v-model="formData.visible" class="form-select">
   21 │                 <el-option label="显示" :value="true" />
   22 │                 <el-option label="隐藏" :value="false" />
   23 │               </el-select>
   24 │             </div>
   25 │             <div class="form-item">
   26 │               <label class="required">排序序号</label>
   27 │               <el-input type="number" v-model="formData.sortOrder" placeholder="请输入排序序号" class="form-input" />
   28 │             </div>
   29 │           </div>
   30 │         </div>
   31 │ 
   32 │         <div class="action-section">
   33 │           <div class="section-header">
   34 │             <span>动作配置</span>
   35 │             <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="addAction">
   36 │               <el-icon><Plus /></el-icon>
   37 │             </el-button>
   38 │           </div>
   39 │ 
   40 │           <div class="action-list">
   41 │             <div v-for="(action, index) in formData.actions" :key="index" class="action-item">
   42 │               <div class="action-index">{{ index + 1 }}</div>
   43 │               <div class="action-fields">
   44 │                 <el-select v-model="action.productType" placeholder="请选择产品类型" class="action-select">
   45 │                   <el-option label="灯控制器" value="灯控制器" />
   46 │                   <el-option label="集控" value="集控" />
   47 │                   <el-option label="传感器" value="传感器" />
   48 │                   <el-option label="摄像头" value="摄像头" />
   49 │                   <el-option label="智能主控" value="智能主控" />
   50 │                   <el-option label="智能主控-站点" value="智能主控-站点" />
   51 │                 </el-select>
   52 │                 <el-select v-model="action.device" placeholder="请选择设备" class="action-select">
   53 │                   <el-option label="展厅隧道灯" value="展厅隧道灯" />
   54 │                   <el-option label="光亚展灯杆" value="光亚展灯杆" />
   55 │                 </el-select>
   56 │                 <div class="delay-group">
   57 │                   <el-input type="number" v-model="action.delay" placeholder="请输入延时时长" class="delay-input" />
   58 │                   <el-select v-model="action.delayUnit" class="delay-unit">
   59 │                     <el-option label="秒" value="秒" />
   60 │                     <el-option label="分" value="分" />
   61 │                     <el-option label="时" value="时" />
   62 │                   </el-select>
   63 │                 </div>
   64 │                 <el-select v-model="action.action" placeholder="请选择动作内容" class="action-select">
   65 │                   <el-option label="开灯" value="开灯" />
   66 │                   <el-option label="关灯" value="关灯" />
   67 │                   <el-option label="调光50%" value="调光50%" />
   68 │                   <el-option label="调光100%" value="调光100%" />
   69 │                 </el-select>
   70 │               </div>
   71 │               <div class="action-controls">
   72 │                 <el-button v-if="index > 0" type="text" @click="moveUp(index)">↑</el-button>
   73 │                 <el-button v-if="index < formData.actions.length - 1" type="text" @click="moveDown(index)">↓</el-button>
   74 │                 <el-button type="text" @click="removeAction(index)">×</el-button>
   75 │               </div>
   76 │             </div>
   77 │           </div>
   78 │         </div>
   79 │       </div>
   80 │     </div>
   81 │   </div>
   82 │ </template>
   83 │ 
   84 │ <script setup>
   85 │ import { ref } from 'vue';
   86 │ import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue';
   87 │ 
   88 │ const formData = ref({
   89 │   name: '',
   90 │   visible: true,
   91 │   sortOrder: 1,
   92 │   actions: [
   93 │     {
   94 │       productType: '',
   95 │       device: '',
   96 │       delay: '',
   97 │       delayUnit: '秒',
   98 │       action: ''
   99 │     }
  100 │   ]
  101 │ });
  102 │ 
  103 │ const addAction = () => {
  104 │   formData.value.actions.push({
  105 │     productType: '',
  106 │     device: '',
  107 │     delay: '',
  108 │     delayUnit: '秒',
  109 │     action: ''
  110 │   });
  111 │ };
  112 │ 
  113 │ const removeAction = (index) => {
  114 │   if (formData.value.actions.length > 1) {
  115 │     formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1);
  116 │   }
  117 │ };
  118 │ 
  119 │ const moveUp = (index) => {
  120 │   if (index > 0) {
  121 │     const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
  122 │     formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index - 1];
  123 │     formData.value.actions[index - 1] = temp;
  124 │   }
  125 │ };
  126 │ 
  127 │ const moveDown = (index) => {
  128 │   if (index < formData.value.actions.length - 1) {
  129 │     const temp = formData.value.actions[index];
  130 │     formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index + 1];
  131 │     formData.value.actions[index + 1] = temp;
  132 │   }
  133 │ };
  134 │ 
  135 │ const handleSave = () => {
  136 │   if (!formData.value.name) {
  137 │     alert('请输入场景名称');
  138 │     return;
  139 │   }
  140 │   alert('场景保存成功');
  141 │ };
  142 │ 
  143 │ const handleCancel = () => {
  144 │   formData.value = {
  145 │     name: '',
  146 │     visible: true,
  147 │     sortOrder: 1,
  148 │     actions: [
  149 │       {
  150 │         productType: '',
  151 │         device: '',
  152 │         delay: '',
  153 │         delayUnit: '秒',
  154 │         action: ''
  155 │       }
  156 │     ]
  157 │   };
  158 │ };
  159 │ </script>
  160 │ 
  161 │ <style scoped>
  162 │ .page-container {
  163 │   display: flex;
  164 │   height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  165 │ }
  166 │ 
  167 │ .main-content {
  168 │   flex: 1;
  169 │   display: flex;
  170 │   overflow: hidden;
  171 │ }
  172 │ 
  173 │ .right-content {
  174 │   flex: 1;
  175 │   display: flex;
  176 │   flex-direction: column;
  177 │   min-width: 0;
  178 │   padding: 15px;
  179 │   overflow: hidden;
  180 │ }
  181 │ 
  182 │ .page-header {
  183 │   display: flex;
  184 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  185 │   align-items: center;
  186 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  187 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  188 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  189 │ }
  190 │ 
  191 │ .form-section {
  192 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  193 │ }
  194 │ 
  195 │ .form-row {
  196 │   display: flex;
  197 │   gap: 20px;
  198 │ }
  199 │ 
  200 │ .form-item {
  201 │   display: flex;
  202 │   flex-direction: column;
  203 │   gap: 8px;
  204 │   width: 250px;
  205 │ }
  206 │ 
  207 │ .form-item label {
  208 │   color: #303133;
  209 │   font-size: 14px;
  210 │ }
  211 │ 
  212 │ .required::after {
  213 │   content: '*';
  214 │   color: #f56c6c;
  215 │   margin-left: 4px;
  216 │ }
  217 │ 
  218 │ .form-input {
  219 │   width: 100%;
  220 │   background: #fff;
  221 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  222 │ }
  223 │ 
  224 │ .form-select {
  225 │   width: 100%;
  226 │   background: #fff;
  227 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  228 │ }
  229 │ 
  230 │ .action-section {
  231 │   flex: 1;
  232 │   overflow-y: auto;
  233 │ }
  234 │ 
  235 │ .section-header {
  236 │   display: flex;
  237 │   justify-content: space-between;
  238 │   align-items: center;
  239 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  240 │   color: #303133;
  241 │   font-size: 14px;
  242 │   font-weight: 600;
  243 │ }
  244 │ 
  245 │ .action-list {
  246 │   display: flex;
  247 │   flex-direction: column;
  248 │   gap: 10px;
  249 │ }
  250 │ 
  251 │ .action-item {
  252 │   display: flex;
  253 │   align-items: center;
  254 │   gap: 10px;
  255 │   background: #fff;
  256 │   border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  257 │   border-radius: 8px;
  258 │   padding: 12px;
  259 │ }
  260 │ 
  261 │ .action-index {
  262 │   width: 30px;
  263 │   height: 30px;
  264 │   display: flex;
  265 │   align-items: center;
  266 │   justify-content: center;
  267 │   background: #f0f2f5;
  268 │   border-radius: 4px;
  269 │   color: #409eff;
  270 │   font-weight: 600;
  271 │ }
  272 │ 
  273 │ .action-fields {
  274 │   flex: 1;
  275 │   display: flex;
  276 │   gap: 15px;
  277 │   align-items: center;
  278 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  279 │ }
  280 │ 
  281 │ .action-select {
  282 │   width: 180px;
  283 │   background: #fff;
  284 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  285 │ }
  286 │ 
  287 │ .delay-group {
  288 │   display: flex;
  289 │   align-items: center;
  290 │   gap: 8px;
  291 │ }
  292 │ 
  293 │ .delay-input {
  294 │   width: 120px;
  295 │   background: #fff;
  296 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ .delay-unit {
  300 │   width: 60px;
  301 │   background: #fff;
  302 │   border: 1px solid #dcdfe6;
  303 │ }
  304 │ 
  305 │ .action-controls {
  306 │   display: flex;
  307 │   flex-direction: column;
  308 │   gap: 4px;
  309 │ }
  310 │ 
  311 │ .action-controls .el-button {
  312 │   padding: 4px 8px;
  313 │   font-size: 12px;
  314 │   color: #909399;
  315 │ }
  316 │ </style>

📄 views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">定时场景管理</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="addSchedule">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Plus" />
    8 │           新增定时
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <el-table :data="schedules" border class="schedule-table">
   13 │       <el-table-column prop="id" label="定时编号" width="100" />
   14 │       <el-table-column prop="name" label="定时名称" />
   15 │       <el-table-column prop="templateName" label="关联场景" width="150" />
   16 │       <el-table-column prop="scheduleType" label="执行类型" width="120">
   17 │         <template #default="scope">
   18 │           <el-tag :type="getTypeTagType(scope.row.scheduleType)">
   19 │             {{ getTypeText(scope.row.scheduleType) }}
   20 │           </el-tag>
   21 │         </template>
   22 │       </el-table-column>
   23 │       <el-table-column prop="time" label="执行时间" width="120" />
   24 │       <el-table-column prop="enabled" label="状态" width="100">
   25 │         <template #default="scope">
   26 │           <el-switch 
   27 │             :value="scope.row.enabled" 
   28 │             @change="toggleEnable(scope.row)"
   29 │             active-color="#13ce66"
   30 │             inactive-color="#ff4949"
   31 │           />
   32 │         </template>
   33 │       </el-table-column>
   34 │       <el-table-column label="操作" width="180">
   35 │         <template #default="scope">
   36 │           <el-button size="small" @click="editSchedule(scope.row)">编辑</el-button>
   37 │           <el-button size="small" type="danger" @click="deleteSchedule(scope.row)">删除</el-button>
   38 │         </template>
   39 │       </el-table-column>
   40 │     </el-table>
   41 │     <el-dialog :title="editDialogTitle" :visible.sync="dialogVisible" width="500px">
   42 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   43 │         <el-form-item label="定时名称" prop="name">
   44 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入定时名称" />
   45 │         </el-form-item>
   46 │         <el-form-item label="关联场景" prop="templateId">
   47 │           <el-select v-model="formData.templateId" placeholder="请选择场景">
   48 │             <el-option 
   49 │               v-for="template in enabledTemplates" 
   50 │               :key="template.id" 
   51 │               :label="template.name" 
   52 │               :value="template.id" 
   53 │             />
   54 │           </el-select>
   55 │         </el-form-item>
   56 │         <el-form-item label="执行类型" prop="scheduleType">
   57 │           <el-select v-model="formData.scheduleType">
   58 │             <el-option label="每天" value="daily" />
   59 │             <el-option label="周末" value="weekend" />
   60 │             <el-option label="节假日" value="holiday" />
   61 │           </el-select>
   62 │         </el-form-item>
   63 │         <el-form-item label="执行时间" prop="time">
   64 │           <el-time-picker 
   65 │             v-model="formData.time" 
   66 │             format="HH:mm" 
   67 │             placeholder="选择执行时间"
   68 │           />
   69 │         </el-form-item>
   70 │       </el-form>
   71 │       <template #footer>
   72 │         <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
   73 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="saveSchedule">保存</el-button>
   74 │       </template>
   75 │     </el-dialog>
   76 │   </div>
   77 │ </template>
   78 │ 
   79 │ <script setup>
   80 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   81 │ import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   82 │ import { scheduledScenes, sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'
   83 │ 
   84 │ const icons = { Plus }
   85 │ const schedules = ref([...scheduledScenes])
   86 │ const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
   87 │ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
   88 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
   89 │ const formData = ref({
   90 │   id: '',
   91 │   name: '',
   92 │   templateId: '',
   93 │   scheduleType: 'daily',
   94 │   time: '',
   95 │   enabled: true
   96 │ })
   97 │ 
   98 │ const editDialogTitle = computed(() => isEdit.value ? '编辑定时场景' : '新增定时场景')
   99 │ 
  100 │ const enabledTemplates = computed(() => {
  101 │   return templates.value.filter(t => t.enabled)
  102 │ })
  103 │ 
  104 │ const schedulesWithTemplateName = computed(() => {
  105 │   return schedules.value.map(s => {
  106 │     const template = templates.value.find(t => t.id === s.templateId)
  107 │     return {
  108 │       ...s,
  109 │       templateName: template ? template.name : '未知场景'
  110 │     }
  111 │   })
  112 │ })
  113 │ 
  114 │ const getTypeTagType = (type) => {
  115 │   switch (type) {
  116 │     case 'daily': return 'success'
  117 │     case 'weekend': return 'warning'
  118 │     case 'holiday': return 'info'
  119 │     default: return 'info'
  120 │   }
  121 │ }
  122 │ 
  123 │ const getTypeText = (type) => {
  124 │   switch (type) {
  125 │     case 'daily': return '每天'
  126 │     case 'weekend': return '周末'
  127 │     case 'holiday': return '节假日'
  128 │     default: return type
  129 │   }
  130 │ }
  131 │ 
  132 │ const addSchedule = () => {
  133 │   isEdit.value = false
  134 │   formData.value = {
  135 │     id: '',
  136 │     name: '',
  137 │     templateId: '',
  138 │     scheduleType: 'daily',
  139 │     time: '',
  140 │     enabled: true
  141 │   }
  142 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  143 │ }
  144 │ 
  145 │ const editSchedule = (row) => {
  146 │   isEdit.value = true
  147 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  148 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  149 │ }
  150 │ 
  151 │ const deleteSchedule = (row) => {
  152 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  153 │     '确定要删除该定时任务吗？',
  154 │     '提示',
  155 │     {
  156 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  157 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  158 │       type: 'warning'
  159 │     }
  160 │   ).then(() => {
  161 │     const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s => s.id === row.id)
  162 │     if (index > -1) {
  163 │       schedules.value.splice(index, 1)
  164 │     }
  165 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  166 │   }).catch(() => {
  167 │     ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  168 │   })
  169 │ }
  170 │ 
  171 │ const toggleEnable = (row) => {
  172 │   row.enabled = !row.enabled
  173 │ }
  174 │ 
  175 │ const saveSchedule = () => {
  176 │   if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.templateId || !formData.value.time) {
  177 │     ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息')
  178 │     return
  179 │   }
  180 │   
  181 │   if (isEdit.value) {
  182 │     const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s => s.id === formData.value.id)
  183 │     if (index > -1) {
  184 │       schedules.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
  185 │     }
  186 │     ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  187 │   } else {
  188 │     const newId = 'SCH' + String(schedules.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
  189 │     schedules.value.push({
  190 │       ...formData.value,
  191 │       id: newId
  192 │     })
  193 │     ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  194 │   }
  195 │   dialogVisible.value = false
  196 │ }
  197 │ </script>
  198 │ 
  199 │ <style scoped>
  200 │ .schedule-table {
  201 │   width: 100%;
  202 │ }
  203 │ </style>
  204 │

📄 views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">场景模板配置</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="addTemplate">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Plus" />
    8 │           新增模板
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <div class="template-grid">
   13 │       <div 
   14 │         v-for="template in templates" 
   15 │         :key="template.id"
   16 │         :class="['template-card', { disabled: !template.enabled }]"
   17 │       >
   18 │         <div class="template-header">
   19 │           <span class="template-name">{{ template.name }}</span>
   20 │           <el-switch 
   21 │             :value="template.enabled" 
   22 │             @change="toggleEnable(template)"
   23 │             active-color="#13ce66"
   24 │             inactive-color="#ff4949"
   25 │           />
   26 │         </div>
   27 │         <p class="template-desc">{{ template.description }}</p>
   28 │         <div class="template-config">
   29 │           <div class="config-item">
   30 │             <span class="config-label">亮度</span>
   31 │             <el-progress :percentage="template.brightness" :show-text="true" width="100" />
   32 │           </div>
   33 │           <div v-if="template.duration" class="config-item">
   34 │             <span class="config-label">时段</span>
   35 │             <span class="config-value">{{ template.duration }}</span>
   36 │           </div>
   37 │         </div>
   38 │         <div class="template-actions">
   39 │           <el-button size="small" @click="editTemplate(template)">编辑</el-button>
   40 │           <el-button size="small" type="danger" @click="deleteTemplate(template)">删除</el-button>
   41 │         </div>
   42 │       </div>
   43 │     </div>
   44 │     <el-dialog :title="editDialogTitle" :visible.sync="dialogVisible" width="500px">
   45 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   46 │         <el-form-item label="场景名称" prop="name">
   47 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入场景名称" />
   48 │         </el-form-item>
   49 │         <el-form-item label="场景描述" prop="description">
   50 │           <el-textarea v-model="formData.description" rows="3" placeholder="请输入场景描述" />
   51 │         </el-form-item>
   52 │         <el-form-item label="亮度(%)" prop="brightness">
   53 │           <el-slider v-model="formData.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" :step="1" show-input />
   54 │         </el-form-item>
   55 │         <el-form-item label="定时时段">
   56 │           <el-input v-model="formData.duration" placeholder="如: 02:00-05:00，为空则全天生效" />
   57 │         </el-form-item>
   58 │       </el-form>
   59 │       <template #footer>
   60 │         <el-button @click="dialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
   61 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="saveTemplate">保存</el-button>
   62 │       </template>
   63 │     </el-dialog>
   64 │   </div>
   65 │ </template>
   66 │ 
   67 │ <script setup>
   68 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   69 │ import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   70 │ import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'
   71 │ 
   72 │ const icons = { Plus }
   73 │ const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
   74 │ const dialogVisible = ref(false)
   75 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
   76 │ const formData = ref({
   77 │   id: '',
   78 │   name: '',
   79 │   description: '',
   80 │   brightness: 80,
   81 │   duration: '',
   82 │   enabled: true
   83 │ })
   84 │ 
   85 │ const editDialogTitle = computed(() => isEdit.value ? '编辑场景模板' : '新增场景模板')
   86 │ 
   87 │ const addTemplate = () => {
   88 │   isEdit.value = false
   89 │   formData.value = {
   90 │     id: '',
   91 │     name: '',
   92 │     description: '',
   93 │     brightness: 80,
   94 │     duration: '',
   95 │     enabled: true
   96 │   }
   97 │   dialogVisible.value = true
   98 │ }
   99 │ 
  100 │ const editTemplate = (template) => {
  101 │   isEdit.value = true
  102 │   formData.value = { ...template }
  103 │   dialogVisible.value = true
  104 │ }
  105 │ 
  106 │ const deleteTemplate = (template) => {
  107 │   ElMessageBox.confirm(
  108 │     '确定要删除该场景模板吗？',
  109 │     '提示',
  110 │     {
  111 │       confirmButtonText: '确定',
  112 │       cancelButtonText: '取消',
  113 │       type: 'warning'
  114 │     }
  115 │   ).then(() => {
  116 │     const index = templates.value.findIndex(t => t.id === template.id)
  117 │     if (index > -1) {
  118 │       templates.value.splice(index, 1)
  119 │     }
  120 │     ElMessage.success('删除成功')
  121 │   }).catch(() => {
  122 │     ElMessage.info('已取消删除')
  123 │   })
  124 │ }
  125 │ 
  126 │ const toggleEnable = (template) => {
  127 │   template.enabled = !template.enabled
  128 │ }
  129 │ 
  130 │ const saveTemplate = () => {
  131 │   if (!formData.value.name) {
  132 │     ElMessage.warning('请填写场景名称')
  133 │     return
  134 │   }
  135 │   
  136 │   if (isEdit.value) {
  137 │     const index = templates.value.findIndex(t => t.id === formData.value.id)
  138 │     if (index > -1) {
  139 │       templates.value[index] = { ...formData.value }
  140 │     }
  141 │     ElMessage.success('修改成功')
  142 │   } else {
  143 │     const newId = 'S' + String(templates.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0')
  144 │     templates.value.push({
  145 │       ...formData.value,
  146 │       id: newId
  147 │     })
  148 │     ElMessage.success('新增成功')
  149 │   }
  150 │   dialogVisible.value = false
  151 │ }
  152 │ </script>
  153 │ 
  154 │ <style scoped>
  155 │ .template-grid {
  156 │   display: grid;
  157 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  158 │   gap: 20px;
  159 │ }
  160 │ 
  161 │ .template-card {
  162 │   background: #fff;
  163 │   padding: 20px;
  164 │   border-radius: 8px;
  165 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  166 │   transition: all 0.3s;
  167 │   
  168 │   &:hover {
  169 │     box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  170 │   }
  171 │   
  172 │   &.disabled {
  173 │     opacity: 0.6;
  174 │     background: #fafafa;
  175 │   }
  176 │ }
  177 │ 
  178 │ .template-header {
  179 │   display: flex;
  180 │   justify-content: space-between;
  181 │   align-items: center;
  182 │   margin-bottom: 12px;
  183 │ }
  184 │ 
  185 │ .template-name {
  186 │   font-size: 16px;
  187 │   font-weight: 600;
  188 │   color: #333;
  189 │ }
  190 │ 
  191 │ .template-desc {
  192 │   font-size: 14px;
  193 │   color: #666;
  194 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  195 │   line-height: 1.5;
  196 │ }
  197 │ 
  198 │ .template-config {
  199 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  200 │ }
  201 │ 
  202 │ .config-item {
  203 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  204 │   
  205 │   &:last-child {
  206 │     margin-bottom: 0;
  207 │   }
  208 │ }
  209 │ 
  210 │ .config-label {
  211 │   font-size: 13px;
  212 │   color: #999;
  213 │   margin-right: 10px;
  214 │ }
  215 │ 
  216 │ .config-value {
  217 │   font-size: 14px;
  218 │   color: #333;
  219 │ }
  220 │ 
  221 │ .template-actions {
  222 │   display: flex;
  223 │   gap: 10px;
  224 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  225 │ }
  226 │ </style>
  227 │

📄 views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="page-container">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <div class="title">一键场景触发</div>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="refreshStatus">
    7 │           <component :is="icons.Refresh" />
    8 │           刷新状态
    9 │         </el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │     <div class="trigger-section">
   13 │       <div class="section-title">快速触发</div>
   14 │       <div class="quick-triggers">
   15 │         <div 
   16 │           v-for="template in enabledTemplates" 
   17 │           :key="template.id"
   18 │           class="trigger-card"
   19 │           @click="triggerScene(template)"
   20 │         >
   21 │           <div class="trigger-icon">
   22 │             <component :is="icons.Lightbulb" />
   23 │           </div>
   24 │           <div class="trigger-info">
   25 │             <span class="trigger-name">{{ template.name }}</span>
   26 │             <span class="trigger-brightness">亮度: {{ template.brightness }}%</span>
   27 │           </div>
   28 │           <el-button type="primary" size="small">触发</el-button>
   29 │         </div>
   30 │       </div>
   31 │     </div>
   32 │     <div class="trigger-section">
   33 │       <div class="section-title">当前场景状态</div>
   34 │       <div class="current-scene">
   35 │         <div class="scene-status">
   36 │           <el-tag :type="currentScene ? 'success' : 'info'" size="large">
   37 │             {{ currentScene ? '场景运行中: ' + currentScene.name : '无场景运行' }}
   38 │           </el-tag>
   39 │         </div>
   40 │         <div v-if="currentScene" class="scene-detail">
   41 │           <div class="detail-row">
   42 │             <span class="detail-label">亮度设置</span>
   43 │             <el-progress :percentage="currentScene.brightness" :show-text="true" />
   44 │           </div>
   45 │           <div class="detail-row">
   46 │             <span class="detail-label">启动时间</span>
   47 │             <span class="detail-value">{{ currentScene.startTime }}</span>
   48 │           </div>
   49 │           <div class="detail-actions">
   50 │             <el-button type="warning" @click="stopScene">停止场景</el-button>
   51 │           </div>
   52 │         </div>
   53 │       </div>
   54 │     </div>
   55 │     <div class="trigger-section">
   56 │       <div class="section-title">触发历史记录</div>
   57 │       <el-table :data="triggerHistory" border class="history-table">
   58 │         <el-table-column prop="time" label="触发时间" width="180" />
   59 │         <el-table-column prop="sceneName" label="场景名称" />
   60 │         <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="100" />
   61 │         <el-table-column prop="operator" label="操作人" width="100" />
   62 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
   63 │           <template #default="scope">
   64 │             <el-tag :type="scope.row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'">
   65 │               {{ scope.row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }}
   66 │             </el-tag>
   67 │           </template>
   68 │         </el-table-column>
   69 │       </el-table>
   70 │     </div>
   71 │     <el-dialog title="场景触发确认" :visible.sync="confirmDialogVisible" width="400px">
   72 │       <div class="confirm-content">
   73 │         <p>确认触发场景:</p>
   74 │         <p class="scene-name">{{ pendingScene?.name }}</p>
   75 │         <p class="scene-desc">{{ pendingScene?.description }}</p>
   76 │       </div>
   77 │       <template #footer>
   78 │         <el-button @click="confirmDialogVisible = false">取消</el-button>
   79 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="confirmTrigger">确认触发</el-button>
   80 │       </template>
   81 │     </el-dialog>
   82 │   </div>
   83 │ </template>
   84 │ 
   85 │ <script setup>
   86 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   87 │ import { Refresh, Sunrise } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
   88 │ import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData'
   89 │ 
   90 │ const icons = { Refresh, Lightbulb: Sunrise }
   91 │ const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates])
   92 │ const confirmDialogVisible = ref(false)
   93 │ const pendingScene = ref(null)
   94 │ const currentScene = ref(null)
   95 │ 
   96 │ const triggerHistory = ref([
   97 │   { id: 1, time: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', sceneName: '节能模式', brightness: 50, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' },
   98 │   { id: 2, time: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', sceneName: '节日庆典模式', brightness: 100, operator: '张三', status: 'success' },
   99 │   { id: 3, time: '2024-01-14 22:00:00', sceneName: '深夜模式', brightness: 30, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  100 │   { id: 4, time: '2024-01-14 18:30:00', sceneName: '日常照明策略', brightness: 100, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' },
  101 │   { id: 5, time: '2024-01-13 14:20:00', sceneName: '雾霾模式', brightness: 90, operator: '李四', status: 'success' }
  102 │ ])
  103 │ 
  104 │ const enabledTemplates = computed(() => {
  105 │   return templates.value.filter(t => t.enabled)
  106 │ })
  107 │ 
  108 │ const triggerScene = (template) => {
  109 │   pendingScene.value = template
  110 │   confirmDialogVisible.value = true
  111 │ }
  112 │ 
  113 │ const confirmTrigger = () => {
  114 │   if (pendingScene.value) {
  115 │     currentScene.value = {
  116 │       ...pendingScene.value,
  117 │       startTime: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN')
  118 │     }
  119 │     triggerHistory.value.unshift({
  120 │       id: Date.now(),
  121 │       time: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN'),
  122 │       sceneName: pendingScene.value.name,
  123 │       brightness: pendingScene.value.brightness,
  124 │       operator: '管理员',
  125 │       status: 'success'
  126 │     })
  127 │     ElMessage.success('场景触发成功')
  128 │   }
  129 │   confirmDialogVisible.value = false
  130 │ }
  131 │ 
  132 │ const stopScene = () => {
  133 │   currentScene.value = null
  134 │   ElMessage.info('场景已停止')
  135 │ }
  136 │ 
  137 │ const refreshStatus = () => {
  138 │   ElMessage.success('状态已刷新')
  139 │ }
  140 │ </script>
  141 │ 
  142 │ <style scoped>
  143 │ .trigger-section {
  144 │   margin-bottom: 25px;
  145 │ }
  146 │ 
  147 │ .section-title {
  148 │   font-size: 16px;
  149 │   font-weight: 600;
  150 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  151 │   color: #333;
  152 │ }
  153 │ 
  154 │ .quick-triggers {
  155 │   display: grid;
  156 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  157 │   gap: 15px;
  158 │ }
  159 │ 
  160 │ .trigger-card {
  161 │   display: flex;
  162 │   align-items: center;
  163 │   gap: 15px;
  164 │   background: #fff;
  165 │   padding: 20px;
  166 │   border-radius: 8px;
  167 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  168 │   cursor: pointer;
  169 │   transition: all 0.3s;
  170 │   
  171 │   &:hover {
  172 │     box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  173 │     transform: translateY(-2px);
  174 │   }
  175 │ }
  176 │ 
  177 │ .trigger-icon {
  178 │   width: 50px;
  179 │   height: 50px;
  180 │   border-radius: 12px;
  181 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  182 │   display: flex;
  183 │   align-items: center;
  184 │   justify-content: center;
  185 │   color: #fff;
  186 │   font-size: 24px;
  187 │ }
  188 │ 
  189 │ .trigger-info {
  190 │   flex: 1;
  191 │ }
  192 │ 
  193 │ .trigger-name {
  194 │   display: block;
  195 │   font-size: 16px;
  196 │   font-weight: 600;
  197 │   color: #333;
  198 │   margin-bottom: 4px;
  199 │ }
  200 │ 
  201 │ .trigger-brightness {
  202 │   font-size: 13px;
  203 │   color: #666;
  204 │ }
  205 │ 
  206 │ .current-scene {
  207 │   background: #fff;
  208 │   padding: 20px;
  209 │   border-radius: 8px;
  210 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  211 │ }
  212 │ 
  213 │ .scene-status {
  214 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  215 │ }
  216 │ 
  217 │ .scene-detail {
  218 │   padding-top: 15px;
  219 │   border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  220 │ }
  221 │ 
  222 │ .detail-row {
  223 │   display: flex;
  224 │   align-items: center;
  225 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  226 │   
  227 │   &:last-child {
  228 │     margin-bottom: 0;
  229 │   }
  230 │ }
  231 │ 
  232 │ .detail-label {
  233 │   width: 100px;
  234 │   font-size: 14px;
  235 │   color: #666;
  236 │ }
  237 │ 
  238 │ .detail-value {
  239 │   font-size: 14px;
  240 │   color: #333;
  241 │ }
  242 │ 
  243 │ .detail-actions {
  244 │   margin-top: 15px;
  245 │ }
  246 │ 
  247 │ .history-table {
  248 │   width: 100%;
  249 │ }
  250 │ 
  251 │ .confirm-content {
  252 │   padding: 10px 0;
  253 │ }
  254 │ 
  255 │ .confirm-content p {
  256 │   margin-bottom: 8px;
  257 │   color: #666;
  258 │ }
  259 │ 
  260 │ .scene-name {
  261 │   font-size: 18px;
  262 │   font-weight: 600;
  263 │   color: #333 !important;
  264 │ }
  265 │ 
  266 │ .scene-desc {
  267 │   color: #999 !important;
  268 │   font-size: 14px;
  269 │ }
  270 │ </style>
  271 │

    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   11 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="选择隧道" style="width: 200px;" clearable>
   12 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   13 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   14 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   15 │       </el-select>

   18 │         <el-option label="环境超标" value="环境超标" />
   19 │         <el-option label="消防告警" value="消防告警" />
   20 │         <el-option label="通信故障" value="通信故障" />
   21 │       </el-select>

   23 │         <el-option label="严重" value="严重" />
   24 │         <el-option label="一般" value="一般" />
   25 │         <el-option label="提示" value="提示" />
   26 │       </el-select>

   28 │         <el-option label="未处理" value="未处理" />
   29 │         <el-option label="处理中" value="处理中" />
   30 │         <el-option label="已处理" value="已处理" />
   31 │       </el-select>

   33 │         v-model="dateRange"

   37 │         end-placeholder="结束日期"
   38 │         style="width: 280px;"
   39 │       />

   44 │     <div class="alarm-summary">

   47 │           <el-icon :size="24"><WarningFilled /></el-icon>
   48 │         </div>
   49 │         <div class="summary-info">
   50 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.total }}</div>

   56 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Clock /></el-icon>
   57 │         </div>
   58 │         <div class="summary-info">
   59 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.unhandled }}</div>
   60 │           <div class="summary-label">未处理</div>
   61 │         </div>
   62 │       </div>
   63 │       <div class="summary-card">
   64 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #409eff;">
   65 │           <el-icon :size="24"><RefreshRight /></el-icon>
   66 │         </div>
   67 │         <div class="summary-info">
   68 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.handling }}</div>
   69 │           <div class="summary-label">处理中</div>
   70 │         </div>
   71 │       </div>
   72 │       <div class="summary-card">
   73 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #67c23a;">
   74 │           <el-icon :size="24"><CircleCheckFilled /></el-icon>
   75 │         </div>
   76 │         <div class="summary-info">
   77 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.handled }}</div>
   78 │           <div class="summary-label">已处理</div>
   79 │         </div>
   80 │       </div>
   81 │     </div>
   82 │ 
   83 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   84 │       <el-table :data="filteredData" border @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   85 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   86 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="ID" width="60" />
   87 │         <el-table-column prop="time" label="告警时间" width="160" />
   88 │         <el-table-column prop="tunnelName" label="隧道名称" width="120" />
   89 │         <el-table-column prop="sectionName" label="路段" width="100" />
   90 │         <el-table-column prop="type" label="告警类型" width="120" />
   91 │         <el-table-column prop="deviceName" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
   92 │         <el-table-column prop="content" label="告警内容" min-width="200" />
   93 │         <el-table-column prop="level" label="级别" width="80">
   94 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   95 │             <el-tag :type="getLevelType(row.level)" size="small">
   96 │               {{ row.level }}
   97 │             </el-tag>
   98 │           </template>
   99 │         </el-table-column>
  100 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
  101 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  102 │             <el-tag :type="getStatusType(row.status)" size="small">
  103 │               {{ row.status }}
  104 │             </el-tag>
  105 │           </template>
  106 │         </el-table-column>
  107 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="200" fixed="right">
  108 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  109 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleHandle(row)">处理</el-button>
  110 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
  111 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleIgnore(row)">忽略</el-button>
  112 │           </template>
  113 │         </el-table-column>
  114 │       </el-table>
  115 │     </div>
  116 │ 
  117 │     <div class="pagination">
  118 │       <el-pagination
  119 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  120 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  121 │         :total="total"
  122 │         layout="total, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  123 │       />
  124 │     </div>
  125 │ 
  126 │     <el-dialog title="处理告警" v-model="showHandleDialog" width="600px">
  127 │       <el-form :model="handleForm" label-width="100px">
  128 │         <el-form-item label="告警编号">
  129 │           <el-input v-model="handleForm.id" disabled />
  130 │         </el-form-item>
  131 │         <el-form-item label="告警类型">
  132 │           <el-input v-model="handleForm.type" disabled />
  133 │         </el-form-item>
  134 │         <el-form-item label="告警内容">
  135 │           <el-input v-model="handleForm.content" type="textarea" :rows="3" disabled />
  136 │         </el-form-item>
  137 │         <el-form-item label="处理方式">
  138 │           <el-radio-group v-model="handleForm.method">

  140 │             <el-radio label="replace">更换设备</el-radio>
  141 │             <el-radio label="config">调整参数</el-radio>
  142 │             <el-radio label="ignore">忽略告警</el-radio>
  143 │           </el-radio-group>
  144 │         </el-form-item>
  145 │         <el-form-item label="处理说明">
  146 │           <el-input v-model="handleForm.remark" type="textarea" :rows="4" placeholder="请输入处理说明" />
  147 │         </el-form-item>
  148 │         <el-form-item label="处理人员">
  149 │           <el-input v-model="handleForm.handler" placeholder="请输入处理人员姓名" />
  150 │         </el-form-item>
  151 │         <el-form-item label="处理时间">
  152 │           <el-date-picker
  153 │             v-model="handleForm.handleTime"
  154 │             type="datetime"
  155 │             placeholder="选择处理时间"
  156 │             style="width: 100%;"
  157 │           />
  158 │         </el-form-item>
  159 │       </el-form>
  160 │       <template #footer>
  161 │         <el-button @click="showHandleDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  162 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleConfirm">确定处理</el-button>
  163 │       </template>
  164 │     </el-dialog>
  165 │ 
  166 │     <el-dialog title="告警详情" v-model="showDetailDialog" width="700px">
  167 │       <el-descriptions :column="2" border>
  168 │         <el-descriptions-item label="告警编号">{{ detailData.id }}</el-descriptions-item>
  169 │         <el-descriptions-item label="告警时间">{{ detailData.time }}</el-descriptions-item>
  170 │         <el-descriptions-item label="隧道名称">{{ detailData.tunnelName }}</el-descriptions-item>
  171 │         <el-descriptions-item label="路段">{{ detailData.sectionName }}</el-descriptions-item>
  172 │         <el-descriptions-item label="告警类型">{{ detailData.type }}</el-descriptions-item>
  173 │         <el-descriptions-item label="设备名称">{{ detailData.deviceName }}</el-descriptions-item>
  174 │         <el-descriptions-item label="告警级别">

  178 │         </el-descriptions-item>

  181 │             {{ detailData.status }}
  182 │           </el-tag>
  183 │         </el-descriptions-item>

  185 │         <el-descriptions-item label="处理说明" :span="2">{{ detailData.remark || '暂无' }}</el-descriptions-item>
  186 │         <el-descriptions-item label="处理人员">{{ detailData.handler || '暂无' }}</el-descriptions-item>
  187 │         <el-descriptions-item label="处理时间">{{ detailData.handleTime || '暂无' }}</el-descriptions-item>
  188 │       </el-descriptions>
  189 │       <template #footer>

  191 │       </template>
  192 │     </el-dialog>
  193 │   </div>
  194 │ </template>
  195 │ 
  196 │ <script setup>
  197 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  198 │ import { WarningFilled, Clock, RefreshRight, CircleCheckFilled } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  199 │ 
  200 │ const filterTunnel = ref('')
  201 │ const filterType = ref('')
  202 │ const filterLevel = ref('')
  203 │ const filterStatus = ref('')
  204 │ const dateRange = ref('')
  205 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  206 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  207 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  208 │ const showHandleDialog = ref(false)
  209 │ const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
  210 │ 
  211 │ const summary = ref({
  212 │   total: 156,
  213 │   unhandled: 23,
  214 │   handling: 12,
  215 │   handled: 121
  216 │ })
  217 │ 
  218 │ const handleForm = ref({
  219 │   id: '',
  220 │   type: '',
  221 │   content: '',
  222 │   method: 'repair',
  223 │   remark: '',
  224 │   handler: '',
  225 │   handleTime: ''
  226 │ })
  227 │ 
  228 │ const detailData = ref({})
  229 │ 
  230 │ const alarmData = ref([
  231 │   { id: 1, time: '2024-05-18 10:25:30', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', type: '设备故障', deviceName: '照明灯具-003', content: '照明设备离线', level: '一般', status: '未处理', remark: '', handler: '', handleTime: '' },
  232 │   { id: 2, time: '2024-05-18 09:15:22', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', type: '环境超标', deviceName: 'CO检测仪-002', content: 'CO浓度超标：52ppm', level: '严重', status: '处理中', remark: '已现场检查，正在处理', handler: '张三', handleTime: '2024-05-18 09:30:00' },
  233 │   { id: 3, time: '2024-05-18 08:30:15', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '过渡段', type: '通信故障', deviceName: '集控器-001', content: '设备通信中断', level: '一般', status: '已处理', remark: '网络恢复，通信正常', handler: '李四', handleTime: '2024-05-18 08:45:00' },
  234 │   { id: 4, time: '2024-05-17 22:30:08', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', type: '消防告警', deviceName: '温感探测器-002', content: '温度异常：65℃', level: '严重', status: '已处理', remark: '环境温度正常，误报', handler: '王五', handleTime: '2024-05-17 22:40:00' },
  235 │   { id: 5, time: '2024-05-17 18:45:30', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '出口段', type: '设备故障', deviceName: '射流风机-005', content: '风机运行异常', level: '一般', status: '未处理', remark: '', handler: '', handleTime: '' }
  236 │ ])
  237 │ 
  238 │ const total = computed(() => filteredData.value.length)
  239 │ 
  240 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  241 │   let result = alarmData.value
  242 │   if (filterTunnel.value) {
  243 │     result = result.filter(item => item.tunnelName === filterTunnel.value)
  244 │   }
  245 │   if (filterType.value) {
  246 │     result = result.filter(item => item.type === filterType.value)
  247 │   }
  248 │   if (filterLevel.value) {
  249 │     result = result.filter(item => item.level === filterLevel.value)
  250 │   }
  251 │   if (filterStatus.value) {
  252 │     result = result.filter(item => item.status === filterStatus.value)
  253 │   }
  254 │   return result
  255 │ })
  256 │ 
  257 │ const getLevelType = (level) => {
  258 │   switch (level) {
  259 │     case '严重':
  260 │       return 'danger'
  261 │     case '一般':
  262 │       return 'warning'
  263 │     case '提示':
  264 │       return 'info'
  265 │     default:
  266 │       return ''
  267 │   }
  268 │ }
  269 │ 
  270 │ const getStatusType = (status) => {
  271 │   switch (status) {
  272 │     case '未处理':
  273 │       return 'danger'
  274 │     case '处理中':
  275 │       return 'warning'
  276 │     case '已处理':
  277 │       return 'success'
  278 │     default:
  279 │       return ''
  280 │   }
  281 │ }
  282 │ 
  283 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  284 │   currentPage.value = 1
  285 │ }
  286 │ 
  287 │ const handleReset = () => {
  288 │   filterTunnel.value = ''
  289 │   filterType.value = ''
  290 │   filterLevel.value = ''
  291 │   filterStatus.value = ''
  292 │   dateRange.value = ''
  293 │   currentPage.value = 1
  294 │ }
  295 │ 
  296 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  297 │   selectedRows.value = val
  298 │ }
  299 │ 
  300 │ const handleHandle = (row) => {
  301 │   handleForm.value = {
  302 │     id: row.id,
  303 │     type: row.type,
  304 │     content: row.content,
  305 │     method: 'repair',
  306 │     remark: '',
  307 │     handler: '',
  308 │     handleTime: new Date()
  309 │   }
  310 │   showHandleDialog.value = true
  311 │ }
  312 │ 
  313 │ const handleDetail = (row) => {
  314 │   detailData.value = { ...row }
  315 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ const handleIgnore = (row) => {
  319 │   console.log('Ignore:', row)
  320 │ }
  321 │ 
  322 │ const handleConfirm = () => {
  323 │   showHandleDialog.value = false
  324 │ }
  325 │ 
  326 │ const handleExport = () => {
  327 │   console.log('Export data')
  328 │ }
  329 │ </script>
  330 │ 
  331 │ <style scoped>
  332 │ .alarm-manage {
  333 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  334 │   min-height: 100%;
  335 │ }
  336 │ 
  337 │ .page-header {
  338 │   display: flex;
  339 │   justify-content: space-between;
  340 │   align-items: center;
  341 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  342 │ }
  343 │ 
  344 │ .page-header h2 {
  345 │   margin: 0;
  346 │   font-size: 24px;
  347 │   font-weight: 600;
  348 │   color: #333;
  349 │ }
  350 │ 
  351 │ .header-actions {
  352 │   display: flex;
  353 │   gap: 10px;
  354 │ }
  355 │ 
  356 │ .filter-bar {
  357 │   background: #ffffff;
  358 │   padding: 20px;
  359 │   border-radius: 8px;
  360 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  361 │   display: flex;
  362 │   gap: 15px;
  363 │   align-items: center;
  364 │   flex-wrap: wrap;
  365 │ }
  366 │ 
  367 │ .alarm-summary {
  368 │   display: grid;
  369 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  370 │   gap: 20px;
  371 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  372 │ }
  373 │ 
  374 │ .summary-card {
  375 │   background: #ffffff;
  376 │   border-radius: 8px;
  377 │   padding: 20px;
  378 │   display: flex;
  379 │   align-items: center;
  380 │   gap: 15px;
  381 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  382 │ }
  383 │ 
  384 │ .summary-icon {
  385 │   width: 50px;
  386 │   height: 50px;
  387 │   border-radius: 10px;
  388 │   display: flex;
  389 │   align-items: center;
  390 │   justify-content: center;
  391 │   color: #ffffff;
  392 │ }
  393 │ 
  394 │ .summary-info {
  395 │   flex: 1;
  396 │ }
  397 │ 
  398 │ .summary-value {
  399 │   font-size: 28px;
  400 │   font-weight: 600;
  401 │   color: #333;
  402 │ }
  403 │ 
  404 │ .summary-label {
  405 │   font-size: 14px;
  406 │   color: #666;
  407 │   margin-top: 4px;
  408 │ }
  409 │ 
  410 │ .table-wrapper {
  411 │   background: #ffffff;
  412 │   border-radius: 8px;
  413 │   padding: 20px;
  414 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  415 │ }
  416 │ 
  417 │ .pagination {
  418 │   display: flex;
  419 │   justify-content: center;
  420 │   background: #ffffff;
  421 │   padding: 20px;
  422 │   border-radius: 8px;
  423 │ }
  424 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/CircuitGroup.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="circuit-group">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>回路分组</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增分组</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger">批量删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="展厅隧道" style="width: 150px;">
   13 │         <el-option label="展厅隧道" value="展厅隧道" />
   14 │       </el-select>
   15 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   16 │     </div>
   17 │ 
   18 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   19 │       <el-table :data="groupData" border>
   20 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   21 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   22 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="分组名称" min-width="120" />
   23 │         <el-table-column prop="circuitCount" label="包含回路数" width="120" />
   24 │         <el-table-column prop="deviceCount" label="关联设备数" width="120" />
   25 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   26 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   27 │             <el-tag :type="row.status === '正常' ? 'success' : 'danger'">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
   28 │           </template>
   29 │         </el-table-column>
   30 │         <el-table-column prop="createTime" label="创建时间" width="150" />
   31 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="200">
   32 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   33 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleView(row)">查看详情</el-button>
   34 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   35 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   36 │           </template>
   37 │         </el-table-column>
   38 │       </el-table>
   39 │     </div>
   40 │ 
   41 │     <el-dialog title="创建分组" v-model="showDialog" width="500px">
   42 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   43 │         <el-form-item label="*分组名称" required>
   44 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入分组名称" />
   45 │         </el-form-item>
   46 │         <el-form-item label="分组描述">
   47 │           <el-input v-model="formData.description" type="textarea" :rows="3" placeholder="请输入分组描述" />
   48 │         </el-form-item>
   49 │         <el-form-item label="关联回路">
   50 │           <el-select v-model="formData.circuits" multiple style="width: 100%;">
   51 │             <el-option label="照明回路1" value="HL-001" />
   52 │             <el-option label="照明回路2" value="HL-002" />
   53 │             <el-option label="照明回路3" value="HL-003" />
   54 │             <el-option label="应急回路" value="HL-004" />
   55 │           </el-select>
   56 │         </el-form-item>
   57 │         <el-form-item label="启用">
   58 │           <el-switch v-model="formData.status" active-value="正常" inactive-value="禁用" />
   59 │         </el-form-item>
   60 │       </el-form>
   61 │       <template #footer>
   62 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
   63 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">确定</el-button>
   64 │       </template>
   65 │     </el-dialog>
   66 │   </div>
   67 │ </template>
   68 │ 
   69 │ <script setup>
   70 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
   71 │ 
   72 │ const filterTunnel = ref('展厅隧道')
   73 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
   74 │ 
   75 │ const formData = ref({
   76 │   name: '',
   77 │   description: '',
   78 │   circuits: [],
   79 │   status: '正常'
   80 │ })
   81 │ 
   82 │ const groupData = ref([
   83 │   { id: 1, name: '入口段照明组', circuitCount: 2, deviceCount: 48, status: '正常', createTime: '2024-05-18 10:00' },
   84 │   { id: 2, name: '基本段照明组', circuitCount: 4, deviceCount: 96, status: '正常', createTime: '2024-05-18 10:05' },
   85 │   { id: 3, name: '出口段照明组', circuitCount: 2, deviceCount: 48, status: '正常', createTime: '2024-05-18 10:10' },
   86 │   { id: 4, name: '应急照明组', circuitCount: 1, deviceCount: 24, status: '正常', createTime: '2024-05-18 10:15' }
   87 │ ])
   88 │ 
   89 │ const handleSearch = () => {}
   90 │ const handleView = (row) => {}
   91 │ const handleAdd = () => {
   92 │   formData.value = {
   93 │     name: '',
   94 │     description: '',
   95 │     circuits: [],
   96 │     status: '正常'
   97 │   }
   98 │   showDialog.value = true
   99 │ }
  100 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  101 │   formData.value.name = row.name
  102 │   showDialog.value = true
  103 │ }
  104 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {}
  105 │ const handleSave = () => {
  106 │   showDialog.value = false
  107 │ }
  108 │ </script>
  109 │ 
  110 │ <style scoped>
  111 │ .circuit-group {
  112 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  113 │   min-height: 100%;
  114 │   padding: 20px;
  115 │ }
  116 │ 
  117 │ .page-header {
  118 │   display: flex;
  119 │   justify-content: space-between;
  120 │   align-items: center;
  121 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  122 │ }
  123 │ 
  124 │ .page-header h2 {
  125 │   margin: 0;
  126 │   font-size: 24px;
  127 │   font-weight: 600;
  128 │   color: #333;
  129 │ }
  130 │ 
  131 │ .header-actions {
  132 │   display: flex;
  133 │   gap: 10px;
  134 │ }
  135 │ 
  136 │ .filter-bar {
  137 │   background: #ffffff;
  138 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  139 │   border-radius: 8px;
  140 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  141 │   display: flex;
  142 │   gap: 15px;
  143 │   align-items: center;
  144 │ }
  145 │ 
  146 │ .table-wrapper {
  147 │   background: #ffffff;
  148 │   border-radius: 8px;
  149 │   padding: 20px;
  150 │ }
  151 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/EnergyStatistics.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="energy-statistics">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>能耗统计</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-date-picker
    7 │           v-model="dateRange"
    8 │           type="daterange"
    9 │           range-separator="至"
   10 │           start-placeholder="开始日期"
   11 │           end-placeholder="结束日期"
   12 │           style="width: 280px;"
   13 │         />
   14 │         <el-button type="primary">导出数据</el-button>
   15 │       </div>
   16 │     </div>
   17 │ 
   18 │     <div class="energy-summary">
   19 │       <div class="summary-card">
   20 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #409eff, #66b1ff);">
   21 │           <el-icon :size="24"><DataLine /></el-icon>
   22 │         </div>
   23 │         <div class="summary-info">
   24 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.totalEnergy }}</div>
   25 │           <div class="summary-label">总能耗(kWh)</div>
   26 │         </div>
   27 │       </div>
   28 │       <div class="summary-card">
   29 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #67c23a, #85ce61);">
   30 │           <el-icon :size="24"><TrendCharts /></el-icon>
   31 │         </div>
   32 │         <div class="summary-info">
   33 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.todayEnergy }}</div>
   34 │           <div class="summary-label">今日能耗(kWh)</div>
   35 │         </div>
   36 │       </div>
   37 │       <div class="summary-card">
   38 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e6a23c, #ebb563);">
   39 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Odometer /></el-icon>
   40 │         </div>
   41 │         <div class="summary-info">
   42 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.avgPower }}</div>
   43 │           <div class="summary-label">平均功率(kW)</div>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │       </div>
   46 │       <div class="summary-card">
   47 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f56c6c, #f78989);">
   48 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Coin /></el-icon>
   49 │         </div>
   50 │         <div class="summary-info">
   51 │           <div class="summary-value">¥{{ summary.totalCost }}</div>
   52 │           <div class="summary-label">总费用(元)</div>
   53 │         </div>
   54 │       </div>
   55 │     </div>
   56 │ 
   57 │     <div class="charts-section">
   58 │       <el-card class="chart-card">
   59 │         <template #header>
   60 │           <div class="card-header">
   61 │             <span>能耗趋势</span>
   62 │             <el-radio-group v-model="timeRange" size="small">
   63 │               <el-radio-button label="日" />
   64 │               <el-radio-button label="周" />
   65 │               <el-radio-button label="月" />
   66 │               <el-radio-button label="年" />
   67 │             </el-radio-group>
   68 │           </div>
   69 │         </template>
   70 │         <div class="chart-container">
   71 │           <div class="bar-chart">
   72 │             <div v-for="(item, index) in energyTrend" :key="index" class="bar-item">
   73 │               <div class="bar-value">{{ item.value }}</div>
   74 │               <div class="bar" :style="{ height: (item.value / maxEnergy * 100) + '%' }"></div>
   75 │               <div class="bar-label">{{ item.label }}</div>
   76 │             </div>
   77 │           </div>
   78 │         </div>
   79 │       </el-card>
   80 │ 
   81 │       <el-card class="chart-card">
   82 │         <template #header>
   83 │           <span>能耗占比</span>
   84 │         </template>
   85 │         <div class="pie-chart">
   86 │           <div class="pie-item" v-for="(item, index) in energyDistribution" :key="index">
   87 │             <div class="pie-value">{{ item.value }}%</div>
   88 │             <div class="pie-label">{{ item.label }}</div>
   89 │           </div>
   90 │         </div>
   91 │       </el-card>
   92 │     </div>
   93 │ 
   94 │     <el-card class="tunnel-energy">
   95 │       <template #header>
   96 │         <div class="card-header">
   97 │           <span>各隧道能耗统计</span>
   98 │           <el-button type="text" size="small">查看详情</el-button>
   99 │         </div>
  100 │       </template>
  101 │       <el-table :data="tunnelEnergyData" border>
  102 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="隧道名称" width="150" />
  103 │         <el-table-column prop="todayEnergy" label="今日能耗(kWh)" width="140" />
  104 │         <el-table-column prop="weekEnergy" label="本周能耗(kWh)" width="140" />
  105 │         <el-table-column prop="monthEnergy" label="本月能耗(kWh)" width="140" />
  106 │         <el-table-column prop="yearEnergy" label="本年能耗(kWh)" width="140" />
  107 │         <el-table-column prop="avgPower" label="平均功率(kW)" width="140" />
  108 │         <el-table-column prop="cost" label="费用(元)" width="120">
  109 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  110 │             <span style="color: #f56c6c; font-weight: 600;">¥{{ row.cost }}</span>
  111 │           </template>
  112 │         </el-table-column>
  113 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="120">
  114 │           <template #default="{ row }">
  115 │             <el-button type="text" size="small">详情</el-button>
  116 │             <el-button type="text" size="small">对比</el-button>
  117 │           </template>
  118 │         </el-table-column>
  119 │       </el-table>
  120 │     </el-card>
  121 │ 
  122 │     <el-card class="device-energy">
  123 │       <template #header>
  124 │         <div class="card-header">
  125 │           <span>设备能耗排名</span>
  126 │           <el-radio-group v-model="deviceType" size="small">
  127 │             <el-radio-button label="照明" />
  128 │             <el-radio-button label="通风" />
  129 │             <el-radio-button label="监控" />
  130 │             <el-radio-button label="消防" />
  131 │           </el-radio-group>
  132 │         </div>
  133 │       </template>
  134 │       <div class="device-ranking">
  135 │         <div v-for="(device, index) in deviceRanking" :key="index" class="ranking-item">
  136 │           <div class="ranking-index" :class="'top-' + (index + 1)">{{ index + 1 }}</div>
  137 │           <div class="ranking-info">
  138 │             <div class="device-name">{{ device.name }}</div>
  139 │             <div class="device-location">{{ device.tunnel }} - {{ device.section }}</div>
  140 │           </div>
  141 │           <div class="ranking-energy">{{ device.energy }} kWh</div>
  142 │         </div>
  143 │       </div>
  144 │     </el-card>
  145 │   </div>
  146 │ </template>
  147 │ 
  148 │ <script setup>
  149 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  150 │ import { DataLine, TrendCharts, Odometer, Coin } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  151 │ 
  152 │ const dateRange = ref('')
  153 │ const timeRange = ref('日')
  154 │ const deviceType = ref('照明')
  155 │ 
  156 │ const summary = ref({
  157 │   totalEnergy: 125680,
  158 │   todayEnergy: 4560,
  159 │   avgPower: 1250,
  160 │   totalCost: 75408
  161 │ })
  162 │ 
  163 │ const energyTrend = ref([
  164 │   { label: '00:00', value: 2800 },
  165 │   { label: '04:00', value: 3200 },
  166 │   { label: '08:00', value: 4200 },
  167 │   { label: '12:00', value: 5100 },
  168 │   { label: '16:00', value: 4800 },
  169 │   { label: '20:00', value: 5600 },
  170 │   { label: '24:00', value: 4500 }
  171 │ ])
  172 │ 
  173 │ const energyDistribution = ref([
  174 │   { label: '照明', value: 55 },
  175 │   { label: '通风', value: 30 },
  176 │   { label: '监控', value: 10 },
  177 │   { label: '其他', value: 5 }
  178 │ ])
  179 │ 
  180 │ const tunnelEnergyData = ref([
  181 │   { name: '梅溪湖隧道', todayEnergy: 1256, weekEnergy: 8792, monthEnergy: 35168, yearEnergy: 421256, avgPower: 320, cost: 25275 },
  182 │   { name: '梅溪湖隧道', todayEnergy: 980, weekEnergy: 6860, monthEnergy: 27440, yearEnergy: 328128, avgPower: 250, cost: 19682 },
  183 │   { name: '梅溪湖隧道', todayEnergy: 1150, weekEnergy: 8050, monthEnergy: 32200, yearEnergy: 385840, avgPower: 295, cost: 23150 },
  184 │   { name: '梅溪湖隧道', todayEnergy: 890, weekEnergy: 6230, monthEnergy: 24920, yearEnergy: 299040, avgPower: 228, cost: 17946 }
  185 │ ])
  186 │ 
  187 │ const deviceRanking = ref([
  188 │   { name: '轴流风机-001', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', energy: 12560 },
  189 │   { name: '射流风机-003', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', energy: 11280 },
  190 │   { name: '照明灯具-015', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', energy: 9860 },
  191 │   { name: '射流风机-007', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', energy: 9250 },
  192 │   { name: '照明灯具-028', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', energy: 8540 }
  193 │ ])
  194 │ 
  195 │ const maxEnergy = computed(() => {
  196 │   return Math.max(...energyTrend.value.map(item => item.value))
  197 │ })
  198 │ </script>

  200 │ <style scoped>
  201 │ .energy-statistics {

  235 │   border-radius: 12px;
  236 │   padding: 24px;
  237 │   display: flex;

  258 │

  269 │

  274 │ }
  275 │ 
  276 │ .charts-section {
  277 │   display: grid;
  278 │   grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
  279 │   gap: 20px;

  282 │ 
  283 │ .chart-card {
  284 │   border-radius: 12px;
  285 │ }
  286 │ 
  287 │ .card-header {
  288 │   display: flex;
  289 │   justify-content: space-between;
  290 │   align-items: center;

  292 │ 
  293 │ .chart-container {
  294 │   height: 300px;
  295 │   display: flex;
  296 │   align-items: flex-end;
  297 │   justify-content: center;
  298 │   padding: 20px 0;
  299 │ }
  300 │ 
  301 │ .bar-chart {
  302 │   display: flex;
  303 │   align-items: flex-end;
  304 │   gap: 15px;
  305 │   height: 100%;
  306 │ }
  307 │ 
  308 │ .bar-item {
  309 │   display: flex;
  310 │   flex-direction: column;
  311 │   align-items: center;
  312 │   width: 60px;
  313 │ }
  314 │ 
  315 │ .bar {
  316 │   width: 40px;
  317 │   background: linear-gradient(180deg, #409eff 0%, #66b1ff 100%);
  318 │   border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  319 │   min-height: 10px;
  320 │   transition: height 0.3s;
  321 │ }
  322 │ 
  323 │ .bar-value {
  324 │   font-size: 12px;
  325 │   color: #666;
  326 │   margin-bottom: 8px;
  327 │ }
  328 │ 
  329 │ .bar-label {
  330 │   font-size: 12px;
  331 │   color: #999;
  332 │   margin-top: 8px;
  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ .pie-chart {
  336 │   display: grid;
  337 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  338 │   gap: 20px;
  339 │   padding: 20px;
  340 │ }
  341 │ 
  342 │ .pie-item {
  343 │   text-align: center;

  353 │ }

  357 │   color: #666;

  359 │ }
  360 │ 
  361 │ .tunnel-energy,
  362 │ .device-energy {
  363 │   border-radius: 12px;
  364 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  365 │ }
  366 │ 
  367 │ .device-ranking {
  368 │   display: flex;
  369 │   flex-direction: column;
  370 │   gap: 12px;
  371 │ }
  372 │ 
  373 │ .ranking-item {
  374 │   display: flex;
  375 │   align-items: center;
  376 │   gap: 15px;
  377 │   padding: 15px;
  378 │   background: #f9fafb;
  379 │   border-radius: 8px;
  380 │ }
  381 │ 
  382 │ .ranking-index {
  383 │   width: 32px;
  384 │   height: 32px;
  385 │   border-radius: 50%;
  386 │   display: flex;
  387 │   align-items: center;
  388 │   justify-content: center;
  389 │   font-size: 14px;
  390 │   font-weight: 700;
  391 │   color: #ffffff;
  392 │   background: #909399;
  393 │ }
  394 │ 
  395 │ .ranking-index.top-1 {
  396 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd700, #ffb700);
  397 │ }
  398 │
