  400 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c0c0c0, #a0a0a0);
  401 │ }
  402 │ 
  403 │ .ranking-index.top-3 {
  404 │   background: linear-gradient(135deg, #cd7f32, #b87333);
  405 │ }
  406 │ 
  407 │ .ranking-info {
  408 │   flex: 1;
  409 │ }
  410 │ 
  411 │ .device-name {
  412 │   font-size: 14px;
  413 │   font-weight: 600;
  414 │   color: #333;
  415 │ }
  416 │ 
  417 │ .device-location {

  419 │   color: #999;
  420 │   margin-top: 4px;
  421 │ }
  422 │ 
  423 │ .ranking-energy {
  424 │   font-size: 16px;
  425 │   font-weight: 600;
  426 │   color: #409eff;
  427 │ }
  428 │ </style>

    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="environment-monitor">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>环境监测</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary">实时刷新</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button>导出数据</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="选择隧道" style="width: 200px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   14 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   15 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   16 │       </el-select>
   17 │       <el-select v-model="filterSection" placeholder="选择路段" style="width: 180px;" clearable>
   18 │         <el-option label="入口段" value="入口段" />
   19 │         <el-option label="过渡段" value="过渡段" />
   20 │         <el-option label="基本段" value="基本段" />
   21 │         <el-option label="出口段" value="出口段" />
   22 │       </el-select>
   23 │       <el-select v-model="timeRange" placeholder="时间范围" style="width: 150px;">
   24 │         <el-option label="实时" value="realtime" />
   25 │         <el-option label="最近1小时" value="1hour" />
   26 │         <el-option label="今日" value="today" />
   27 │         <el-option label="本周" value="week" />
   28 │       </el-select>
   29 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">搜索</el-button>
   30 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   31 │     </div>
   32 │ 
   33 │     <div class="environment-stats">
   34 │       <div class="stat-card">
   35 │         <div class="stat-header">
   36 │           <span class="stat-title">CO浓度</span>
   37 │           <el-tag :type="coStatus === '正常' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">{{ coStatus }}</el-tag>
   38 │         </div>
   39 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.co }} <span class="unit">ppm</span></div>
   40 │         <div class="stat-chart">
   41 │           <div class="mini-chart">
   42 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in coHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: (value / 100) + '%' }"></div>
   43 │           </div>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: 0-50ppm</div>
   46 │       </div>
   47 │ 
   48 │       <div class="stat-card">
   49 │         <div class="stat-header">
   50 │           <span class="stat-title">能见度</span>
   51 │           <el-tag :type="visibilityStatus === '正常' ? 'success' : 'warning'" size="small">{{ visibilityStatus }}</el-tag>
   52 │         </div>
   53 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.visibility }} <span class="unit">m</span></div>
   54 │         <div class="stat-chart">
   55 │           <div class="mini-chart">
   56 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in visibilityHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: (value / 1000) + '%' }"></div>
   57 │           </div>
   58 │         </div>
   59 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: >500m</div>
   60 │       </div>
   61 │ 
   62 │       <div class="stat-card">
   63 │         <div class="stat-header">
   64 │           <span class="stat-title">风速</span>
   65 │           <el-tag type="success" size="small">正常</el-tag>
   66 │         </div>
   67 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.windSpeed }} <span class="unit">m/s</span></div>
   68 │         <div class="stat-chart">
   69 │           <div class="mini-chart">
   70 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in windSpeedHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: (value / 10) + '%' }"></div>
   71 │           </div>
   72 │         </div>
   73 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: 0-8m/s</div>
   74 │       </div>
   75 │ 
   76 │       <div class="stat-card">
   77 │         <div class="stat-header">
   78 │           <span class="stat-title">光照度</span>
   79 │           <el-tag type="success" size="small">正常</el-tag>
   80 │         </div>
   81 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.illuminance }} <span class="unit">lux</span></div>
   82 │         <div class="stat-chart">
   83 │           <div class="mini-chart">
   84 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in illuminanceHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: (value / 1000) + '%' }"></div>
   85 │           </div>
   86 │         </div>
   87 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: 0-1000lux</div>
   88 │       </div>
   89 │ 
   90 │       <div class="stat-card">
   91 │         <div class="stat-header">
   92 │           <span class="stat-title">温度</span>
   93 │           <el-tag type="success" size="small">正常</el-tag>
   94 │         </div>
   95 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.temperature }} <span class="unit">℃</span></div>
   96 │         <div class="stat-chart">
   97 │           <div class="mini-chart">
   98 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in temperatureHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: (value / 50) + '%' }"></div>
   99 │           </div>
  100 │         </div>
  101 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: -10-50℃</div>
  102 │       </div>
  103 │ 
  104 │       <div class="stat-card">
  105 │         <div class="stat-header">
  106 │           <span class="stat-title">湿度</span>
  107 │           <el-tag type="success" size="small">正常</el-tag>
  108 │         </div>
  109 │         <div class="stat-value">{{ currentData.humidity }} <span class="unit">%</span></div>
  110 │         <div class="stat-chart">
  111 │           <div class="mini-chart">
  112 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in humidityHistory" :key="index" class="mini-bar" :style="{ height: value + '%' }"></div>
  113 │           </div>
  114 │         </div>
  115 │         <div class="stat-range">阈值: 0-95%</div>
  116 │       </div>
  117 │     </div>
  118 │ 
  119 │     <div class="charts-grid">
  120 │       <el-card class="chart-card">
  121 │         <template #header>
  122 │           <div class="card-header">
  123 │             <span>CO浓度趋势</span>
  124 │             <el-radio-group v-model="coTimeRange" size="small">
  125 │               <el-radio-button label="1小时" />
  126 │               <el-radio-button label="6小时" />
  127 │               <el-radio-button label="24小时" />
  128 │             </el-radio-group>
  129 │           </div>
  130 │         </template>
  131 │         <div class="chart-placeholder">
  132 │           <div class="line-chart">
  133 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in coTrendData" :key="index" class="line-point">
  134 │               <div class="point" :style="{ top: (100 - value) + '%' }"></div>
  135 │               <div class="point-line" v-if="index < coTrendData.length - 1" :style="{ height: Math.abs(coTrendData[index + 1] - value) + '%' }"></div>
  136 │             </div>
  137 │           </div>
  138 │         </div>
  139 │       </el-card>
  140 │ 
  141 │       <el-card class="chart-card">
  142 │         <template #header>
  143 │           <div class="card-header">
  144 │             <span>能见度趋势</span>
  145 │             <el-radio-group v-model="visibilityTimeRange" size="small">
  146 │               <el-radio-button label="1小时" />
  147 │               <el-radio-button label="6小时" />
  148 │               <el-radio-button label="24小时" />
  149 │             </el-radio-group>
  150 │           </div>
  151 │         </template>
  152 │         <div class="chart-placeholder">
  153 │           <div class="line-chart">
  154 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in visibilityTrendData" :key="index" class="line-point">
  155 │               <div class="point" :style="{ top: (100 - (value / 10)) + '%' }"></div>
  156 │             </div>
  157 │           </div>
  158 │         </div>
  159 │       </el-card>
  160 │     </div>
  161 │ 
  162 │     <div class="alarm-section">
  163 │       <el-card>
  164 │         <template #header>
  165 │           <div class="card-header">
  166 │             <span>环境告警记录</span>
  167 │             <el-button type="text" size="small">查看全部</el-button>
  168 │           </div>
  169 │         </template>
  170 │         <el-table :data="alarmRecords" border>
  171 │           <el-table-column prop="time" label="告警时间" width="160" />
  172 │           <el-table-column prop="tunnel" label="隧道名称" width="150" />
  173 │           <el-table-column prop="section" label="路段" width="120" />
  174 │           <el-table-column prop="type" label="告警类型" width="150" />
  175 │           <el-table-column prop="value" label="监测值" width="120" />
  176 │           <el-table-column prop="threshold" label="阈值" width="120" />
  177 │           <el-table-column prop="level" label="级别" width="80">
  178 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  179 │               <el-tag :type="row.level === '严重' ? 'danger' : 'warning'" size="small">{{ row.level }}</el-tag>
  180 │             </template>
  181 │           </el-table-column>
  182 │           <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
  183 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  184 │               <el-tag :type="row.status === '已处理' ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
  185 │             </template>
  186 │           </el-table-column>
  187 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="120">
  188 │             <template #default="{ row }">
  189 │               <el-button type="text" size="small">处理</el-button>
  190 │               <el-button type="text" size="small">详情</el-button>
  191 │             </template>
  192 │           </el-table-column>
  193 │         </el-table>
  194 │       </el-card>
  195 │     </div>
  196 │   </div>
  197 │ </template>
  198 │ 
  199 │ <script setup>
  200 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  201 │ 
  202 │ const filterTunnel = ref('')
  203 │ const filterSection = ref('')
  204 │ const timeRange = ref('realtime')
  205 │ const coTimeRange = ref('1小时')
  206 │ const visibilityTimeRange = ref('1小时')
  207 │ 
  208 │ const currentData = ref({
  209 │   co: 35,
  210 │   visibility: 850,
  211 │   windSpeed: 2.5,
  212 │   illuminance: 450,
  213 │   temperature: 22,
  214 │   humidity: 65
  215 │ })
  216 │ 
  217 │ const coStatus = computed(() => {
  218 │   return currentData.value.co > 50 ? '超标' : '正常'
  219 │ })
  220 │ 
  221 │ const visibilityStatus = computed(() => {
  222 │   return currentData.value.visibility < 500 ? '偏低' : '正常'
  223 │ })
  224 │ 
  225 │ const coHistory = ref([32, 35, 38, 42, 45, 48, 50, 45, 42, 38, 35, 32])
  226 │ const visibilityHistory = ref([820, 850, 880, 900, 870, 850, 830, 850, 860, 880, 850, 850])
  227 │ const windSpeedHistory = ref([2.0, 2.2, 2.5, 2.8, 3.0, 2.8, 2.5, 2.2, 2.0, 2.5, 2.8, 2.5])
  228 │ const illuminanceHistory = ref([420, 450, 480, 500, 480, 450, 420, 450, 470, 480, 450, 450])
  229 │ const temperatureHistory = ref([20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 24, 23, 22, 21, 20, 21, 22])
  230 │ const humidityHistory = ref([60, 62, 65, 68, 70, 68, 65, 63, 62, 60, 62, 65])
  231 │ 
  232 │ const coTrendData = ref([35, 38, 42, 45, 48, 50, 52, 48, 45, 42, 38, 35, 32, 35, 38, 42])
  233 │ const visibilityTrendData = ref([850, 830, 810, 780, 750, 720, 750, 780, 800, 820, 840, 860, 880, 850, 840, 850])
  234 │ 
  235 │ const alarmRecords = ref([
  236 │   { time: '2024-05-18 10:25:30', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', type: 'CO浓度', value: '52ppm', threshold: '50ppm', level: '严重', status: '已处理' },
  237 │   { time: '2024-05-18 09:15:22', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '入口段', type: '能见度', value: '480m', threshold: '500m', level: '一般', status: '已处理' },
  238 │   { time: '2024-05-17 22:30:15', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '基本段', type: 'CO浓度', value: '55ppm', threshold: '50ppm', level: '严重', status: '已处理' },
  239 │   { time: '2024-05-17 18:45:08', tunnel: '梅溪湖隧道', section: '出口段', type: '风速', value: '8.5m/s', threshold: '8m/s', level: '一般', status: '已处理' }
  240 │ ])
  241 │ 
  242 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  243 │   console.log('Search')
  244 │ }
  245 │ 
  246 │ const handleReset = () => {
  247 │   filterTunnel.value = ''
  248 │   filterSection.value = ''
  249 │   timeRange.value = 'realtime'
  250 │ }
  251 │ </script>
  252 │

  297 │   border-radius: 8px;
  298 │   padding: 20px;
  299 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  300 │ }
  301 │ 
  302 │ .stat-header {
  303 │   display: flex;

  305 │   align-items: center;
  306 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  307 │ }
  308 │

  311 │   font-weight: 600;

  313 │ }
  314 │ 
  315 │ .stat-value {
  316 │   font-size: 32px;

  320 │ }

  322 │ .stat-value .unit {

  327 │ 
  328 │ .stat-chart {

  333 │ }
  334 │ 
  335 │ .mini-chart {
  336 │   display: flex;
  337 │   align-items: flex-end;
  338 │   gap: 2px;
  339 │   width: 100%;
  340 │   height: 100%;
  341 │ }
  342 │ 
  343 │ .mini-bar {
  344 │   flex: 1;
  345 │   background: linear-gradient(180deg, #409eff 0%, #66b1ff 100%);
  346 │   border-radius: 2px;
  347 │   min-height: 2px;
  348 │ }
  349 │ 
  350 │ .stat-range {
  351 │   font-size: 12px;
  352 │   color: #999;
  353 │ }
  354 │ 
  355 │ .charts-grid {
  356 │   display: grid;
  357 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  358 │   gap: 20px;
  359 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  360 │ }
  361 │ 
  362 │ .chart-card {
  363 │   border-radius: 8px;
  364 │ }
  365 │ 
  366 │ .card-header {
  367 │   display: flex;
  368 │   justify-content: space-between;
  369 │   align-items: center;
  370 │ }
  371 │ 
  372 │ .chart-placeholder {
  373 │   height: 250px;
  374 │   display: flex;
  375 │   align-items: center;
  376 │   justify-content: center;
  377 │ }
  378 │ 
  379 │ .line-chart {
  380 │   width: 100%;
  381 │   height: 200px;
  382 │   position: relative;
  383 │   display: flex;
  384 │   align-items: center;
  385 │   gap: 20px;
  386 │ }
  387 │ 
  388 │ .line-point {
  389 │   flex: 1;
  390 │   height: 100%;
  391 │   position: relative;
  392 │   display: flex;
  393 │   align-items: center;
  394 │   justify-content: center;
  395 │ }
  396 │ 
  397 │ .point {
  398 │   width: 8px;
  399 │   height: 8px;
  400 │   border-radius: 50%;
  401 │   background: #409eff;
  402 │   position: absolute;
  403 │ }
  404 │ 
  405 │ .alarm-section {
  406 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  407 │ }
  408 │ 
  409 │ .alarm-section .el-card {
  410 │   border-radius: 8px;
  411 │ }
  412 │ </style>

    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="fire-control">

    5 │       <div class="header-actions">

    7 │         <el-button>导出数据</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="选择隧道" style="width: 200px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   14 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   15 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   16 │       </el-select>
   17 │       <el-select v-model="filterType" placeholder="设备类型" style="width: 150px;" clearable>
   18 │         <el-option label="烟雾探测器" value="烟雾探测器" />
   19 │         <el-option label="温感探测器" value="温感探测器" />
   20 │         <el-option label="手动报警按钮" value="手动报警按钮" />

   22 │       </el-select>

   25 │         <el-option label="告警" value="告警" />
   26 │         <el-option label="故障" value="故障" />
   27 │       </el-select>
   28 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">搜索</el-button>
   29 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   30 │     </div>
   31 │ 
   32 │     <div class="fire-summary">
   33 │       <div class="summary-card">
   34 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #409eff;">
   35 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Monitor /></el-icon>
   36 │         </div>
   37 │         <div class="summary-info">
   38 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.total }}</div>
   39 │           <div class="summary-label">消防设备总数</div>
   40 │         </div>
   41 │       </div>
   42 │       <div class="summary-card">
   43 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #67c23a;">
   44 │           <el-icon :size="24"><CircleCheckFilled /></el-icon>
   45 │         </div>
   46 │         <div class="summary-info">
   47 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.normal }}</div>
   48 │           <div class="summary-label">正常设备</div>
   49 │         </div>
   50 │       </div>
   51 │       <div class="summary-card">
   52 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #f56c6c;">
   53 │           <el-icon :size="24"><WarningFilled /></el-icon>
   54 │         </div>
   55 │         <div class="summary-info">
   56 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.alarm }}</div>
   57 │           <div class="summary-label">告警设备</div>
   58 │         </div>
   59 │       </div>
   60 │       <div class="summary-card">
   61 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #e6a23c;">
   62 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Warning /></el-icon>
   63 │         </div>
   64 │         <div class="summary-info">
   65 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.fault }}</div>
   66 │           <div class="summary-label">故障设备</div>
   67 │         </div>
   68 │       </div>
   69 │     </div>
   70 │ 
   71 │     <div class="tabs-section">
   72 │       <el-tabs v-model="activeTab">
   73 │         <el-tab-pane label="设备列表" name="device">
   74 │           <div class="table-wrapper">
   75 │             <el-table :data="filteredData" border @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   76 │               <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   77 │               <el-table-column prop="id" label="设备ID" width="80" />
   78 │               <el-table-column prop="tunnelName" label="所属隧道" width="120" />
   79 │               <el-table-column prop="sectionName" label="所属路段" width="100" />
   80 │               <el-table-column prop="name" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
   81 │               <el-table-column prop="type" label="设备类型" width="120" />
   82 │               <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   83 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
   84 │                   <el-tag :type="getStatusType(row.status)" size="small">
   85 │                     {{ row.status }}
   86 │                   </el-tag>
   87 │                 </template>
   88 │               </el-table-column>
   89 │               <el-table-column prop="location" label="安装位置" width="150" />
   90 │               <el-table-column prop="lastCheck" label="最后检查" width="160" />
   91 │               <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
   92 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
   93 │                   <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleCheck(row)">检测</el-button>
   94 │                   <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
   95 │                 </template>
   96 │               </el-table-column>
   97 │             </el-table>
   98 │           </div>
   99 │         </el-tab-pane>
  100 │         <el-tab-pane label="告警记录" name="alarm">
  101 │           <el-table :data="alarmRecords" border>
  102 │             <el-table-column prop="time" label="告警时间" width="160" />
  103 │             <el-table-column prop="tunnelName" label="隧道名称" width="120" />
  104 │             <el-table-column prop="sectionName" label="路段" width="100" />
  105 │             <el-table-column prop="deviceName" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
  106 │             <el-table-column prop="deviceType" label="设备类型" width="120" />
  107 │             <el-table-column prop="alarmType" label="告警类型" width="120" />
  108 │             <el-table-column prop="level" label="级别" width="80">
  109 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  110 │                 <el-tag :type="row.level === '严重' ? 'danger' : 'warning'" size="small">
  111 │                   {{ row.level }}
  112 │                 </el-tag>
  113 │               </template>
  114 │             </el-table-column>
  115 │             <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="100">
  116 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  117 │                 <el-tag :type="row.status === '已处理' ? 'success' : 'info'" size="small">
  118 │                   {{ row.status }}
  119 │                 </el-tag>
  120 │               </template>
  121 │             </el-table-column>
  122 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
  123 │               <template #default="{ row }">
  124 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small">处理</el-button>
  125 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small">详情</el-button>
  126 │               </template>
  127 │             </el-table-column>
  128 │           </el-table>
  129 │         </el-tab-pane>
  130 │         <el-tab-pane label="联动配置" name="linkage">
  131 │           <div class="linkage-config">
  132 │             <div class="config-item">
  133 │               <div class="config-title">
  134 │                 <h4>烟雾报警联动</h4>
  135 │                 <el-switch v-model="linkageConfig.smoke.enabled" />
  136 │               </div>
  137 │               <div class="config-content">
  138 │                 <div class="config-row">
  139 │                   <span>触发条件：</span>
  140 │                   <el-select v-model="linkageConfig.smoke.condition" style="width: 200px;">
  141 │                     <el-option label="烟雾浓度超标" value="smoke" />
  142 │                     <el-option label="温感超标" value="temperature" />
  143 │                   </el-select>
  144 │                 </div>
  145 │                 <div class="config-row">
  146 │                   <span>执行动作：</span>
  147 │                   <el-checkbox-group v-model="linkageConfig.smoke.actions">
  148 │                     <el-checkbox label="开启应急照明">开启应急照明</el-checkbox>
  149 │                     <el-checkbox label="启动排烟风机">启动排烟风机</el-checkbox>
  150 │                     <el-checkbox label="关闭正常照明">关闭正常照明</el-checkbox>
  151 │                     <el-checkbox label="声光报警">声光报警</el-checkbox>
  152 │                     <el-checkbox label="通知监控中心">通知监控中心</el-checkbox>
  153 │                   </el-checkbox-group>
  154 │                 </div>
  155 │               </div>
  156 │             </div>
  157 │ 
  158 │             <div class="config-item">
  159 │               <div class="config-title">
  160 │                 <h4>温感报警联动</h4>
  161 │                 <el-switch v-model="linkageConfig.temperature.enabled" />
  162 │               </div>
  163 │               <div class="config-content">
  164 │                 <div class="config-row">
  165 │                   <span>触发条件：</span>
  166 │                   <el-input-number v-model="linkageConfig.temperature.threshold" :min="0" :max="100" /> ℃
  167 │                 </div>
  168 │                 <div class="config-row">
  169 │                   <span>执行动作：</span>
  170 │                   <el-checkbox-group v-model="linkageConfig.temperature.actions">
  171 │                     <el-checkbox label="开启应急照明">开启应急照明</el-checkbox>
  172 │                     <el-checkbox label="启动排烟风机">启动排烟风机</el-checkbox>
  173 │                     <el-checkbox label="关闭正常照明">关闭正常照明</el-checkbox>
  174 │                     <el-checkbox label="启动喷淋">启动喷淋</el-checkbox>
  175 │                     <el-checkbox label="通知消防部门">通知消防部门</el-checkbox>
  176 │                   </el-checkbox-group>
  177 │                 </div>
  178 │               </div>
  179 │             </div>
  180 │ 
  181 │             <div class="config-actions">
  182 │               <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSaveLinkage">保存配置</el-button>
  183 │               <el-button @click="handleResetLinkage">重置</el-button>
  184 │             </div>
  185 │           </div>
  186 │         </el-tab-pane>
  187 │       </el-tabs>
  188 │     </div>
  189 │ 
  190 │     <div class="pagination">
  191 │       <el-pagination
  192 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  193 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  194 │         :total="total"
  195 │         layout="total, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  196 │       />
  197 │     </div>
  198 │   </div>
  199 │ </template>
  200 │ 
  201 │ <script setup>
  202 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  203 │ import { Monitor, CircleCheckFilled, WarningFilled, Warning } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  204 │ 
  205 │ const filterTunnel = ref('')
  206 │ const filterType = ref('')
  207 │ const filterStatus = ref('')
  208 │ const activeTab = ref('device')
  209 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  210 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  211 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  212 │ 
  213 │ const summary = ref({
  214 │   total: 86,
  215 │   normal: 82,
  216 │   alarm: 2,
  217 │   fault: 2
  218 │ })
  219 │ 
  220 │ const linkageConfig = ref({
  221 │   smoke: {
  222 │     enabled: true,
  223 │     condition: 'smoke',
  224 │     actions: ['开启应急照明', '启动排烟风机', '通知监控中心']
  225 │   },
  226 │   temperature: {
  227 │     enabled: true,
  228 │     threshold: 60,
  229 │     actions: ['开启应急照明', '启动排烟风机', '通知消防部门']
  230 │   }
  231 │ })
  232 │ 
  233 │ const fireDevices = ref([
  234 │   { id: 1, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', name: '烟雾探测器-001', type: '烟雾探测器', status: '正常', location: '左侧壁', lastCheck: '2024-05-18 10:30' },
  235 │   { id: 2, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', name: '温感探测器-001', type: '温感探测器', status: '告警', location: '顶部', lastCheck: '2024-05-18 10:25' },
  236 │   { id: 3, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', name: '手动报警按钮-001', type: '手动报警按钮', status: '正常', location: '右侧壁', lastCheck: '2024-05-18 10:20' },
  237 │   { id: 4, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '过渡段', name: '烟雾探测器-002', type: '烟雾探测器', status: '故障', location: '左侧壁', lastCheck: '2024-05-18 09:15' },
  238 │   { id: 5, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', name: '消防栓-001', type: '消防栓', status: '正常', location: '右侧壁', lastCheck: '2024-05-18 10:15' }
  239 │ ])
  240 │ 
  241 │ const alarmRecords = ref([
  242 │   { time: '2024-05-18 10:25:30', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', deviceName: '温感探测器-001', deviceType: '温感探测器', alarmType: '温度超标', level: '严重', status: '处理中' },
  243 │   { time: '2024-05-17 22:30:15', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', deviceName: '手动报警按钮-002', deviceType: '手动报警按钮', alarmType: '人为触发', level: '一般', status: '已处理' },
  244 │   { time: '2024-05-17 15:45:20', tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '过渡段', deviceName: '烟雾探测器-001', deviceType: '烟雾探测器', alarmType: '设备故障', level: '一般', status: '已处理' }
  245 │ ])
  246 │ 
  247 │ const total = computed(() => filteredData.value.length)
  248 │ 
  249 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  250 │   let result = fireDevices.value
  251 │   if (filterTunnel.value) {
  252 │     result = result.filter(item => item.tunnelName === filterTunnel.value)
  253 │   }
  254 │   if (filterType.value) {
  255 │     result = result.filter(item => item.type === filterType.value)
  256 │   }
  257 │   if (filterStatus.value) {
  258 │     result = result.filter(item => item.status === filterStatus.value)
  259 │   }
  260 │   return result
  261 │ })
  262 │ 
  263 │ const getStatusType = (status) => {
  264 │   switch (status) {
  265 │     case '正常':
  266 │       return 'success'
  267 │     case '告警':
  268 │       return 'danger'
  269 │     case '故障':
  270 │       return 'warning'
  271 │     default:
  272 │       return ''
  273 │   }
  274 │ }
  275 │ 
  276 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  277 │   currentPage.value = 1
  278 │ }
  279 │ 
  280 │ const handleReset = () => {
  281 │   filterTunnel.value = ''
  282 │   filterType.value = ''
  283 │   filterStatus.value = ''
  284 │   currentPage.value = 1
  285 │ }
  286 │ 
  287 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  288 │   selectedRows.value = val
  289 │ }
  290 │ 
  291 │ const handleCheck = (row) => {
  292 │   console.log('Check device:', row)
  293 │ }
  294 │ 
  295 │ const handleDetail = (row) => {
  296 │   console.log('View detail:', row)
  297 │ }
  298 │ 
  299 │ const handleRefresh = () => {
  300 │   console.log('Refresh status')
  301 │ }
  302 │ 
  303 │ const handleSaveLinkage = () => {
  304 │   console.log('Save linkage config:', linkageConfig.value)
  305 │ }
  306 │ 
  307 │ const handleResetLinkage = () => {
  308 │   linkageConfig.value = {
  309 │     smoke: {
  310 │       enabled: true,
  311 │       condition: 'smoke',
  312 │       actions: []
  313 │     },
  314 │     temperature: {
  315 │       enabled: true,
  316 │       threshold: 60,
  317 │       actions: []
  318 │     }
  319 │   }
  320 │ }
  321 │ </script>
  322 │

  375 │ .summary-icon {

  378 │   border-radius: 10px;
  379 │   display: flex;
  380 │   align-items: center;

  382 │   color: #ffffff;
  383 │ }
  384 │ 
  385 │ .summary-info {
  386 │   flex: 1;
  387 │ }
  388 │ 
  389 │ .summary-value {
  390 │   font-size: 28px;
  391 │   font-weight: 600;
  392 │   color: #333;
  393 │ }
  394 │ 
  395 │ .summary-label {
  396 │   font-size: 14px;
  397 │   color: #666;
  398 │   margin-top: 4px;
  399 │ }
  400 │ 
  401 │ .tabs-section {
  402 │   background: #ffffff;
  403 │   border-radius: 8px;
  404 │   padding: 20px;
  405 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  406 │ }

  408 │ .table-wrapper {
  409 │   margin-top: 20px;

  412 │ .linkage-config {
  413 │   margin-top: 20px;

  416 │ .config-item {
  417 │   border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  418 │   border-radius: 8px;
  419 │   padding: 20px;
  420 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  421 │ }
  422 │ 
  423 │ .config-title {
  424 │   display: flex;
  425 │   justify-content: space-between;
  426 │   align-items: center;
  427 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  428 │   padding-bottom: 15px;
  429 │   border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  430 │ }
  431 │ 
  432 │ .config-title h4 {
  433 │   margin: 0;
  434 │   font-size: 16px;
  435 │   font-weight: 600;
  436 │   color: #333;
  437 │ }
  438 │ 
  439 │ .config-content {

📄 views/tunnel/FittingManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="fitting-manage">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>灯具管理</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增灯具</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger">批量删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterProduct" placeholder="请选择所属产品" style="width: 180px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="PLC灯控" value="PLC灯控" />
   14 │         <el-option label="隧道485灯控" value="隧道485灯控" />
   15 │       </el-select>
   16 │       <el-input v-model="searchText" placeholder="请输入IMEI号或名称" style="width: 250px;" clearable />
   17 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   18 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   19 │     </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   22 │       <el-table :data="fittingData" border>
   23 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   24 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   25 │         <el-table-column prop="product" label="所属产品" width="140" />
   26 │         <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" width="140" />
   27 │         <el-table-column prop="controllerName" label="灯控名称" width="150" />
   28 │         <el-table-column prop="lightName" label="灯具名称" width="150" />
   29 │         <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="100" />
   30 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="120">
   31 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   32 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   33 │           </template>
   34 │         </el-table-column>
   35 │       </el-table>
   36 │     </div>
   37 │ 
   38 │     <div class="pagination">
   39 │       <el-pagination
   40 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   41 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   42 │         :total="total"
   43 │         layout="prev, pager, next, jumper"
   44 │         :page-sizes="[15, 30, 50]"
   45 │       />
   46 │       <span style="margin-left: 20px;">每页显示</span>
   47 │       <el-select v-model="pageSize" style="width: 80px; margin: 0 5px;">
   48 │         <el-option :value="15" label="15" />
   49 │         <el-option :value="30" label="30" />
   50 │         <el-option :value="50" label="50" />
   51 │       </el-select>
   52 │       <span>条 共 {{ total }} 条</span>
   53 │     </div>
   54 │ 
   55 │     <el-dialog title="编辑灯具" v-model="showDialog" width="400px">
   56 │       <div class="dialog-section">
   57 │         <span class="section-title">灯具信息</span>
   58 │         <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   59 │           <el-row :gutter="20">
   60 │             <el-col :span="12">
   61 │               <el-form-item label="*灯具名称" required>
   62 │                 <el-input v-model="formData.lightName" />
   63 │               </el-form-item>
   64 │             </el-col>
   65 │             <el-col :span="12">
   66 │               <el-form-item label="额定功率">
   67 │                 <el-input v-model="formData.power" style="width: 120px;" />
   68 │                 <span style="margin-left: 10px;">W</span>
   69 │               </el-form-item>
   70 │             </el-col>
   71 │           </el-row>
   72 │         </el-form>
   73 │       </div>
   74 │       <template #footer>
   75 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
   76 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">确定</el-button>
   77 │       </template>
   78 │     </el-dialog>
   79 │   </div>
   80 │ </template>
   81 │ 
   82 │ <script setup>
   83 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   84 │ 
   85 │ const filterProduct = ref('')
   86 │ const searchText = ref('')
   87 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
   88 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
   89 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
   90 │ 
   91 │ const formData = ref({
   92 │   lightName: '',
   93 │   power: ''
   94 │ })
   95 │ 
   96 │ const fittingData = ref([
   97 │   { id: 1, product: 'PLC灯控', imei: '1C1334124028', controllerName: '线性隧道灯', lightName: '线性隧道灯', brightness: 20 },
   98 │   { id: 2, product: '隧道485灯控', imei: '1C133413190B', controllerName: '高速隧道灯', lightName: '高速隧道灯', brightness: 100 }
   99 │ ])
  100 │ 
  101 │ const total = computed(() => fittingData.value.length)
  102 │ 
  103 │ const handleSearch = () => { currentPage.value = 1 }
  104 │ const handleReset = () => { filterProduct.value = ''; searchText.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1 }
  105 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  106 │   formData.value = { lightName: '', power: '' }
  107 │   showDialog.value = true
  108 │ }
  109 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  110 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  111 │   showDialog.value = true
  112 │ }
  113 │ const handleSave = () => {
  114 │   showDialog.value = false
  115 │ }
  116 │ </script>
  117 │ 
  118 │ <style scoped>
  119 │ .fitting-manage {
  120 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  121 │   min-height: 100%;
  122 │   padding: 20px;
  123 │ }
  124 │ 
  125 │ .page-header {
  126 │   display: flex;
  127 │   justify-content: space-between;
  128 │   align-items: center;
  129 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  130 │ }
  131 │ 
  132 │ .page-header h2 {
  133 │   margin: 0;
  134 │   font-size: 24px;
  135 │   font-weight: 600;
  136 │   color: #333;
  137 │ }
  138 │ 
  139 │ .header-actions {
  140 │   display: flex;
  141 │   gap: 10px;
  142 │ }
  143 │ 
  144 │ .filter-bar {
  145 │   background: #ffffff;
  146 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  147 │   border-radius: 8px;
  148 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  149 │   display: flex;
  150 │   gap: 15px;
  151 │   align-items: center;
  152 │ }
  153 │ 
  154 │ .table-wrapper {
  155 │   background: #ffffff;
  156 │   border-radius: 8px;
  157 │   padding: 20px;
  158 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  159 │ }
  160 │ 
  161 │ .pagination {
  162 │   display: flex;
  163 │   justify-content: flex-end;
  164 │   align-items: center;
  165 │   background: #ffffff;
  166 │   padding: 20px;
  167 │   border-radius: 8px;
  168 │ }
  169 │ 
  170 │ .dialog-section {
  171 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  172 │ }
  173 │ 
  174 │ .section-title {
  175 │   font-weight: 600;
  176 │   color: #409eff;
  177 │   display: block;
  178 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  179 │ }
  180 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/LampManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="lamp-manage">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>隧道灯管理</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="text" @click="handleDimming">调光</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    8 │         <el-button type="primary">批量导入</el-button>
    9 │         <el-button type="danger">删除</el-button>
   10 │       </div>
   11 │     </div>
   12 │ 
   13 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   14 │       <el-select v-model="filterProduct" placeholder="请选择所属产品" style="width: 180px;" clearable>
   15 │         <el-option label="PLC灯控" value="PLC灯控" />
   16 │         <el-option label="隧道485灯控" value="隧道485灯控" />
   17 │       </el-select>
   18 │       <el-select v-model="filterStatus" placeholder="请选择网络状态" style="width: 180px;" clearable>
   19 │         <el-option label="在线" value="在线" />
   20 │         <el-option label="离线" value="离线" />
   21 │       </el-select>
   22 │       <el-input v-model="searchText" placeholder="请输入IMEI号或名称" style="width: 250px;" clearable />
   23 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   24 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   25 │     </div>
   26 │ 
   27 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   28 │       <el-table :data="lampData" border @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   29 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   30 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   31 │         <el-table-column prop="product" label="所属产品" width="140" />
   32 │         <el-table-column prop="imei" label="IMEI号" width="140" />
   33 │         <el-table-column prop="controllerName" label="灯控名称" width="150" />
   34 │         <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="亮度(%)" width="150">
   35 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   36 │             <el-slider v-model="row.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" :disabled="row.status === '离线'" style="width: 100px;" />
   37 │             <span style="margin-left: 10px;">{{ row.brightness }}%</span>
   38 │           </template>
   39 │         </el-table-column>
   40 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="网络状态" width="100">
   41 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   42 │             <el-tag :type="row.status === '在线' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
   43 │           </template>
   44 │         </el-table-column>
   45 │         <el-table-column prop="lastOnline" label="最后在线时间" width="180" />
   46 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="200">
   47 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   48 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   49 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleDetail(row)">详情</el-button>
   50 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   51 │           </template>
   52 │         </el-table-column>
   53 │       </el-table>
   54 │     </div>
   55 │ 
   56 │     <div class="pagination">
   57 │       <el-pagination
   58 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   59 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   60 │         :total="total"
   61 │         layout="prev, pager, next, jumper"
   62 │       />
   63 │       <span style="margin-left: 20px;">上一页</span>
   64 │       <el-select v-model="currentPage" style="width: 80px; margin: 0 5px;">
   65 │         <el-option :value="1" label="1" />
   66 │       </el-select>
   67 │       <span>下一页</span>
   68 │       <span style="margin: 0 10px;">前往</span>
   69 │       <el-input-number v-model="currentPage" :min="1" :max="1" style="width: 80px;" />
   70 │       <span style="margin: 0 5px;">页</span>
   71 │       <span>每页显示</span>
   72 │       <el-select v-model="pageSize" style="width: 80px; margin: 0 5px;">
   73 │         <el-option :value="15" label="15" />
   74 │         <el-option :value="30" label="30" />
   75 │         <el-option :value="50" label="50" />
   76 │       </el-select>
   77 │       <span>条 共 {{ total }} 条</span>
   78 │     </div>

   80 │     <el-dialog title="新增灯控" v-model="showAddDialog" width="600px">
   81 │       <el-form :model="addForm" label-width="100px">
   82 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   83 │           <el-col :span="12">
   84 │             <el-form-item label="*所属产品" required>
   85 │               <el-select v-model="addForm.product">
   86 │                 <el-option label="PLC灯控" value="PLC灯控" />
   87 │                 <el-option label="隧道485灯控" value="隧道485灯控" />
   88 │               </el-select>
   89 │             </el-form-item>
   90 │           </el-col>
   91 │           <el-col :span="12">

   94 │             </el-form-item>
   95 │           </el-col>
   96 │         </el-row>
   97 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
   98 │           <el-col :span="12">
   99 │             <el-form-item label="*灯控名称" required>
  100 │               <el-input v-model="addForm.controllerName" placeholder="请输入灯控名称" />
  101 │             </el-form-item>
  102 │           </el-col>
  103 │           <el-col :span="12">
  104 │             <el-form-item label="绑定回路">
  105 │               <el-select v-model="addForm.circuit" placeholder="请选择">
  106 │                 <el-option label="展厅配电柜/隧道线型灯供电(开)" value="展厅配电柜/隧道线型灯供电(开)" />
  107 │               </el-select>
  108 │             </el-form-item>
  109 │           </el-col>
  110 │         </el-row>
  111 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  112 │           <el-col :span="12">
  113 │             <el-form-item label="*所属层级" required>
  114 │               <el-select v-model="addForm.level">

  116 │               </el-select>
  117 │             </el-form-item>
  118 │           </el-col>
  119 │           <el-col :span="12">

  123 │                 <el-option label="双路" value="双路" />
  124 │               </el-select>
  125 │             </el-form-item>
  126 │           </el-col>

  128 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  129 │           <el-col :span="12">
  130 │             <el-form-item label="*照明级别" required>
  131 │               <el-select v-model="addForm.lightingLevel">
  132 │                 <el-option label="基本照明" value="基本照明" />
  133 │                 <el-option label="加强照明" value="加强照明" />
  134 │               </el-select>
  135 │             </el-form-item>
  136 │           </el-col>
  137 │           <el-col :span="12">
  138 │             <el-form-item label="*调光类型" required>
  139 │               <el-radio-group v-model="addForm.dimmingType">
  140 │                 <el-radio label="正向" value="正向" />
  141 │                 <el-radio label="逆向" value="逆向" />
  142 │               </el-radio-group>
  143 │             </el-form-item>
  144 │           </el-col>
  145 │         </el-row>

  243 │     <el-dialog title="调光" v-model="showDimmingDialog" width="500px">
  244 │       <el-form :model="dimmingForm" label-width="100px">
  245 │         <el-form-item label="亮度(%)">
  246 │           <el-slider v-model="dimmingForm.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" style="width: 300px;" />
  247 │           <el-input-number v-model="dimmingForm.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" style="width: 80px;" />
  248 │         </el-form-item>
  249 │         <el-form-item label="预设">
  250 │           <el-button size="small" @click="dimmingForm.brightness = 25">25%</el-button>
  251 │           <el-button size="small" @click="dimmingForm.brightness = 50">50%</el-button>
  252 │           <el-button size="small" @click="dimmingForm.brightness = 75">75%</el-button>
  253 │           <el-button size="small" @click="dimmingForm.brightness = 100">100%</el-button>
  254 │         </el-form-item>
  255 │       </el-form>
  256 │       <template #footer>
  257 │         <el-button @click="showDimmingDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  258 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSaveDimming">确定</el-button>
  259 │       </template>
  260 │     </el-dialog>
  261 │ 
  262 │     <el-dialog title="灯控详情" v-model="showDetailDialog" width="600px">
  263 │       <el-tabs v-model="detailTab" type="card">
  264 │         <el-tab-pane label="基本信息" name="basic">
  265 │           <div class="detail-content">
  266 │             <div class="detail-row">
  267 │               <span class="detail-label">所属产品：</span>
  268 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.product }}</span>
  269 │               <span class="detail-label">IMEI号：</span>
  270 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.imei }}</span>
  271 │               <span class="detail-label">灯控名称：</span>
  272 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.controllerName }}</span>
  273 │             </div>
  274 │             <div class="detail-row">
  275 │               <span class="detail-label">所属层级：</span>
  276 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.level }}</span>
  277 │               <span class="detail-label">回路数：</span>
  278 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.circuitCount }}</span>
  279 │             </div>
  280 │             <div class="detail-row">
  281 │               <span class="detail-label">调光类型：</span>
  282 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.dimmingType }}</span>
  283 │               <span class="detail-label">项目经纬度：</span>
  284 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.latLng }}</span>
  285 │               <el-button type="text" size="small">同步</el-button>
  286 │               <span class="detail-label">灯控经纬度：</span>
  287 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.deviceLatLng }}</span>
  288 │               <el-button type="text" size="small">回读</el-button>
  289 │             </div>
  290 │             <div class="detail-row">
  291 │               <span class="detail-label">数据上报周期：</span>
  292 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.reportCycle }}</span>
  293 │               <span class="detail-label">绑定线路：</span>
  294 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.line }}</span>
  295 │             </div>
  296 │             <div class="detail-row">
  297 │               <span class="detail-label">所属集控：</span>
  298 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.centralControl }}</span>
  299 │             </div>
  300 │           </div>
  301 │         </el-tab-pane>
  302 │         <el-tab-pane label="上传信息" name="upload">
  303 │           <div class="detail-content">
  304 │             <div class="detail-row">
  305 │               <span class="detail-label">数据上报时间：</span>
  306 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.reportTime }}</span>
  307 │               <span class="detail-label">网络状态：</span>
  308 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.status }}</span>
  309 │               <span class="detail-label">最后在线时间：</span>
  310 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.lastOnline }}</span>
  311 │             </div>
  312 │             <div class="detail-row">
  313 │               <span class="detail-label">电压(V)：</span>
  314 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.voltage }}</span>
  315 │               <span class="detail-label">能耗(kwh)：</span>
  316 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.energy }}</span>
  317 │               <span class="detail-label">温度(℃)：</span>
  318 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.temperature }}</span>
  319 │             </div>
  320 │             <div class="detail-row">
  321 │               <span class="detail-label">电压(V)：</span>
  322 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.voltage }}</span>
  323 │               <span class="detail-label">能耗(kwh)：</span>
  324 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.energy }}</span>
  325 │             </div>
  326 │             <div class="detail-row">
  327 │               <span class="detail-label">硬件版本：</span>
  328 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.hardwareVersion }}</span>
  329 │               <span class="detail-label">固件版本：</span>
  330 │               <span class="detail-value">{{ detailForm.firmwareVersion }}</span>
  331 │             </div>
  332 │           </div>
  333 │         </el-tab-pane>
  334 │       </el-tabs>
  335 │       <template #footer>
  336 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="showDetailDialog = false">确定</el-button>
  337 │       </template>
  338 │     </el-dialog>
  339 │   </div>
  340 │ </template>
  341 │ 
  342 │ <script setup>
  343 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  344 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  345 │ 
  346 │ const filterProduct = ref('')
  347 │ const filterStatus = ref('')
  348 │ const searchText = ref('')
  349 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  350 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  351 │ const showAddDialog = ref(false)
  352 │ const showEditDialog = ref(false)
  353 │ const showDetailDialog = ref(false)
  354 │ const detailTab = ref('basic')
  355 │ 
  356 │ const addForm = ref({
  357 │   product: '',
  358 │   imei: '',
  359 │   controllerName: '',
  360 │   circuit: '',
  361 │   level: '',
  362 │   circuitCount: '',
  363 │   lightingLevel: '',
  364 │   dimmingType: '正向',
  365 │   lightName: '',
  366 │   power: ''
  367 │ })
  368 │ 
  369 │ const editForm = ref({
  370 │   product: '',
  371 │   imei: '',
  372 │   controllerName: '',
  373 │   circuit: '',
  374 │   level: '',
  375 │   circuitCount: '',
  376 │   lightingLevel: '',
  377 │   dimmingType: '正向'
  378 │ })
  379 │ 
  380 │ const detailForm = ref({
  381 │   product: '',
  382 │   imei: '',
  383 │   controllerName: '',
  384 │   level: '',
  385 │   circuitCount: '',
  386 │   dimmingType: '',
  387 │   latLng: '',
  388 │   deviceLatLng: '',
  389 │   reportCycle: '',
  390 │   line: '',
  391 │   centralControl: '',
  392 │   reportTime: '',
  393 │   status: '',
  394 │   lastOnline: '',
  395 │   voltage: '',
  396 │   energy: '',
  397 │   temperature: '',
  398 │   hardwareVersion: '',
  399 │   firmwareVersion: ''
  400 │ })
  401 │ 
  402 │ const lampData = ref([
  403 │   { id: 1, product: 'PLC灯控', imei: '1C1334124028', controllerName: '线性隧道灯', brightness: 20, status: '在线', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:00:47' },
  404 │   { id: 2, product: 'PLC灯控', imei: '1C1334124028', controllerName: '线性隧道灯', brightness: 20, status: '在线', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 13:37:40' },
  405 │   { id: 3, product: '隧道485灯控', imei: '1C133413190B', controllerName: '高速隧道灯', brightness: 100, status: '在线', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 13:37:40' }
  406 │ ])
  407 │ 
  408 │ const total = computed(() => lampData.value.length)
  409 │ 
  410 │ const selectedLamps = ref([])
  411 │ const showDimmingDialog = ref(false)
  412 │ const dimmingForm = ref({
  413 │   brightness: 50
  414 │ })
  415 │ 
  416 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  417 │   selectedLamps.value = val.map(item => item.id)
  418 │ }
  419 │ 
  420 │ const handleDimming = () => {
  421 │   if (selectedLamps.value.length === 0) {
  422 │     ElMessage.warning('请先选择要调光的灯具')
  423 │     return
  424 │   }
  425 │   dimmingForm.value.brightness = 50
  426 │   showDimmingDialog.value = true
  427 │ }
  428 │ 
  429 │ const handleSaveDimming = () => {
  430 │   selectedLamps.value.forEach(id => {
  431 │     const lamp = lampData.value.find(item => item.id === id)
  432 │     if (lamp) {
  433 │       lamp.brightness = dimmingForm.value.brightness
  434 │     }
  435 │   })
  436 │   ElMessage.success('调光成功')
  437 │   showDimmingDialog.value = false
  438 │   selectedLamps.value = []
  439 │ }
  440 │ const handleSearch = () => { currentPage.value = 1 }
  441 │ const handleReset = () => { filterProduct.value = ''; filterStatus.value = ''; searchText.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1 }
  442 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  443 │   addForm.value = {
  444 │     product: '',
  445 │     imei: '',
  446 │     controllerName: '',
  447 │     circuit: '',
  448 │     level: '',
  449 │     circuitCount: '',
  450 │     lightingLevel: '',
  451 │     dimmingType: '正向',
  452 │     lightName: '',
  453 │     power: ''
  454 │   }
  455 │   showAddDialog.value = true
  456 │ }
  457 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  458 │   editForm.value = {
  459 │     product: row.product,
  460 │     imei: row.imei,
  461 │     controllerName: row.controllerName,
  462 │     circuit: '',
  463 │     level: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道',
  464 │     circuitCount: '单路',
  465 │     lightingLevel: '基本照明',
  466 │     dimmingType: '正向'
  467 │   }
  468 │   showEditDialog.value = true
  469 │ }
  470 │ const handleDetail = (row) => {
  471 │   detailForm.value = {
  472 │     product: row.product,
  473 │     imei: row.imei,
  474 │     controllerName: row.controllerName,
  475 │     level: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道',
  476 │     circuitCount: '单路',
  477 │     dimmingType: '正向',
  478 │     latLng: '22.735108,113.930463',
  479 │     deviceLatLng: '0,0',
  480 │     reportCycle: '-',
  481 │     line: '展厅配电柜-隧道线型灯供电(开)',
  482 │     centralControl: '梅溪湖隧道集控',
  483 │     reportTime: '2026-04-28 12:01',
  484 │     status: '在线',
  485 │     lastOnline: row.lastOnline,
  486 │     voltage: '232.8',
  487 │     energy: '0',
  488 │     temperature: '33',
  489 │     hardwareVersion: '0.0',
  490 │     firmwareVersion: '15020'
  491 │   }
  492 │   showDetailDialog.value = true
  493 │ }
  494 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {}
  495 │ const handleAddSave = () => {
  496 │   showAddDialog.value = false
  497 │ }
  498 │ const handleEditSave = () => {
  499 │   showEditDialog.value = false
  500 │ }
  501 │ </script>
  502 │

  504 │ .lamp-manage {
  505 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  506 │   min-height: 100%;

  508 │ }

  520 │   font-weight: 600;
  521 │   color: #333;
  522 │ }

  524 │ .header-actions {

  553 │ }

  556 │   margin-top: 20px;
  557 │ }

  560 │   font-weight: 600;

  562 │   display: block;
  563 │   margin-bottom: 15px;

  568 │ }
  569 │

  574 │ }

  579 │   min-width: 100px;
  580 │ }

    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="lighting-control">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>隧道照明</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger">批量删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <el-tabs v-model="activeTab" type="card" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
   12 │       <el-tab-pane label="调光控制" name="dimming">
   13 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   14 │           <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="展厅隧道" style="width: 150px;">
   15 │             <el-option label="展厅隧道" value="展厅隧道" />
   16 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   17 │           </el-select>
   18 │           <el-select v-model="filterHole" placeholder="展厅隧道洞" style="width: 150px;">
   19 │             <el-option label="展厅隧道洞" value="展厅隧道洞" />
   20 │           </el-select>
   21 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   22 │         </div>
   23 │ 
   24 │         <div class="table-wrapper">
   25 │           <el-table :data="dimmingData" border>
   26 │             <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   27 │             <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   28 │             <el-table-column prop="sectionType" label="分段-照明类型" min-width="150" />
   29 │             <el-table-column prop="dawn" label="凌晨" width="80">
   30 │               <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.dawn || '-' }}</template>
   31 │             </el-table-column>
   32 │             <el-table-column prop="day" label="白天" width="80">
   33 │               <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.day || '-' }}</template>
   34 │             </el-table-column>
   35 │             <el-table-column prop="dusk" label="傍晚" width="80">
   36 │               <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.dusk || '-' }}</template>
   37 │             </el-table-column>
   38 │             <el-table-column prop="night" label="夜间" width="80">
   39 │               <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.night || '-' }}</template>
   40 │             </el-table-column>
   41 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
   42 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   43 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEditDimming(row)">修改</el-button>
   44 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDeleteDimming(row)">删除</el-button>
   45 │               </template>
   46 │             </el-table-column>
   47 │           </el-table>
   48 │         </div>
   49 │       </el-tab-pane>
   50 │ 
   51 │       <el-tab-pane label="回路控制" name="circuit">
   52 │         <div class="filter-bar">
   53 │           <el-select v-model="circuitFilter" placeholder="选择回路" style="width: 200px;">
   54 │             <el-option label="全部回路" value="" />
   55 │             <el-option label="回路1" value="1" />
   56 │             <el-option label="回路2" value="2" />
   57 │           </el-select>
   58 │           <el-button type="primary" @click="handleCircuitSearch">查询</el-button>
   59 │         </div>
   60 │ 
   61 │         <div class="table-wrapper">
   62 │           <el-table :data="circuitData" border>
   63 │             <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   64 │             <el-table-column prop="id" label="回路编号" width="100" />
   65 │             <el-table-column prop="name" label="回路名称" width="120" />
   66 │             <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   67 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   68 │                 <el-tag :type="row.status === '正常' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
   69 │               </template>
   70 │             </el-table-column>
   71 │             <el-table-column prop="load" label="负载率" width="100">
   72 │               <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.load }}%</template>
   73 │             </el-table-column>
   74 │             <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(kW)" width="100" />
   75 │             <el-table-column prop="devices" label="关联设备" width="100" />
   76 │             <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
   77 │               <template #default="{ row }">
   78 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleCircuitControl(row)">控制</el-button>
   79 │                 <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDeleteCircuit(row)">删除</el-button>
   80 │               </template>
   81 │             </el-table-column>
   82 │           </el-table>
   83 │         </div>
   84 │       </el-tab-pane>
   85 │     </el-tabs>
   86 │ 
   87 │     <el-dialog title="回路调光" v-model="showCircuitControlDialog" width="500px">
   88 │       <el-form :model="circuitControlForm" label-width="100px">
   89 │         <el-form-item label="回路名称">
   90 │           <span>{{ circuitControlForm.name }}</span>
   91 │         </el-form-item>
   92 │         <el-form-item label="亮度(%)">
   93 │           <el-slider v-model="circuitControlForm.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" style="width: 300px;" />
   94 │           <el-input-number v-model="circuitControlForm.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" style="width: 80px;" />
   95 │         </el-form-item>
   96 │         <el-form-item label="预设">
   97 │           <el-button size="small" @click="circuitControlForm.brightness = 0">0%</el-button>
   98 │           <el-button size="small" @click="circuitControlForm.brightness = 25">25%</el-button>
   99 │           <el-button size="small" @click="circuitControlForm.brightness = 50">50%</el-button>
  100 │           <el-button size="small" @click="circuitControlForm.brightness = 75">75%</el-button>
  101 │           <el-button size="small" @click="circuitControlForm.brightness = 100">100%</el-button>
  102 │         </el-form-item>
  103 │       </el-form>
  104 │       <template #footer>
  105 │         <el-button @click="showCircuitControlDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  106 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSaveCircuitControl">确定</el-button>
  107 │       </template>
  108 │     </el-dialog>
  109 │ 
  110 │     <el-dialog title="修改" v-model="showDimmingDialog" width="500px">
  111 │       <el-form :model="dimmingForm" label-width="100px">
  112 │         <el-row :gutter="20">
  113 │           <el-col :span="12">
  114 │             <el-form-item label="分段类型">
  115 │               <el-select v-model="dimmingForm.sectionType">
  116 │                 <el-option label="入口段" value="入口段" />
  117 │                 <el-option label="基本段" value="基本段" />
  118 │                 <el-option label="出口段" value="出口段" />
  119 │               </el-select>
  120 │             </el-form-item>
  121 │           </el-col>

  123 │             <el-form-item label="分段名称">
  124 │               <el-select v-model="dimmingForm.sectionName" placeholder="请选择">

  133 │           <el-col :span="12">
  134 │             <el-form-item label="*照明级别" required>
  135 │               <el-select v-model="dimmingForm.lightingLevel">
  136 │                 <el-option label="基本照明" value="基本照明" />
  137 │                 <el-option label="加强照明" value="加强照明" />

  146 │                 <el-option label="时序" value="时序" />
  147 │                 <el-option label="手动" value="手动" />
  148 │               </el-select>

  174 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" style="margin-left: 20px;">+</el-button>
