  199 │ 
  200 │ <script setup>
  201 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
  202 │ import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus'
  203 │ 
  204 │ const activeTab = ref('dimming')
  205 │ const filterTunnel = ref('展厅隧道')
  206 │ const filterHole = ref('展厅隧道洞')
  207 │ const circuitFilter = ref('')
  208 │ const showDimmingDialog = ref(false)
  209 │ 
  210 │ const dimmingForm = ref({
  211 │   sectionType: '入口段',
  212 │   sectionName: '',
  213 │   lightingLevel: '基本照明',
  214 │   executeMode: '光感',
  215 │   sensorType: '光照度传感器',
  216 │   enabled: true,
  217 │   illuminance1: 2500,
  218 │   illuminance2: 25000,
  219 │   dimmingValue: 50,
  220 │   dimmingEnabled: true
  221 │ })
  222 │ 
  223 │ const dimmingData = ref([
  224 │   { id: 1, sectionType: '入口段-基本照明', dawn: '-', day: '-', dusk: '-', night: '-', status: '未配置' },
  225 │   { id: 2, sectionType: '入口段-全部', dawn: '-', day: '-', dusk: '-', night: '-', status: '未配置' },
  226 │   { id: 3, sectionType: '基本段-基本照明', dawn: '10%', day: '30%', dusk: '20%', night: '15%', status: '已配置' }
  227 │ ])
  228 │ 
  229 │ const circuitData = ref([
  230 │   { id: 'HL-001', name: '照明回路1', status: '正常', load: 65, power: 12.5, devices: 24 },
  231 │   { id: 'HL-002', name: '照明回路2', status: '正常', load: 45, power: 8.8, devices: 18 },
  232 │   { id: 'HL-003', name: '照明回路3', status: '故障', load: 0, power: 0, devices: 20 },
  233 │   { id: 'HL-004', name: '应急回路', status: '正常', load: 30, power: 5.2, devices: 10 }
  234 │ ])
  235 │ 
  236 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  237 │   console.log('Search:', filterTunnel.value, filterHole.value)
  238 │ }
  239 │ 
  240 │ const handleCircuitSearch = () => {
  241 │   console.log('Circuit search:', circuitFilter.value)
  242 │ }
  243 │ 
  244 │ const handleEditDimming = (row) => {
  245 │   dimmingForm.value.sectionType = row.sectionType.split('-')[0] || '入口段'
  246 │   dimmingForm.value.sectionName = row.sectionType
  247 │   showDimmingDialog.value = true
  248 │ }
  249 │ 
  250 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  251 │   dimmingForm.value = {
  252 │     sectionType: '入口段',
  253 │     sectionName: '',
  254 │     lightingLevel: '基本照明',
  255 │     executeMode: '光感',
  256 │     sensorType: '光照度传感器',
  257 │     enabled: true,
  258 │     illuminance1: 2500,
  259 │     illuminance2: 25000,
  260 │     dimmingValue: 50,
  261 │     dimmingEnabled: true
  262 │   }
  263 │   showDimmingDialog.value = true
  264 │ }
  265 │ 
  266 │ const handleDeleteDimming = (row) => {
  267 │   console.log('Delete dimming:', row)
  268 │ }
  269 │ 
  270 │ const showCircuitControlDialog = ref(false)
  271 │ const circuitControlForm = ref({
  272 │   id: '',
  273 │   name: '',
  274 │   brightness: 50
  275 │ })
  276 │ 
  277 │ const handleCircuitControl = (row) => {
  278 │   circuitControlForm.value = {
  279 │     id: row.id,
  280 │     name: row.name,
  281 │     brightness: 50
  282 │   }
  283 │   showCircuitControlDialog.value = true
  284 │ }
  285 │ 
  286 │ const handleSaveCircuitControl = () => {
  287 │   const circuit = circuitData.value.find(item => item.id === circuitControlForm.value.id)
  288 │   if (circuit) {
  289 │     ElMessage.success(`${circuitControlForm.value.name} 调光成功，亮度: ${circuitControlForm.value.brightness}%`)
  290 │   }
  291 │   showCircuitControlDialog.value = false
  292 │ }
  293 │ 
  294 │ const handleSaveDimming = () => {
  295 │   const targetIndex = dimmingData.value.findIndex(item => item.sectionType === dimmingForm.value.sectionName)
  296 │   if (targetIndex !== -1) {
  297 │     dimmingData.value[targetIndex].dawn = `${dimmingForm.value.dimmingValue}%`
  298 │     dimmingData.value[targetIndex].day = `${dimmingForm.value.dimmingValue}%`
  299 │     dimmingData.value[targetIndex].dusk = `${dimmingForm.value.dimmingValue}%`
  300 │     dimmingData.value[targetIndex].night = `${dimmingForm.value.dimmingValue}%`
  301 │     dimmingData.value[targetIndex].status = '已配置'
  302 │   }
  303 │   ElMessage.success('调光配置保存成功')
  304 │   showDimmingDialog.value = false
  305 │ }
  306 │ 
  307 │ const handleDeleteCircuit = (row) => {
  308 │   console.log('Delete circuit:', row)
  309 │ }
  310 │ </script>
  311 │ 
  312 │ <style scoped>
  313 │ .lighting-control {
  314 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  315 │   min-height: 100%;
  316 │   padding: 20px;
  317 │ }
  318 │ 
  319 │ .page-header {
  320 │   display: flex;
  321 │   justify-content: space-between;
  322 │   align-items: center;
  323 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  324 │ }
  325 │ 
  326 │ .page-header h2 {
  327 │   margin: 0;
  328 │   font-size: 24px;
  329 │   font-weight: 600;
  330 │   color: #333;
  331 │ }
  332 │ 
  333 │ .header-actions {
  334 │   display: flex;
  335 │   gap: 10px;
  336 │ }
  337 │ 
  338 │ .filter-bar {
  339 │   background: #ffffff;
  340 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  341 │   border-radius: 8px;
  342 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  343 │   display: flex;
  344 │   gap: 15px;
  345 │   align-items: center;
  346 │ }
  347 │ 
  348 │ .table-wrapper {
  349 │   background: #ffffff;
  350 │   border-radius: 8px;
  351 │   padding: 20px;
  352 │ }
  353 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/SectionManage.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="section-manage">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>分段管理</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger">批量删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="展厅隧道" style="width: 150px;">
   13 │         <el-option label="展厅隧道" value="展厅隧道" />
   14 │       </el-select>
   15 │       <el-select v-model="filterHole" placeholder="展厅隧道洞" style="width: 150px;">
   16 │         <el-option label="展厅隧道洞" value="展厅隧道洞" />
   17 │       </el-select>
   18 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   19 │     </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   22 │       <el-table :data="sectionData" border>
   23 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   24 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   25 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="分段名称" min-width="120" />
   26 │         <el-table-column prop="type" label="分段类型" width="100">
   27 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   28 │             <el-tag :type="getTagType(row.type)">{{ row.type }}</el-tag>
   29 │           </template>
   30 │         </el-table-column>
   31 │         <el-table-column prop="order" label="排序" width="80" />
   32 │         <el-table-column prop="length" label="长度(米)" width="100" />
   33 │         <el-table-column prop="entrance" label="出入口" width="80" />
   34 │         <el-table-column prop="sensor" label="关联传感器" width="120" />
   35 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   36 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   37 │             <el-tag :type="row.status === '启用' ? 'success' : 'warning'">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
   38 │           </template>
   39 │         </el-table-column>
   40 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
   41 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   42 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   43 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   44 │           </template>
   45 │         </el-table-column>
   46 │       </el-table>
   47 │     </div>
   48 │ 
   49 │     <el-dialog title="修改分段" v-model="showDialog" width="500px">
   50 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   51 │         <el-form-item label="*分段名称" required>
   52 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入分段名称" />
   53 │         </el-form-item>
   54 │         <el-form-item label="*分段类型" required>
   55 │           <el-select v-model="formData.type">
   56 │             <el-option label="入口段" value="入口段" />
   57 │             <el-option label="基本段" value="基本段" />
   58 │             <el-option label="出口段" value="出口段" />
   59 │           </el-select>
   60 │         </el-form-item>
   61 │         <el-form-item label="*排序" required>
   62 │           <el-input-number v-model="formData.order" :min="1" />
   63 │         </el-form-item>
   64 │         <el-form-item label="*长度(米)" required>
   65 │           <el-input-number v-model="formData.length" :min="0" />
   66 │         </el-form-item>
   67 │         <el-form-item label="出入口">
   68 │           <el-select v-model="formData.entrance">
   69 │             <el-option label="入口" value="入口" />
   70 │             <el-option label="出口" value="出口" />
   71 │           </el-select>
   72 │         </el-form-item>
   73 │         <el-form-item label="关联传感器">
   74 │           <el-input v-model="formData.sensor" placeholder="请输入传感器名称" />
   75 │         </el-form-item>
   76 │         <el-form-item label="启用">
   77 │           <el-switch v-model="formData.status" active-value="启用" inactive-value="禁用" />
   78 │         </el-form-item>
   79 │       </el-form>
   80 │       <template #footer>
   81 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
   82 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">确定</el-button>
   83 │       </template>
   84 │     </el-dialog>
   85 │   </div>
   86 │ </template>
   87 │ 
   88 │ <script setup>
   89 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
   90 │ 
   91 │ const filterTunnel = ref('展厅隧道')
   92 │ const filterHole = ref('展厅隧道洞')
   93 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
   94 │ 
   95 │ const formData = ref({
   96 │   name: '',
   97 │   type: '入口段',
   98 │   order: 1,
   99 │   length: 0,
  100 │   entrance: '入口',
  101 │   sensor: '',
  102 │   status: '启用'
  103 │ })
  104 │ 
  105 │ const sectionData = ref([
  106 │   { id: 1, name: '入口段', type: '入口段', order: 1, length: 5, entrance: '入口', sensor: '展厅光照', status: '启用' },
  107 │   { id: 2, name: '基本段', type: '基本段', order: 2, length: 10, entrance: '入口', sensor: '-', status: '启用' },
  108 │   { id: 3, name: '出口段', type: '出口段', order: 3, length: 5, entrance: '出口', sensor: '展厅光照', status: '启用' }
  109 │ ])
  110 │ 
  111 │ const getTagType = (type) => {
  112 │   const types = { '入口段': 'primary', '基本段': 'success', '出口段': 'warning' }
  113 │   return types[type] || 'info'
  114 │ }
  115 │ 
  116 │ const handleSearch = () => {}
  117 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  118 │   formData.value = {
  119 │     name: '',
  120 │     type: '入口段',
  121 │     order: 1,
  122 │     length: 0,
  123 │     entrance: '入口',
  124 │     sensor: '',
  125 │     status: '启用'
  126 │   }
  127 │   showDialog.value = true
  128 │ }
  129 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  130 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  131 │   showDialog.value = true
  132 │ }
  133 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {}
  134 │ const handleSave = () => {
  135 │   showDialog.value = false
  136 │ }
  137 │ </script>
  138 │ 
  139 │ <style scoped>
  140 │ .section-manage {
  141 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  142 │   min-height: 100%;
  143 │   padding: 20px;
  144 │ }
  145 │ 
  146 │ .page-header {
  147 │   display: flex;
  148 │   justify-content: space-between;
  149 │   align-items: center;
  150 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  151 │ }
  152 │ 
  153 │ .page-header h2 {
  154 │   margin: 0;
  155 │   font-size: 24px;
  156 │   font-weight: 600;
  157 │   color: #333;
  158 │ }
  159 │ 
  160 │ .header-actions {
  161 │   display: flex;
  162 │   gap: 10px;
  163 │ }
  164 │ 
  165 │ .filter-bar {
  166 │   background: #ffffff;
  167 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  168 │   border-radius: 8px;
  169 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  170 │   display: flex;
  171 │   gap: 15px;
  172 │   align-items: center;
  173 │ }
  174 │ 
  175 │ .table-wrapper {
  176 │   background: #ffffff;
  177 │   border-radius: 8px;
  178 │   padding: 20px;
  179 │ }
  180 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/TimeSchedule.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="time-schedule">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>时序设置</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">添加时段</el-button>
    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   11 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="展厅隧道" style="width: 150px;">
   12 │         <el-option label="展厅隧道" value="展厅隧道" />
   13 │       </el-select>
   14 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   15 │     </div>
   16 │ 
   17 │     <div class="schedule-grid">
   18 │       <div class="schedule-card">
   19 │         <div class="card-header">
   20 │           <span class="card-title">凌晨时段</span>
   21 │           <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="editSchedule('dawn')">修改</el-button>
   22 │         </div>
   23 │         <div class="card-content">
   24 │           <div class="time-range">00:00 - 06:00</div>
   25 │           <div class="brightness-info">
   26 │             <span>调光值: <strong>10%</strong></span>
   27 │           </div>
   28 │         </div>
   29 │       </div>
   30 │ 
   31 │       <div class="schedule-card">
   32 │         <div class="card-header">
   33 │           <span class="card-title">白天时段</span>
   34 │           <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="editSchedule('day')">修改</el-button>
   35 │         </div>
   36 │         <div class="card-content">
   37 │           <div class="time-range">06:00 - 18:00</div>
   38 │           <div class="brightness-info">
   39 │             <span>调光值: <strong>30%</strong></span>
   40 │           </div>
   41 │         </div>
   42 │       </div>
   43 │ 
   44 │       <div class="schedule-card">
   45 │         <div class="card-header">
   46 │           <span class="card-title">傍晚时段</span>
   47 │           <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="editSchedule('dusk')">修改</el-button>
   48 │         </div>
   49 │         <div class="card-content">
   50 │           <div class="time-range">18:00 - 20:00</div>
   51 │           <div class="brightness-info">
   52 │             <span>调光值: <strong>20%</strong></span>
   53 │           </div>
   54 │         </div>
   55 │       </div>
   56 │ 
   57 │       <div class="schedule-card">
   58 │         <div class="card-header">
   59 │           <span class="card-title">夜间时段</span>
   60 │           <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="editSchedule('night')">修改</el-button>
   61 │         </div>
   62 │         <div class="card-content">
   63 │           <div class="time-range">20:00 - 24:00</div>
   64 │           <div class="brightness-info">
   65 │             <span>调光值: <strong>15%</strong></span>
   66 │           </div>
   67 │         </div>
   68 │       </div>
   69 │     </div>
   70 │ 
   71 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   72 │       <el-table :data="scheduleList" border>
   73 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="No" width="60" />
   74 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="时段名称" width="120" />
   75 │         <el-table-column prop="startTime" label="开始时间" width="100" />
   76 │         <el-table-column prop="endTime" label="结束时间" width="100" />
   77 │         <el-table-column prop="brightness" label="调光值" width="100">
   78 │           <template #default="{ row }">{{ row.brightness }}%</template>
   79 │         </el-table-column>
   80 │         <el-table-column prop="section" label="适用分段" width="150" />
   81 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   82 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   83 │             <el-tag :type="row.status === '启用' ? 'success' : 'warning'">{{ row.status }}</el-tag>
   84 │           </template>
   85 │         </el-table-column>
   86 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="150">
   87 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   88 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   89 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   90 │           </template>
   91 │         </el-table-column>
   92 │       </el-table>
   93 │     </div>
   94 │ 
   95 │     <el-dialog title="编辑时段" v-model="showDialog" width="400px">
   96 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="80px">
   97 │         <el-form-item label="时段名称">
   98 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" />
   99 │         </el-form-item>
  100 │         <el-form-item label="开始时间">
  101 │           <el-time-picker v-model="formData.startTime" format="HH:mm" />
  102 │         </el-form-item>
  103 │         <el-form-item label="结束时间">
  104 │           <el-time-picker v-model="formData.endTime" format="HH:mm" />
  105 │         </el-form-item>
  106 │         <el-form-item label="调光值">
  107 │           <el-slider v-model="formData.brightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
  108 │         </el-form-item>
  109 │         <el-form-item label="适用分段">
  110 │           <el-select v-model="formData.section" multiple>
  111 │             <el-option label="入口段" value="入口段" />
  112 │             <el-option label="基本段" value="基本段" />
  113 │             <el-option label="出口段" value="出口段" />
  114 │           </el-select>
  115 │         </el-form-item>
  116 │         <el-form-item label="启用">
  117 │           <el-switch v-model="formData.status" active-value="启用" inactive-value="禁用" />
  118 │         </el-form-item>
  119 │       </el-form>
  120 │       <template #footer>
  121 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  122 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">确定</el-button>
  123 │       </template>
  124 │     </el-dialog>
  125 │   </div>
  126 │ </template>
  127 │ 
  128 │ <script setup>
  129 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
  130 │ 
  131 │ const filterTunnel = ref('展厅隧道')
  132 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
  133 │ 
  134 │ const formData = ref({
  135 │   name: '',
  136 │   startTime: '00:00',
  137 │   endTime: '06:00',
  138 │   brightness: 10,
  139 │   section: [],
  140 │   status: '启用'
  141 │ })
  142 │ 
  143 │ const scheduleList = ref([
  144 │   { id: 1, name: '凌晨时段', startTime: '00:00', endTime: '06:00', brightness: 10, section: '基本段', status: '启用' },
  145 │   { id: 2, name: '白天时段', startTime: '06:00', endTime: '18:00', brightness: 30, section: '基本段', status: '启用' },
  146 │   { id: 3, name: '傍晚时段', startTime: '18:00', endTime: '20:00', brightness: 20, section: '入口段', status: '启用' },
  147 │   { id: 4, name: '夜间时段', startTime: '20:00', endTime: '24:00', brightness: 15, section: '基本段', status: '启用' }
  148 │ ])
  149 │ 
  150 │ const handleSearch = () => {}
  151 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  152 │   formData.value = {
  153 │     name: '',
  154 │     startTime: '00:00',
  155 │     endTime: '06:00',
  156 │     brightness: 10,
  157 │     section: [],
  158 │     status: '启用'
  159 │   }
  160 │   showDialog.value = true
  161 │ }
  162 │ const editSchedule = (type) => {
  163 │   const names = { dawn: '凌晨时段', day: '白天时段', dusk: '傍晚时段', night: '夜间时段' }
  164 │   formData.value.name = names[type]
  165 │   showDialog.value = true
  166 │ }
  167 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  168 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  169 │   showDialog.value = true
  170 │ }
  171 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {}
  172 │ const handleSave = () => {
  173 │   showDialog.value = false
  174 │ }
  175 │ </script>
  176 │ 
  177 │ <style scoped>
  178 │ .time-schedule {
  179 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  180 │   min-height: 100%;
  181 │   padding: 20px;
  182 │ }
  183 │ 
  184 │ .page-header {
  185 │   display: flex;
  186 │   justify-content: space-between;
  187 │   align-items: center;
  188 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  189 │ }
  190 │ 
  191 │ .page-header h2 {
  192 │   margin: 0;
  193 │   font-size: 24px;
  194 │   font-weight: 600;
  195 │   color: #333;
  196 │ }
  197 │ 
  198 │ .header-actions {
  199 │   display: flex;
  200 │   gap: 10px;
  201 │ }
  202 │ 
  203 │ .filter-bar {
  204 │   background: #ffffff;
  205 │   padding: 15px 20px;
  206 │   border-radius: 8px;
  207 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  208 │   display: flex;
  209 │   gap: 15px;
  210 │   align-items: center;
  211 │ }
  212 │ 
  213 │ .schedule-grid {
  214 │   display: grid;
  215 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  216 │   gap: 20px;
  217 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  218 │ }
  219 │ 
  220 │ .schedule-card {
  221 │   background: #ffffff;
  222 │   border-radius: 8px;
  223 │   padding: 20px;
  224 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  225 │ }
  226 │ 
  227 │ .card-header {
  228 │   display: flex;
  229 │   justify-content: space-between;
  230 │   align-items: center;
  231 │   margin-bottom: 15px;
  232 │ }
  233 │ 
  234 │ .card-title {
  235 │   font-weight: 600;
  236 │   color: #333;
  237 │ }
  238 │ 
  239 │ .time-range {
  240 │   font-size: 14px;
  241 │   color: #666;
  242 │   margin-bottom: 10px;
  243 │ }
  244 │ 
  245 │ .brightness-info {
  246 │   font-size: 16px;
  247 │   color: #333;
  248 │ }

  250 │ .table-wrapper {
  251 │   background: #ffffff;
  252 │   border-radius: 8px;
  253 │   padding: 20px;
  254 │ }
  255 │ </style>

   10 │         <el-button>导出数据</el-button>

   28 │             <el-tag :type="tunnelInfo.status === '在线' ? 'success' : 'danger'">
   29 │               {{ tunnelInfo.status }}
   30 │             </el-tag>
   31 │           </el-descriptions-item>

  148 │ <script setup>
  149 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
  150 │ import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  151 │ 
  152 │ const route = useRoute()
  153 │ const router = useRouter()
  154 │ const activeDeviceTab = ref('lighting')
  155 │ 
  156 │ const tunnelInfo = ref({
  157 │   id: route.params.id,
  158 │   name: '梅溪湖隧道',
  159 │   region: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道',
  160 │   length: 1000,
  161 │   lanes: 4,
  162 │   speed: 60,
  163 │   status: '在线',
  164 │   longitude: 112.938825,
  165 │   latitude: 28.234521,
  166 │   devices: 156,
  167 │   onlineDevices: 148,
  168 │   todayEnergy: 1256,
  169 │   alarms: 3
  170 │ })
  171 │ 
  172 │ const sectionData = ref([
  173 │   { id: 1, name: '入口段', type: '入口', startMileage: 'K0+000', endMileage: 'K0+200', length: 200, lighting: 12, ventilation: 4 },
  174 │   { id: 2, name: '过渡段', type: '过渡', startMileage: 'K0+200', endMileage: 'K0+400', length: 200, lighting: 10, ventilation: 4 },
  175 │   { id: 3, name: '基本段', type: '基本', startMileage: 'K0+400', endMileage: 'K2+300', length: 1900, lighting: 95, ventilation: 38 },
  176 │   { id: 4, name: '出口段', type: '出口', startMileage: 'K2+300', endMileage: 'K2+500', length: 200, lighting: 12, ventilation: 4 }
  177 │ ])
  178 │ 
  179 │ const lightingDevices = ref([
  180 │   { id: 1, name: '照明灯具-001', section: '入口段', type: '高压钠灯', status: '在线', brightness: '100%' },
  181 │   { id: 2, name: '照明灯具-002', section: '入口段', type: 'LED灯', status: '在线', brightness: '85%' },
  182 │   { id: 3, name: '照明灯具-003', section: '过渡段', type: 'LED灯', status: '离线', brightness: '0%' }
  183 │ ])
  184 │ 
  185 │ const ventilationDevices = ref([
  186 │   { id: 1, name: '射流风机-001', section: '入口段', type: '射流风机', status: '在线', speed: '2.5m/s' },
  187 │   { id: 2, name: '射流风机-002', section: '过渡段', type: '射流风机', status: '在线', speed: '3.0m/s' }
  188 │ ])
  189 │ 
  190 │ const monitorDevices = ref([
  191 │   { id: 1, name: 'CO检测仪-001', section: '入口段', type: 'CO传感器', status: '在线' },
  192 │   { id: 2, name: '能见度仪-001', section: '入口段', type: '能见度仪', status: '在线' }
  193 │ ])
  194 │ 
  195 │ const handleBack = () => {
  196 │   router.push('/tunnel/list')
  197 │ }
  198 │ 
  199 │ const handleAddSection = () => {
  200 │   console.log('Add section')
  201 │ }
  202 │ </script>

    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="tunnel-home">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>隧道总览</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary">刷新数据</el-button>
    7 │       </div>
    8 │     </div>
    9 │ 
   10 │     <div class="stats-grid">
   11 │       <div class="stat-card">
   12 │         <div class="stat-icon" style="background: #409eff;">
   13 │           <el-icon :size="32"><Guide /></el-icon>
   14 │         </div>
   15 │         <div class="stat-info">
   16 │           <div class="stat-value">{{ stats.totalTunnels }}</div>
   17 │           <div class="stat-label">隧道总数</div>
   18 │         </div>
   19 │       </div>
   20 │ 
   21 │       <div class="stat-card">
   22 │         <div class="stat-icon" style="background: #67c23a;">
   23 │           <el-icon :size="32"><SuccessFilled /></el-icon>
   24 │         </div>
   25 │         <div class="stat-info">
   26 │           <div class="stat-value">{{ stats.onlineTunnels }}</div>
   27 │           <div class="stat-label">在线隧道</div>
   28 │         </div>
   29 │       </div>
   30 │ 
   31 │       <div class="stat-card">
   32 │         <div class="stat-icon" style="background: #f56c6c;">
   33 │           <el-icon :size="32"><WarningFilled /></el-icon>
   34 │         </div>
   35 │         <div class="stat-info">
   36 │           <div class="stat-value">{{ stats.alarms }}</div>
   37 │           <div class="stat-label">告警数量</div>
   38 │         </div>
   39 │       </div>
   40 │ 
   41 │       <div class="stat-card">
   42 │         <div class="stat-icon" style="background: #e6a23c;">
   43 │           <el-icon :size="32"><PieChart /></el-icon>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │         <div class="stat-info">
   46 │           <div class="stat-value">{{ stats.energyConsumption }}</div>
   47 │           <div class="stat-label">今日能耗(kWh)</div>
   48 │         </div>
   49 │       </div>
   50 │     </div>
   51 │ 
   52 │     <div class="content-grid">
   53 │       <div class="grid-item tunnel-list">
   54 │         <div class="card-header">
   55 │           <h3>隧道列表</h3>
   56 │           <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleAddTunnel">新增隧道</el-button>
   57 │         </div>
   58 │         <el-table :data="tunnelData" border style="width: 100%">
   59 │           <el-table-column prop="name" label="隧道名称" width="150" />
   60 │           <el-table-column prop="location" label="所在区域" width="120" />
   61 │           <el-table-column prop="length" label="长度(m)" width="100" />
   62 │           <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   63 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   64 │               <el-tag :type="row.status === '在线' ? 'success' : 'danger'" size="small">
   65 │                 {{ row.status }}
   66 │               </el-tag>
   67 │             </template>
   68 │           </el-table-column>
   69 │           <el-table-column prop="devices" label="设备数量" width="100" />
   70 │           <el-table-column label="操作" width="180">
   71 │             <template #default="{ row }">
   72 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="handleViewDetail(row)">查看</el-button>
   73 │               <el-button type="warning" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">编辑</el-button>
   74 │             </template>
   75 │           </el-table-column>
   76 │         </el-table>
   77 │       </div>
   78 │ 
   79 │       <div class="grid-item environment-monitor">
   80 │         <div class="card-header">
   81 │           <h3>环境监测</h3>
   82 │           <el-button type="text" size="small">查看详情</el-button>
   83 │         </div>
   84 │         <div class="monitor-grid">
   85 │           <div class="monitor-item">
   86 │             <div class="monitor-label">CO浓度</div>
   87 │             <div class="monitor-value">35 <span>ppm</span></div>
   88 │             <div class="monitor-status normal">正常</div>
   89 │           </div>
   90 │           <div class="monitor-item">
   91 │             <div class="monitor-label">能见度</div>
   92 │             <div class="monitor-value">850 <span>m</span></div>
   93 │             <div class="monitor-status normal">正常</div>
   94 │           </div>
   95 │           <div class="monitor-item">
   96 │             <div class="monitor-label">风速</div>
   97 │             <div class="monitor-value">2.5 <span>m/s</span></div>
   98 │             <div class="monitor-status normal">正常</div>
   99 │           </div>
  100 │           <div class="monitor-item">
  101 │             <div class="monitor-label">光照度</div>
  102 │             <div class="monitor-value">450 <span>lux</span></div>
  103 │             <div class="monitor-status normal">正常</div>
  104 │           </div>
  105 │         </div>
  106 │       </div>
  107 │ 
  108 │       <div class="grid-item alarm-list">
  109 │         <div class="card-header">
  110 │           <h3>最新告警</h3>
  111 │           <el-button type="text" size="small">全部告警</el-button>
  112 │         </div>
  113 │         <div class="alarm-items">
  114 │           <div v-for="alarm in recentAlarms" :key="alarm.id" class="alarm-item">
  115 │             <div class="alarm-icon" :class="alarm.level">
  116 │               <el-icon><Warning /></el-icon>
  117 │             </div>
  118 │             <div class="alarm-content">
  119 │               <div class="alarm-title">{{ alarm.title }}</div>
  120 │               <div class="alarm-info">
  121 │                 <span>{{ alarm.tunnel }}</span>
  122 │                 <span>{{ alarm.time }}</span>
  123 │               </div>
  124 │             </div>
  125 │           </div>
  126 │         </div>
  127 │       </div>
  128 │ 
  129 │       <div class="grid-item energy-chart">
  130 │         <div class="card-header">
  131 │           <h3>能耗趋势</h3>
  132 │           <el-select size="small" v-model="energyTimeRange" style="width: 120px;">
  133 │             <el-option label="今日" value="today" />
  134 │             <el-option label="本周" value="week" />
  135 │             <el-option label="本月" value="month" />
  136 │           </el-select>
  137 │         </div>
  138 │         <div class="chart-placeholder">
  139 │           <div class="chart-bar">
  140 │             <div v-for="(value, index) in energyData" :key="index" class="bar-item">
  141 │               <div class="bar" :style="{ height: value + '%' }"></div>
  142 │               <div class="bar-label">{{ index + 1 }}时</div>
  143 │             </div>
  144 │           </div>
  145 │         </div>
  146 │       </div>
  147 │     </div>
  148 │ 
  149 │     <el-dialog title="新增隧道" v-model="showAddDialog" width="600px">
  150 │       <el-form :model="tunnelForm" label-width="100px">
  151 │         <el-form-item label="隧道名称">
  152 │           <el-input v-model="tunnelForm.name" placeholder="请输入隧道名称" />
  153 │         </el-form-item>
  154 │         <el-form-item label="所在区域">
  155 │           <el-select v-model="tunnelForm.region" placeholder="请选择区域">
  156 │             <el-option label="长沙" value="长沙" />
  157 │             <el-option label="长沙/岳麓区" value="长沙/岳麓区" />
  158 │             <el-option label="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道" value="长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道" />
  159 │           </el-select>
  160 │         </el-form-item>
  161 │         <el-form-item label="隧道长度(m)">
  162 │           <el-input-number v-model="tunnelForm.length" :min="0" />
  163 │         </el-form-item>
  164 │         <el-form-item label="车道数量">
  165 │           <el-input-number v-model="tunnelForm.lanes" :min="1" :max="10" />
  166 │         </el-form-item>
  167 │         <el-form-item label="设计时速">
  168 │           <el-input-number v-model="tunnelForm.speed" :min="0" /> km/h
  169 │         </el-form-item>
  170 │       </el-form>
  171 │       <template #footer>
  172 │         <el-button @click="showAddDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  173 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSaveTunnel">确定</el-button>
  174 │       </template>
  175 │     </el-dialog>
  176 │   </div>
  177 │ </template>
  178 │ 
  179 │ <script setup>
  180 │ import { ref } from 'vue'
  181 │ import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'
  182 │ import { Guide, SuccessFilled, WarningFilled, PieChart, Warning } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  183 │

  189 │   totalTunnels: 12,
  190 │   onlineTunnels: 10,
  191 │   alarms: 3,

  193 │ })

  197 │ ])
  198 │

  203 │ ])

  215 │ const handleAddTunnel = () => {
  216 │   showAddDialog.value = true
  217 │ }
  218 │ 
  219 │ const handleSaveTunnel = () => {
  220 │   showAddDialog.value = false
  221 │ }

  223 │ const handleViewDetail = (row) => {
  224 │   router.push(`/tunnel/detail/${row.id}`)
  225 │ }

  227 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {

  229 │ }

    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="tunnel-list">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>隧道管理</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger" @click="handleBatchDelete" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterLevel" placeholder="请选择" style="width: 150px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="爱克股份产业园" value="1" />
   14 │         <el-option label="1栋" value="2" />
   15 │         <el-option label="路灯展厅" value="3" />
   16 │       </el-select>

   18 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">查询</el-button>
   19 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   20 │     </div>
   21 │

   26 │         <el-table-column prop="hierarchy" label="所属层级" min-width="200" />
   27 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="隧道名称" min-width="150" />
   28 │         <el-table-column prop="length" label="隧道长度(米)" width="120" />
   29 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="150" fixed="right">
   30 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   31 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">修改</el-button>
   32 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   33 │           </template>

   35 │       </el-table>
   36 │     </div>

  273 │                     </el-col>
  274 │                     <el-col :span="4">
  275 │                       <el-form-item>
  276 │                         <el-button type="primary" size="small">选择设备</el-button>
  277 │                       </el-form-item>
  278 │                     </el-col>
  279 │                   </el-row>
  280 │                 </div>
  281 │                 <el-button type="text" @click="addHole">+ 添加隧道洞</el-button>
  282 │               </div>
  283 │             </el-form>
  284 │           </div>
  285 │         </el-tab-pane>
  286 │ 
  287 │         <el-tab-pane label="分段信息" name="section">
  288 │           <div style="margin-top: 20px;">
  289 │             <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px;">
  290 │               <span style="font-weight: bold;">展厅隧道洞</span>
  291 │               <el-button type="primary" size="small" @click="addSection">添加</el-button>
  292 │             </div>
  293 │             <el-table :data="formData.sections" border>
  294 │               <el-table-column prop="name" label="分段名称" width="120" />
  295 │               <el-table-column prop="type" label="分段类型" width="120">
  296 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  297 │                   <el-select v-model="row.type" style="width: 100%;">
  298 │                     <el-option label="入口段" value="入口段" />
  299 │                     <el-option label="基本段" value="基本段" />
  300 │                     <el-option label="出口段" value="出口段" />
  301 │                   </el-select>
  302 │                 </template>
  303 │               </el-table-column>
  304 │               <el-table-column prop="order" label="分段排序" width="100">
  305 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  306 │                   <el-input-number v-model="row.order" :min="1" style="width: 80px;" />
  307 │                 </template>
  308 │               </el-table-column>
  309 │               <el-table-column prop="length" label="本段长度(米)" width="120">
  310 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  311 │                   <el-input-number v-model="row.length" :min="0" style="width: 100px;" />
  312 │                 </template>
  313 │               </el-table-column>
  314 │               <el-table-column prop="entrance" label="出入口" width="100">
  315 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  316 │                   <el-select v-model="row.entrance" style="width: 100%;">
  317 │                     <el-option label="入口" value="入口" />
  318 │                     <el-option label="出口" value="出口" />
  319 │                   </el-select>
  320 │                 </template>
  321 │               </el-table-column>
  322 │               <el-table-column prop="distance" label="距离(米)" width="100">
  323 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  324 │                   <el-input-number v-model="row.distance" :min="0" style="width: 100px;" />
  325 │                 </template>
  326 │               </el-table-column>
  327 │               <el-table-column prop="sensor" label="关联传感器" width="120">
  328 │                 <template #default="{ row }">
  329 │                   <el-input v-model="row.sensor" placeholder="关联传感器" />
  330 │                 </template>
  331 │               </el-table-column>
  332 │               <el-table-column label="操作" width="120">
  333 │                 <template #default="{ row, $index }">
  334 │                   <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="editSection($index)">修改</el-button>
  335 │                   <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="deleteSection($index)">删除</el-button>
  336 │                 </template>
  337 │               </el-table-column>
  338 │             </el-table>
  339 │           </div>
  340 │         </el-tab-pane>
  341 │       </el-tabs>
  342 │ 
  343 │       <template #footer>
  344 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  345 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">保存</el-button>
  346 │       </template>
  347 │     </el-dialog>
  348 │   </div>
  349 │ </template>
  350 │ 
  351 │ <script setup>
  352 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  353 │ 
  354 │ const searchText = ref('')
  355 │ const filterLevel = ref('')
  356 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  357 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  358 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  359 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
  360 │ const isEdit = ref(false)
  361 │ const activeTab = ref('basic')
  362 │ 
  363 │ const formData = ref({
  364 │   basic: {
  365 │     hierarchy: '',
  366 │     name: '',
  367 │     length: 0,
  368 │     completionDate: '',
  369 │     longitude: '',
  370 │     latitude: '',
  371 │     mapCoordinate: '',
  372 │     responsibleUnit: '',
  373 │     responsiblePerson: '',
  374 │     contact: '',
  375 │     address: '',
  376 │     description: ''
  377 │   },
  378 │   hole: {
  379 │     type: '单道',
  380 │     name: '',
  381 │     length: 0,
  382 │     order: '上',
  383 │     lanes: 2,
  384 │     startPile: '',
  385 │     endPile: '',
  386 │     electricDevice: ''
  387 │   },
  388 │   holes: [
  389 │     { name: '', length: 0, order: '上', lanes: 2, startPile: '', endPile: '', electricDevice: '' },
  390 │     { name: '', length: 0, order: '下', lanes: 2, startPile: '', endPile: '', electricDevice: '' }
  391 │   ],
  392 │   sections: [
  393 │     { name: '入口段', type: '入口段', order: 1, length: 5, entrance: '入口', distance: 0, sensor: '展厅光照' },
  394 │     { name: '基本段', type: '基本段', order: 2, length: 10, entrance: '入口', distance: 5, sensor: '-' },
  395 │     { name: '出口段', type: '出口段', order: 3, length: 5, entrance: '出口', distance: 0, sensor: '展厅光照' }
  396 │   ]
  397 │ })
  398 │ 
  399 │ const tunnelData = ref([
  400 │   { id: 1, hierarchy: '长沙-岳麓区-梅溪湖隧道', name: '梅溪湖隧道', length: 1000 }
  401 │ ])
  402 │ 
  403 │ const total = computed(() => filteredData.value.length)
  404 │ 
  405 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  406 │   let result = tunnelData.value
  407 │   if (searchText.value) {
  408 │     result = result.filter(item => item.name.includes(searchText.value))
  409 │   }
  410 │   return result
  411 │ })
  412 │ 
  413 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  414 │   isEdit.value = false
  415 │   formData.value = {
  416 │     basic: {
  417 │       hierarchy: '',
  418 │       name: '',
  419 │       length: 0,
  420 │       completionDate: '',
  421 │       longitude: '',
  422 │       latitude: '',
  423 │       mapCoordinate: '',
  424 │       responsibleUnit: '',
  425 │       responsiblePerson: '',
  426 │       contact: '',
  427 │       address: '',
  428 │       description: ''
  429 │     },
  430 │     hole: {
  431 │       type: '单道',
  432 │       name: '',
  433 │       length: 0,
  434 │       order: '上',
  435 │       lanes: 2,
  436 │       startPile: '',
  437 │       endPile: '',
  438 │       electricDevice: ''
  439 │     },
  440 │     holes: [
  441 │       { name: '', length: 0, order: '上', lanes: 2, startPile: '', endPile: '', electricDevice: '' },
  442 │       { name: '', length: 0, order: '下', lanes: 2, startPile: '', endPile: '', electricDevice: '' }
  443 │     ],
  444 │     sections: [
  445 │       { name: '入口段', type: '入口段', order: 1, length: 5, entrance: '入口', distance: 0, sensor: '展厅光照' },
  446 │       { name: '基本段', type: '基本段', order: 2, length: 10, entrance: '入口', distance: 5, sensor: '-' },
  447 │       { name: '出口段', type: '出口段', order: 3, length: 5, entrance: '出口', distance: 0, sensor: '展厅光照' }
  448 │     ]
  449 │   }
  450 │   activeTab.value = 'basic'
  451 │   showDialog.value = true
  452 │ }
  453 │ 
  454 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  455 │   isEdit.value = true
  456 │   formData.value.basic = {
  457 │     hierarchy: row.hierarchy,
  458 │     name: row.name,
  459 │     length: row.length,
  460 │     completionDate: '',
  461 │     longitude: '',
  462 │     latitude: '',
  463 │     mapCoordinate: '',
  464 │     responsibleUnit: '',
  465 │     responsiblePerson: '',
  466 │     contact: '',
  467 │     address: '',
  468 │     description: ''
  469 │   }
  470 │   formData.value.hole.name = '展厅隧道洞'
  471 │   formData.value.hole.length = 20
  472 │   activeTab.value = 'basic'
  473 │   showDialog.value = true
  474 │ }
  475 │ 
  476 │ const handleSave = () => {
  477 │   showDialog.value = false
  478 │ }
  479 │ 
  480 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {
  481 │   console.log('Delete:', row)
  482 │ }
  483 │ 
  484 │ const handleBatchDelete = () => {
  485 │   console.log('Batch delete:', selectedRows.value)
  486 │ }
  487 │ 
  488 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  489 │   selectedRows.value = val
  490 │ }
  491 │ 
  492 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  493 │   currentPage.value = 1
  494 │ }
  495 │ 
  496 │ const handleReset = () => {
  497 │   searchText.value = ''
  498 │   filterLevel.value = ''
  499 │   currentPage.value = 1
  500 │ }
  501 │ 
  502 │ const addHole = () => {
  503 │   formData.value.holes.push({
  504 │     name: '',
  505 │     length: 0,
  506 │     order: '上',
  507 │     lanes: 2,
  508 │     startPile: '',
  509 │     endPile: '',
  510 │     electricDevice: ''
  511 │   })
  512 │ }
  513 │ 
  514 │ const removeHole = (index) => {
  515 │   formData.value.holes.splice(index, 1)
  516 │ }
  517 │ 
  518 │ const addSection = () => {
  519 │   formData.value.sections.push({
  520 │     name: '',
  521 │     type: '基本段',
  522 │     order: formData.value.sections.length + 1,
  523 │     length: 0,
  524 │     entrance: '入口',
  525 │     distance: 0,
  526 │     sensor: '-'
  527 │   })
  528 │ }
  529 │ 
  530 │ const editSection = (index) => {
  531 │   console.log('Edit section:', index)
  532 │ }
  533 │ 
  534 │ const deleteSection = (index) => {
  535 │   formData.value.sections.splice(index, 1)
  536 │ }
  537 │ </script>
  538 │ 
  539 │ <style scoped>
  540 │ .tunnel-list {
  541 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  542 │   min-height: 100%;
  543 │   padding: 20px;
  544 │ }
  545 │ 
  546 │ .page-header {
  547 │   display: flex;
  548 │   justify-content: space-between;
  549 │   align-items: center;
  550 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  551 │ }
  552 │ 
  553 │ .page-header h2 {
  554 │   margin: 0;
  555 │   font-size: 24px;
  556 │   font-weight: 600;
  557 │   color: #333;
  558 │ }
  559 │ 
  560 │ .header-actions {
  561 │   display: flex;
  562 │   gap: 10px;
  563 │ }
  564 │ 
  565 │ .filter-bar {
  566 │   background: #ffffff;
  567 │   padding: 20px;
  568 │   border-radius: 8px;
  569 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  570 │   display: flex;
  571 │   gap: 15px;
  572 │   align-items: center;
  573 │ }
  574 │ 
  575 │ .table-wrapper {
  576 │   background: #ffffff;
  577 │   border-radius: 8px;
  578 │   padding: 20px;
  579 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  580 │ }
  581 │ 
  582 │ .pagination {
  583 │   display: flex;
  584 │   justify-content: center;
  585 │   background: #ffffff;
  586 │   padding: 20px;
  587 │   border-radius: 8px;
  588 │ }
  589 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/TunnelSection.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="tunnel-section">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>路段管理</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleAdd">新增路段</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button type="danger" @click="handleBatchDelete" :disabled="selectedRows.length === 0">批量删除</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="选择隧道" style="width: 200px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   14 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   15 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   16 │       </el-select>
   17 │       <el-select v-model="filterType" placeholder="路段类型" style="width: 150px;" clearable>
   18 │         <el-option label="入口段" value="入口" />
   19 │         <el-option label="过渡段" value="过渡" />
   20 │         <el-option label="基本段" value="基本" />
   21 │         <el-option label="出口段" value="出口" />
   22 │       </el-select>
   23 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">搜索</el-button>
   24 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   25 │     </div>
   26 │ 
   27 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   28 │       <el-table :data="filteredData" border @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   29 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   30 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="ID" width="60" />
   31 │         <el-table-column prop="tunnelName" label="所属隧道" width="150" />
   32 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="路段名称" width="150" />
   33 │         <el-table-column prop="type" label="路段类型" width="100" />
   34 │         <el-table-column prop="startMileage" label="起点里程" width="120" />
   35 │         <el-table-column prop="endMileage" label="终点里程" width="120" />
   36 │         <el-table-column prop="length" label="长度(m)" width="100" />
   37 │         <el-table-column prop="lightingCount" label="照明设备" width="100" />
   38 │         <el-table-column prop="ventilationCount" label="通风设备" width="100" />
   39 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="180" fixed="right">
   40 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   41 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleEdit(row)">编辑</el-button>
   42 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleViewDevices(row)">设备</el-button>
   43 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" style="color: #f56c6c;" @click="handleDelete(row)">删除</el-button>
   44 │           </template>
   45 │         </el-table-column>
   46 │       </el-table>
   47 │     </div>
   48 │ 
   49 │     <div class="pagination">
   50 │       <el-pagination
   51 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
   52 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
   53 │         :total="total"
   54 │         layout="total, prev, pager, next, jumper"
   55 │       />
   56 │     </div>
   57 │ 
   58 │     <el-dialog title="新增路段" v-model="showDialog" width="600px">
   59 │       <el-form :model="formData" label-width="100px">
   60 │         <el-form-item label="所属隧道" required>
   61 │           <el-select v-model="formData.tunnelName" placeholder="请选择隧道">
   62 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   63 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   64 │             <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   65 │           </el-select>
   66 │         </el-form-item>
   67 │         <el-form-item label="路段名称" required>
   68 │           <el-input v-model="formData.name" placeholder="请输入路段名称" />
   69 │         </el-form-item>
   70 │         <el-form-item label="路段类型" required>
   71 │           <el-select v-model="formData.type" placeholder="请选择类型">
   72 │             <el-option label="入口段" value="入口" />
   73 │             <el-option label="过渡段" value="过渡" />
   74 │             <el-option label="基本段" value="基本" />
   75 │             <el-option label="出口段" value="出口" />
   76 │           </el-select>
   77 │         </el-form-item>
   78 │         <el-form-item label="起点里程" required>
   79 │           <el-input v-model="formData.startMileage" placeholder="如：K0+000" />
   80 │         </el-form-item>
   81 │         <el-form-item label="终点里程" required>
   82 │           <el-input v-model="formData.endMileage" placeholder="如：K0+200" />
   83 │         </el-form-item>
   84 │         <el-form-item label="设计亮度">
   85 │           <el-slider v-model="formData.designBrightness" :min="0" :max="100" show-input />
   86 │         </el-form-item>
   87 │       </el-form>
   88 │       <template #footer>
   89 │         <el-button @click="showDialog = false">取消</el-button>
   90 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSave">确定</el-button>
   91 │       </template>
   92 │     </el-dialog>
   93 │   </div>
   94 │ </template>
   95 │ 
   96 │ <script setup>
   97 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
   98 │ 
   99 │ const filterTunnel = ref('')
  100 │ const filterType = ref('')
  101 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  102 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  103 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  104 │ const showDialog = ref(false)
  105 │ 
  106 │ const formData = ref({
  107 │   tunnelName: '',
  108 │   name: '',
  109 │   type: '',
  110 │   startMileage: '',
  111 │   endMileage: '',
  112 │   designBrightness: 100
  113 │ })
  114 │ 
  115 │ const sectionData = ref([
  116 │   { id: 1, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '入口段', type: '入口', startMileage: 'K0+000', endMileage: 'K0+200', length: 200, lightingCount: 12, ventilationCount: 4 },
  117 │   { id: 2, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '过渡段', type: '过渡', startMileage: 'K0+200', endMileage: 'K0+400', length: 200, lightingCount: 10, ventilationCount: 4 },
  118 │   { id: 3, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '基本段', type: '基本', startMileage: 'K0+400', endMileage: 'K2+300', length: 1900, lightingCount: 95, ventilationCount: 38 },
  119 │   { id: 4, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '出口段', type: '出口', startMileage: 'K2+300', endMileage: 'K2+500', length: 200, lightingCount: 12, ventilationCount: 4 },
  120 │   { id: 5, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '入口段', type: '入口', startMileage: 'K0+000', endMileage: 'K0+180', length: 180, lightingCount: 10, ventilationCount: 4 },
  121 │   { id: 6, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', name: '基本段', type: '基本', startMileage: 'K0+180', endMileage: 'K1+620', length: 1440, lightingCount: 72, ventilationCount: 28 }
  122 │ ])
  123 │ 
  124 │ const total = computed(() => filteredData.value.length)
  125 │ 
  126 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  127 │   let result = sectionData.value
  128 │   if (filterTunnel.value) {
  129 │     result = result.filter(item => item.tunnelName === filterTunnel.value)
  130 │   }
  131 │   if (filterType.value) {
  132 │     result = result.filter(item => item.type === filterType.value)
  133 │   }
  134 │   return result
  135 │ })
  136 │ 
  137 │ const handleAdd = () => {
  138 │   formData.value = {
  139 │     tunnelName: '',
  140 │     name: '',
  141 │     type: '',
  142 │     startMileage: '',
  143 │     endMileage: '',
  144 │     designBrightness: 100
  145 │   }
  146 │   showDialog.value = true
  147 │ }
  148 │ 
  149 │ const handleEdit = (row) => {
  150 │   formData.value = { ...row }
  151 │   showDialog.value = true
  152 │ }
  153 │ 
  154 │ const handleSave = () => {
  155 │   showDialog.value = false
  156 │ }
  157 │ 
  158 │ const handleDelete = (row) => {
  159 │   console.log('Delete:', row)
  160 │ }
  161 │ 
  162 │ const handleBatchDelete = () => {
  163 │   console.log('Batch delete:', selectedRows.value)
  164 │ }
  165 │ 
  166 │ const handleViewDevices = (row) => {
  167 │   console.log('View devices:', row)
  168 │ }
  169 │ 
  170 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  171 │   selectedRows.value = val
  172 │ }
  173 │ 
  174 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  175 │   currentPage.value = 1
  176 │ }
  177 │ 
  178 │ const handleReset = () => {
  179 │   filterTunnel.value = ''
  180 │   filterType.value = ''
  181 │   currentPage.value = 1
  182 │ }
  183 │ </script>
  184 │ 
  185 │ <style scoped>
  186 │ .tunnel-section {
  187 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  188 │   min-height: 100%;
  189 │ }
  190 │ 
  191 │ .page-header {
  192 │   display: flex;
  193 │   justify-content: space-between;
  194 │   align-items: center;
  195 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  196 │ }
  197 │ 
  198 │ .page-header h2 {
  199 │   margin: 0;
  200 │   font-size: 24px;
  201 │   font-weight: 600;
  202 │   color: #333;
  203 │ }
  204 │ 
  205 │ .header-actions {
  206 │   display: flex;
  207 │   gap: 10px;
  208 │ }
  209 │ 
  210 │ .filter-bar {
  211 │   background: #ffffff;
  212 │   padding: 20px;
  213 │   border-radius: 8px;
  214 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  215 │   display: flex;
  216 │   gap: 15px;
  217 │   align-items: center;
  218 │ }
  219 │ 
  220 │ .table-wrapper {
  221 │   background: #ffffff;
  222 │   border-radius: 8px;
  223 │   padding: 20px;
  224 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  225 │ }
  226 │ 
  227 │ .pagination {
  228 │   display: flex;
  229 │   justify-content: center;
  230 │   background: #ffffff;
  231 │   padding: 20px;
  232 │   border-radius: 8px;
  233 │ }
  234 │ </style>

📄 views/tunnel/VentilationControl.vue


    1 │ <template>
    2 │   <div class="ventilation-control">
    3 │     <div class="page-header">
    4 │       <h2>通风控制</h2>
    5 │       <div class="header-actions">
    6 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBatchControl">批量控制</el-button>
    7 │         <el-button>导出数据</el-button>
    8 │       </div>
    9 │     </div>
   10 │ 
   11 │     <div class="filter-bar">
   12 │       <el-select v-model="filterTunnel" placeholder="选择隧道" style="width: 200px;" clearable>
   13 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   14 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   15 │         <el-option label="梅溪湖隧道" value="梅溪湖隧道" />
   16 │       </el-select>
   17 │       <el-select v-model="filterType" placeholder="风机类型" style="width: 150px;" clearable>
   18 │         <el-option label="射流风机" value="射流风机" />
   19 │         <el-option label="轴流风机" value="轴流风机" />
   20 │         <el-option label="屋顶风机" value="屋顶风机" />
   21 │       </el-select>
   22 │       <el-select v-model="filterStatus" placeholder="设备状态" style="width: 120px;" clearable>
   23 │         <el-option label="运行中" value="运行中" />
   24 │         <el-option label="停止" value="停止" />
   25 │         <el-option label="故障" value="故障" />
   26 │       </el-select>
   27 │       <el-button type="primary" @click="handleSearch">搜索</el-button>
   28 │       <el-button @click="handleReset">重置</el-button>
   29 │     </div>
   30 │ 
   31 │     <div class="control-summary">
   32 │       <div class="summary-card">
   33 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #409eff;">
   34 │           <el-icon :size="24"><RefreshRight /></el-icon>
   35 │         </div>
   36 │         <div class="summary-info">
   37 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.total }}</div>
   38 │           <div class="summary-label">风机总数</div>
   39 │         </div>
   40 │       </div>
   41 │       <div class="summary-card">
   42 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #67c23a;">
   43 │           <el-icon :size="24"><VideoPlay /></el-icon>
   44 │         </div>
   45 │         <div class="summary-info">
   46 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.running }}</div>
   47 │           <div class="summary-label">运行中</div>
   48 │         </div>
   49 │       </div>
   50 │       <div class="summary-card">
   51 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #f56c6c;">
   52 │           <el-icon :size="24"><CloseBold /></el-icon>
   53 │         </div>
   54 │         <div class="summary-info">
   55 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.stopped }}</div>
   56 │           <div class="summary-label">已停止</div>
   57 │         </div>
   58 │       </div>
   59 │       <div class="summary-card">
   60 │         <div class="summary-icon" style="background: #e6a23c;">
   61 │           <el-icon :size="24"><Warning /></el-icon>
   62 │         </div>
   63 │         <div class="summary-info">
   64 │           <div class="summary-value">{{ summary.fault }}</div>
   65 │           <div class="summary-label">故障数量</div>
   66 │         </div>
   67 │       </div>
   68 │     </div>
   69 │ 
   70 │     <div class="table-wrapper">
   71 │       <el-table :data="filteredData" border @selection-change="handleSelectionChange">
   72 │         <el-table-column type="selection" width="50" />
   73 │         <el-table-column prop="id" label="设备ID" width="80" />
   74 │         <el-table-column prop="tunnelName" label="所属隧道" width="120" />
   75 │         <el-table-column prop="sectionName" label="所属路段" width="100" />
   76 │         <el-table-column prop="name" label="设备名称" min-width="150" />
   77 │         <el-table-column prop="type" label="风机类型" width="100" />
   78 │         <el-table-column prop="status" label="状态" width="80">
   79 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   80 │             <el-tag :type="getStatusType(row.status)" size="small">
   81 │               {{ row.status }}
   82 │             </el-tag>
   83 │           </template>
   84 │         </el-table-column>
   85 │         <el-table-column prop="windSpeed" label="风速(m/s)" width="100" />
   86 │         <el-table-column prop="frequency" label="频率(Hz)" width="100" />
   87 │         <el-table-column prop="power" label="功率(kW)" width="100" />
   88 │         <el-table-column prop="runtime" label="运行时长(h)" width="120" />
   89 │         <el-table-column label="操作" width="200" fixed="right">
   90 │           <template #default="{ row }">
   91 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleStart(row)">启动</el-button>
   92 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleStop(row)">停止</el-button>
   93 │             <el-button type="text" size="small" @click="handleAdjust(row)">调速</el-button>
   94 │           </template>
   95 │         </el-table-column>
   96 │       </el-table>
   97 │     </div>
   98 │ 
   99 │     <div class="pagination">
  100 │       <el-pagination
  101 │         v-model:current-page="currentPage"
  102 │         v-model:page-size="pageSize"
  103 │         :total="total"
  104 │         layout="total, prev, pager, next, jumper"
  105 │       />
  106 │     </div>
  107 │ 
  108 │     <el-dialog title="批量控制" v-model="showBatchDialog" width="500px">
  109 │       <el-form :model="batchForm" label-width="100px">
  110 │         <el-form-item label="控制类型">
  111 │           <el-radio-group v-model="batchForm.type">
  112 │             <el-radio label="start">全部启动</el-radio>
  113 │             <el-radio label="stop">全部停止</el-radio>
  114 │             <el-radio label="speed">调节风速</el-radio>
  115 │           </el-radio-group>
  116 │         </el-form-item>
  117 │         <el-form-item label="风速值" v-if="batchForm.type === 'speed'">
  118 │           <el-slider v-model="batchForm.windSpeed" :min="0" :max="10" show-input />
  119 │         </el-form-item>
  120 │         <el-form-item label="执行时间">
  121 │           <el-radio-group v-model="batchForm.executeTime">
  122 │             <el-radio label="now">立即执行</el-radio>
  123 │             <el-radio label="schedule">定时执行</el-radio>
  124 │           </el-radio-group>
  125 │         </el-form-item>
  126 │         <el-form-item label="定时时间" v-if="batchForm.executeTime === 'schedule'">
  127 │           <el-date-picker
  128 │             v-model="batchForm.scheduleTime"
  129 │             type="datetime"
  130 │             placeholder="选择执行时间"
  131 │             style="width: 100%;"
  132 │           />
  133 │         </el-form-item>
  134 │       </el-form>
  135 │       <template #footer>
  136 │         <el-button @click="showBatchDialog = false">取消</el-button>
  137 │         <el-button type="primary" @click="handleBatchConfirm">确定</el-button>
  138 │       </template>
  139 │     </el-dialog>
  140 │   </div>
  141 │ </template>
  142 │ 
  143 │ <script setup>
  144 │ import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
  145 │ import { DArrowRight, RefreshRight } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
  146 │ 
  147 │ const filterTunnel = ref('')
  148 │ const filterType = ref('')
  149 │ const filterStatus = ref('')
  150 │ const selectedRows = ref([])
  151 │ const currentPage = ref(1)
  152 │ const pageSize = ref(15)
  153 │ const showBatchDialog = ref(false)
  154 │ 
  155 │ const summary = ref({
  156 │   total: 48,
  157 │   running: 12,
  158 │   stopped: 32,
  159 │   fault: 4
  160 │ })
  161 │ 
  162 │ const batchForm = ref({
  163 │   type: 'start',
  164 │   windSpeed: 5,
  165 │   executeTime: 'now',
  166 │   scheduleTime: ''
  167 │ })
  168 │ 
  169 │ const ventilationData = ref([
  170 │   { id: 1, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', name: '射流风机-001', type: '射流风机', status: '运行中', windSpeed: 5.2, frequency: 35, power: 15, runtime: 245 },
  171 │   { id: 2, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '入口段', name: '射流风机-002', type: '射流风机', status: '停止', windSpeed: 0, frequency: 0, power: 0, runtime: 189 },
  172 │   { id: 3, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', name: '轴流风机-001', type: '轴流风机', status: '运行中', windSpeed: 6.8, frequency: 45, power: 22, runtime: 456 },
  173 │   { id: 4, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '过渡段', name: '射流风机-003', type: '射流风机', status: '故障', windSpeed: 0, frequency: 0, power: 0, runtime: 0 },
  174 │   { id: 5, tunnelName: '梅溪湖隧道', sectionName: '基本段', name: '屋顶风机-001', type: '屋顶风机', status: '运行中', windSpeed: 4.5, frequency: 30, power: 11, runtime: 312 }
  175 │ ])
  176 │ 
  177 │ const total = computed(() => filteredData.value.length)
  178 │ 
  179 │ const filteredData = computed(() => {
  180 │   let result = ventilationData.value
  181 │   if (filterTunnel.value) {
  182 │     result = result.filter(item => item.tunnelName === filterTunnel.value)
  183 │   }
  184 │   if (filterType.value) {
  185 │     result = result.filter(item => item.type === filterType.value)
  186 │   }
  187 │   if (filterStatus.value) {
  188 │     result = result.filter(item => item.status === filterStatus.value)
  189 │   }
  190 │   return result
  191 │ })
  192 │ 
  193 │ const getStatusType = (status) => {
  194 │   switch (status) {
  195 │     case '运行中':
  196 │       return 'success'
  197 │     case '停止':
  198 │       return 'info'
  199 │     case '故障':
  200 │       return 'danger'
  201 │     default:
  202 │       return ''
  203 │   }
  204 │ }
  205 │ 
  206 │ const handleSearch = () => {
  207 │   currentPage.value = 1
  208 │ }
  209 │ 
  210 │ const handleReset = () => {
  211 │   filterTunnel.value = ''
  212 │   filterType.value = ''
  213 │   filterStatus.value = ''
  214 │   currentPage.value = 1
  215 │ }
  216 │ 
  217 │ const handleSelectionChange = (val) => {
  218 │   selectedRows.value = val
  219 │ }
  220 │ 
  221 │ const handleStart = (row) => {
  222 │   row.status = '运行中'
  223 │ }
  224 │ 
  225 │ const handleStop = (row) => {
  226 │   row.status = '停止'
  227 │ }
  228 │ 
  229 │ const handleAdjust = (row) => {
  230 │   console.log('Adjust:', row)
  231 │ }
  232 │ 
  233 │ const handleBatchControl = () => {
  234 │   if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) {
  235 │     alert('请先选择要控制的设备')
  236 │     return
  237 │   }
  238 │   showBatchDialog.value = true
  239 │ }
  240 │ 
  241 │ const handleBatchConfirm = () => {
  242 │   showBatchDialog.value = false
  243 │ }
  244 │ </script>
  245 │ 
  246 │ <style scoped>
  247 │ .ventilation-control {
  248 │   background: #f5f5f5;
  249 │   min-height: 100%;
  250 │ }
  251 │ 
  252 │ .page-header {
  253 │   display: flex;
  254 │   justify-content: space-between;
  255 │   align-items: center;
  256 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  257 │ }
  258 │ 
  259 │ .page-header h2 {
  260 │   margin: 0;
  261 │   font-size: 24px;
  262 │   font-weight: 600;
  263 │   color: #333;
  264 │ }
  265 │ 
  266 │ .header-actions {
  267 │   display: flex;
  268 │   gap: 10px;
  269 │ }
  270 │ 
  271 │ .filter-bar {
  272 │   background: #ffffff;
  273 │   padding: 20px;
  274 │   border-radius: 8px;
  275 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  276 │   display: flex;
  277 │   gap: 15px;
  278 │   align-items: center;
  279 │ }
  280 │ 
  281 │ .control-summary {
  282 │   display: grid;
  283 │   grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  284 │   gap: 20px;
  285 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  286 │ }
  287 │ 
  288 │ .summary-card {
  289 │   background: #ffffff;
  290 │   border-radius: 8px;
  291 │   padding: 20px;
  292 │   display: flex;
  293 │   align-items: center;
  294 │   gap: 15px;
  295 │   box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
  296 │ }
  297 │ 
  298 │ .summary-icon {
  299 │   width: 50px;
  300 │   height: 50px;
  301 │   border-radius: 10px;
  302 │   display: flex;
  303 │   align-items: center;
  304 │   justify-content: center;
  305 │   color: #ffffff;
  306 │ }
  307 │ 
  308 │ .summary-info {
  309 │   flex: 1;
  310 │ }
  311 │ 
  312 │ .summary-value {
  313 │   font-size: 28px;
  314 │   font-weight: 600;
  315 │   color: #333;
  316 │ }
  317 │ 
  318 │ .summary-label {
  319 │   font-size: 14px;
  320 │   color: #666;
  321 │   margin-top: 4px;
  322 │ }
  323 │ 
  324 │ .table-wrapper {
  325 │   background: #ffffff;
  326 │   border-radius: 8px;
  327 │   padding: 20px;
  328 │   margin-bottom: 20px;
  329 │ }
  330 │ 
  331 │ .pagination {
  332 │   display: flex;
  333 │   justify-content: center;
  334 │   background: #ffffff;
  335 │   padding: 20px;
  336 │   border-radius: 8px;
  337 │ }
  338 │ </style>
  339 │
